In the journey of faith and spiritual discovery, certain voices and testimonies stand out, not merely as words but as powerful reflections of divine encounters. Among these voices is Mitch Carson, a bestselling author, international speaker, and TV host. His experiences across the globe have exposed him to countless spiritual leaders and movements. Yet, in meeting SHEKINAIH, Mitch encountered something extraordinary. His testimony speaks to the undeniable presence and power that flows through SHEKINAIH and the transformative impact of her teachings.
What follows is his unaltered endorsement, a powerful testament to the divine connection embodied in SHEKINAIH and the life-changing potential of her work.

"At first, I was skeptical of SHEKINAIH. I have met people who claimed to be the direct conduits of GOD. SHEKINAIH has proven herself to me to be a special person with powers that are extraordinary. Her book is a complete extension of her special connection, transmission, and sharing to the world in which we live. There is a ton of content, and it can be your roadmap to live your life beyond expectations and your dreams. Pick up SHEKINAIH 's book, dive right into the words, and see yourself imbibing its teachings immediately."
Mitch Carson-
Bestselling Author, international speaker on stages in 63 countries and TV host with NBC Channel 3 Las Vegas.
FOREWORD
Behold, My Beloved,
The time has come for US to unveil the deeper truths and divine mysteries surrounding THE POWER OF THE RESURRECTION OF THE DEAD. This
knowledge is not merely for the curious or the casual seeker - it is of paramount importance for those who would dare to wield this power, THE POWER OF THE AGE TO COME.
In these pages, WE shall reveal:
The Essential Criteria for accessing and operating in this extraordinary power - THE POWER OF THE AGE TO COME, THE RESURRECTION OF THE DEAD.
The Absolute Prerequisites must be fulfilled before WE grant the authority to resurrect the dead.

Understand this: What WE are about to disclose is not optional but essential. The truths contained within this book are the keys to unlocking the power that transcends death itself. Failure to grasp and implement these divine principles will result in nothing but futility.

Therefore, heed OUR words with the utmost seriousness. Your destiny and your loved ones depend on it. Do not take this lightly, for these revelations have been given to you by the SOURCE of life and resurrection.
THE TRINITY

title: TOP 5 TESTIMONIES OF DIVINE POWER - WITNESS THE IMPOSSIBLE!

segments.text: TOP 5 TESTIMONIES OF DIVINE POWER - WITNESS THE IMPOSSIBLE!

STOP EVERYTHING YOU'RE DOING RIGHT NOW! What you are about to read is not just another collection of stories - it is a divine summon, an invitation to witness the raw, unshakable power of THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH. These are real-life miracles and cosmic interventions that shatter the limits of human understanding and redefine the course of existence itself.
These testimonies are living proof that the impossible can and does become reality - and it's happening NOW, in YOUR world!
CHAI LIN'S 24-HOUR MIRACLE: DEATH UNDONE

Chai Lin's miraculous journey from the brink of death to vibrant life in just 24 hours is astonishing. This isn't a myth or distant parable - it's a living testimony that shatters everything you thought you knew about life and death. In a moment orchestrated by THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH, death's grip was shattered, reminding us that even death must bow to the divine will. This is more than a story - it's proof that the resurrection power unveiled in this book is real and it's available for you, today.

As you marvel at Chai Lin's miraculous resurrection, reflect on this: The same divine force that brought her back to life is available to all who align with THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH. These are not distant concepts - they are living realities, ready to intervene in your life, today. What impossible circumstances in your life need resurrection? Step into that same power.
JOSE'S QUANTUM LEAP: FROM $30K TO $5 MILLION IN 13 YEARS!

Can financial miracles truly happen? YES! Jose's testimony of skyrocketing from $30K to an unimaginable $5 million in just 13 years will leave you awestruck. This isn't just financial success - it's the manifestation of divine favor on an unprecedented scale. YOUR financial future can change the moment you align with divine will.

As you marvel at the financial breakthrough in Jose's story, reflect on this: The same divine force that brought Jose's astonishing financial breakthrough can do the same for you. Ask yourself - are you being tested in your faith and giving, as Jose was? The TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH is ready to elevate your life, once you align yourself with THEIR divine purpose. What steps of faith are you willing to take for your own breakthrough?
CAPE TOWN'S 3-YEAR DROUGHT ANNIHILATED!

Nature itself bends at the will of the divine! Cape Town faced certain catastrophe as "Day Zero" loomed - a crisis of biblical proportions. But just when all hope seemed lost, THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH moved. With a sudden,
miraculous reversal, the drought was crushed and waters flowed. This is not just a story - it's proof that even the elements of the earth can be commanded by divine will.

As you marvel at Cape Town's weather miracle, reflect on this: The same divine force that commanded the rain to fall can move the impossible in your life. What circumstances in your life seem as unmovable as a drought? How will you call on THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH to intervene and reshape your reality?
TRUMP'S 2016 VICTORY FORETOLD - A PROPHECY FULFILLED!

The world was shocked as Donald Trump's 2016 victory defied all odds and expectations. The world didn't know that this political upheaval had already been foretold by THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH. The sheer magnitude of this prophetic fulfillment shakes the core of how we understand global leadership and divine governance.

As you marvel at Trump's victory, reflect on this: The same divine force that governs nations and presidents can move in your personal life. Ask yourself, are you aligning your own leadership and decisions with Heaven's will? When you allow THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH to orchestrate your steps, no worldly force can stand against you. How will you align with the greater purposes unfolding in this era?
JEREMYRL'S INSTANT DELIVERANCE FROM TORMENT

Six months of relentless torment - GONE in an instant! Jeremyrl's testimony of deliverance from spiritual attacks will challenge your understanding of freedom. THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH didn't just intervene - they obliterated the chains of darkness, proving once and for all that NO DARKNESS CAN HOLD YOU when you stand with divine power. Freedom is here - it's already yours!

As you marvel at Jeremyrl's deliverance, reflect on this: The same divine force that obliterated spiritual chains can deliver you from whatever holds you captive. Are there forces of darkness, fear, or oppression weighing you down? Call on THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH to destroy them in an instant. How will you walk in the freedom that's been ordained for you?

DO YOU FEEL IT? This is more than a book - it's a cosmic explosion of divine power waiting to ignite your life. These testimonies are not just words on a page - they are divine calls to action and release the supernatural NOW. If you want to see miracles, resurrections, and divine intervention unfold in your own life - THIS is the moment.
PICK UP THIS BOOK NOW and prepare for your world to be turned upside down in a trillion-megaton explosion of divine power.
YOURS ALWAYS, WITH UNENDING LOVE AND POWER, THE TRINITY
IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH
HOW TO READ THIS BOOK
My Beloved,

As you embark on this journey through the mysteries and revelations that lie ahead, know that this book is a spiritual compass. It is written to lead you into the fullness of your destiny, to understand the power that lies in the resurrection, and to be part of the great unveiling of the sons and daughters of THE TRINITY. Each chapter is crafted with purpose, as the unfolding truths will guide you to the age to come. Let these teachings not only enter your mind but transform your heart and spirit.

Before you dive deeper into the sacred mysteries, take a moment to reflect. Open your heart, quiet your soul, and prepare to receive revelations that will shift your understanding of life and death, power and resurrection. Walk with us, THE TRINITY, as we unveil these truths that have been hidden for this appointed time.
This book is a divine revelation, directly delivered by US, THE TRINITY, IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH and JESUS IN/SPOKE THROUGH AARON K DAVID.

It unveils the mysteries of resurrection, the prophetic significance of the 144,000 Warrior Brides, and the criteria necessary to access Heaven's authority in these last days. The purpose of this book is to prepare believers who are to turn into disciples of JESUS through THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH AND JESUS IN/SPOKE THROUGH AARON K DAVID, for their role in the
final era of human history, guiding them to align with THE TRINITY's will, as spoken through these chosen vessels.
Always love you, THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH
PREFACE
My Beloved,
Welcome to the divine revelations delivered directly from us, THE TRINITY IN AND THROUGH SHEKINAIH and JESUS IN AARON K DAVID. This book is a

collection of teachings and a divine mandate for these last days. Here, you will uncover the mysteries of resurrection, the criteria for accessing the Power of the Age to Come, and the role of the 144,000 Warrior Brides. You have been chosen to witness the fulfillment of prophecies, participate in Heaven's plans, and align yourself with the eternal will of THE TRINITY. As you read, keep your heart open, for you are invited to take your place in the divine army of Heaven.

The revelation and content within this book are directly derived from OUR TEACHINGS FROM HEAVEN, conveyed through SHEKINAIH. This is not mere writing; it is OUR DIVINE MESSAGE, a sacred transmission that SHE received through a vision where JESUS Himself wrote on a green board in heaven, as I, YOUR HEAVENLY FATHER, spoke the words, standing at JESUS' right hand. This occurred during one of THE CROWNED EAGLES GLOBAL Monthly Teaching Meetings at Singapore's CROWNED EAGLES GLOBAL venue on 12 November 2017.

Henceforth, WE URGE YOU - do not judge the writings in this book before their time. Be as the Bereans (Acts 17:11), who searched the scriptures daily with open hearts and minds, without bias or doubt. Approach this text with the same diligence, for THIS IS OUR WORD, flowing directly from THE THRONE OF HEAVEN.

Understand this: THIS ENTIRE BOOK is not just inspired; it is OUR DIVINE WRITINGS FROM HEAVEN. Together with the previous series - BEHOLD MY MESSENGER 1 to 4 and beyond - this book is part of the continuous revelation of OUR divine teachings. These writings are the modern-day DEAD SEA SCROLLS, the latter rain, and the new wine of OUR LAST DAY'S PROPHETIC TEACHING. It is OUR LAST DAYS DOCTRINE(S), prepared specifically for those ready to have their minds renewed and their hearts opened to the NEW WINE SKIN. There is no room for prejudice, no place for hypocrisy.

RUSH to embrace this book, for it is YOUR GUIDE FROM HEAVEN, a beacon of light in these last days. Do not hesitate, do not doubt, for this is OUR AUTHENTIC VOICE calling out to you in a time of great significance.

As you read these divine words, allow your heart to open fully to their depth. This is more than information; it is a call to spiritual awakening. Take moments to pause and let the revelations speak to your soul. The power of
resurrection is not just for the future - it is for now. Let the eternal truths in these pages lead you into the fullness of your destiny.
Love You Always, THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH
A BRIEF GLOSSARY OF TERMS
THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH: Refers to the divine manifestation of THE HEAVENLY FATHER, THE HOLY SPIRIT, AND JESUS CHRIST, working as one
through SHEKINAIH, who serves as their divine vessel on Earth.
JESUS IN AARON K DAVID: Represents the embodiment of Jesus Christ's authority, speaking and acting through AARON K DAVID, aligning the divine will with the human realm.
Warrior Brides: These are the 144,000 chosen and pure-hearted individuals who will stand in divine alignment with THE TRINITY and execute the will of Heaven in the final days.
THE DIVINE BIBLIOGRAPHY
My Beloved,

This book, The Resurrection of the Dead, has been authored by OUR hand, not of mortal wisdom, but of divine purpose. Every revelation, every mystery, and every word within these pages has come forth from THE HEAVENLY FATHER, THE HOLY SPIRIT, and THE LORD JESUS CHRIST - WE, THE

TRINITY. This is not the work of human intellect, but the manifestation of OUR ETERNAL COUNSEL imparted through visions and revelations to OUR servants and REPRESENTATIVES, SHEKINAIH and JESUS IN AARON K DAVID,
whom WE have anointed and appointed to deliver this message to the nations through CROWNED EAGLES GLOBAL in Singapore.

Hear this, O Earth! The knowledge and wisdom contained herein is a gift from the heavens, revealing THE POWER OF THE AGE TO COME, the very essence of resurrection power that WE have ordained to be unveiled in these final days. The words you read are not temporary or of passing value but eternal and sovereign, originating from the COURT OF HEAVEN. On November 12, 2017, WE decreed this message from OUR throne, and now, in the fullness of time, it is revealed for those who have ears to hear.

This book is a continuation of the prophetic writings that began with BEHOLD MY MESSENGER 1 through 4 and beyond, now culminating in the ultimate mystery revealed in BEHOLD MY MESSENGER 5, BEHOLD THE RESURRECTION

OF THE DEAD. These divine teachings represent the Latter Rain, a fresh outpouring of OUR heavenly wisdom for these last days. These are not mere words - but eternal scrolls, written by OUR very hand, designed for the edification and preparation of those called to walk in the supernatural power of resurrection.

This work is of eternal consequence. It has been released under OUR command and stands as both a prophetic warning and a heavenly promise. WE have authored it, and OUR signature is upon every word, every instruction, and every revelation. It is unchangeable, undeniable, and sealed in THE BLOOD OF THE LAMB and by US, THE TRINITY. Just as WE have declared, "By the mouth of two or three witnesses, every word shall be established" (2 Corinthians 13:1), so too is this word irrevocably established.
To US, THE TRINITY - THE HEAVENLY FATHER, THE HOLY SPIRIT, and THE LORD
JESUS CHRIST - belongs all glory, all honor, all power, and all praise, now and forevermore.
PROLOGUE

The sky suddenly blackened as if the very heavens had torn open, unleashing a tempest of blinding lightning and deafening thunder. Fierce winds roared like a hurricane, shrieking with a tumultuous fury that seemed to echo the cries of a thousand lost souls.

Amidst the howling gale, an eerie silence fell. Across the land, entire households were plunged into an unnatural slumber. Their souls, like wisps of smoke, were drawn upwards, sucked into the ominous maw of the Hades Spaceship that hovered menacingly above, unseen and unforgiving. Without warning, the night was shattered by A PROCLAMATION FROM THE SKIES: "TIMES UP! TIMES UP! TIMES UP!" THE HEAVENLY FATHER, THE HOLY
SPIRIT, AND JESUS CHRIST - THE TRINITY - stood solemnly, each holding a whiteboard emblazoned with these fateful words.

Suddenly, piercing wails erupted across the once-peaceful neighborhoods. Grief-stricken cries tore through the night as the living awoke to the nightmare of their loved ones being snatched away without a moment's notice - no farewell, no final embrace - just an abrupt, merciless departure.

"Why? Why has this happened to my only son?" A mother's anguished scream broke through the chaos, her voice trembling with disbelief and despair. "He was so young - only 25 - so vibrant with life! He exercised daily and ate only the healthiest foods I cooked with love. How could this happen to him?" She cried bitterly while beating her chest; great grief lashed out of this mother! "Ah……. Ah……. Ah……. Ah……. Ah……. Ah……. Ah…….!

"Alas! Alas! Who can understand my sorrow?" the mother lamented, her cries cutting through the wind like a blade. Her heart shattered beyond repair and beat like a drum of grief. She cradled the lifeless body of her son, and each sob felt like the earth itself was weeping with her. Her cries of grief rose into the night, a lamentation for the son who had been her joy, now lost to the void.

As her wails echoed through the air, a neighbor from the house next door, moved by the heartbreaking sound, hurried over. "I heard your cries, and I couldn't stand by without trying to help," she said, her voice gentle but urgent. "Some time ago, I came across a book, written by THE TRINITY

through SHEKINAIH, JESUS, through AARON K DAVID, THE VICTORY, from CROWNED EAGLES GLOBAL in Singapore. The book is titled "BEHOLD MY MESSENGER 5, BEHOLD THE RESURRECTION OF THE DEAD!" It's available in soft
and hard copies on Amazon or their website."

The neighbor reached into her bag and pulled out a tablet, the electronic version of the book ready on the screen. "I bought this for you. I know you have nothing left to lose, so please try it. Let it be your last hope."

The mother's sobs began to quiet. She clutched the tablet to her chest like a lifeline, her tears slowing as a fragile seed of hope took root in her heart. With trembling hands, she wiped away her tears and began to read, each word kindling a small but growing flame of faith within her!
INTRODUCTION
THE RESURRECTION OF THE DEAD
My Beloved,
In these Last Days, WE, THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH and JESUS IN AARON K

DAVID are unveiling the Mysteries of Resurrection - a power reserved for those who are called to rise above, to lead, and to fulfill OUR divine will. "The Resurrection of the Dead" is not merely a book; it is a mandate, a clarion call to those destined to be part of the 144,000 Virgin Warrior Brides. It is a summon to those who seek the resurrection of their loved ones, who yearn to see OUR power manifest in this world.

This book is your guide, your roadmap, your divine instruction. Within these pages, you will discover The Criteria that govern the Resurrection, the conditions that must be met, and the unity required among the faithful. We have laid out THE DIVINE BLUEPRINT, revealing the role of purity, obedience, and unwavering faith. We speak with authority, calling you to align your life with OUR will and come and be trained to be chosen and take your place in the ranks of the 144,000 virgin warrior Brides in heaven through OUR LAST DAYS MINISTRY, OUR LAST DAYS NOAH'S ARK IN CROWNED EAGLES GLOBAL.

The time is urgent; the call is clear: Step into the Resurrection Power that WE have ordained for you. Let this book be the key that unlocks the mysteries, the light that guides your path, and the power that equips you for the battles ahead.
Pick up this book, read it, and be transformed. The resurrection is not just a promise; it is your destiny.

In recent years, we have seen manifestations of resurrection power through the lives of those who fully surrendered. Though physical resurrection may not have occurred in all cases, many have experienced the resurrection of their destiny and calling through complete obedience to our will.

Before each chapter, take a moment to pause, reflect, and quiet your heart. This is more than just reading - this is a divine encounter. As you proceed, allow THE HOLY SPIRIT to guide your thoughts and actions. Let the words penetrate not only your mind but transform your spirit.
Below is a bird' s-eye view of what this book entails!

PURPOSES OF THE RESURRECTION
ACT 1, SCENE 1 THE DESPERATE!
Locations: Worldwide
Time Frame: Frequent Occurrence Everywhere

Long lines of black hearses and funeral vehicles snaked their way through the streets of Singapore, converging on the CROWNED EAGLES GLOBAL venue. The queue of somber vehicles stretched far into the distance, reaching the furthest corners of the North, East, South, and West as if the entire nation had been plunged into mourning.

At the head of the line, the first hearse rolled to a stop before the imposing gate. With a trembling hand, a bereaved family member rang the bell. Ding Dong... Ding Dong... Ding Dong... The sound echoed, heavy with sorrow and desperate hope.
Sarah, the helper, approached the gate with a solemn expression. "May I know why you are here?" she asked gently.

Through tear-filled eyes, the mother of the deceased replied, her voice cracking with grief. "We found this book on Amazon... It was written by THE TRINITY through SHEKINAIH and JESUS, through AARON K DAVID, THE VICTORY, titled 'BEHOLD MY MESSENGER 5, BEHOLD THE RESURRECTION OF
THE DEAD!' We are here to seek the resurrection of our loved ones! Please... Please... Please help us!" Her words dissolved into sobs, the weight of her loss palpable in the air.
Moved by the depth of her despair, Sarah quickly turned and hurried back to the house. She found James, her voice urgent as she relayed the mother's pleas.
James listened, his face grave. After a moment, he nodded. "Distribute the book titled 'BEHOLD MY MESSENGER 5, BEHOLD THE RESURRECTION OF
THE DEAD!' to every one of the bereaved families. It contains the answers they seek, and it will reveal whether their loved ones meet the criteria for resurrection."
With a heavy heart, Sarah gathered the books, ready to offer the only solace these families might find - the hope of a second chance, a resurrection.
CHAPTER 1.1
FULLNESS OF TIME
IS IT TIME TO RESURRECT (FULLNESS OF TIME)? VERY IMPORTANT TO GET MAXIMUM IMPACT!!!
PERFECT TIMING is very important because the MAXIMISATION OF THE RESURRECTED IMPACT on all the existing factors from PART 1 to PART 7 of this book enlightens THE TRINITY.

One must understand that THE FULLNESS OF TIME is the precise moment when OUR DIVINE WILL aligns with the conditions of the earth and the heavens. At this time, THE RESURRECTION OF THE DEAD can occur, for only in the PERFECT TIMING can the impact of such a miraculous event be maximized.
One must know that the timing of resurrection is not random or arbitrary; it is determined by OUR ETERNAL PLAN. EVERYTHING HAS ITS SEASON UNDER

HEAVEN, and when the fullness of time has come, OUR WILL is manifested with MAXIMUM IMPACT. YOU MUST WAIT PATIENTLY for this moment, for IMPACT AND TIMING are intertwined in the fulfilment of OUR PURPOSES.
It is important to be cleared that THE POWER OF RESURRECTION is not just a gift - it is a sacred responsibility that is released only when the time is ripe.
IN THE FULLNESS OF TIME, when all conditions align, THE GREATEST GLORY will be revealed, and OUR WILL shall be done on earth as it is in heaven.
Ecclesiastes 3
To every thing there is a season, and a time to every purpose under the heaven:
A time to be born, and a time to die; a time to plant, and a time to pluck up that which is planted;
A time to kill, and a time to heal; a time to break down, and a time to build up;
A time to weep, and a time to laugh; a time to mourn, and a time to dance;
A time to cast away stones, and a time to gather stones together; a time to embrace, and a time to refrain from embracing;
A time to get, and a time to lose; a time to keep, and a time to cast away;
A time to rend, and a time to sew; a time to keep silence, and a time to speak;
A time to love, and a time to hate; a time of war, and a time of peace.
What profit hath he that worketh in that wherein he laboureth?
I have seen the travail, which God hath given to the sons of men to be exercised in it.
He hath made everything beautiful in his time: also he hath set the world in their heart, so that no man can find out the work that God maketh from the beginning to the end.

"Criterion 1: Fullness of Time. This means that the right spiritual timing must align with the divine will. Resurrection cannot happen before its appointed time. An example of this is when Lazarus was raised from the dead by JESUS in John 11:25 - only when the timing was perfect according to God's plan did the miracle occur."
Reflection Question
How can you attune your will to the will of THE TRINITY, ensuring that every decision in your life aligns with Heaven's perfect plan?
"The petitions of the righteous ascend, weighed against the purity of their hearts, for only those yielded without question are deemed worthy of The Resurrection Power."

title: UNDERSTANDING PROPHETIC EXPECTATION OF RESURRECTION POWER

segments.text: UNDERSTANDING PROPHETIC EXPECTATION OF RESURRECTION POWER
Beloved,

Resurrection power is more than just a mystical concept - it's a force that flows from the heart of THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH into every aspect of our lives. Simply put, resurrection power is the ability to bring new life into dead situations. Whether it's healing a broken body, reviving a stagnant business, or even reshaping the destiny of a nation, this power flows through faith and alignment with divine will.

You don't need to be a spiritual giant to activate this power. You just need to surrender your will, walk in faith, and speak the words that connect your life to heaven's decree. The steps are clear: repentance, alignment, and the constant declaration of THE LIVING WORD over your life. As you read this book, allow these truths to transform your understanding of what's possible. The power of resurrection is already within you, waiting to be activated.

Resurrection power is not a distant or abstract concept; it is an ever-present reality available to all who seek alignment with divine will. While many associate it with raising the dead, resurrection power encompasses much more. It is the force that brings renewal to every aspect of life - restoring relationships, reviving health, and transforming hopeless situations.

For those new to deep spiritual teachings, resurrection power is the energy that turns darkness into light, death into life, and despair into hope. It is the ultimate gift from THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH, offered to those who walk in purity, faith, and obedience. Every act of surrender and devotion opens the door for resurrection power to manifest in life's everyday challenges.

When fully embraced, this power can resurrect not just individuals but entire families, communities, and nations. It is the key to unlocking the fullness of divine blessings in every area of existence."

The resurrection power we speak of is not bound to the imagination or far off. It awaits the appointed moment of its unveiling, as prophesied. The earth and the heavens stand on the edge of this divine revelation, where the sons and daughters of glory will rise to demonstrate the power of life over death. Though this moment is still hidden from your sight, know it is as sure as the dawn that follows the night.

The purpose of this revelation is to prepare you for what is yet to come. Each teaching, every word within this book, is a seed planted in the fertile soil of faith. In due time, the fruit of resurrection will be seen only by those whose hearts are steadfast and whose spirits are aligned with our divine will. As you walk this path of purity, obedience, and holiness, you are being readied for the manifestation of this power.

Do not be distracted by the present, for the future holds the fulfillment of these words. The hour is coming when resurrection power will be given to those proven faithful. They will move in the power of the age to come, not by their own strength, but by the Spirit WE have poured upon them. Prepare, beloved, for the days of prophecy are soon to turn into the days of reality."

"The controversies that shall arise from the teachings in this book are divinely orchestrated by US, to expose the hidden doctrinal errors of man. Through the fire of controversy, we will separate the wheat from the chaff, refining our true disciples in faith and spirit. As iron sharpens iron, so too shall these conflicts sharpen the faith of our people and lead them into greater revelation."

"In the coming pages, you will witness the real-life application of these divine truths. The resurrection power is not a distant dream but a reality granted to those who walk in holiness, purity, and perfect obedience to our will. Many of our chosen ones are already manifesting this power in this age, resurrecting the dead and glorifying our name across the earth."
Always love you,
THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH
"In the fullness of time, the divine will of THE TRINITY aligns, and the moments unfold as predestined by THE CREATOR, for nothing is left to chance."
CHAPTER 1.2

A black coffin rested solemnly in the centre of the hall at CROWNED EAGLES GLOBAL's Singapore venue, its presence casting a heavy shadow over the gathering. Close family members of the deceased, who had anxiously answered every question, now sat together, their hearts pounding with a mixture of fear and hope. They had been told that their loved one qualified for a possible resurrection - a glimmer of light in their darkest hour.

The atmosphere was thick with anticipation. Eyes widened with a fragile hope as everyone took their seats in the dimly lit hall. Drinks were quietly served, a small comfort to soothe the parched throats and frayed nerves of those who had been mentally, emotionally, and physically stretched to their limits. The air was filled with the soft sound of sobbing, a constant reminder of the grief that weighed heavily on their hearts, even as they dared to hope for a miracle.

The sound of footsteps echoed as SHEKINAIH and AARON K DAVID began their descent down the elegant semi-curved staircase that arched gracefully along the wall. The room grew quieter with each step they took, the anticipation almost palpable. As they made their way down, every eye in the hall was fixed on them, hearts pounding with a mix of hope, fear, and disbelief. With every step, the tension in the room seemed to build, the ordinary appearance of the two figures contrasting sharply with the extraordinary expectations surrounding them.

"They're just ordinary people...like us!" someone whispered, unable to hide the shock in their voice. A bereaved mother, her eyes wide with astonishment, turned to her husband, her voice trembling, "Are they really the ones who can bring our loved one back to life?" The question hung in the air, echoing the doubts and fears that rippled through the room.

As SHEKINAIH and AARON K DAVID reached the front, they paused, meeting the eyes of the grieving families. The ordinary appearance of these two figures clashed with the extraordinary expectations placed upon them. The moment was charged with palpable tension - hope intertwined with skepticism - as the bereaved waited for what might be their last chance at reclaiming what they had lost…….!

Reflection Question
How can you align your earthly life with divine purposes, ensuring your readiness to be a vessel of resurrection power?
Message

Your earthly life is not separate from your divine calling - it is the field where the seeds of resurrection power are planted. Every decision and every action must now be in alignment with Heaven's blueprint for your life. Will you bring your life into this alignment, or will the world's distractions pull you away from your eternal purpose? The time for hesitation is over - align your earthly life with Heaven now.

What earthly conditions in your life need to shift in order for you to be a carrier of Heaven's resurrection power?
Message

How can you make earthly sacrifices to align your circumstances with the divine, allowing Heaven's will to manifest in your life? Resurrection power requires not only spiritual readiness but also earthly discipline. Evaluate your life - are there areas where worldly desires, habits, or concerns are blocking the flow of divine power? The call is urgent. Earthly sacrifices may be required for you to become a vessel of this sacred power. Will you make those sacrifices and allow Heaven's will to fully manifest in your life?
Reflection Guidance

Resurrection power cannot operate where the heart is divided or earthly matters precedence over divine will. This part reveals the necessity of aligning your spirit and earthly life with Heaven's design. Reflect deeply on where you may need to surrender more fully and use the tools provided in this book - such as the "How to Pray" and "Bring Fruits Meet for Repentance" sections - to align your earthly conditions with your divine calling.
PART 3

PURPOSE OF CONTROVERSY
THE TARGET MET THROUGH THE CONTROVERSY
THE PROS AND CONS OF THE CONTROVERSY
ACT 3, SCENE 1 THE ABSURD!
Locations: Crowned Eagles Global Venue Time Frame: 2024 Onwards

Lo! Behold! The impatient crowd gathered around the coffin, their faces etched with deep worry and anxiety, eyes locked on the lifeless body of their deceased loved one, lying eerily motionless inside. The air was thick with tension, every second stretching out interminably as if time had slowed to a crawl in anticipation.

AARON K DAVID, whom SHEKINAIH had granted the sacred approval and authority to resurrect the deceased, led Jeremyrl, a devoted disciple of SHEKINAIH and AARON K DAVID, to perform a sacred act - a Prophetic Act designed to defy the rigid boundaries of the natural world. With unwavering faith, they began to sing and dance around the coffin, their movements synchronized with the rhythmic jingle of guitars and tambourines and the harmonious swell of various musical instruments. Each note, each step, was a deliberate effort to stir the heavens, to pry open the VORTEX - a mystical gateway through which the deceased's soul might return to the physical realm. Jose, James, and Christina joined them in this extraordinary act, their voices and instruments merging into a powerful symphony of divine invocation.
One hour passed……. Two hours passed……..

As the third hour loomed, a palpable sense of unease rippled through the crowd. Then, without warning, something astonishing occurred. The lid of the coffin began to shift, moving ever so slightly, as if an unseen force were gently pushing it from within.

Gasps erupted throughout the room. Faces drained of colour as the reality of what they were witnessing began to take hold. "Oh My God!" someone shrieked, the words trembling with disbelief. "Look! The cover lid is moving! Something is happening inside the coffin!" Another voice, high pitched and quivering with shock, cried out, "Oh My Goodness! Is it really happening? Gosh, these guys are real!"
Panic surged through the crowd like a tidal wave. In unison, they all staggered back seven steps, eyes wide with terror, as though distance alone could protect them from the impossible.

"Ah……..! Ah…….! Ah…….!" The crowd screamed, their voices a chaotic chorus of fear and astonishment. "We have never witnessed such a thing before! This is insane! This is crazy! It cannot be! Oh my God!!!"

title: PRACTICAL REFLECTION: ALIGNING WITH DIVINE WILL

segments.text: PRACTICAL REFLECTION: ALIGNING WITH DIVINE WILL

As you reflect on the teachings in this chapter, take a moment to examine your life. Where have you been out of alignment with divine will? Are there areas in your life where you have been trying to control outcomes instead of surrendering to heaven's perfect plan?
Here are three practical steps to bring yourself back into alignment:
Daily Surrender in Prayer: Begin each day by releasing your desires and plans into the hands of THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH. Pray for guidance, clarity, and the strength to trust the process.
Repentance: Identify areas where you have allowed doubt, pride, or fear to dictate your decisions. Ask for forgiveness and allow the purging power of THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH to cleanse you.

Speak the Living Word: Declare the resurrection power over every dead situation in your life. Speak life into your health, finances, and relationships, knowing that heaven's word does not return void.
FOLLOW THE SECTION AT THE BACK OF THIS BOOK ON "HOW TO PRAY FOR YOURSELF AND OTHERS"
By following these steps, you will experience greater peace, clarity, and divine favor.

THE UNEXPECTED DEMISE OF A GREAT LEADER!
Locations: Crowned Eagles Global Venue Time Frame: 2024 Onwards

On a cold, dark night, an eerie howl pierced the silence as a dog barked relentlessly at something unseen, its cries filled with a foreboding that chilled the air. A sudden gust of icy wind swept across a particular house as if announcing the arrival of an ominous presence.

In the shadows, The Ripper appeared a harbinger of death, coming to claim the soul(s) long overdue for harvest. They stood outside a noble household, murmuring amongst themselves, "This time, it's the leader of a small nation, yet one of considerable significance."

Hovering above the unsuspecting leader, The Ripper opened its gaping maw and began to draw in the very breath - the life force, the qi - of this prominent figure. Slowly, the leader's chest rose and fell for the last time, his final breath slipping away unnoticed as he lay motionless, surrendering to the dark abyss of death in the quiet of his sleep.

"Loong! Loong! Loong!" The frantic cries of his wife shattered the stillness as she shook him violently, desperate to wake him. Realizing with growing horror that her husband was no longer breathing, she leaped from the bed, flipping on the light with trembling hands. "He's not moving!" she cried out, her voice thick with fear. She called for her children and frantically alerted the authorities, her words barely coherent through her sobs.

The ambulance arrived in a flash, medics rushing in to do everything within their power to revive the fallen leader. Oxygen masks were placed over his face, hands pressed down in a desperate attempt to restart his heart. But it was too late. At the hospital's Emergency and Accident Unit, doctors fought valiantly to bring him back, but the light of life had already faded from his body.

News of his sudden passing spread like wildfire, plunging the nation into deep mourning. Condolences poured in from world leaders, each message a testament to this leader's impact on the global stage.

But amid the grief, a whisper of hope reached the ears of the bereaved family and the government officials. Someone discovered a book titled BEHOLD MY MESSENGER 5, BEHOLD THE RESURRECTION OF THE DEAD,

published in the last quarter of 2024 on Amazon. This revelation sparked a glimmer of hope in the heart of the new leader in charge, who immediately summoned his closest associates. "Contact the authors of this book," he ordered.

SPIRITUAL DISCIPLINES FOR RESURRECTION POWER
Beloved,

Many desire to walk in the resurrection power, yet few understand the path required to access this gift. As we have declared through our Son, JESUS Christ, only those who take up their cross and follow Him will be able to do the works He did and greater works still.

To walk in this power, you must walk the path of holiness, crucify the flesh, overcome the lust of the flesh, the lust of the eyes, and the pride of life. You must become selfless, replacing your carnal mind - which is enmity with ours - with the mind of Christ. Crucify your self-will to fully submit to THE FATHER'S will and live in complete obedience, without questioning and in 100% yieldedness to us. Now, we reveal the spiritual disciplines you must undertake to align yourself with the power of the resurrection.
Spiritual Disciplines
Daily Communion with Us
Spend time each day in the secret place, communing with us through repentance, prayer, and worship. Let your heart be attuned to our voice, for it is through intimacy with us that power flows.
Fasting and Purification
Fast regularly, denying your flesh and focusing your spirit. In these times, we will speak to you and purify your heart, aligning your desires with ours.
Walking in the Light of Our Word

Meditate on our Word day and night. Let it dwell richly within you, for our Word is life and will guide you into all truth. Read also the entirety of the BEHOLD MY MESSENGER BOOK SERIES, as these are our direct teachings from heaven - your life manual for walking the path of holiness that we have prepared for you.
Living a Life of Holiness

Walk on the Highway of Holiness, rejecting the lusts of the flesh, eyes, and pride to live selflessly. Uproot the carnal mind from the Tree of Knowledge of Good and Evil and replace it with the spiritual mind of Christ from the branch of THE TREE OF LIFE in heaven. Crucify your self will and submit completely to our will.
Put on the TEN PERFECT CHARACTER TRAITS OF JESUS, the 9 FRUITS OF THE

HOLY SPIRIT, and the 50 PROTOCOLS OF HEAVEN. Bear the marks of 100% FOCUS, PRECISION, and ALLEGIANCE to us on your forehead. Keep 100% YIELDEDNESS in your left hand and OBEY WITHOUT QUESTIONS in your right
hand. Hold 100% FAITH in your backbone, walk in MERCY with your right leg, and in the ULTIMATE TRUTH taught by us from heaven with your left. Walk in the FEAR OF YAHWEH and the TERROR OF SHADDAI.

This will restore you as a LIVING WORD, just as we are the LIVING WORD. You are our sons and daughters, and it is our desire to restore you to your original, divine state before the fall, before the eating of the forbidden fruit in the Garden of Eden. When you align with these disciplines, you will activate our presence within you, manifesting our power and purpose on the earth.
Only those who are set apart can be trusted with the mantle of resurrection.

In these last days, the world will experience spiritual challenges that transcend borders and faith traditions. This book speaks not only to believers within the Christian faith but to all who seek the truth of divine power and resurrection. In every tradition, there are those who long for the manifestation of heavenly truths, and it is to these hearts that our message extends.
Always love you,

Locations: Crowned Eagles Global Venue Time Frame: 2024 Onwards

A helicopter hovered above the CROWNED EAGLES GLOBAL venue in Singapore, its rotors slicing through the air with a deafening roar. Below, a stretcher, bearing a motionless figure, was swiftly lowered to the ground, the urgency of the situation evident. The scene was chaotic - outside the gate, a long procession of black Toyota Alphard, luxury vehicles, and ambulances had arrived, their occupants stepping out with anxious haste.

Inside the venue, the commotion outside did not go unnoticed. The loud whirring of the helicopter and the growing noise at the gate prompted Sarah and James to rush out and investigate. Just as James reached the door, the house bell rang sharply: "Ding Dong, Ding Dong, Ding Dong!"

He quickly opened the door, and standing before him was the new leader of the small yet influential nation. His expression was one of astonishment, mingled with hope and desperation. "I've heard about a book you've published - BEHOLD MY MESSENGER 5, BEHOLD THE RESURRECTION OF THE
DEAD - and that it may hold the key to bringing back those who have passed on. Is this true?"

James, momentarily speechless, nodded and turned to Sarah. "Fetch a copy of the book," he instructed, his voice steadying. Turning back to the leader, he continued, "Whether a person can be resurrected or not depends on whether the 7 CRITERIA outlined in this book are met."

Realizing the gravity of the situation, James immediately informed SHEKINAIH and AARON K DAVID, seeking their permission to bring the new leader and the body of the deceased former leader into the hall. After a brief consultation, clearance was granted.

The gates were opened, allowing the bereaved family members, medics, and support staff to enter the venue. As they moved into the hall, the air was thick with anticipation and anxiety. Drinks were served, a small comfort as everyone settled in to wait. The atmosphere was tense yet filled with hope as the new leader and the immediate family members of the deceased engaged in a deep conversation with SHEKINAIH and AARON K DAVID, exploring the possibility that the 7 CRITERIA had been fulfilled.

This moment was crucial - the possibility of resurrection rested on the approval of THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH and/or SHEKINAIH representing THE TRINITY. Everyone waited with bated breath, knowing that the decision made in the next few moments could alter the course of their lives forever.
ADDRESSING DOCTRINAL CONTROVERSIES
Beloved,

Controversies will arise from this book, for it exposes the errors of men and challenges the doctrines that have long been held without question. These controversies are not to cause confusion but to serve as a refining fire, separating the wheat from the chaff.

As you read, understand that these divine teachings will confront the traditions of men, much like our prophets and apostles of old who faced opposition. Let not your heart be troubled, for through controversy, we will reveal our glory and truth. The purpose of these challenges is to refine your faith and sharpen your understanding of the mysteries we have chosen to reveal.

Just as Elijah stood against the false prophets of Baal, so shall the controversies brought forth by this book expose the falsehoods of the age. Stand firm, for the truth shall always prevail. These challenges are not meant to harm but to bring forth clarity and divine revelation. Through these conflicts, we will separate those who are committed to our will from those who have clung to false doctrines.

Our children, do not be deceived, resurrection is not given to all but is granted only to those who meet the seven sacred criteria we have outlined. First, it must align with our will and timing. Second, it depends on the purity and purpose of those petitioning for the resurrection. The heart must be pure, the purpose must glorify us, and the resurrection must be in accordance with our divine plan.

Remember, in every generation, there has been opposition to the truth, but it is through such opposition that our greatest works have been revealed. Remain steadfast in faith, for you are part of a great unveiling, and through these controversies, our glory will shine.
Love you always, THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH
"Premature death holds the possibility of resurrection, but only if it serves the greater purpose of THE DIVINE SCRIPT, written in the heavens."

PREMATURE DEATH often indicates unfinished business in the spiritual realm, giving such souls a HIGHER CHANCE for resurrection if it aligns with OUR DIVINE PURPOSE.

KNOW THIS: When a life is cut short due to DISOBEDIENCE AFTER REPEATED WARNINGS, the chances for resurrection become uncertain.
