OUR MERCY IS GREAT, but it must be aligned with OUR DIVINE ORDER and the greater good. THOSE WHO ABUSED THEIR LIVES FOR FLESHLY INDULGENCE may find NEUTRAL CHANCES, but OUR DECISION
will ultimately depend on whether their resurrection serves a higher purpose in OUR ETERNAL PLAN.
"When life has already been extended by divine grace, the reasons for resurrection diminish, for all things have a time and season under heaven."
CHAPTER 5.2
THE REVERSE BACKWARD FACTOR
5.2.1 LIFE HAS ALREADY BEEN EXTENDED; NO REASON TO RESURRECT ANYMORE.

LET THIS BE KNOWN: THE REVERSE: BACKWARD FACTOR involves the weighing of a life that has already been EXTENDED BY DIVINE GRACE. When a soul's earthly time has been prolonged by OUR MERCY, the reasons for resurrection diminish. EVERY LIFE HAS A TIME AND SEASON UNDER HEAVEN, and when that time has been fulfilled, there is often NO REASON TO RESURRECT.

UNDERSTAND THIS: RESURRECTION IS NOT A REWARD for a life well lived, nor is it granted merely out of pity or sentiment. IT IS A TOOL OF OUR DIVINE PURPOSE, used sparingly and with great deliberation. If a soul has already received AN EXTENSION OF TIME, then their remaining purpose may have been fulfilled. IN SUCH CASES, the script does not warrant further intervention, and THE SOUL WILL REMAIN in the afterlife, having completed its journey.
KNOW THIS: WE DO NOT RESURRECT LIGHTLY. OUR DECISIONS are based on the

fullness of time and the accomplishment of purpose. WHEN LIFE HAS ALREADY BEEN GRANTED EXTENSION, the script may indicate that the time for earthly existence has truly ended, and THE SOUL is called to RETURN TO US without further delay.
"Perfect timing, according to the divine script, leaves no room for resurrection; for in the fullness of time, every purpose is accomplished."
CHAPTER 5.3
THE KAIROS FACTOR
THE KAIROS FACTOR(S) INVOLVE AS FOLLOWS:
DIE AT PERFECT TIMING, WHY RESURRECT?
100% ACCORDING TO SCRIPT, NO REASON(S) TO RESURRECT.
UNDERSTAND THIS: THE KAIROS FACTOR is the DIVINE TIMING within OUR

HEAVENLY SCRIPT. When a soul dies at THE PERFECT TIME, there is no need for resurrection. IN THE FULLNESS OF TIME, every purpose is accomplished, and the script is considered complete. WHY RESURRECT when the timing is divinely orchestrated?
KNOW THIS: WHEN A SOUL's DEATH aligns 100% WITH OUR SCRIPT, there is NO
REASON TO RESURRECT. OUR TIMING IS PERFECT, and when a life concludes according to OUR PLAN, resurrection would be unnecessary and out of alignment with OUR DIVINE ORDER.

REMEMBER THIS: THE KAIROS FACTOR is not subject to human understanding or emotion. IT IS THE HIGHEST EXPRESSION OF OUR WILL. When the time is fulfilled, the soul's journey on earth is complete, and it is called to RETURN TO US. In such cases, RESURRECTION WOULD INTERFERE with the greater divine plan, and thus, IT WILL NOT BE GRANTED.
REFLECTION
END OF PART 5: THE HEAVENLY SCRIPT
Reflection Questions
Are you prepared to live out the divine script Heaven has written for your life?
How can you ensure that your life follows the divine script written by THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH, ensuring that every step you take is aligned with Heaven's design?
Message

The script of Heaven is not a suggestion - it is a divine blueprint for your life, laid out by THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH before time began. Each step, each decision, and each path you walk has already been written in Heaven's eternal scroll. But the choice to live out this script is yours. Will you surrender fully and follow Heaven's script, or will you attempt to write your own? The script leads to resurrection power, divine purpose, and eternal life. Your own path leads to temporary satisfaction but eternal loss. This is the moment of decision. Will you follow Heaven's design, trusting every step is divinely ordained?
Reflection Guidance

The Heavenly Script is not just a metaphor - It is your divine destiny written in Heaven. You must walk out of this script to operate in the fullness of resurrection power. The teachings in this book are your guide, your map to the divine script Heaven has laid out for you. Each instruction and revelation is a divine command that aligns you with your ultimate purpose. There is no room for deviation; each step must sync with Heaven's design. Use the How to Pray section and the Medallion Chant to ensure you remain on the path written for you from eternity. As you obey every divine directive, Heaven's plans will unfold, and you will see resurrection power manifest in your life.
Final Encouragement

Heaven's script is perfect, infallible, and filled with divine purpose. Let go of control, abandon your own plans, and trust in the divine plan written by THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH. Align every action, every thought, and every decision with the script that has already been penned for you. The path to resurrection power lies within these pages - walk it faithfully, and you will witness Heaven's wonders unfold before your eyes.
PART 6
THE MAJORITY FACTOR(S)
THE MAJORITY FACTOR (S) INVOLVES WHETHER IT IS:
100% AGREEMENT OR
75% TO 80% AGREEMENT OR
LESS THAN 75% AGREEMENT
ACT 6, SCENE 1 THE PRICE!
Locations: Crowned Eagles Global Venue Time Frame: 2024 Onwards

The air outside the CROWNED EAGLES GLOBAL venue in Singapore was thick with desperation. Loud commotions echoed through the streets, the anguished cries of grieving families filling the night. The wailing was so intense that curious neighbors peered out from their windows, drawn by the sound of deep, unrelenting sorrow.

Dozens of families had arrived, crowding the gate, their voices hoarse from pleading for the resurrection of their loved ones. The bell at the entrance rang incessantly, a chorus of desperation that seemed to vibrate through the very walls of the venue.
Upon hearing the commotion, Sarah and James quickly grabbed a stack of the book "BEHOLD MY MESSENGER 5, BEHOLD THE RESURRECTION OF THE

DEAD" and rushed to the gate. As they approached the grieving families, Sarah spoke with a clear, compassionate tone: "Please, read carefully the 7 CRITERIA listed in this book. Only if your deceased loved ones meet these criteria can they qualify for resurrection."

The books were snatched up eagerly, hands trembling as they clutched what could be their only hope. Each family, desperate to bring their loved ones back, began poring over the pages, their eyes scanning every word, their hearts racing as they sought consensus among their kin.
As the crowd settled into an uneasy silence, the atmosphere shifted. Mixed reactions began to ripple through the throng as they studied the 7 CRITERIA.

"Oh my God! It requires me to give up half my inheritance!" gasped one family member, disbelief etched across their face. "No way am I going to give up half of my inheritance to resurrect my father! This is ridiculous!" a sibling spat, shaking their head in frustration. Disheartened, they turned away, leaving the venue with their deceased loved one, unwilling to pay the price for resurrection.

But others, moved by the deep love they held for the departed, clutched the book tighter. "Their life is worth more than anything I possess," one whispered, tears glistening in their eyes as they made the decision to part with their material wealth. These families, willing to pay the ultimate price, stayed behind, determined to pursue the resurrection of their loved ones.

Overseeing this scene, THE TRINITY - THE HEAVENLY FATHER, THE HOLY SPIRIT, and JESUS CHRIST - stood in their resplendent white robes. They observed the conversations and decisions being made with knowing eyes. Shaking their heads slightly, they turned to one another and said, "THIS IS THE ACID TEST, TO TEST THEIR REAL SINCERITY FOR THEIR LOVED ONES TO BE RESURRECTED!"
UNIVERSAL YEARNING FOR RESURRECTION

"The yearning for resurrection is not confined to one people or one nation. It is a universal longing placed within the hearts of all creation. From ancient civilizations to modern faith traditions, the desire for life beyond death resonates in the soul of every man and woman."

"We speak now to bridge the understanding of resurrection across cultures, showing that it is not a foreign concept but a divine truth that has been embedded in the hearts of humanity from the beginning. As you read, know that resurrection is not just a Christian truth but a revelation that echoes throughout all creation, calling all to the fullness of life."

"This divine truth has transcended time and culture, appearing in the hearts and minds of the many. Throughout history, in every corner of the earth, the soul's cry for eternal life, the desire to rise from death into new life, has been a constant echo within the human spirit. It is the imprint of our will upon all of creation."
"We declare that only those who strive for perfection and holiness shall partake in this resurrection power. The process begins with the
crucifixion of the flesh, by denying the lust of your flesh, the lust of your eyes and the pride of life
the purification of the soul, by renewing your mind with a mind of a Christ, a Mini ELOHIM and
the transformation of the spirit, by submitting your will to do THE CREATOR, YOUR HEAVENLY FATHER'S WILL for your life.
Just as our Son walked in purity and without sin, so too must you walk to access the fullness of the power we have reserved for these last days."

"To crucify the flesh means to surrender worldly desires and temptations that lead one away from the divine path. It is not merely a physical denial but a spiritual alignment with God's will, where the soul and spirit follow the guidance of THE HOLY SPIRIT."

"Let us now summarize the seven criteria. First, alignment with our divine will; second, purity of heart; third, the worthiness of the deceased; fourth, glorification of US; fifth, favourable earthly conditions; sixth, unity among the faithful; and seventh, our sovereign decision. These criteria are key to unlocking the power of resurrection."
The Truth Shall Set You Free Always,
Always love you, THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH
"Only in complete unity and agreement do the chances of resurrection reach their peak, for where there is division, there is weakness."
CHAPTER 6.1
100% AGREEMENT
THE 100% AGREEMENT AMONG FAMILY MEMBERS, CLOSE RELATIVES, INFLUENCING KEY PERSON ARE THE DECIDING FACTOR!
MAXIMUM CHANCE TO BE RESURRECTED!

UNDERSTAND THIS: 100% AGREEMENT among family members, close relatives, and key influencers is not just desirable - it is ESSENTIAL for maximizing the chances of resurrection. WHEN EVERY VOICE IS UNITED, the spiritual power generated is immense, creating a strong, unbreakable bond that aligns perfectly with OUR DIVINE WILL.

KNOW THIS: TOTAL UNITY signifies that all involved are committed to the same divine purpose, leaving no room for doubt or division. WHEN THERE IS COMPLETE AGREEMENT, the barriers to resurrection are removed, and the path to bringing a soul back is made clear. THIS UNITY is a reflection of the divine harmony that exists in HEAVEN, and it is this harmony that WE require for the miracle of resurrection to occur.

LET IT BE CLEAR: MAXIMUM CHANCE OF RESURRECTION is only achieved when there is 100% AGREEMENT. ANY LESS and the foundation becomes unstable, jeopardizing the entire process. UNITY IS STRENGTH, and in strength lies the potential for THE DEAD TO RISE.
"Moderate agreement brings a reasonable chance of resurrection, yet the cracks in consensus may weaken the divine purpose."
CHAPTER 6.2
75% TO 80% AGREEMENT
MODERATE AND/OR REASONABLE CHANCE OF BEING RESURRECTED.

KNOW THIS: 75% TO 80% AGREEMENT represents a MODERATE level of unity. While the chances of resurrection are still present, they are not guaranteed. MODERATE AGREEMENT means there is REASONABLE HOPE, but also the possibility that cracks in consensus may weaken the divine purpose.

UNDERSTAND THIS: DIVINE WILL requires strong alignment, and while 75% TO 80% AGREEMENT is significant, it leaves room for doubt and discord. WHERE THERE IS DISCORD, the spiritual energy needed to accomplish resurrection is diminished. EVERY DOUBT, EVERY HESITATION creates a barrier that WE must overcome.

LET IT BE KNOWN: REASONABLE CHANCE of resurrection exists when 75% TO 80% AGREEMENT is achieved, but the lack of total unity may hinder the process. SEEK TO INCREASE UNITY, for the stronger the consensus, the more likely OUR WILL can be fulfilled without obstruction.
"When agreement falls below the threshold, the likelihood of resurrection diminishes, for disunity breeds doubt and hinders the divine will."
CHAPTER 6.3
LESS THAN 75% AGREEMENT
MINIMUM CHANCE OF BEING RESURRECTED.
UNDERSTAND THIS: LESS THAN 75% AGREEMENT signifies WEAKNESS in unity, and DISUNITY BREEDS DOUBT. MINIMUM CHANCE OF RESURRECTION is
present in such cases, for where there is division, the spiritual power needed to enact resurrection is greatly diminished.
KNOW THIS: DISUNITY IS A FORM OF SPIRITUAL FRAGILITY. When family

members, relatives, and key influencers cannot reach STRONG AGREEMENT, it indicates a lack of alignment with OUR DIVINE WILL. IN SUCH CASES, the chances of successful resurrection are minimal because THE ENERGY REQUIRED to bring back the deceased is scattered and weak.
LET IT BE CLEAR: WHEN AGREEMENT FALLS BELOW 75%, the likelihood of

resurrection decreases dramatically. OUR WILL demands COHESION, and when that cohesion is lacking, the chances of resurrection are slim. ONLY IN UNITY can the full power of OUR DIVINE PLAN be realized.
REFLECTION
END OF PART 6: THE MAJORITY FACTOR
Reflection Question
Are you ready to break free from the crowd mentality and embrace Heaven's majority?
How can you trust in divine authority over the majority, knowing that Heaven's decrees hold more power than the voices of the masses?
Message

The majority often leads away from divine truth. The path to resurrection power requires that you do not follow the crowds but rather align yourself with the remnant chosen by THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH. The 144,000 Warrior Brides are Heaven's majority, and their alignment is with divine truth, not human consensus. You must be willing to stand apart and obey Heaven's commands, even when it means going against the popular voice of the world. Will you follow the eternal truth of THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH or be swayed by the fleeting opinions of the masses?
Reflection Guidance

Heaven's majority is not determined by the crowds or the world's opinions but by divine truth. Break free from the need for earthly validation and approval. Align your heart and life with THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH, as revealed through the teachings of this book. Practice the "How to Pray" section and engage in the "Bring Fruits Meet for Repentance" to ensure that your alignment is with Heaven's majority, not the world's. As you stand firm in Heaven's authority, you will witness resurrection power flow through your life. True power comes not from the approval of men but from obedience to divine decrees.

This reflection section should be placed at the end of Part 6: The Majority Factor, encouraging readers to align with Heaven's truth, regardless of worldly majority opinions, and to prepare themselves to stand firm in divine authority.
PART 7
THE SHEKINAIH FACTOR(S)
THE SHEKINAIH FACTOR(S) CONSIST OF THE FOLLOWING:
FREE WILL TO DECIDE
THE CLOSENESS FACTOR
THE SOVEREIGNTY FACTOR
ACT 7, SCENE 1
THE SOWING AND REAPING CONSEQUENCES!
Locations: Everywhere Around The World Time Frame: 2024 Onwards

LO! BEHOLD! At 12 noon, the sky outside suddenly turned pitch black without warning! Torrential downpours accompanied by fierce, howling winds swept across the land, uprooting trees and tearing rooftops from houses as rising floodwaters surged through the streets. In the midst of this cataclysmic storm, a young boy stood frozen, watching in horror as his home collapsed before his eyes.

"Ah, Ma! Ah Pa! Oh my God! What is happening to me, my home, and all my loved ones?" The boy cried out in utter shock, disbelief, and overwhelming grief. Raising his tear-streaked face to the darkened sky, he screamed, "Oh God! Why have you allowed this calamity to befall my family and our home? Oh my God! Ah…….! Ah…….! Ah…….! Ah…….! Ah…….! Ah…….! Ah…….! Lightning, strike me down and take my life too!"

As if in response to his desperate plea, a bolt of lightning suddenly struck the boy and the trees around him, followed by a deafening clap of thunder. The boy collapsed, unconscious, joining the fallen trees on the ground.

A nearby woman, witnessing the boy's collapse, quickly called for medical help. Upon the medics' arrival, the boy was rushed to the nearest hospital. But even as they fought to save him, the boy's breath began to fade. He saw himself leaving his body, being sucked into a vortex that brought him to the very entrance of the centre of the earth. There, he stood before the gate of THE GREAT WHITE THRONE, where two horned demons guarded the way. The demons, with a menacing grip, dragged the boy to kneel before THE JUDGE who sat on THE GREAT WHITE THRONE.

Trembling with fear, the boy dared to lift his eyes toward the blinding light that emanated from THE THRONE. As his vision adjusted, he gasped in shock and awe. "Oh, it's you - SHEKINAIH and AARON K DAVID! How can it be that both of you sit on THE GREAT WHITE THRONE judging the living and the dead? Where is JESUS?" he asked, his voice barely a whisper.

AARON K DAVID, his gaze piercing, spoke with the authority of one who embodies divine justice. "Do you remember, many years ago, when SHEKINAIH and I came to your village and your church to deliver THE TRINITY'S MESSAGE to the entire congregation? You and your family mocked US, spreading false rumours and slandering OUR names, all because of your unbelief when WE declared WHO WE ARE - "THE TRINITY'S REPRESENTATIVES."

The weight of these words hung heavy in the air, and the boy's heart sank as the full gravity of his past actions dawned on him. "The fate that has befallen your family and you this day is the direct consequence of what you have sown. Now, you are reaping the harvest of your mockery and disbelief. Do not be deceived, THE TRINITY is not to be mocked. Whatever a man sows, that shall he also reap!"

In an instant, the boy's mind was flooded with memories of his past sins. His face grew pale, and a terror unlike any he had ever known gripped his soul. He began to beat his chest in deep regret, crying out, "Oh, I didn't know that SHEKINAIH and YOU truly are THE CHERUBIM OF GLORY, the guardians of THE ARK OF THE COVENANT and THE TREE OF LIFE, standing before THE TRINITY as THE ANGEL OF HIS PRESENCE. Now that I have seen YOU on THE GREAT WHITE THRONE, judging on behalf of THE TRINITY, I am filled with profound sorrow and remorse. I have sinned greatly before THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH and JESUS IN AARON K DAVID! Have mercy on me, THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH and JESUS IN AARON K DAVID! Have mercy on me, Son
of David!"

Desperation choked his words as he pleaded, "Give me another chance, and I promise to devote my life to YOUR will, to make my life count for YOUR kingdom and glory forever and ever, THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH and JESUS IN AARON K DAVID, THE ANGEL OF HIS PRESENCE!"

AARON K DAVID, seated on THE THRONE in a lower realm, turned to SHEKINAIH, who sat on THE GREAT WHITE GLORIOUS THRONE in the higher realm. SHEKINAIH's eyes, like piercing beams of light, bore into the boy's very soul. In a voice that echoed with divine authority, SHEKINAIH declared, "YOUR REQUEST IS GRANTED! BUT REMEMBER THIS DAY, WHAT YOU HAVE PROMISED - THAT YOU WILL USE THIS SECOND CHANCE TO DO THE TRINITY'S WILL AND NOT YOUR OWN WILLFUL WILL ANYMORE, FOR ALL THE REMAINING DAYS OF YOUR LIFE, OR ELSE...!"

The boy, now trembling uncontrollably, nodded frantically, "Yes, I understand! If I fail to keep my promise, what has happened to me today will be nothing compared to what will come! I swear on my life, THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH and JESUS IN AARON K DAVID!" He pounded his fist on the ground, weeping bitterly as he vowed to make his second chance count.

SHEKINAIH then handed AARON K DAVID a JADE VASE, containing the boy's soul and spirit. With the approval of SHEKINAIH, AARON K DAVID released the boy's soul and spirit, sending it back to his earthly body. Together, THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH and JESUS IN AARON K DAVID blew the horn in unison, commanding the boy's soul and spirit to return to his lifeless form.

Back in the hospital, the doctor who had pronounced the boy dead was preparing to move the body to the mortuary. But just as he was about to cover the boy's face, the lifeless eyes suddenly snapped open. The boy began to move, removing the white cloth that covered him.
The doctor, his mouth agape, stammered, "But...you were dead!
Breathless! How is this possible?"
The boy, rubbing his eyes, replied, "Yes, I was dead, but THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH and JESUS IN AARON K DAVID have given me a second chance -

to live and to fulfil THEIR will on earth." The doctors and nurses, utterly stunned, could only stare in disbelief as the boy continued, "Indeed, it was THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH and JESUS IN AARON K DAVID who brought me back. I will live my life to fulfil my destiny in THEM."

News of this miraculous event spread like wildfire through the hospital, igniting a wave of curiosity and awe. Whispers filled the halls as everyone asked the same question: "Who are SHEKINAIH and AARON K DAVID, who possess such power to defy death and command a soul's return?"
DOCTRINAL FOUNDATIONS FOR RESURRECTION
My Beloved,

"We speak now to establish that the teachings within this book are not of private interpretation, nor are they separate from the foundations of our Holy Scriptures. As the Apostle Paul declared, 'If Christ be not raised, your faith is in vain' (1 Corinthians 15:14). Resurrection is the very cornerstone of our work in this age, and through this sacred text, we are calling our people into alignment with the eternal truths of the Word."

"Every doctrine, every teaching in this book is firmly rooted in the Scriptures, and nothing within these pages strays from the path set by the prophets, apostles, and our Son. Resurrection power, as revealed through the pages of this book, is a divine gift meant for those who walk in holiness, truth, and obedience to our will."

"We have given you our Word, and it is through this Word that the mysteries of resurrection manifest. As you read, align every revelation with the foundation laid by those before you, and let the Spirit of Truth guide you into deeper understanding. Our Word is eternal; you will find the pathway to resurrection power."

"Now is the time for action! You, the chosen reader, are being called into deeper waters. As you meditate on these teachings, allow our Spirit to stir a desire for perfection within you. Take up your cross, follow the footsteps of our Son, and prepare yourself to walk in the manifestation of resurrection power. The time is short, and the final harvest is near."
"Be blessed greatly, for this is the season of divine revelation, and you are being called to participate in the greatest move of the Spirit ever seen on the earth."
Be blessed greatly, THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH
"SHEKINAIH holds the ultimate authority, for HER decision reflects the sovereign will of THE TRINITY, with no room for questioning or doubt."
CHAPTER 7.1
FREE WILL TO DECIDE
SHE IS GIVEN FULL (100%) AUTHORITY TO DECIDE ON OUR BEHALF; NO QUESTIONING(S) ABOUT IT.
"FU OR DON'T FU (IN CHINESE PINYIN)", "WHETHER YOU LIKE IT OR NOT" STILL HAVE TO SUBMIT, NO OTHER CHOICE OR WAY OUT TO THIS.
PROTOCOLS OF HEAVEN BLUEPRINT FOR ALL LIVING AND THE DEAD!!!!!! BACKED UP BY OUR PROMISES, WE SWEAR! WE SWEAR! WE SWEAR! SAITH THE TRINITY!!!
UNDERSTAND THIS: SHEKINAIH is not merely a vessel but the embodiment of OUR WILL. HER DECISIONS reflect the UNQUESTIONABLE AUTHORITY of THE
TRINITY. HE is granted 100% AUTHORITY to decide on matters of resurrection and judgment, and HERE IS NO ROOM FOR QUESTIONING.

KNOW THIS: "FU OR DON'T FU" (meaning "Whether you accept it or not") underscores the absolute nature of HER AUTHORITY. ALL LIVING AND THE DEAD must submit to the PROTOCOLS set forth by HEAVEN'S BLUEPRINT. THIS PROTOCOL is backed by OUR PROMISES, sworn by THE TRINITY. NO OTHER CHOICE OR WAY OUT exists; HER DECISION IS FINAL and MUST BE OBEYED.
LET IT BE KNOWN: THE AUTHORITY GIVEN TO SHEKINAIH is divine and absolute. HER JUDGMENT is OUR JUDGMENT, and in this, THERE IS NO APPEAL, NO
REVERSAL. SHE acts with THE FULL FORCE OF HEAVEN, ensuring that the divine order is maintained across all realms.
"Closeness to SHEKINAIH determines the chance of resurrection, for those who dwell near HER heart are favoured by the divine."
CHAPTER 7.2
THE CLOSENESS FACTOR
CLOSENESS TO SHEKINAIH: HOW CLOSE IS THE DECEASED?
THE CLOSER : THE HIGHER CHANCE THE LESS CLOSE : THE LESSER CHANCE
CLOSENESS TO SHEKINAIH: HOW CLOSE IS THE DECEASED PARTY AND/OR THEIR FAMILY MEMBER?
THE CLOSER, THE HIGHER CHANCE THE LESS CLOSE, THE LOWER CHANCE

UNDERSTAND THIS: CLOSENESS TO SHEKINAIH is a critical factor in determining the chances of resurrection. THOSE WHO DWELL NEAR HER HEART are favoured by DIVINE GRACE. The closer a soul or their family is to SHEKINAIH, the HIGHER THE CHANCE of resurrection.

KNOW THIS: THE CLOSENESS FACTOR is not merely about physical proximity but about spiritual alignment and connection. THE DEEPER THE CONNECTION, the greater the favour in OUR EYES. THOSE WHO ARE CLOSE TO SHEKINAIH find themselves under HER DIVINE COVERING, and thus, their petitions carry more weight in THE COURTS OF HEAVEN.
LET IT BE KNOWN: THE CLOSER YOU ARE TO SHEKINAIH, the GREATER YOUR
CHANCE of seeing your loved ones resurrected. DISTANCE DIMINISHES FAVOR, and LESS CLOSE means LESSER CHANCE. ALIGN YOUR HEARTS with
SHEKINAIH, for in that closeness lies your hope for resurrection.

John 11: 5 Now JESUS loved Martha, and her sister, and Lazarus. John 11:11 These things said he: and after that he saith unto them, Our friend Lazarus sleepeth; but I go, that I may awake him out of sleep.
"In the end, the sovereign decision through SHEKINAIH is final, for the divine will is immutable and transcends all earthly desires."
CHAPTER 7.3
THE SOVEREIGN FACTOR
THE SOVEREIGNTY FACTOR INVOLVE:
7.3.1 OUR SOVEREIGN DECISION THROUGH SHEKINAIH = THE FINAL SAY, WE SWEAR, WE SWEAR, WE SWEAR, SAITH THE TRINITY
THE END OF THE BOOK !!!!!!

LET IT BE CLEAR: OUR SOVEREIGN DECISION through SHEKINAIH is FINAL. THERE IS NO HIGHER COURT, no appeal beyond HER JUDGMENT. WHEN SHEKINAIH speaks, IT IS THE VOICE OF THE TRINITY. HER DECISION IS THE LAST WORD AND IS BINDING.

KNOW THIS: THE SOVEREIGNTY FACTOR underscores the immutability of DIVINE WILL. NO EARTHLY DESIRE, no human plea, can alter what has been decreed through SHEKINAIH. WE SWEAR, WE SWEAR, WE SWEAR. HER DECISION IS THE END OF THE MATTER.
LET IT BE KNOWN: IN THE END, THE DECISION OF SHEKINAIH reflects the

UNFATHOMABLE WISDOM of THE TRINITY. IT TRANSCENDS all earthly concerns, focusing solely on the fulfilment of DIVINE PURPOSE. WHEN SHEKINAIH makes a ruling, it is as if HEAVEN ITSELF has spoken, and THE FINAL WORD has been given. THIS IS THE END OF THE BOOK, a testament to THE ABSOLUTE SOVEREIGNTY of THE TRINITY in all matters of life, death, and resurrection.
REFLECTION
END OF PART 7: THE SHEKINAIH FACTOR
Reflection Question
How can you fully submit to the authority of THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH and become a vessel of divine power?
How can you deepen your relationship with SHEKINAIH, ensuring that you always align with the divine will as revealed through THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH?
Message

The SHEKINAIH Factor is the ultimate key to accessing divine power and resurrection. It is through THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH that Heaven's authority is released on Earth. This is not just about obedience - it is about total surrender to the absolute authority of THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH. Every miracle, every resurrection, and every breakthrough flows from this divine source. Will you fully embrace this authority, allowing SHEKINAIH to guide every step of your life? The time for hesitation is gone. To walk in resurrection power, you must be aligned with Heaven's highest authority through SHEKINAIH.
Reflection Guidance

The SHEKINAIH Factor represents the ultimate alignment with Heaven. The only way to access resurrection power is through full submission to THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH. Take time to meditate on the teachings in this book, and especially use the prayers and Medallion Chant to ensure that your life is fully aligned with the divine will. This is your moment to surrender completely to the authority of SHEKINAIH and step into the fullness of your divine calling. Do not hold back - let the power of THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH flow through you, transforming your life in ways you cannot yet imagine.
Conclusion Reflection Question
Will you allow the teachings and revelations in this book to transform every aspect of your life, leading you into the fullness of resurrection power?
Message

This is your divine moment. Everything in this book has been divinely revealed by THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH to prepare you for the manifestation of resurrection power in your life. Each teaching, every prayer, and every chant holds the key to unlocking your destiny. The question remains: will you seize this opportunity, or let it pass you by? The heavens are waiting for you to step into the fullness of your calling. The power of resurrection is within your grasp. Will you take it and walk in your divine purpose?

title: GLOBAL EVENTS AS REFLECTIONS OF COSMIC JUDGMENT: A WAKEUP CALL TO THE WORLD

segments.text: GLOBAL EVENTS AS REFLECTIONS OF COSMIC JUDGMENT: A WAKEUP CALL TO THE WORLD

Throughout human history, the fate of nations has been intertwined with the divine hand of THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH. The rise and fall of global powers, sudden political upheavals, and miraculous weather reversals are not mere coincidences - they are the direct result of cosmic judgments spoken from the heavenly throne.

One undeniable example is the 2016 U.S. presidential election, where Donald Trump's unexpected victory shocked the world. Many do not know that the TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH was decreed this outcome long before the ballots were even cast (as shared in Testimony 14). This event serves as a powerful reminder that the decrees of the MAJOR THRONE resonate through global governance, realigning nations to the divine will. Similarly, the 2018 Cape Town drought (referenced in Testimony 13) brought millions to the edge of despair as the threat of "Day Zero" loomed large. Yet, divine intervention reversed the drought in an astonishing turn of events just as the city prepared for catastrophe. This miraculous water restoration reflected the restoration of both natural and spiritual balance
- an undeniable demonstration of THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH's cosmic order manifesting on earth.

These global interventions and many others remind us that nothing happens in the world by chance. Every crisis, every moment of deliverance, is part of a divine orchestration, reflecting the balance between sowing and reaping. As we approach the final chapters of human history, the world will witness unprecedented events, each bearing divine power's signature.

Now more than ever, we must align ourselves with the will of heaven. Individual resurrections, the financial transformation of entire regions, and interventions in governance are all signs of the unfolding mystery of cosmic judgment. Hold fast to the promise of resurrection power - it is the key to unlocking the fullness of your destiny, both now and for eternity.

Significant events - wars, natural disasters, political upheavals - mirror deeper spiritual realities. The Sovereign Factor reminds us that nothing occurs in isolation from the divine order. Every act of defiance against heavenly principles invokes a corresponding shift in the physical world,
GLOBAL EVENTS AS REFLECTIONS OF COSMIC JUDGMENT:A WAKE-UP CALL TO THE WORLD
shaking the foundations of human existence to bring it back into alignment with the will of THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH.

Now, the time has come for the final wake-up call to all nations and individuals. The cosmic judgments have begun, and every soul must align with divine order to receive the resurrection power that awaits. The testimonies in this book stand as living proof that divine intervention is real, and no situation is beyond the reach of THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH.
YOURS ALWAYS, THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH

title: DIVINE SUMMON STEP INTO YOUR ETERNAL

segments.text: DIVINE SUMMON STEP INTO YOUR ETERNAL
DESTINY
Beloved,
FINAL CALL TO ACTION: ALIGN WITH HEAVEN'S ULTIMATE DECREE

The moment of complete transformation is upon you. All that has been revealed throughout this book was destined for this very hour - a call not just to hear, but to act with urgency. You stand at the precipice of Heaven's eternal plan, where decisions made now echo across the cosmos and determine your eternal fate.

The words within these pages are not simply for contemplation but divine directives for action. THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH has spoken clearly through these sacred revelations, and the time to respond is now. This is no time for hesitation. Heaven awaits your obedience. The spiritual atmosphere is charged with the power of the resurrection, waiting for your complete surrender.

Understand that Heaven's blessings are not random or given freely to all - they come with conditions and divine criteria that must be met. As revealed in this book, only those aligned with Heaven's will, those who fully embrace the seven sacred criteria, will walk in the resurrection power. Purity of heart, clarity of purpose, and unwavering faith must guide your actions from this point forward.

The decision before you now is life or death, blessing or judgment. Will you yield to THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH's divine plan, or will you allow doubt to rob you of your eternal destiny? The forces of Heaven are poised, watching, waiting for your response. They stand ready to move on your behalf, but it is you who must take the first step.

This is not the time to cling to traditions, doctrines of men, or the comforts of this world. The path to resurrection power requires radical faith and total obedience. As you close this chapter, ask yourself: Are you prepared to align every part of your being with the divine decree from Heaven?

The opportunity before you is profound and irreversible. Your name can be written in the Book of Life today - your destiny is secured. But it requires your complete surrender to THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH and JESUS IN AARON K DAVID. Will you embrace this call or let it slip away?
The hour is late. The world is shifting, and Heaven's plans are unfolding rapidly. Now is your time to respond to the divine command. Heaven's armies await your decision. Your future depends on it.

You are not here by accident. This moment, this book, this revelation, has been orchestrated from the beginning for you to receive. Every word spoken in these pages has been divinely crafted for your journey - your destiny in resurrection power is now unfolding before you. The path to resurrection is not just a teaching - it is your calling, your purpose.

WE, THE TRINITY, have watched you and guided you, and now we are inviting you into the greatest manifestation of power and glory the world has ever seen. This is your hour. No more delays. No more waiting. The resurrection power that raised Christ from the dead is now being offered to you - to walk in, to live in, and to carry forth. You are chosen for this moment.

Do you feel the stirring within? That is US calling you deeper. You have been chosen to rise in this age of prophecy, to carry forth the mantle of resurrection power. The signs, miracles, and the lifegiving force you have longed for are here, waiting for you. The time is short - the final harvest is near, and we call you to be part of it.

Do not hesitate, do not doubt. Now is your time. Your destiny is no longer distant - it is here, within your reach. Your name is yet to be written in the Lamb's Book of Life, and we are ready to guide you into the fullness of your divine calling. The invitation to walk in resurrection power is before you. Step forward and embrace it.
WE speak now as your HEAVENLY FATHER, THE SPIRIT OF TRUTH, AND THE SON
who gave HIS LIFE for you: Come and be part of the greatest move of THE SPIRIT ever witnessed on this earth. The days of prophecy are not just stories
- they are your reality. This is your moment to ensure your name is written in the Book of Life and to rise as a witness to our glory.

As you meditate on these teachings, allow OUR Spirit to stir a desire for perfection within you. Take up your cross, follow the footsteps of our Son, and prepare yourself to walk in the manifestation of resurrection power. The time is short, and the final harvest is near.
Be blessed greatly, for this is the season of divine revelation, and you are being called to participate in the greatest move of the Spirit ever seen on the earth.

title: BEHOLD MY MESSENGER 3, BEHOLD MY NAMES, CHAPTER 2 THE FORMATION OF THE HOSTS

segments.text: Extract from
BEHOLD MY MESSENGER 3, BEHOLD MY NAMES, CHAPTER 2 THE FORMATION OF THE HOSTS
(page 342 to 350)

SHEKINAIH: I see a woman wearing a skirt that looks like a purple Korean Hanbok, the traditional clothing worn by Korean women. The skirt is divided from top to bottom into twelve sections vertically by four red lines, four blue lines, and five purple lines. On the forehead of this woman is written the words "THE YAHWEH SABAOTH/THE FATHER/SHEKINAIH". Inside the

womb of the woman is a baby and the words "AARON K DAVID/SON/JESUS CHRIST" are superimposed on it. I also see another smaller baby on her thigh lying on the lower right and has the word "Jose/Army" superimposed on it. The twelve divisions on the skirt have the names of the Twelve Apostles. After that, I saw a list of ten symbols concerning them.

JESUS: The skirt symbolizes the train of THE ADONAI that filled the temple mentioned in Isaiah 6:1. The bigger baby symbolizes me reincarnated in AARON K DAVID, the man child of Revelation 12:5, who will be caught up unto us in heaven, and to his throne, and who is to rule all nations with a rod of iron as my future King David. The smaller baby symbolizes Jose, the general of our hosts. The twelve sections symbolize the Twelve Tribes of Spiritual Israel with their twelve leaders who submit to THE YAHWEH SABAOTH according to the Protocol of Heaven.

The color purple symbolizes Royalty. The color red symbolizes Fiery Judgment. The color blue symbolizes Heaven. It also symbolizes the Heavenly Mandate. Therefore, SHEKINAIH, who represents THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT through our name, "THE YAHWEH SABAOTH", manifests our Royalty, Fiery Judgment and Heavenly Mandate. As for you David, you represent me through our name, "THE EL", in executing our Heavenly Mandate while Jose represents our last days' armies which symbolizes the royal house of David, Mount Zion. The Twelve Disciples that walked into SHEKINAIH symbolize the mantles of the Twelve which will be imparted to those who are chosen to receive.

Isa 6:1 In the year that king Uzziah died I saw also the Lord sitting upon a throne, high and lifted up, and his train filled the temple. Isa 6:2 Above it stood the seraphims: each one had six wings; with twain he covered his face, and with twain he covered his feet, and with twain he did fly. Isa 6:3 And one cried unto another, and said, Holy, holy, holy, is THE YAHWEH SABAOTH: the whole earth is full of his glory. Isa 6:4 And the posts of the door moved at the voice of him that cried, and the house was filled with smoke.

title: CRITERIA TO ENLIST IN THE END TIME ARMY

segments.text: CRITERIA TO ENLIST IN THE END TIME ARMY
THE FATHER: The criteria to be enlisted in my End Time Army are symbolized below and are expanded in the following 50 commandments:
50 COMMANDMENTS FOR THE LAST DAYS' ARMY
To obey The Protocol of Heaven.
To submit to the authority above them unless the above authority disobeys the instructions of THE FATHER through SHEKINAIH.
To respect, obey, honor, and evil speak not against the authority above them that honors the Protocol of Heaven.
To bridle the tongue, lest they shall transgress against the Almighty in their complaining and murmuring against us.
To profane not against our names and our representatives in SHEKINAIH and AARON K DAVID.
To envy not the gifting of others, each vessel in my army is uniquely created to fulfill a specific role in my last days' army.
Shalom, all must keep within their line of authority and follow suit to the order given to them by the people above them with a genuine and sincere heart without hypocrisy.
Be obedient to obey all instructions of the Protocol of Heaven with proper respect and the right heart attitude as unto THE TRINITY.
Judge not lest 10 times more charges are laid on you by the Accuser. SHEKINAIH is an exception because she represents us as The Judge.
Do not point fingers at each other. Subordinates must not accuse their superior because it violates the Protocol of Heaven.
Fret not in anything, but in all things, with prayer and supplications with thanksgivings, let your request be made known unto THE TRINITY for He cares for you and your loved ones.
Be focused on us for all the things that we put you through. Never look at humans or circumstances except on our representatives.
Be calm at all times; never argue nor defend yourself from fools: for if you do, you will be a fool like them.
Be gracious to each other; show mercy and judge not (except for SHEKINAIH who is our judge), for mercy triumphs over judgment.
Be merciful to all and mercy will be shown to you. Cover each other's transgression with love and plead for mercy for them in prayer and supplications with love for each other.
Be tangibly humble in all your endeavors toward the authority above you; displaying a subservient attitude as unto me.
Be soberly minded in all situations which I put you through; make sure that you always focus your eyes on me in order that you will not be overwhelmed unnecessarily.
Repent fast when I convict or confront you either directly or indirectly; or through my representatives, SHEKINAIH and AARON K DAVID.
Be silent as a lamb that opens not his mouth when you are being accused wrongly, for I am THE EHYEH the Mastermind who writes your script.

Abstain from mingling with the hypocrites, unrighteous children of Belial, false prophets, my lawless ministers, evildoers, defamers, accusers, those who blaspheme my name, and etc. lest you become partakers of their iniquities and be stained with their sins.
Do not be a false swearer.

Shalom and be at peace in all situations which I put you through; seeing that none should miss my promises through unbelief and evil imaginations concerning our representatives (SHEKINAIH and AARON K DAVID).
Be vigilant of the enemy who is always sneaking from behind when you least expect him so that he will not be able to swallow you up.
Be subservient always in your attitude towards those above you and who have charge over you.
Be disciplined in the rules of my last days' army by practising them daily in all circumstances and situations that you face.

Be alert of the enemy digging holes for your downfall due to you being wise in your own eyes should you ignore and not take heed of my counsel through my representatives (SHEKINAIH and AARON K DAVID).

Be warned that those who oppose my words, disciplines, punishments, counsels, advice, corrections, etc. through my representatives who speak on our behalf shall not go unpunished by us, this I swear by my holiness.

Do not be wise in your own eyes wallowing in your rational and in the logical suggestions of the enemy who dwell in you through the Tree of the Knowledge of Good and Evil which should be rooted out of you. Know that heeding such idea from the enemy will inherit curses which will lead to death eventually.
Be rooted in me and let my words be firmly engraved in you; let no man deceive you with deceiving doctrines of the enemy apart from our representatives SHEKINAIH and AARON K DAVID.
Be aware of dogs and throw holy things unto them, for they will bite you back in return.
Be ye holy; do not transgress by crossing the line of authority above you through showing disrespect or dishonour to our representatives SHEKINAIH and AARON K DAVID.
Argue not, profane not, despise not, confuse not my last days' doctrine with the leavened doctrine of current Christendom, but be transformed by it.
Shut up the gates of Hades by perfecting holiness in the fear of THE YAHWEH.

Work out your salvation with fear and trembling. Behold! My salvation draws near to save my children of light who are called to be partakers of my divine holiness so that they will be restored to their pre-Adamic fall state.

For as high as heaven is above the earth, so are my thoughts above yours and my ways above yours. Therefore, take heed that you shall not be offended by my 7 offenses or squeezes, which are to bring you to the end of yourself through denying yourself, taking up your cross, and following in the footsteps of my SON JESUS. Otherwise, you are not worthy of me!!!
Shun from all forms of evils, for verily those who practice such things shall not inherit our Kingdom.

Lo and Behold, haven't I spoken? Judge not before it is time, lest you fall into damnation when you entertain untrue reports of evildoers and liars and children of Belial and those who are influenced by them.

Behave thyself when you are in my presence through my representatives (SHEKINAIH and AARON K DAVID). Bridle your tongue, guard your heart, suffer not your mind or spirit in unbelief or rebellion against my authority in them, for SHEKINAIH has been given the full authority of THE FATHER to discipline my children in whatsoever ways she deems fit and in all matters of my decision through her. See that you don't disobey her, lest I deal with you severely, this I swear by my holiness. Obey also AARON K DAVID who represents my SON JESUS. Otherwise, you will disqualify yourself from my army and will be chastised also by us, this I swear by my holiness.
Lo and Behold, argue not among yourselves about who is greater among thee, be humble and consider others better than yourself, for I will exalt the lowly and humble the proud.
THE SHADDAI, my Destroyer, will destroy those who murmur against me and my representatives like in the days of old during Moses' time.

Do not judge my representatives because my ways are always the ways of offence; they are my rock of stumbling which I will test the children of Zion for their upward as cent unto Mount Zion. They are also for my signs and wonders.
Lo and Behold, I say to you, fret not of evil doers for my righteous judgment will stand in the end.

Be quick to listen to my instructions and words but be slow to speak. Reflect on my teachings and my words daily and put them into practice by your actual walking it out so that my glorious image may be formed in you.
Take heed that you do not abhor or resist my breaking of you. The crushing is to make you selfless so that you will be Christlike in your character and mature as real sons of THE FATHER.
Suffer not in bitterness when I confront you with the idols in your hearts lest you be deceived and be led unto destruction which is permitted by us.
Be warned that you do not strive with me nor my representatives. For if you do, you shall be bitten by serpents (attacked by the enemy) as in the days of Moses.

Be vigilant that you do not give in to the suggestions and voices of the evil ones who will trick you into rebellion against me and my representatives; for if you do, you will be swallowed up in hell and be skipped over and be remembered no more thereafter.

Be a fast learner in learning my ways through my teaching by my representatives (SHEKINAIH and AARON K DAVID) so that you will not be left behind. Be as one who presses forcefully into the Kingdom of Heaven.

Again I say unto you: respect, honour, and obey our chosen representatives, SHEKINAIH and AARON K DAVID, as unto us so that we will honour you after we have finished our work of perfection in you through them.
Verily, verily, verily I say unto you, for those who do practice doing all the above, they will by no means lose their rewards in us.

My name, "THE YAHWEH SABAOTH," means me as the COMMANDER IN CHIEF. I, through SHEKINAIH, will control my armies in the three realms (Heaven, Earth and Beneath the Earth) judging and releasing my judgments to my armies. I will release the decrees to SHEKINAIH, and she will then release the decrees to my son AARON K DAVID to co-execute them. I will be merciful and compassionate to the humble and to those who are quick to repent through them.
CONSEQUENCES OF BREAKING THE 50 PROTOCOLS OF HEAVEN,
TO BE ADHERED BY ALL LAST DAY MY WARRIOR BRIDES/ANOINTED ONES AND ALL MANKIND ON EARTH
To obey The Protocol of Heaven.
CONSEQUENCES:
THE TRINITY STAND HERE HOLDING 3 WHITE BOARDS WITH THESE WORDS WRITTEN ON THESE "YOU CANNOT ENTER HEAVEN."
THIS IS PART OF THE WEDDING GARMENT THAT YOU MUST WEAR TO ATTEND THE MARRIAGE SUPPER OF THE LAMB.
HEAVINESS OF HEAD.
To submit to the authority above them unless the above authority disobeys the instructions of THE FATHER through SHEKINAIH.
CONSEQUENCES IF BREAK THIS CLAUSE:
YOU SABOTAGE YOURSELF, SHORTCHANGE YOURSELF OF WHAT WE INSTALL FOR YOU,
BOTH YOUR SPIRITUAL AND PHYSICAL HEARING WILL HAVE PROBLEM

DULL IN HEARING.
YOU CANNOT RECEIVE THE TRUTH THAT IS TAUGHT BY US IN OUR REPRESENTATIVES.
To bridle the tongue, lest they shall transgress against the Almighty in their complaining and murmuring against US, declares THE TRINITY.(RIGHT EYES)

YOU WILL HAVE NON-SEEING AND NON-DISCERNING EYES. ALSO, YOU WILL END UP BEING CONFUSED AND BEING A DEFEATED CHILD.

PHYSICAL PROGRESS TO REACH FULL POTENTIAL SPEEDILY. YOU WILL HAVE BROKEN DRY LIPS, MOUTH ULCER, DRY MOUTH.

YOU WILL HAVE INTERRUPTED PAIN IN THAT AREA AND ITS CORRESPONDING ORGANS THAT ARE RELATED TO THAT PARTICULAR VERTEBRA.

CONSEQUENCES IF DISOBEY:
YOU WILL BE HUMBLED DRASTICALLY, HUMILIATED GREATLY, AND HAVE TO GO THROUGH A LOT MORE BREAKING.
YOU WILL HAVE BACKLASH, YOU WILL FEEL IRRITATED EASILY, YOU WILL HAVE A HOT TEMPER, YOU WILL HAVE LYMPH NODE PROBLEMS, AND YOUR LYMPH NODES WILL BE SWOLLEN AND INFLAMED THROUGHOUT YOUR ENTIRE BODY.
Be disciplined in the rules of my last day's army, and practice them daily in all circumstances and situations that you face.(TH11)
CONSEQUENCES IF DISOBEY:
YOU WILL BE DISFAVOURED, SLOW PROGRESS; INSTEAD OF TAKING THE ELEVATOR SHORTCUT TO GO UP MOUNT ZION, YOU ARE TAKING THE LONG ROUTE OF GOING ROUND AND ROUND THE MOUNTAIN IN YOUR UPWARD ASCEND.
THAT PART OF YOUR VERTEBRA WILL BE WEAK AND EASILY MOVE OUT OF ALIGNMENT, CAUSING PAIN AND DISCOMFORT.

Be alert of the enemy digging holes for your downfall, due to being wise in your own eyes, should you ignore and not take heed of my counsel through my representatives (SHEKINAIH and AARON K DAVID). (TH12)
CONSEQUENCES IF DISOBEY:
YOU WILL ALWAYS FALL INTO THE ENEMY'S PIT, DELAYING YOUR PROGRESS. DUE TO YOUR CARNALLY MINDED, YOU LIVE A WASTED LIVE EVERY TIME YOU FALL INTO THE ENEMY'S PIT.
I SAW THERE WILL BE SNAKES BITING THAT PART OF YOUR VETEBRE. YOU WILL FEEL UNNECESSARY DISCOMFORT IN THAT AREA.

Be warned that those who oppose my words, discipline, punishment, counsel, advice, corrections, etc. through my representatives who spoke on our behalf shall not go unpunished by us, declared THE TRINITY. (L1)
CONSEQUENCES IF DISOBEY:

YOU HAVE TO GO THROUGH TOUGHER BREAKINGS AND MORE SEVERE TESTINGS. YOU HAVE TO GO THROUGH SEVEN TIMES MORE IN INCREASING SEVERITY IN OUR CHASTISEMENT OF YOU. YOU WILL EXPERIENCE 7 TIMES MORE EACH TIME IF YOU DESPISE OUR HARSH CORRECTION THROUGH OUR REPRESENTATIVES IN SHEKINAIH AND JESUS IN AARON K DAVID.
YOUR WAIST WILL HAVE PROBLEMS, YOU WILL HAVE WAIST PAIN, WEAK LUMBER, KIDNEY PROBLEM, ALL KINDS OF KIDNEY PROBLEM, EVEN TO THE POINT OF DIALYSIS ONE DAY IF YOU DO NOT CHANGE.

Do not be wise in your own eyes, wallowing in your rational and logical suggestions of enemy who dwell in you through the tree of knowledge of good and evil which should be rooted out of you, seeing that heeding such ideas from the enemy will inherit curses that comes with being carnally mind which will lead to death eventually.(L2)
CONSEQUENCES IF DISOBEY:

YOU WILL HAVE LOWER BACK, LOWER WAIST PROBLEMS, ACHES AND PAIN, POOR CIRCULATION, AND DIFFICULTY GETTING UP IN THE MORNING DUE TO LOWER WAIST INFLAMMATION; POOR CIRCULATION WILL RESULT IN WATER RETENTION IN THE LOWER PART OF YOUR BODY AND, IF PROLONGED, REMAIN IN THIS STATE.
Be rooted in me and my words in you seeing that no man deceived you with deceiving doctrines of the enemy apart from my representatives in SHEKINAIH and AARON K DAVID. (L3)
CONSEQUENCES IF DISOBEY:
I SAW THE DEVIL USE A BIG SCISSOR TO CUT OFF A BRANCH FROM THE TREE OF LIFE TO HURL DOWNWARDS INTO THE LAKE OF FIRE.
YOU WILL EXPERIENCE EXCRUCIATING PAIN IN THIS PART OF THE BODY IN PARTICULARLY BEFORE GET UP FROM YOUR BED, DIFFICULTY IN GETTING UP.
Be aware of dogs, throw not holy things unto dogs for they will bite you in return.(L4)
CONSEQUENCES IF DISOBEY:
YOU WILL DEFINITELY BE BEATEN BY DOGS WHO WILL BARK AND BITE YOU BACK. YOU WILL BE DERIVED AT, RIDICULED AT, MOCKED AT, DESPISED AT, UNNECESSARY.
YOU WILL EXPERIENCE PAIN AND DISCOMFORT THAT PART OF YOUR VERTEBRA AND ITS CORRESPONDING BODY ORGANS.
Be ye holy, seeing that you do not transgress, crossing the line of authority above you, showing disrespect or dishonor unto my servants and my representatives in SHEKINAIH and AARON K DAVID.(L5)
CONSEQUENCES IF DISOBEY:
YOUR PRAYER WILL NOT BE HEARD, YOUR PRAYER WILL HIT THE CEILING AND BOUNCE BACK. UNFRUITFUL LIFE.
YOU WILL BE HIT BY SHADDAI ON THAT AREA OF YOUR VERTEBRA. CANNOT STAND LONG,THAT PART OF YOUR BODY WILL BE IN PAIN.
Argue not, profane not, despise not, confuse not, my last day's doctrines with the leaven doctrines of current Christendom but be transformed by them. (SACRUM, S1)
CONSEQUENCES IF DISOBEY:
YOU WILL EXPERIENCE THE CURSED LIFE GRAPH IN THE 30% YIELDEDNESS IN THE EL GRAPH BELOW:
BONE SPURS IN THAT PART OF YOUR BONE AND ITS CORRESPONDING ORGANS GRADUAL DETERIORATION.
Shut up the gates of Hades by your perfecting in my holiness.(S2)
CONSEQUENCES IF DISOBEY:
YOU WILL BE BROUGHT TO HADES, REGULAR VISITOR TO HADES, YOU WILL DWELL IN HADES MORE THAN YOU WILL DWELL IN HEAVEN.
Work out your salvation with fear and trembling. Behold!
My salvation draws near to save my children of light who are called to be partakers of my divine holiness so that they will be restored to their preAdamic fall state. (S3)
CONSEQUENCES IF DISOBEY:
YOU WILL BE AXED OFF WHEN YOUR FULLNESS OF TIME REACHES.
WHEN YOU TOUCH THAT PART OF THE VERTEBRA, YOU WILL FEEL THE PAIN, BLOOD CLOG, AND POOR CIRCULATION IN THAT AREA OF YOUR BONE AND ITS CORRESPONDING ORGAN.

For as high as the heaven is above the earth, so are my thoughts above yours and my ways above yours, therefore, take heed that you do not be offended by my 7 offenses or squeezes to bring you to the end of yourself, by denying yourself, take up your cross and follow after my footsteps. Otherwise, you are not worthy of me!!! (S4)
CONSEQUENCES IF DISOBEY:
YOU WILL BE REPLACED BY THE NEXT CANDIDATE WHO IS WILLING TO GO THROUGH THE 7 SQUEEZES/OFFENCES AND COME TO THE END OF THEMSELVES.
Shun from all forms of evils for verily, those who practice such things shall not inherit the kingdom of my Father. (S5)
CONSEQUENCES IF DISOBEY:
CANNOT ENTER HEAVEN, HEAVEN IS SHUT FOR YOU, THAT'S ALL THAT'S ALL, THAT'S ALL.
YOU WILL FEEL PAIN WHEN YOU SIT DOWN; THAT PART OF THE BONE WILL PRESS AGAINST YOUR NERVE. WHEN YOU SIT DOWN, THAT PART WILL ACHE.

Lo and Behold, haven't I have spoken, judge not before its time, lest you fall into damnation when you entertain untrue reports of the evil doers and liars and children of Belial and those who are influenced by them. (CCOCY 1)
CONSEQUENCES IF DISOBEY:

YOU WILL EXPERIENCE OUR HARSH CHASTISEMENT; YOU WILL FALL INTO GEHENNA, THE TRINITY POINTS TOWARD TARTARUS, AND BE TORMENTED BY THE DEVIL DAY AND NIGHT. YOU WILL BE DESTROYED IF YOU DON'T REPENT FAST WHEN BEING CONFRONTED DIRECTLY OR INDIRECTLY.
THAT PART OF YOUR TAILBONE WILL EXPERIENCE PAIN IN A GRADUAL, EXCRUCIATING MANNER, LEADING TO DETERIORATION OF THAT PART OF YOUR TAIL BONE. I SEE THESE WORDS "BONE SPURS"

Behave thyself when you are in my presence in my representatives (SHEKINAIH and AARON K DAVID), bridle your tongue, guard your heart, suffer not your mind or spirit in unbelief or rebel against my authority in them, for SHEKINAIH is given the full authority of THE FATHER to discipline my children in whatsoever ways that deem it to her and in all matters of THE FATHER's decision through her, seeing that you don't disobey her, lest I will deal with you severely, declares THE FATHER. Obey also, AARON K DAVID, who represents my son JESUS; otherwise, you will disqualify yourself from my army and will be chastised also by us, declares THE TRINITY. (CCOCY 2)
CONSEQUENCES IF DISOBEY:
YOU WILL BE DEMOTED, BLESSINGS FORFEITED, ALL HELL BREAK LOOSE, AND YOU WILL EXPERIENCE OPPOSITION FROM EVERY SIDE
YOU WILL EXPERIENCE INCREASING PAIN, GRADUAL BONE SPURS IN THAT PART OF YOUR BONE, AND BONE DETERIORATION.
Lo and Behold, argue not among yourself about who is greater among thee, be humble and consider others better than yourself, for I will exalt the humble and humble the proud. (CCOCY 3)
CONSEQUENCES IF DISOBEY:
YOU WILL BE FOR SURE HUMBLED BY US, BE HUMILIATED BY US, YOU WILL BE PRESSED DOWN BY US, SAYS THE TRINITY.
BONE SPURS, DISCOMFORT IN SITTING OR STANDING FOR LONG.
Shaddai, my Destroyer will destroy those who murmur against me and my representatives like the days of old during Moses time.(CCOCY 4)
CONSEQUENCES IF DISOBEY:

YOU WILL PROVOKE US TO GREAT WRATH, I SAW THE TRINITY HOLD 3 WHITEBOARDS WITH THE WORD "APPROVE" WRITTEN ON IT, FOR THE BLACK HOODED BLACK SKELETON TO RELEASE A BAG OF SNAKES TO BITE YOU JUST LIKE THE DAYS OF MOSES, I HEARD.

YOU WILL EXPERIENCE NON-STOP PROBLEMS/ HICCUPS ONE AFTER ANOTHER, NOTHING WILL GO SMOOTH, PEOPLE WILL DISLIKE YOU, YOU RELEASE A STINK AROMA AND PEOPLE WILL AVOID YOU, ALL YOUR CUSTOMERS WILL GO TO SOMEBODY'S ELSE.

Do not judge my representatives because my ways is always the ways of my offence, my rock of stumbling to test the children of Zion for their upward ascend unto Mount Zion. There are also for my signs and wonders.(CCOCY 5)
CONSEQUENCES IF DISOBEY:

YOU WILL STUMBLE AND FALL FROM GREAT HEIGHT INTO GEHENNA FIRE. YOU HAVE TO START FROM GROUND ZERO OF YOUR TEST UNTIL YOU OVERCOME WITH THE INVINCIBLE MEDALLION CHANT/VICTORY DECLARATION TO DEFEAT ALL YOUR ENEMY AS FOLLOWS:

"I CHOOSE TO SUBMIT TO THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH AND JESUS IN AARON K DAVID, WITH JOY AND PEACE, WITHOUT QUESTIONS ASKED, WITH 100% YIELDEDNESS AND ALLEGIANCE, AND CHOOSE TO RESIST THE ACCUSER AND IT SHALL FLEE FROM ME.
AMEN! AMEN! AMEN!"

AND BE A YES, YES, YES MAN OR WOMAN TO SKIP ALL YOUR TEST. WHEN YOU ARE A YES MAN OR WOMAN, YOU DON'T NEED FURTHER BREAKING, FOR WE ARE WELL PLEASED YOU. Hence, YOU CAN START TO ENTER INTO YOUR DESTINY IN US.

THAT PART OF THE TAIL BONE WILL EXPERIENCE GRADUAL PAIN AND DISCOMFORT, BONE SPURS, INFLAMMATION, I SAW THE STOOL GOT BLOOD, JESUS POINT TOWARDS THE TAIL BONE, INFECTION, BRUISES, PAINFUL WHEN PASSING MOTION.
Lo and Behold, I say to you, fret not of evil doers for my righteous judgement will stand in the end. (RIGHT KIDNEY).
CONSEQUENCES IF DISOBEY:
WORRY WILL ROB YOU OF YOUR PEACE OF IN US, SAYS THE TRINITY, RESULTING IN CANNOT EAT OR SLEEP, NO APPETITE FOR FOOD, INTERRUPTED SLEEP, DISTURB SLEEP.
YOU WILL HAVE PAIN, INFLAMMATION, POOR CIRCULATION IN JESUS POINTS TOWARDS YOUR RIGHT KIDNEY.

Be quick to listen to my instructions and words but be slow to speak. Reflect my teachings and my words daily and put them into practice by your actual walking it out, so that my glorious image may be formed in you.
(LEFT KIDNEY) CONSEQUENCES IF DISOBEY:

YOUR TONGUE WILL BE SHORTENED EVENTUALLY, HARD TO PRONOUNCE WORDS, WHICH WILL MAKE YOU SLOW TO SPEAK, QUICK TO LISTEN, UNTIL YOU ARE PERFECTED IN THIS AREA , THEN WE THROUGH OUR REPRESENTATIVES WILL PRAY FOR YOU AFTER YOU REPENT AND REMAINED REPENT, WE THROUGH THEM WILL PRAY TO GROW BACK YOUR TONGUE. YOU WILL HAVE DIFFICULTY IN CONTROLLING YOUR URINE, ALWAYS HAVE TO GO TO THE TOILET TO URINE REGULARLY, URINARY INCONTINENCE.
Take heed that you do not abhor or resist my breaking of you, crushing you to be selfless so that you will be Christlike in your character, being matured as real sons of THE FATHER. (RIGHT UPPER ARM)
CONSEQUENCES IF DISOBEY:
YOU WILL BE BROKEN SEVEN MORE HARSHLY, HARDER, THE HARDER THE NUT TO CRACK, THE HARDER WILL BE THE FORCE OF CRUSHING IN ORDER TO CRACK IT.
YOUR RIGHT UPPER ARM WILL BE AT PAIN, UNABLE TO LIFT UP YOUR RIGHT ARM FOR LONG.
Suffer not in bitterness when I confront you of your idols in your heart lest you be deceived and be led into destruction, permitted by us. (LEFT UPPER ARM)
CONSEQUENCES IF DISOBEY:

YOUR UPPER LEFT ARM WILL BE IN PAIN, AND YOU WILL NO STRENGTH TO LIFT UP YOUR LEFT ARM FOR LONG NOT ENOUGH BECAUSE YOUR CIRCULATION IS BLOCKED THERE. AND YOU WILL FEEL THE NUMBNESS OF YOUR RIGHT HAND AT TIMES.
Be warned that you do not strive with me nor my representatives, for if you do, you will be bitten by the serpents as in the days of Moses. (RIGHT KNEE)
CONSEQUENCES IF DISOBEY:
ALL SERPENTS WILL ATTACK YOU. YOU WILL BE TORMENTED BY THE SERPENT IN HELL DUE TO YOUR STRIVING WITH US IN OUR REPRESENTATIVES UNTIL YOU REPENT REMORSEFULLY.
I SAW THE SERPENT WILL BITE YOUR RIGHT KNEE; I SEE THIS WORD "OSTEOPOROSIS" OF YOUR RIGHT KNEECAP

Be vigilant that you do not give in to the suggestions and voices of the evil ones which will trick you into rebellion against me and my representatives, for if you do, you will be swallowed up in hell and be skipped over and be remembered no more, thereafter. (RIGHT KNEE)
CONSEQUENCES IF DISOBEY:
YOU WILL FALL INTO GEHENNA AND HAVE TO PAY TO THE LAST PENNY UNTIL YOU REMORSEFULLY REPENT AND NULLIFY ALL YOUR EVIL SPEAKING AND BE REPLACED BY THE OPPOSITE WORDS, AND ASK FORGIVENESS FROM US
IN OUR REPRESENTATIVES, WE SWEAR, WE SWEAR, WE SWEAR, SAYS THE TRINITY.
YOUR RIGHT KNEE WILL BE SWOLLEN AND DISTORT SLIGHTLY EVENTUALLY, AND YOU WILL HAVE SLIGHT PAIN WHEN GOING UP AND DOWN THE STAIRCASE.

Be a fast learner in learning my ways through my teaching through my representatives (SHEKINAIH and AARON K DAVID) so that you will not be left behind, be as one whom the kingdom of heaven suffer violent and violent press in by force. (YOUR RIGHT ANKLE)
CONSEQUENCES IF DISOBEY:

YOU WILL BE LEFT BEHIND AND WILL BE REPLACED EVENTUALLY ONCE YOUR CUTOFF TIME IS UP. I SAW A VISION OF THE HEAVEN GOLD DOOR JUST SHUT AND PAUL DAVID, STANDING AT THE GOLD DOOR, KNOCK, KNOCK, KNOCK; I SAW THE TRINITY HOLDING THREE WHITEBOARDS WITH THESE WORDS WRITTEN ON THESE BOARDS "AMEN, AMEN, AMEN", AFFIRMED THE TRINITY. THE GOLDEN EMPRESS IN SHEKINAIH OPENS THE HEAVEN GOLD DOOR AND SAID, "SORRY, ALL THE VACANCIES WERE TAKEN UP ALREADY; YOU ARE ONE 1 SECOND TOO SLOW." HENCE, ALL NEED TO PRESS IN WITH GREAT FORCE ELSE YOU WILL BE LEFT BEHIND BY DEFAULT; WE SWEAR, WE SWEAR, WE SWEAR.
THE TRINITY POINTS TOWARDS THE RIGHT ANKLE, CAUSING PAIN AND DISCOMFORT WHEN WALKING INTERMITTENTLY, SOMETIMES TWISTING THE ANKLE WHEN YOU WALK.

Again, I say unto you, Be Respectful, Honor, Obey US through our chosen representative SHEKINAIH and AARON K DAVID, that we will honor you after we have Finish OUR work of perfection in you, through them whom represent US. (YOUR LEFT ANKLE)
CONSEQUENCES IF DISOBEY:

YOU WILL BE DISFAVOURED, DEMOTED, AND WILL BE EVENTUALLY BEING REPLACED BY US BY THOSE WHO HONOUR, RESPECT US IN OUR REPRESENTATIVES IN SHEKINAIH AND JESUS IN AARON K DAVID, WITH NO TURNING AFTER PASS THE CUT OFF TIME.
PHYSICALLY, JESUS POINT TOWARDS YOUR LEFT ANKLE, TWISTED EASILY, PAIN INTERMITTENTLY, SWALLOW SUDDENLY, ETC.

Verily, verily, verily, I say unto you, for those who do practice doing all the above will by no means shall lose their rewards in US, through our representative, SHEKINAIH and AARON K DAVID. (CENTRE BACK OF YOUR HEAD, PINEAL GLAND)
YOUR PINEAL GLAND (THIRD EYE, SPIRITUAL EYES WILL BE OPEN TO SEE DIFFERENT DIMENSIONS IN TRAVEL BACK AND FORTH IN THE 50 AGES OF PAST, PRESENT AND FUTURE.
CONSEQUENCES IF DISOBEY:

YOU SHALL LOSE YOUR REWARDS, YOU HAVE WASTED YOUR VAIN WALK IN THIS EARTHLY LIFE THAT WE GIVE YOU, YOUR DAYS WILL BE SHORTEN, I SAW SHADDAI AXING A TREE WITH THE WORDS "UNFRUITFUL LIVES" WRITTEN ON THE TREE THAT IS BEING HEWN BY US, THROUGH OUR NAME, THE SHADDAI, WE SWEAR, WE SWEAR, WE SWEAR, I SAW THE FATHER, THE HOLY SPIRIT, AND JESUS CHRIST LIFT THEIR RIGHT PALM TO SWEAR AN OATH. THE END, THE END, THE END!

title: THE 50 BENEFITS OF UPHOLDING THE 50 PROTOCOLS OF HEAVEN:

segments.text: THE 50 BENEFITS OF UPHOLDING THE 50 PROTOCOLS OF HEAVEN:
Perfect health conditions
Continuous blessings unstoppable
You will be the head and not the big toe
There will be no devil in your life
You will be infallible
Before you open your mouth I will answer you
You will live to an old age
Your life will be stable
Your intelligence will exceed like no others
You will be promoted continuously every year both in the spiritual and in the physical realm.
You will be highly sought after.
You will eat the best of the land.
There is no sorrow in your life.
Your enemy will serve you.
You will have abundance, never suffer lack.
Your loved ones will not be deceived, for I will build a hedge over them.
Your salary will increase every year. During a recession, others will receive a pay cut, but yours will remain intact or untouched.
Less testing for you because you have honoured my commandments
Trouble free, stress free.
Life is a holiday during the preservation period, remain untouched.
Life is a continuous gift from us, every morning my mercy is new.
Instantaneous happenings, no holding back because Satan had no case against you.
Tears of joy await you daily. I saw a vision of JESUS giving you a bouquet of flowers before you get out of bed each day.
Everyone will call you the blessed ones.
You will have encounter with JESUS personally.
Your blessings will flow down to your children and your grandchildren.
You will have perfect vision, and you won't need glasses anymore.
Your youth will be restored.
Your grey hair will become black hair again, age reversal.
Your baldness will grow hair again; hormone reconstructed and being balanced again.
THE 50 BENEFITS OF UPHOLDING THE 50 PROTOCOLS OF HEAVEN
Your children will be given the best in everything. promised of a blessed life.
Your income will supersede among your peers.
Each will be given an inheritance from US, in different sizes.
All your diseases will be healed.
You don't operate by the law that govern this earth. you are now subject to a higher law, called the LAW OF THE SPIRIT.

Supernatural happenings will happen to you, because now you are tapping to a higher law of the universe. JESUS points towards the 50 POINTS IN YOUR BODY THAT CORRESPONDS TO THE 50 COSMOS/AGES, WHICH IS THE HIGHER LAW.
My vindication will be instantaneous.
A token of appreciation will be given to you each day, in one way or another by my angels(s).
You will have an inner knowing like me before things happen.
You will have very sharp discernment, just like me, as you are now a mini Elohim, being restored back to our image.
Things happen, as you command it to happen Rom 9:21-23with a sincere heart without ulterior motive
Many will be attracted to you in a good sense.
Shalom! my peace will dwell in you on a daily basis. therefore Satan is always under your feet.
Before you speak, words will be given to you, like a mini SHEKINAIH
Every day a prayer will be answered.
Before you ask, the answer will be given to you.
Holiday every year, free trip from God.
Your wealth will increase steeply as our steward.
Sharp business acumen, a shrewd businessman without harm, wiser than the children of this world.
A free trip to heaven.

segments.text: "THE SEVEN WORDS" TO METAMORPHOSIS INTO OUR ARCHANGEL, THE
MANIFESTATION OF THE SONS OF GOD!
THE ABOVE IS THE 7 WORDS TO DO THE FINISHING TOUCH TO ACTIVATE OR TRANSFORM YOU TO BE THE SONS OR DAUGHTERS OF OURS (THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH AND JESUS IN AARON K DAVID) AS FOLLOWS:

100% ALLEGIANCE, FOCUS, AND PRECISION IN MY FOREHEAD (3RD EYE) TO THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH AND JESUS IN AARON K DAVID, SO THAT THERE IS NO SATAN IN YOUR LIFE AS SATAN WILL BOW DOWN TO OBEY YOU WHEN YOU ARE 100% TO US IN SHEKINAIH AND JESUS IN AARON K DAVID!!
OBEDIENCE WITHOUT QUESTIONS ASKED IN MY RIGHT HAND, SO THAT WE WILL ESTABLISH THE FRUITS OF YOUR LABOUR!

100% YIELDEDNESS IN YOUR LEFT HAND TO THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH AND JESUS IN AARON K DAVID, TO ACTIVATE THE BLESSED LIFE, A STABLE, EASY JOURNEY WITH MINIMUM TESTS IN YOUR ASCEND TO MOUNT ZION, THE KINGDOM OF HEAVEN!

100% FAITH IN THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH AND JESUS IN AARON K DAVID IN MY VERTEBRA, WHICH IS YOUR FIRM FOUNDATION DIVINE GROUND THAT YOU ARE STANDING ON, SO THAT YOU WILL NOT BE SWALLOWED UP BY THE DOUBT SNAKE TO HURL YOU INTO TARTARUS WHERE ALL HELL BREAKS LOSE AND AS A RESULT, OPENED THE DOOR FOR THE DEVIL TO STEAL, KILL AND DESTROY EVERYTHING WE HAVE GIVEN TO YOU AND YOUR LOVED ONES AND THE ENTIRE REALM UNDER YOU!
"THE SEVEN WORDS" TO METAMORPHOSIS INTO OUR ARCHANGEL
WALK IN MERCY IN MY RIGHT LEG, AND MERCY SHALL BE SHOWN TO YOU,
WALK IN THE ULTIMATE TRUTH TAUGHT BY THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH AND JESUS IN AARON K DAVID IN MY LEFT LEG, AND THE TRUTH SHALL SET YOU FREE AND YOU SHALL BE FREE INDEED!

BEING ROOTED AND FILLED WITH THE FLUID OF THE `FATHER'S LOVE SO THAT YOU WILL NOT BE EASILY DECEIVED WHEN WE PERMIT TESTINGS IN YOUR LIFE TO TEST YOU, TO OFFEND YOUR MIND IN ORDER TO EXPOSE WHAT IS IN YOUR HEART THROUGHOUT 7 OFFENCES OF ADONAI, SO THAT YOU WILL KNOW YOUR STRONGHOLDS AND REPENT ACCORDING TO HOW WE TAUGHT YOU IN THIS BOOK UNDER THE SECTION OF HOW TO PRAY FOR YOURSELF AND OTHERS AND HOW TO BRING FRUITS MEET FOR YOUR REPENTANCE SO THAT THE DEVIL WILL RELEASE YOU AFTER YOU HAVE BOTH REPENTED AND BRING FRUITS MEET FOR YOUR REPENTANCE BEFORE THE BLOOD OF JESUS IS ABLE TO CLEANSE YOU FROM ALL YOUR SINS AND UNRIGHTEOUSNESS.

YOU NEED TO BE CLOTHED WITH THE SKIN OF THE SEVERITY OF THE FATHER IN/SPOKE THROUGH THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH, FOR YOU` TO BE ABLE TO BE CONFORMED INTO THE IMAGE OF A CHRIST BY PERFECTING IN HOLINESS AND TO BE PERFECT AS YOUR ABBA FATHER IN THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH AND JESUS IN AARON K DAVID, IS PERFECT. FOR WITHOUT THE SKIN OF THE SEVERITY OF THE FATHER IN THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH, YOU WILL NOT BE ABLE TO BE PERFECTED. THIS IS BECAUSE YOU WILL TAKE OUR LOVE FOR GRANTED AND TRAMPLE OUR LOVE UNDER YOUR FEET AND CONTINUE TO SIN IF THERE ARE NO CONSEQUENCES OF SIN. WHEN ONE SINNETH NOT, THE DEVIL TOUCHES NOT!

HENCE OUR DISCIPLINE THROUGH SHEKINAIH IS NECESSARY IF MY CHILDREN ARE TO BE PERFECTED UNTO HOLINESS IN ORDER TO PARTAKE OF OUR DIVINE NATURE, FOR WE DISCIPLINE THOSE WHOM WE LOVE AND ARE CALLED ACCORDING TO OUR PURPOSE!
YOU SHALL KNOW THIS TRUTH, AND THIS TRUTH SHALL SET YOU FREE FROM MISSING THE MARK CALLED SIN, AND YOU SHALL BE FREED INDEED.
FOR THE FULL TRAINING ON OUR ABOVE SEVEN WORDS, WE URGE YOU TO WATCH OUR DIRECT TEACHING FROM HEAVEN IN OUR YOUTUBE CHANNEL LINK BELOW:

THE MENTAL PERSPECTIVE, "THE PARADIGM SHIFT"!

THE RECHANNELLING OF YOUR SPIRITUAL ENERGY!

HOW TO MAXIMISE "THE UPS" AND "THE DOWNS" TO ACHIEVE THE MAXIMUM QUANTITATIVE AND QUALITATIVE REWARDS AND PROMOTIONS IN HEAVEN FOR YOU!

ABSOLUTELY, THE TRINITY
IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH
"To enlist in the End Times' Army, one must adhere strictly to The Protocols of Heaven, for only those who are pure and obedient will stand in the final battle."
APPENDIX 3 - BEHOLD MY NAMES | THE TEST PAPERS OF THE ADONAI
APPENDIX 3
Extract from
BEHOLD MY MESSENGER 3, BEHOLD MY NAMES, THE TEST PAPERS OF THE ADONAI
(page 510 to 512)
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, what does this diagram which SHEKINAIH saw symbolize?

JESUS: The hand of SHEKINAIH that is inside the hand of THE FATHER symbolizes that the doing of SHEKINAIH is controlled by THE FATHER. The Tree of Offences on SHEKINAIH's hand is the offensive testing of THE FATHER through SHEKINAIH for His children. The test papers of our name, "THE ADONAI," that are in SHEKINAIH's hand symbolize her authority to release the test papers to test them with our seven squeezes. My FATHER, through His name, "THE ADONAI", will use these seven areas to test His children to see whether they will remain faithful and be at peace when they are being squeezed by Him through the name, "THE ADONAI". We will squeeze them financially, physically, or mentally, or emotionally, or ridiculously, or ask impossible demands, or through things that are completely out of this world. We through our name, "THE ADONAI", shall have the last laugh and will turn their situations around provided that they are not offended by the seven test papers during the time of testing in different phases of their life.
BASIC TRAINING OF THE 144,000
APPENDIX 3 - BEHOLD MY NAMES | BASIC TRAINING OF THE 144,000
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, what does this diagram with the ascending ten peaks which SHEKINAIH saw symbolize?

JESUS: This diagram symbolizes the tests that my 144,000 brides need to go through in their life journeys in order to ascend my Heavenly Mountain/Mount Zion. Only those who have passed our seven offences through our name, "THE ADONAI", and have 100% submitted to us through both of you without questioning our word of command but willingly yield with joy, will be chosen and metamorphose into archangels with authority and power a million times greater than any sons of THE ELOHIM who have only passed our seven steps of offences and qualified to be in the lower part of heaven. It is a tough ascent where many would slip in their climbs, and have their hearts exposed of the strongholds in their lives, but I will give them the grace to continue the journey.

THE FATHER: Woe unto those who are offended by these tests; for if they lose their peace and faith in me in SHEKINAIH, because of the tests, they will definitely lose the little that they have for sure (100% guarantee, we swear). However, blessed are those who have overcome these offences and are victorious; many blessings, promotions, rewards, and gifts await them through you and SHEKINAIH who represent my name, "THE ADONAI".
"The commandments for the last days' army are not mere guidelines but divine decrees that must be followed without question, for they lead to victory and eternal life."
APPENDIX 4

title: 1B) THE ONE WHO HAS THE FINAL SAY IN THE COSMOSES

segments.text: Extract from

The conclusion of the matter is, are you still living in you or have you emptied your all in surrendering your all unto Me in order for Me to live through your life on this earth?

JESUS: Only those who score 10/10 in the below ten areas of perfection shall be loved by Us to be one with Us to be anointed with authority and power to manifest Our glory.

Joh 17:22 And the glory which thou gavest me I have given them; that they may be one, even as we are one: Joh 17:23 I in them, and thou in me, that they may be made perfect (G5048 "teleioo") in one; and that the world may know that thou hast sent me, and hast loved them, as thou hast loved me.
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, what is the definition of being perfect in your eyes?

"The Seven Spiritual Offences are The Ultimate Tests, separating the true sons of ELOHIM from those who merely profess faith. Only by passing these tests and yielding fully to SHEKINAIH and AARON K DAVID will one ascend to the heights of Divine Authority."
