(JESUS then drew the above diagram and said to SHEKINAIH AND DAVID:) The above picture depicts a well-balanced perfected being which is the exact resemblance of the image of THE ELOHIM before Adam fell.

The elects, once tested and perfected, will have all the compartments in their minds which tally with the corresponding parts of the organs within the body, fully lighten up respectively. These perfected saints will enjoy heaven like capacity on earth like Adam before the fall.

1Ch 29:10 Wherefore David blessed THE YAHWEH before all the congregation: and David said, Blessed be thou, THE YAHWEH ELOHIM of Israel our father, for ever and ever. 1Ch 29:11 Thine, O THE YAHWEH, is the greatness (H1420 "gedulah"), and the might (H1369 "geburah" power and authority), and the beauty (H8597 "tipharah" majesty ), and the victory (H5331 "netsach" enduring, and the glory (H1935 "hod" ): for all that is in the heaven and in the earth is thine; thine is the kingdom, O THE YAHWEH, and thou art exalted as head above all. 1Ch 29:12 Both riches (H6239 "osher") and glory H3519) come from your presence (H6440 "paniym"), and thou reignest over all; and in thine hand is power (H3581 "koach") and might (H1369 "geburah"); and in thine hand it is to make great (H1431 "gadal"), and to give strength(H2388 "chazaq") unto all.
Wisdom and understanding, greatness, might in authority and power over all creation, beauty in holiness and majesty, victory in perpetuity, and glory which belong Us, THE YAHWEH, will be theirs.

I once emptied Myself of My divinity and all these to fulfil all righteousness by going through the suffering and death of the cross but was reinstated with the power, riches, wisdom, might, honor, glory and blessing in the end.

Rev 5:11 And I beheld, and I heard the voice of many angels round about the throne and the beasts and the elders: and the number of them was ten thousand times ten thousand, and thousands of thousands; Rev 5:12 Saying with a loud voice, Worthy is the Lamb that was slain to receive power, and riches, and wisdom, and might, and honour, and glory, and blessing.

Thus, I became the leader and completer of those who are called to be a partaker of the fellowship of My suffering and death so that they also will be crowned with glory and honour and to have dominion over the three realms.

Psa 8:1 To the chief Musician upon Gittith, A Psalm of David. O THE YAHWEH our ADON, how enlarged (H117 "addiyr") is thy name in all the earth! Who hast set thy glory (H1935 "hod") above the heavens. Psa 8:2 Out of the mouth of babes and sucklings hast thou ordained strength (H5797 "oz") because of thine enemies, that thou mightest still the enemy and the avenger. Psa 8:3 When I consider thy heavens, the work of thy fingers, the moon and the stars, which thou hast ordained; Psa 8:4 What is man, that thou art mindful of him? And the son of man, that thou visitest him? Psa 8:5 For thou hast made him a little lower than THE ELOHIM, and hast crowned him with glory (H1935) and honour (H1926 "hadar"). Psa 8:6 Thou madest him to have dominion over the works of thy hands; thou hast put all things under his feet: Psa 8:7 All sheep and oxen, yea, and the beasts of the field; Psa 8:8 The fowl of the air, and the fish of the sea, and whatsoever passeth through the paths of the seas. Psa 8:9 O THE YAHWEH our ADON, how excellent is thy name in all the earth!

Psalms 21 depicts Our blessing of salvation/restoration on the children whom We have given who rejoice in SHEKINAIH and you, the strength of THE YAHWEH. They shall receive wisdom and understanding and nothing shall be withholding from them and blessings of goodness anticipated them. They shall live in perpetuity with glory and honor rejoicing with Us manifested in SHEKINAIH and you, the Angel of Our Presence, who will destroy those who come against them.

Psa 21:1 To the chief Musician, A Psalm of David. The king shall joy in thy strength (H5795 "oz"), O YAHWEH; and in thy salvation how greatly shall he rejoice! Psa 21:2 Thou hast given him his heart's desire, and hast not withholden the request of his lips. Selah. Psa 21:3 For thou preventest him pure gold on his head. Psa 21:4 He asked life of thee, and thou gavest it him, even length of days for ever and ever. Psa 21:5 His glory is great in thy salvation: glory (H1935 "hod") and honour (H1926 "hadar" hast thou laid upon him. Psa 21:6 For thou hast made him most blessed forever: thou hast made

him exceeding glad with thy countenance. Psa 21:7 For the king trusteth in THE YAHWEH, and through the mercy of the most High he shall not be moved. Psa 21:8 Thine hand shall find out all thine enemies: thy right hand shall find out those that hate thee. Psa 21:9 Thou shalt make them as a fiery oven in the time of thine anger: THE YAHWEH shall swallow them up in his wrath, and the fire shall devour them. Psa 21:10 Their fruit shalt thou destroy from the earth, and their seed from among the children of men. Psa 21:11 For they intended evil against thee: they imagined a mischievous device, which they are not able to perform. Psa 21:12 Therefore shalt thou make them turn their back, when thou shalt make ready thine arrows upon thy strings against the face of them. Psa 21:13 Be thou exalted, THE YAHWEH, in thine own strength: so will we sing and praise thy power.

In Isaiah 61:1, the meek refers to My brothers/sisters who are incarnated to be brought low. The good tidings (gospel of the Kingdom) is for them. After being perfected unto righteousness, peace and joy in the HOLY GHOST through suffering, they now inherit the Kingdom of heaven with power.

Isa 61:1 The Spirit of THE ADONAI YAHVIH is upon me; because THE YAHWEH hath anointed me to preach good tidings unto the meek (H6035 "anav"); he hath sent me to bind up the brokenhearted, to proclaim liberty to the captives, and the opening of the prison to them that are bound; Isa 61:2 To proclaim the acceptable year of THE YAHWEH, and the day of vengeance of our ELOHIM; to comfort all that mourn; Isa 61:3 To appoint unto them that mourn in Zion, to give unto them beauty for ashes, the oil of joy for mourning, the garment of praise for the spirit of heaviness; that they might be called trees of righteousness, the planting of THE YAHWEH, that he might be glorified.
Mat 5:3 Blessed are the poor (G4434 "ptochos") in spirit: for theirs is the kingdom of heaven.
Rom 14:17 For the kingdom of THE ELOHIM is not meat and drink; but righteousness, and peace, and joy in the Holy Ghost.
Their suffering have resulted in them bearing the spirit of meekness of love which come with power.

1Co 4:19 But I will come to you shortly, if THE YAHWEH will, and will know, not the speech of them which are puffed up, but the power. 1Co 4:20 For the kingdom of THE ELOHIM is not in word, but in power. 1Co 4:21 What will ye? Shall I come unto you with a rod, or in love, and in the spirit of meekness?

They are now comforted because they have been crowned with glory and anointed with the oil of joy like Me. They are now the ministers of righteousness and will be used by THE FATHER to manifest His glory.
Mat 5:4 Blessed are they that mourn: for they shall be comforted.
Heb 1:9 Thou hast loved righteousness, and hated iniquity; therefore THE ELOHIM, even thy ELOHIM, hath anointed thee with the oil of gladness above thy fellows (G3353 "metochos" partaker).

After the Kingdoms of the antichrist have been destroyed by THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by SHEKINAIH/JESUS represented by AARON K DAVID, they shall inherit the earth as kings because of their meekness as a Christ.
Mat 5:5 Blessed are the meek: for they shall inherit the earth.

In the age to come, SHEKINAIH and you, together with the children We have given SHEKINAIH and you, shall revamp the fallen cities and create a futuristic city beyond comparison of any age. The technology will be instant like real heaven. Everything will be created using brain power. It will be very different from what the Antichrist through her futuristic scientists who are pursuing

their vision of "Singularity" through their technologies like computers, genetics, nanotechnology, robotics and artificial intelligence. On the contrary, the real creative power of a little Elohim will be in SHEKINAIH and you and Our circumcised children that follow both of you faithfully. They will be using the thought wavelength to create about anything. So far, none have witnessed it at this age or even in the coming age. It will be awesome, just like a mini heaven of its own. This is but a small gleam of the power of the age to come. The people of the nations shall serve them, and they shall eat the riches of the world and live like elites and royalty. At last, for all their shame, I shall reward them double; and their confusion they shall rejoice in their portion: therefore in the delightful land they shall possess the double: everlasting joy shall be unto them.

Mat 6:28 And why take ye thought for raiment? Consider the lilies of the field, how they grow; they toil not, neither do they spin: Mat 6:29 And yet I say unto you, That even Solomon in all his glory was not arrayed like one of these Mat 6:33 But seek ye first the kingdom of THE ELOHIM, and
his righteousness, and all these things shall be added unto you

They are the vessels of mercy whom I have chosen. (Rom 9:21-23) They shall ascend and descend to earth from their thrones in the heavens as they determined. They shall be directed by Us in truth perpetually, and their descendants shall be acknowledged by the world's inhabitants as being blessed by Us. Everything they need will be instantly placed before them in the blinking of an eye. In this realm, all needs are fulfilled. They shall suffer no lack. It is a perfect state of awareness and of divine health. The old shall look young. They shall be in their perfect state constantly because My light radiates upon them and becomes their fountain of youth and divinity life form.

Isa 65:13 Therefore thus saith THE ADONAI YAHVIH, Behold, my servants shall eat, but ye shall be hungry: behold, my servants shall drink, but ye shall be thirsty: behold, my servants shall rejoice, but ye shall be ashamed: Isa 65:14 Behold, my servants shall sing for joy of heart, but ye shall cry for sorrow of heart, and shall howl for vexation of spirit. Isa 65:15 And ye shall leave your Name for a curse unto my chosen: for THE ADONAI YAHVIH shall slay thee, and call his servants by another name: Isa 65:16 That he who blesseth himself in the earth shall bless himself in THE ELOHIM of truth; and he that sweareth in the earth shall swear by THE ELOHIM of truth; because the former troubles are forgotten, and because they are hid from mine eyes. Isa 65:17 For, behold, I create new heavens and a new earth: and the former shall not be remembered, nor come into mind. Isa 65:18 But be ye glad and rejoice for ever in that which I create: for, behold, I create Jerusalem a rejoicing, and her people a joy. Isa 65:19 And I will rejoice in Jerusalem, and joy in my people: and the voice of weeping shall be no more heard in her, nor the voice of crying. Isa 65:20 There shall be no more thence an infant of days, nor an old man that hath not filled his days: for the child shall die an hundred years old; but the sinner being an hundred years old shall be accursed. Isa 65:21 And they shall build houses, and inhabit them; and they shall plant vineyards, and eat the fruit of them. Isa 65:22 They shall not build, and another inhabit; they shall not plant, and another eat: for as the days of a tree are the days of my people, and mine elect shall long enjoy the work of their hands. Isa 65:23 They shall not labour in vain, nor bring forth for trouble; for they are the seed of the blessed of THE YAHWEH, and their offspring with them. Isa 65:24 And it shall come to pass, that before they call, I will answer; and while they are yet speaking, I will hear. Isa 65:25 The wolf and the lamb shall feed together, and the lion shall eat straw like the bullock: and dust shall be the serpent's meat. They shall not hurt nor destroy in all my holy mountain, saith THE YAHWEH.

These are the children who believe that SHEKINAIH and you are The Angel of Our Presence, who bears Our Names and have receive both of you, who represent THE TRINITY and thus perfected and given spiritual authority to become Our legitimate sons.

Joh 1:11 He came unto his own, and his own received him not. Joh 1:12 But as many as received him, to them gave he authority (G1849 "exousia") to become the sons of THE ELOHIM, even to them that believe on his name: Joh 1:13 Which were born, not of blood, nor of the will of the flesh, nor of the will of man, but of THE ELOHIM.
Having loved Us and following My footsteps in My suffering through persecutions and death, they are now conformed to Our image and are given spiritual power according to the spirit of holiness.

Rom 1:1 Paul, a servant of JESUS Christ, called to be an apostle, separated unto the gospel of THE ELOHIM, Rom 1:2 (Which he had promised afore by his prophets in the holy scriptures,) Rom 1:3 Concerning his Son JESUS Christ our YAHWEH, which was made of the seed of David according to the flesh; Rom 1:4 And declared to be the Son of THE ELOHIM with power (G1411 "dunamis"), according to the spirit of holiness (G42 "hagiasune"), by the resurrection from the dead: Rom 1:5 By whom we have received grace and apostleship, for obedience to the faith among all nations, for his name: Rom 1:6 Among whom are ye also the called of JESUS Christ:
Because they have forsaken all, We shall reward them with the riches, honour, glory and power.

Mar 10:28 Then Peter began to say unto him, Lo, we have left all, and have followed thee. Mar 10:29 And JESUS answered and said, Verily I say unto you, There is no man that hath left house, or brethren, or sisters, or father, or mother, or wife, or children, or lands, for my sake, and the gospel's, Mar 10:30 But he shall receive an hundredfold now in this time, houses, and brethren, and sisters, and mothers, and children, and lands, with persecutions; and in the world to come eternal life. Mar 10:31 But many that are first shall be last; and the last first.

We own the entire Cosmoses and all the wealth within. When they yielded 100% unto Us through SHEKINAIH and you, Our Two Representatives, We will grant them a new heart, a new mind and a new spirit like Ours. Our thoughts and heart's desire become theirs. They shall think and feel alike. They will begin to do serious business with Us. All Our resources are unlimited to back them up as they do Our will all the days of their lives. They shall be abundantly taken care of. All We have are theirs. All they have are also ours. We are one.

1Co 3:21 Therefore let no man boast in men. For all things are yours; 1Co 3:22 Whether Paul, or Apollos, or Cephas, or the Cosmos, or life, or death, or things present, or things to come; all are yours; 1Co 3:23 And ye are Christ; and Christ is of THE ELOHIM.

Yielding 100% to SHEKINAIH and you, Our Representatives, is to yield to the way of THE YAHWEH by going through the depression of weeping and be made lowly in mind. As they abide in Our teachings through both of you, who represent THE TRINITY, We will fill up their blessings in which they will go from strength to strength, everyone appearing before Me in the Heavenly Mount Zion. We will not withhold any good thing from them.

Psa 84:5 Blessed is the Adam whose strength (H5795 "oz") is in thee; in whose heart are the ways of them. Psa 84:6 Who passing through the valley of weeping (H1056 "Baca") make it a well; the teaching (H4175 "moreh") also filleth the blessing (H1293 "berakah"). Psa 84:7 They go from strength (H2428 "chayil") to strength, every one of them in Zion appeareth before THE

ELOHIM. Psa 84:8 O YAHWEH ELOHIM SABAOTH, hear my prayer: give ear, O ELOHIM of Jacob. Selah. Psa 84:9 Behold, O ELOHIM our shield, and look upon the face of thine anointed. Psa 84:10 For a day in thy courts is better than a thousand. I had rather be a doorkeeper in the house of my ELOHIM, than to dwell in the tents of wickedness. Psa 84:11 For THE YAHWEH ELOHIM is a sun and shield: THE YAHWEH will give grace and glory: no good thing will he withhold from them that walk uprightly. Psa 84:12 O YAHWEH SABAOTH, blessed is the man that trusteth in thee.
The word "strength" H2428 "chayil" mean wealth, forces and power. Therefore they shall have unlimited wealth, forces and power from Us.

During perilous time when darkness cover the earth, we through our Representatives will appear to Our elects with the true gospel. All flesh shall see Our glory through them. Many people and kings from many nations shall be drawn to them. Many potential Brides and Anointed Ones will also be gathered and fed by them with the sincere milk of the last days' doctrine. The wealth of Our sons from the Arab and Africa nations shall be converted to them as they join forces with them because of Our glory in them. Our sons among the wealthy men of United Kingdom (Isles) and European Union (ships of Tarshish) shall be gathered by them. They shall come with their silver and their gold and place at their feet because We, THE YAHWEH have fulfilled Our words and revealed our glory to SHEKINAIH and you, Our Representatives with Our children who pay their allegiance to both of you, who represent Us, THE TRINITY.

After Mystery Babylon's kingdom had been destroyed, the people of the nations and their kings shall serve SHEKINAIH and you, and Our perfected children. The gate of heavenly Jerusalem shall be opened continually so that the resources and wealth (H2428 "chayil") of the people and kings may be brought in. For the nation and kingdom that will not serve SHEKINAIH and you and Our perfected children shall perish; yea, those nations shall be utterly wasted. My Anointed Ones/ the glory of Lebanon shall come unto them to beautify and be part of Our temple and the feet (infantry) shall be glorious. The sons of Satan that despised and afflicted them shall come bending unto them at the soles of their feet and acknowledge that they are the Heavenly Zion of the Holy One of Israel. Whereas once they have been forsaken and hated, We will make them live in majesty for many generations. The people and kings of the nations shall bring their resources to them. They shall be overseers of peace and taskmasters of righteousness. Violence shall no more be heard in their land nor robbery and invasion within their borders for they are all righteous deliverers and shall inherit the land for ever. We will radiate Our light on them and they shall be in their perfect state constantly in divinity life form. They shall multiply and become a powerful nation.

Isa 60:1 Arise, shine; for thy light is come, and the glory of THE YAHWEH is risen upon thee. Isa 60:2 For, behold, the darkness shall cover the earth, and gross darkness the people: but THE YAHWEH shall arise upon thee, and his glory shall be seen upon thee. Isa 60:3 And the Gentiles shall come to thy light, and kings to the brightness of thy rising. Isa 60:4 Lift up thine eyes round about, and see: all they gather themselves together, they come to thee: thy sons shall come from far, and thy daughters shall be nursed at thy side. Isa 60:5 Then thou shalt see, and flow together, and thine heart shall fear, and be enlarged; because the abundance of the sea shall be converted unto thee, the forces (H2428 "chayil") of the Gentiles shall come unto thee. Isa 60:6 The multitude of camels shall cover thee, the dromedaries of Midian and Ephah; all they from Sheba shall come: they shall bring gold and incense; and they shall shew forth the praises of THE YAHWEH. Isa 60:7 All the flocks of Kedar shall be gathered together unto thee, the rams of Nebaioth shall minister unto thee: they shall come up with acceptance on mine altar, and

I will glorify the house of my glory. Isa 60:8 Who are these that fly as a cloud, and as the doves to their windows? Isa 60:9 Surely the isles shall wait for me, and the ships of Tarshish first, to bring thy sons from far, their silver and their gold with them, unto the name of THE YAHWEH thy ELOHIM, and to the Holy One of Israel, because he hath glorified thee. Isa 60:10 And the sons of strangers shall build up thy walls, and their kings shall minister unto thee: for in my wrath I smote thee, but in my favor have I had mercy on thee. Isa 60:11 Therefore thy gates shall be open continually; they shall not be shut day nor night; that men may bring unto thee the forces of the Gentiles, and that their kings may be brought. Isa 60:12 For the nation and kingdom that will not serve thee shall perish; yea, those nations shall be utterly wasted. Isa 60:13 The glory of Lebanon shall come unto thee, the fir tree, the pine tree, and the box together, to beautify the place of my sanctuary; and I will make the place of my feet glorious. Isa 60:14 The sons also of them that afflicted thee shall come bending unto thee; and all they that despised thee shall bow themselves down at the soles of thy feet; and they shall call thee, The city of THE YAHWEH, The Zion of the Holy One of Israel. Isa 60:15 Whereas thou hast been forsaken and hated, so that no man went through thee, I will make thee an eternal excellency, a joy of many generations. Isa 60:16 Thou shalt also suck the milk of the Gentiles, and shalt suck the breast of kings: and thou shalt know that I THE YAHWEH am thy Saviour and thy Redeemer, the mighty One of Jacob. Isa 60:17 For brass I will bring gold, and for iron, I will bring silver, and for wood brass, and for stones iron: I will also make thy officers peace, and thine exactors righteousness. Isa 60:18 Violence shall no more be heard in thy land, wasting nor destruction within thy borders; but thou shalt call thy walls Salvation, and thy gates Praise. Isa 60:19 The sun shall be no more thy light by day; neither for brightness shall the moon give light unto thee: but THE YAHWEH shall be unto thee an everlasting light, and thy ELOHIM thy glory. Isa 60:20 Thy sun shall no more go down; neither shall thy moon withdraw itself: for THE YAHWEH shall be thine everlasting light, and the days of thy mourning shall be ended. Isa 60:21 Thy people also shall be all righteous: they shall inherit the land for ever, the branch of my planting, the work of my hands, that I may be glorified. Isa 60:22 A little one shall become a thousand, and a small one a strong nation: I THE YAHWEH will hasten it in his time.

In wisdom and understanding, there are nonequal to SHEKINAIH and you and Our perfected children under both of you, who represent THE TRINITY. All of you shall be the cream of the crop. As they have set themselves apart unto Us to be holy, like Daniel, We will fill them with the Spirit of Wisdom and Understanding and will place them in potential leadership position of tomorrow. They will lead a steady life without the Diabolos/ Accuser opposing them for they are overcomers in Us.

We change the times and the seasons. We remove kings and set up kings. We give wisdom to the wise and knowledge to them that know understanding. We reveal deep and secret things. We know what is in the darkness and the light dwells with Us. We will give wisdom and might and made known to them what We have determine in the universe. They are Our greater Jonah, Our last days' signs and wonders to the principalities and authorities. They are Our Solomon whose wisdom are greater than the Solomon in the bible.

Mat 12:38 Then certain of the scribes and of the Pharisees answered, saying, Master, we would see a sign from thee. Mat 12:39 But he answered and said unto them, An evil and adulterous generation seeketh after a sign; and there shall no sign be given to it, but the sign of the prophet Jonas: Mat 12:40 For as Jonas was three days and three nights in the whale's belly; so shall the Son of man be three days and three nights in the heart of the earth. Mat 12:41 The men of Nineveh shall rise in judgment with this generation, and shall condemn it: because they repented at the preaching of Jonas; and, behold, a greater than Jonas is here. Mat 12:42 The queen of the south shall rise up in the judgment with this generation, and shall
condemn it: for she came from the uttermost parts of the earth to hear the wisdom of Solomon; and, behold, a greater than Solomon is here.

Through them, we will manifest Our manifold wisdom to the principalities and authorities in the universe. This is Our eternal purpose for those who are called to take part in the fellowship of My suffering and conformity to My death to be a Christ/Anointed one.

Eph 3:8 Unto me, who am less than the least of all saints, is this grace given, that I should preach among the Gentiles the unsearchable riches of Christ; Eph 3:9 And to make all men see what is the fellowship of the mystery, which from the beginning of the world hath been hid in THE ELOHIM, who created all things by JESUS Christ: Eph 3:10 To the intent that now unto the principalities and authorities in heavenly places might be known by the church the manifold wisdom of THE ELOHIM, Eph 3:11 According to the eternal purpose which he purposed in Christ JESUS our Lord:

"The path of the Bride and the Anointed Ones is steep and narrow, guided by the teachings of SHEKINAIH and AARON K DAVID. It is a journey of purification, climbing the Holy Mountain of Zion, where only those who submit fully to the refining fire will be crowned as The True Warriors of the Last Days."
APPENDIX 8

title: THE WALK OF A BRIDE & ANOINTED ONES

segments.text: Extract from
BEHOLD MY MESSENGER 1, BEHOLD MY GLORY
(page 138 to 245)
THE WALK OF A BRIDE & ANOINTED ONES
APPENDIX 8 - BEHOLD MY GLORY | THE WALK OF A BRIDE & ANOINTED ONES

Last but not least, everyone must read Our teaching and instructions written in BEHOLD! MY MESSENGER 1, BEHOLD! MY GLORY. I will further instruct you on My preordained path for your perfection which I will put you through in Crowned Eagles Global, without which you will not make it to My Holy Mountain.
For this is My provision for you to escape Hell Fire!

Through every step of your climb in My Holy Mountain in Mount Zion, you will be purified as you ascend in your journey with our guidance, instructions, admonition through OUR REPRESENTATIVES, SHEKINAIH and AARON K DAVID, THE TWO CHERUBIM OF GLORY, prepared by Us for this last day preparation of Our Bridal Warrior purpose, in order that you may be purged from your filth with My refiner's fire through SHEKINAIH, and My fullers' soap through AARON K DAVID.

In the following diagram below, THE FATHER has given SHEKINAIH, His incarnation, THE KEYS TO ENTER THE KINGDOM OF HEAVEN, of which each must go through this STRAIT PATH if he/she wants to be part of heaven!

Apart from this, no one can make it to our Holy Mountain, for the god of this world has blinded all eyes to perceive My GLORIOUS GOSPEL/REAL KINGDOM, and the majority of earthly people, including my elect(s) and children, have missed it at most time!

2 Co 4:3 But if our gospel be hid, it is hid to them that are lost: 2 Co 4:4 In whom the god of this world hath blinded the minds of them which believe not, lest the light of the glorious gospel of Christ, who is the image of God, should shine unto them.

Please read BEHOLD MY MESSENGER 1, BEHOLD MY GLORY, PART 2, CHAPTER 1 THE ASCENT, CHAPTER 2 SONG OF DEGREES, CHAPTER 3 THE PATH OF THE BRIDES and CHAPTER 4 THE PATH OF THE ANOINTED ONES on page138 to 245
for detailed explanation of the above diagram.
CHAPTER 1
THE VISION OF THE ASCENT

SHEKINAIH: I see THE FATHER in a white robe transformed himself into me in Golden Empress robe used a golden key to unlock a dual padlock on a door. As the door was unlocked, it opened up and I saw two ascending paths leading to the top of the same mountain.

The left side of the ascending path was made up of five levels with these words, "Peace and Joy, Meekness of Love, Lowliness of Mind, Yieldedness and Faith in THE ELOHIM" written on each level progressively. I also saw the words "Bridal Path" superimposed on these paths.

The right side of the ascending path was made up of seven levels with these words, "Faith, Joy, Patience, Mercy, Hope, Love and Peace" written on each level progressively. I also saw the words "Anointed Path" superimposed on these paths.

I saw two groups of people ascending these two paths. I saw those who ascend on the Bridal Path have the words, "Brides" written on their foreheads, and those who ascended on the Anointed Path have the words, "Anointed Ones" written on their foreheads.

I saw the Brides and the Anointed Ones ascended their respective path singing the song "Ye are holiness unto the Lord" from our Song Album 1. I saw angels blowing trumpets and sprinkling gold dusts and flowers on them on the left and right of the paths as they progressed from each level. I saw them coated with increasing layers of gold as they progressed from level to level.
After these two groups of people have reached the top of the mountain, I saw them looking at a gate of a garden whose access was through an open field which were paved with broken glasses.
I then saw those whose foreheads are marked with the words, "Brides", crawling on these broken glasses toward the gate.

I saw those whose heads are marked with the words, "Anointed Ones" rolling their bodies over the broken glasses towards the gate. It was a bloody scene as both groups were so cut and bruised by the broken glasses. I then saw them pointing fingers at one another.
After that, I saw all of them fell into a river and the moment their bodies touched the river, the whole river turned into a river of fire.
I saw many angels and demons dragging them out of the fire and nailing them on individual crosses to be crucified.

DAVID: According to my research, Ichthys (also Ichthus) is from the Koine Greek word for fish. It is a symbol consisting of two intersecting arcs with

Ichthus is an acronym/acrostic which translates into English as "JESUS CHRIST, Son of ELOHIM, Saviour".
Iota (i) is the first letter of Iēsous (Ἰησοῦς), Greek for "JESUS".
Chi (ch) is the first letter of Christos (Χριστός), Greek for "anointed".
Theta (th) is the first letter of Theou (Θεου), Greek for "God's", the genitive case of Θεóς, Theos, Greek for "God".
Upsilon (y) is the first letter of huios (Υἱός), Greek for "Son".
Sigma (s) is the first letter of sōtēr (Σωτήρ), Greek for "Savior".

The word "JESUS" in Greek is the same as the word "Joshua" in Hebrew. It is from H3091 "yehoshua" which is from H3068 "Jehovah" pronounced as "THE YAHWEH" and H3467 "yasha" which means "to deliver, to save". Thus, the meaning of JESUS/Joshua is "THE YAHWEH'S Deliverer."

SUDDEN UNEXPECTED MISHAP
In Private Houses Worldwide Timeline/Frame: Daily Event
Lo! And Behold! The sky is covered with a dark cloud with the occasion of sudden lightning that strikes across the gloomy dark sky, and rain begins to drizzle, followed by a sudden heavy outpour.

It is the wee hour of the morning when school children are walking to their nearby school, men and women carrying umbrellas walking hurriedly to work. The traffic that morning was very heavy due to the heavy downpour.

All of a sudden, there is a loud bang. An accident had just occurred. A car suddenly hit a primary school boy who was crossing the road in a hurry with her mother, who was following behind him, as he was late for school. The child in a white short-sleeved shirt and light blue pants and tie lies motionless on the road, bleeding from his head. His mother in great shock rushes and stoop next to the child crying bitterly while shouting for help.

The driver quickly came out of his car and carried the child and put him at the back seat of his car, and together with the child's mother, he drove and manage to exit from the heavy traffic to nearby hospital.
Upon arriving, the hospital staff quickly pushed out an emergency trolley bed and transfer the boy to the A & E ward to be examined.
Meanwhile, the mother was walking up and down outside the emergency ward anxiously waiting for new from the doctor concerning her son's condition.
The boy was unconsciously lying on the A & E bed while the doctor and nurses were trying to rescue him.
Suddenly, the boy began to see his own spirit coming out of his body and the spirit began to float up and suddenly travel downward in great speed.

The atmosphere was very dark and he began to fall at great lightning speed to the level four. At the entrance of the Great White Throne, two horned demons holding a trident began to drag him to kneel in front of the Great White Throne. The boy then lifted up his head to look fearfully at the glorious light that proceeded out of that Throne and was trembling.
Suddenly, a loud thunderous voice proceeded out of the Throne saying, "If you are given a second chance to live, will you obey Me unto death and fulfil My will for your life just like My son, JESUS?
The boy shivering and trembling with great fear begin to speak while kept nodding his head, "Yes. I will".
Suddenly the boy began to open his eyes, awakened from his hospital bed in awe of what he had just seen, and heard. He began to relate his
