I write unto you, little children, because ye have known THE FATHER. 1Jn 2:14 I have written unto you, fathers, because ye have known him that is from the beginning. I have written unto you, young men, because ye are strong, and the word of THE ELOHIM abideth in you, and ye have overcome the wicked one.
Mat 18:10 Take heed that ye despise not one of these little ones; for I say unto you, That in heaven their angels do always behold the face of my Father which is in heaven.
Mat 18:11 For the Son of man is come to save that which was lost.
Therefore in your ascent, bless My FATHER all ye His servants who desire to be priests and stand in Our house in Heavenly Jerusalem.

Psa 134:1 A Song of degrees (Ascent). Behold, bless ye THE YAHWEH, all ye servants of THE YAHWEH, which by night stand in the house of THE YAHWEH. Psa 134:2 Lift up your hands in the sanctuary, and bless THE YAHWEH. Psa 134:3 THE YAHWEH that made heaven and earth bless thee out of Zion.
CHAPTER 3
THE PATH OF THE BRIDES
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, can you elaborate on the five levels the Brides have to ascend?
JESUS: The five levels the Brides need to go through are:
Peace And Joy Through Tribulation
Meekness Of Love Through Persecution
Lowliness Of Mind Through Oppression
Yieldedness
Faith in THE ELOHIM
PEACE AND JOY THROUGH TRIBULATION
JESUS: The five levels are fruits unto holiness, and the end is everlasting life in Heavenly Mount Zion.
Rom 6:22 But now being made free from sin, and become servants to THE ELOHIM, ye have your fruit unto holiness, and the end everlasting life.

They are part of the fruits of the Spirit. My Brides must crucify the flesh with the affections and lusts if they are to be accepted by My FATHER to be part of Heavenly Jerusalem in Heavenly Mount Zion to be His children.

2Co 6:16 And what agreement hath the temple of THE ELOHIM with idols? For ye are the temple of the living ELOHIM; as THE ELOHIM hath said, I will dwell in them, and walk in them; and I will be their ELOHIM, and they shall be my people. 2 Co 6:17 Wherefore come out from among them, and be ye separate, saith THE YAHWEH, and touch not the unclean thing; and I will receive you, 2 Co 6:18 And will be a Father unto you, and ye shall be my sons and daughters, saith THE SHADDAI EL.

Therefore, My FATHER will orchestrate many tribulations for them to crucify their flesh by resisting and subduing the evil spirits that energize them on a daily basis to work all works of adultery, fornication (illicit sexual intercourse like homosexuality, lesbianism, bestiality or extramarital sex), uncleanness (involving the impurity of the heart, mind and body), lasciviousness (unbridled and excess lust), idolatry (loving people and things more than THE YAHWEH), witchcraft (the use of drugs which are influenced by evil spirits that control and deceive their minds), hatred (influenced by hostile spirit), variance (quarrelling), emulation (jealousy), wrath (fierceness), strife (evil plots), seditions (disunity), heresies (denominations, sectarian), envying, murder, drunkenness, reveling (rioting).

If they humble themselves to submit to the discipline of THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT in SHEKINAIH when she exposes the evil spirits that sneaked into their hearts, they will produce the fruits of the Spirit (love, joy, peace, longsuffering, gentleness, goodness, faith, meekness and temperance) through her impartation of maturing enablement.

Gal 5:18 But if ye be led of the Spirit, ye are not under the law. Gal 5:19 Now the works of the flesh are manifest, which are these; Adultery, fornication, uncleanness, lasciviousness, Gal 5:20 Idolatry, witchcraft, hatred, variance, emulations, wrath, strife, seditions, heresies, Gal 5:21 Envyings, murders,

drunkenness, revellings, and such like: of the which I tell you before, as I have also told you in time past, that they which do such things shall not inherit the kingdom of THE ELOHIM. Gal 5:22 But the fruit of the Spirit is love, joy, peace, longsuffering, gentleness, goodness, faith, Gal 5:23 Meekness, temperance: against such there is no law. Gal 5:24 And they that are Christ have crucified the flesh with the affections and lusts.
Having peace in My FATHER despite His chastisement is accounted as righteousness by Us as Righteousness and Peace are inseparable.
Psa 85:10 Mercy and truth are met together; righteousness and peace have kissed each other.
My righteousness are Peace and Joy in THE HOLY GHOST. It is through maintaining peace and joy in THE HOLY GHOST in tribulations is one imputed as righteous to enter into Our Kingdom.
Mat 6:33 But seek ye first the kingdom of THE ELOHIM, and his righteousness; and all these things shall be added unto you.
Ro 14:17 For the kingdom of THE ELOHIM is not meat and drink; but righteousness, and peace, and joy in the Holy Ghost.
David, would you like to share a dream We gave you concerning this Revelation?

title: A DREAM ON HOW TO BE AT PEACE AND JOYFUL IN TRIBULATIONS

segments.text: A DREAM ON HOW TO BE AT PEACE AND JOYFUL IN TRIBULATIONS

DAVID: As I was writing the Chapter on Peace and Joy in Tribulation, I was going through many testing of tribulation and chastening of THE FATHER. In one of the nights, I had a prophetic dream. In my dream, one of my disciples had decided to leave me and defected to a lawless minister because of an idol in his heart. Upon hearing the news, I lost my peace and joy. My third sister who was not a believer was present at that time and out of self-righteousness, she was very disgusted with him and was volunteering to send him off quickly. I was comforted and felt vindicated by her. Despite my grief, I decided to send him off myself. All this seemed to happen in our rented one room one hall government subsidized flat where my parents and my nine siblings were staying 52 years ago when I was 6 years old. My parents were struggling to raise us up in that pathetic place where we had to sleep on the floor in the hall piling up like sardines in a can. As I walked this disciple along the field behind my flat, a young Chinese man whom I could not recall where I knew him approached me. At that time, he was playing basketball with his friends. He told me that he had lost his phone, which had my contact number. The impression he gave me was that he highly esteemed me as someone he would like to learn from and follow regarding the Way of THE YAHWEH. In the midst of our exchange, somehow after speaking with one of his friends, he left with his companions without saying farewell and I was left alone and felt rejected. As I turned around, my disciple was also nowhere to be seen. Feeling lonely and forsaken, as I looked around by myself, I noticed that the field I was standing on was filled with people who were busy with their activities. They were in groups: some were doing exercises; others were playing games etc. At one corner, I noticed a Christian ministry whom I knew and they were having fellowship but they were dressed up in religious robes and were walking and worshipping as in a religious procession. Suddenly, I felt very lonely and lost again and there arose in my heart a desire to visit one of my intercessors whom I had not contacted since the prayer group was dissolved. Then, I woke up from this dream and realized that in reality, I was not that lonely
after all, for my wife, my children, SHEKINAIH and my disciples were still with me, trusting that JESUS is using me to represent him.

As I meditate on the dream, THE HOLY SPIRIT said to me, "THE FATHER has purposed for you to go through tribulations, rejections and betrayals in order to teach you a spiritual lesson that your peace and joy must not rest on the acceptance of men and you should not be so easily comforted through the vindication of others in a pathetic mentality. Neither should you long for honour from men you hardly knew, nor should you fret and be distracted by other groups who prosper according to their own devices and are busy in their religious activities after the commandments and doctrines of men which indeed seems to make a show of holiness but are without power, playing Christianity carnally in their religious hypocrisy. THE FATHER will not forsake you as He has given SHEKINAIH to represent Him to help you fulfil your destiny as a Christ, an anointed one."

Col 2:16 Let no man therefore judge you in meat, or in drink, or in respect of an holyday, or of the new moon, or of the sabbath days: Col 2:17 Which are a shadow of things to come; but the body is a Christ.
SHEKINAIH: David, THE FATHER ask me to instruct you to speak out aloud these words 100 times and meditate upon it while you speak.

These are the words: "Sincere repentance will lead to the greatest bond of love in THE TRINITY that is unbreakable for Us. Love relinquished to THE FATHER will lead to unlimited love returned back to me".

(David believed and did as he was told and after which JESUS said to him JESUS: David, you must not be bitter with SHEKINAIH because of the discipline of My FATHER through her. Humble yourself with true repentance and ask for more grace to be filled with My love for her for the sake of unity of THE TRINITY so that Our works through both of you are not hindered. As THE FATHER hath loved me, so have I loved you: continue you in My love. Love one another and you shall abide in My love. Surrender all your love to My FATHER by loving His children even willing to lay down your life for them and in return, My FATHER and I will love you and fill you with Our unlimited love and We will make Our abode with you and call you friend. These things have I spoken unto you, that My joy might remain in you, and that your joy might be full and whatsoever ye shall ask of THE FATHER in My Name, He may give it you. Joh 14:21 He that hath my commandments, and keepeth them, he it is that loveth me: and he that loveth me shall be loved of my Father, and I will love him, and will manifest myself to him. Joh 14:23 JESUS answered and said unto him, If a man love me, he will keep my words: and my Father will love him, and we will come unto him, and make our abode with him.
Joh 15:9 As THE FATHER hath loved me, so have I loved you: continue ye in my love.

Joh 15:10 If ye keep my commandments, ye shall abide in my love; even as I have kept my Father's commandments, and abide in his love. Joh 15:11 These things have I spoken unto you, that my joy might remain in you, and that your joy might be full. Joh 15:12 This is my commandment, That ye love one another, as I have loved you. Joh 15:13 Greater love hath no man than this, that a man lay down his life for his friends. Joh 15:14 Ye are my friends, if ye do whatsoever I command you. Joh 15:15 Henceforth I call you not servants; for the servant knoweth not what his lord doeth: but I have called you friends; for all things that I have heard of my Father I have made known unto you. Joh 15:16 Ye have not chosen me, but I have chosen you, and ordained you, that ye should go and bring forth fruit, and that your fruit should remain: that whatsoever ye shall ask of THE FATHER in my name, he
may give it you. Joh 15:17 These things I command you, that ye love one another.
THE FATHER: Yes, My unlimited love will energize your faith which will lead to peace and joy unto righteousness unto holiness abounding in hope of Our glory.

Rom 15:12 And again, Esaias saith, There shall be a root of Jesse, and he that shall rise to reign over the Gentiles; in him shall the Gentiles trust. Rom 15:13 Now THE ELOHIM of hope fill you with all joy and peace in believing, that ye may abound in hope, through the power of the Holy Ghost.

JESUS: Be like Me, be patient in all your tribulations by crucifying your flesh with its affection and lusts; despising all the shame you experienced; they cannot be compared with the commendation and honour and glory as the son of THE ELOHIM with joy unspeakable and full of glory ready to be revealed in the last days.

Heb 12:2 Looking unto JESUS the author and finisher of our faith; who for the joy that was set before him endured the cross, despising the shame, and is set down at the right hand of the throne of THE ELOHIM.

1Pe 1:3 Blessed be THE ELOHIM and Father of our Lord JESUS Christ, which according to his abundant mercy hath begotten us again unto a lively hope by the resurrection of JESUS Christ from the dead, 1Pe 1:4 To an inheritance incorruptible, and undefiled, and that fadeth not away, reserved in heaven for you, 1Pe 1:5 Who are kept by the power of THE ELOHIM through faith unto salvation ready to be revealed in the last time. 1Pe 1:6 Wherein ye greatly rejoice, though now for a season, if need be, ye are in heaviness through manifold temptations: 1Pe 1:7 That the trial of your faith, being much more precious than of gold that perisheth, though it be tried with fire, might be found unto praise and honour and glory in the revelation (G602 "apokalupsis") of JESUS Christ: 1Pe 1:8 Whom having not seen, ye love; in whom, though now ye see him not, yet believing, ye rejoice with joy unspeakable and full of glory: 1Pe 1:9 Receiving the end of your faith, even the salvation of your souls.

THE FATHER: My chastening is for your perfection in holiness so that you may enter into Heavenly Mount Zion to see Me. So, do not be discouraged and give up easily but pursue peace in all situations unto holiness and be not defiled by bitterness, sorrow or grief.

Heb 12:10 For they verily for a few days chastened us after their own pleasure; but he for our profit, that we might be partakers of his holiness. Heb 12:11 Now no chastening for the present seemeth to be joyous, but grievous: nevertheless afterward it yieldeth the peaceable fruit of righteousness unto them which are exercised thereby. Heb 12:12 Wherefore lift up the hands which hang down, and the feeble knees; Heb 12:13 And make straight paths for your feet, lest that which is lame be turned out of the way; but let it rather be healed. Heb 12:14 Pursue peace in the midst of everything, and holiness, without which no man shall see THE YAHWEH:
JESUS: Look unto Me, I am more than able to guard you from falling and present you faultless in the sight of My glory with exceeding joy.

Jud 1:24 Now unto him that is able to keep you from falling, and to present you faultless in (G2714 "katenopion" from G2596 "kata" according and G1799 "enopion" in sight) his glory with exceeding joy,

SHEKINAIH: I saw a man staring at a staircase which represents his tribulations. I saw both of us putting two white wings on that man. One wing is called "Peace" and the other wing is called "Joy" and it made the spirit of that man very light so that he can flies to the next level of the ascent and victoriously.

THE FATHER: My potential Brides and Anointed Ones if they will be in Joy in carrying My instructions through THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by SHEKINAIH, and I, represented by you, THE ANCIENT OF DAYS, THE MESSENGER SENT BY US, THE ELIJAH, THE MAJOR and THE MINOR
respectively, who was, and is, and is to come, will cut short their testing to 10%.
MEEKNESS OF LOVE THROUGH PERSECUTION
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, what does meekness of love through persecution mean?

JESUS: In order to reach the top of the Holy Mountain, meekness or gentleness is another requirement that will make one great in holiness so as to reach the Holy Mountain to inherit the Kingdom of Heaven.
Psa 18:35 Thou hast also given me the shield of thy salvation: and thy right hand hath holden me up, and thy gentleness (meekness) hath made me great.
I take delight in the meek and will beautify them with the robe of salvation as My heavenly bride.
Psa 149:4 For THE YAHWEH taketh pleasure in his people: he will beautify the meek with salvation.
I give grace to the meek so that they can inherit My glory and the earth.
Pro 3:34 Surely he scorneth the scorners: but he giveth grace unto the meek. Pro 3:35 The wise shall inherit glory: but shame shall be the promotion of fools.
Mat 5:5 Blessed are the meek (G4239 praus): for they shall inherit the earth.
Those who follow Me to be meek and lowly in heart shall enter into Our rest in Heavenly Mount Zion.

Mat 11:28 Come unto me, all ye that labour and are heavy laden, and I will give you rest. Mat 11:29 Take my yoke upon you, and learn of me; for I am meek and lowly in heart: and ye shall find rest unto your souls. Mat 11:30 For my yoke is easy, and my burden is light.

When a person is so broken and crushed by My FATHER through persecution, the meekness of a Christ/an anointed will be evident in him. His spirit will release a sweet smell like the fragrant of perfume that is obtained from crushed myrrh when mixed with olive oil. Myrrh symbolizes suffering and oil symbolizes the anointing. This fruit of meekness, like other fruit of the spirit, needs to be maintained when yielded. We have appointed at least 15 years to break and crush you in order to accomplish this state of spirit man on its sustainable basis. Pruning is painful but it is necessary if you are to produce more fruits of the Spirit. Each time when my FATHER withdrew His grace from you, hell will break loose. According to what fruit He wanted you to bear, He would show you the worst in you concerning that fruit you lack. Sometimes, you will fall into condemnation by the Accuser and felt very discouraged and nearly gave up but abiding in My FATHER'S love will keep you going.

Joh 15:1 I am the true vine, and my Father is the husbandman. Joh 15:2 Every branch in me that beareth not fruit he taketh away: and every branch that beareth fruit, he purgeth it, that it may bring forth more fruit. Joh 15:3 Now ye are clean through the word which I have spoken unto you. Joh 15:4 Abide in me, and I in you. As the branch cannot bear fruit of itself, except it abide in the vine; no more can ye, except ye abide in me. Joh 15:5 I am the vine, ye are the branches: He that abideth in me, and I in him, the same bringeth forth much fruit: for without me ye can do nothing. Joh 15:6 If a man abide not in me, he is cast forth as a branch, and is withered; and men gather them, and cast them into the fire, and they are burned. Joh 15:7 If ye abide in me and my speech (G 4487 rhema") abide in you, ye shall ask what ye will, and it shall be done unto you. Joh 15:8 Herein is my Father glorified, that ye bear much fruit; so shall ye be my disciples. Joh 15:9 As THE FATHER hath loved me, so have I loved you: continue ye in my love. Joh 15:10 If ye keep my commandments, ye shall abide in my love; even as I have kept my Father's commandments, and abide in his love. Joh 15:11 These things have I spoken unto you, that my joy might remain in you, and that your joy might be full. Joh 15:12 This is my commandment, That ye love one another, as I have loved you. Joh 15:13 Greater love hath no man than this, that a man lay down his life for his friends. Joh 15:14 Ye are my friends, if ye do whatsoever I command you. Joh 15:15 Henceforth I call you not servants; for the servant knoweth not what his lord doeth: but I have called you friends; for all things that I have heard of my Father I have made known unto you. Joh 15:16 Ye have not chosen me, but I have chosen you, and ordained you, that ye should go and bring forth fruit, and that your fruit should remain: that whatsoever ye shall ask of THE FATHER in my name, he may give it you.

David, would you like to share with SHEKINAIH how it is like to be meek? DAVID: When I am broken, I would speak in a soft, feeble and humble tone; but when I have recovered from this brokenness and was not vigilant, the

spirit of pride would sneak back into me and my speech would become arrogant and harsh. Maybe I need further breaking until it becomes sustainable where I will remain gentle and meek, loving my persecutors. To be crushed by THE FATHER is not easy. It is very hard to go through and at times, I will break down and cry like a baby. Have you ever seen an adult man who cries like a baby during the breaking? This is what THE FATHER has planned for every one of us.

title: ARE THE CONSOLATION OF THE EL, SMALL WITH THEE?

segments.text: ARE THE CONSOLATION OF THE EL, SMALL WITH THEE?

There was a period where I was going through many persecutions from the leader of a church who was jealous of me because they said I was hyper spiritual, and over self-righteous. I was really hungry for righteousness of THE ELOHIM not knowing that I was asking to be tested and sifted by Satan through the fiery trial of faith. I was persecuted by the leader and the members that believed in his evil speaking which he spoke against me falsely.

Many years ago, I followed this leader with his team to Osaka for ministry. During prayer, I came out for altar call and kneeled before the altar to be ministered by him. During ministry time, he prayed for everyone who came out except me. At the end of the meeting, I was the only one left still kneeling and waiting to be ministered by him. He just passed by me and made a sarcastic statement in derision that really broke my heart. I was crushed in my spirit but I continued to encourage myself in THE YAHWEH. When everyone was about to leave the meeting hall, I stood up and hugged him with all the love I still had within me. As I hugged him, I saw a vision of him smiling maliciously at me. Back in my hotel room, I was crying to THE FATHER to heal me of my wound for it was unbearable because reproach had broken my heart. For more than an hour, I was crying with all my heart, mind and strength but I received no comfort. Feeling like a dying man who gave up his will to live, I breathed my last breath lying on the floor as one who had lost all hopes to live. I was so exhausted that I fell asleep immediately.

Out of a sudden, I was awakened by a great noise of many trumpets accompanied by music from different musical instruments that were not of this world. Next, I heard voices of tongues that sounded like great waves of rolling waters coming down from heaven. In that split of a second, I could sense that many angels had come down and they were sprinkling gold dusts all over my body as I could feel the tingling feeling in my spirit that my body also felt. My soul was revived and instinctively, I opened my physical eyes hoping to see THE YAHWEH JESUS but ended up seeing myself alone in my room in the dead of the night. All that I was experiencing a moment before seemed to be like a dream. Instantly, I heard a thin and quiet voice instructing me to close my physical eyes telling me that I could not hear and see the spiritual things with my fleshly eyes. I immediately closed my eyes and I was in the spirit again hearing the voices of tongues sounding like great waves of rolling water from heaven. Then, I heard a woman speaking these words in a gentle, soft and motherly voice:
"Your FATHER loves you very much!"

I was comforted instantly. This timely gentle speech really delighted my soul. Immediately, my spirit was transported into a womb. This was the most memorable moment of my life for I felt like an unborn baby floating inside the bag of waters in the womb of his mother. I felt so refreshed, so secured, so clean and so pure. At that moment, I had forgotten all the stains in my

tattered soul. The peace that I had at that moment was beyond description. I have found my rest. I have found solace in this womb and if it was not for the disruption of some noise outside my room, I would not have been awakened but will be lost in this eternity.
From this incident, I was encouraged and I continued to seek THE YAHWEH and seek comfort from the scripture regarding my experience. I was edified when I read Isaiah 28:11.

Isa 28:11 For with stammering lips and another tongue will he speak to this people. Isa 28:12 For whom he said, This is the rest wherewith ye may cause the weary to rest; and this is the refreshing: yet they would not hear.

I can relate to the stammering lips and another tongue that I have heard during the visitation of the heavenly being. I knew she was THE HOLY SPIRT. I was in her womb. The protocol of her throne and the seraphim and cherubim that made up her train was manifested to me for I felt their presence as they sprinkled gold dusts over me. I knew they were sanctifying my spirit prophetically.

JESUS: David, the womb that you were transported into is the womb of THE FATHER, symbolizing THE HOLY SPIRIT in SHEKINAIH, who is a Shekinah to manifest Our Name, "THE YAHWEH SABAOTH and "THE ADONAI" prominently. You are the Manchild in the womb of the woman/THE HOLY SPIRIT of Revelation 12:5, and shall become a Male Metatron when We lift you up to My FATHER in heaven to authorize you to rule all nations with a rod of iron. You are the voice of THE HOLY SPIRIT/ADONAI represented by SHEKINAIH in Isaiah 6:8 doing all Our determination through SHEKINAIH. In the last days, the Isaiahs (H3470 deliverer of YAH) who are the deliverers from Zion will be sanctified from their uncleanness by THE SHE/HE, THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by SHEKINAIH/JESUS represented by AARON K DAVID, THE DECREEING AND SEALING SWORD AND THE MAJOR EXECUTING SABRE/THE
MINOR COEXECUTING SABRE, and shall be sent to warn the ungodly generation of the coming woes. The remnant that came out of the Great Tribulation shall be holy unto Us, THE YAHWEH.

Isa 6:1 In the year that king Uzziah died I saw also THE ADONAI sitting upon a throne, high and lifted up, and his train filled the temple. Isa 6:2 Above it stood the seraphims: each one had six wings; with twain he covered his face, and with twain he covered his feet, and with twain he did fly. Isa 6:3 And one cried unto another, and said, Holy, holy, holy, is THE YAHWEH SABAOTH: the whole earth is full of his glory. Isa 6:4 And the posts of the door moved at the voice of him that cried, and the house was filled with smoke. Isa 6:5 Then said I, Woe is me! for I am undone; because I am a man of unclean lips, and I dwell in the midst of a people of unclean lips: for mine eyes have seen the King, the YAHWEH SABAOTH. Isa 6:6 Then flew one of the seraphims unto me, having a live coal in his hand, which he had taken with the tongs from off the altar: Isa 6:7 And he laid it upon my mouth, and said, Lo, this hath touched thy lips; and thine iniquity is taken away, and thy sin purged. Isa 6:8 Also I heard the voice of THE ADONAI, saying, Whom shall I send, and who will go for us? Then said I, Here am I; send me. Isa 6:9 And he said, Go, and tell this people, Hear ye indeed, but understand not; and see ye indeed, but perceive not. Isa 6:10 Make the heart of this people fat, and make their ears heavy, and shut their eyes; lest they see with their eyes, and hear with their ears, and understand with their heart, and convert, and be healed. Isa 6:11 Then said I, THE ADONAI, how long? And he answered, Until the cities be wasted without inhabitant, and the houses without man, and the land be utterly desolate, Isa 6:12 And THE YAHWEH have removed men far away, and there be a great forsaking in the midst of the land. Isa 6:13 But yet in it shall be a tenth, and it shall return, and shall be eaten: as a teil tree, and as an oak, whose substance is in them, when they cast their leaves: so the holy seed shall be the substance thereof.

The last days' Brides and the Anointed Ones are signified by the Four Living Creatures in Ezekiel's vision. The great noise you heard as of many trumpets and a voice that sounded like great waters coming down from heaven was the same voice Ezekiel heard in Ezekiel 1:24. "The noise of their wings, like the noise of great waters, as the voice of THE SHADDAI, the voice of speech, as the noise of an host: when they stood as they let down their wings" refers to the noises of the host of the camps of seraphim, cherubim and the ophanim (wheel with many eyes) that followed the spokesman of THE SHADDAI.

Eze 1:4 And I looked, and, behold, a whirlwind came out of the north, a great cloud, and a fire infolding itself, and a brightness was about it, and out of the midst thereof as the colour of amber, out of the midst of the fire. Eze 1:5 Also out of the midst thereof came the likeness of four living creatures. And this was their appearance; they had the likeness of a man. Eze 1:6 And everyone had four faces, and every one had four wings. Eze 1:7 And their feet were straight feet; and the sole of their feet was like the sole of a calf's foot: and they sparkled like the colour of burnished brass. Eze 1:8 And they had the hands of a man under their wings on their four sides; and they four had their faces and their wings. Eze 1:9 Their wings were joined one to another; they turned not when they went; they went every one straight forward. Eze 1:10 As for the likeness of their faces, they four had the face of a man, and the face of a lion, on the right side: and they four had the face of an ox on the left side; they four also had the face of an eagle. Eze 1:11 Thus were their faces: and their wings were stretched upward; two wings of every one were joined one to another, and two covered their bodies. Eze 1:12 And they went every one straight forward: whither the spirit was to go, they went; and they turned not when they went. Eze 1:13 As for the likeness of the living creatures, their appearance was like burning coals of fire, and like the appearance of lamps: it went up and down among the living creatures; and the fire was bright, and out of the fire went forth lightning. Eze 1:14 And the living creatures ran and returned as the appearance of a flash of lightning. Eze 1:15 Now as I beheld the living creatures, behold one wheel (H212 "ophan") upon the earth by the living creatures, with his four faces. Eze 1:16 The appearance of the wheels and their work was like unto the colour of a beryl: and they four had one likeness: and their appearance and their work was as it were a wheel in the middle of a wheel. Eze 1:17 When they went, they went upon their four sides: and they turned not when they went. Eze 1:18 As for their rings, they were so high that they were dreadful; and their rings were full of eyes round about them four. Eze 1:19 And when the living creatures went, the wheels went by them: and when the living creatures were lifted up from the earth, the wheels were lifted up. Eze 1:20 Whithersoever the spirit was to go, they went, thither was their spirit to go; and the wheels were lifted up over against them: for the spirit of the living creature was in the wheels. Eze 1:21 When those went, these went; and when those stood, these stood; and when those were lifted up from the earth, the wheels were lifted up over against them: for the spirit of the living creature was in the wheels. Eze 1:22 And the likeness of the firmament upon the heads of the living creature was as the colour of the terrible crystal, stretched forth over their heads above. Eze 1:23 And under the firmament were their wings straight, the one toward the other: everyone had two, which covered on this side, and every one had two, which covered on that side, their bodies. Eze 1:24 And when they went, I heard the noise of their wings, like the noise of great waters, as the voice of THE SHADDAI, the voice of speech, as the noise of an host: when they stood, they let down their wings. Eze 1:25 And there was a voice from the firmament that was over their heads, when they stood, and had let down their wings. Eze 1:26 And above the firmament that was over their heads was the likeness of a throne, as the appearance of a sapphire stone: and upon the likeness of the throne was the likeness as the appearance of a man above upon it. Eze 1:27 And I saw as the colour of amber, as the appearance of fire round about within it, from the appearance of his loins even upward,

and from the appearance of his loins even downward, I saw as it were the appearance of fire, and it had brightness round about. Eze 1:28 As the appearance of the bow that is in the cloud in the day of rain, so was the appearance of the brightness round about. This was the appearance of the likeness of the glory of THE YAHWEH. And when I saw it, I fell upon my face, and I heard a voice of one that spake.
The glory of THE YAHWEH is THE HOLY SPIRIT and The Angel of THE YAHWEH is Her spokesman, the captain of the hosts.

"The noise of the wings of the cherubim and the ophanim, like the noise of great waters, the voice of speech, as the noise of an host" in Ezekiel is the same voice of the 144,000 Brides whose voice are "as the voice of many waters, and as the voice of thunder, voice of harpers harping with their harps". This is the same music you heard in your heavenly experience.

Rev 14:1 And I looked, and, lo, a Lamb stood on the mount Sion, and with him an hundred forty and four thousand, having his Father's name written in their foreheads. Rev 14:2 And I heard a voice from heaven, as the voice of many waters, and as the voice of a great thunder: and I heard the voice of harpers harping with their harps: Rev 14:3 And they sung as it were a new song before the throne, and before the four beasts, and the elders: and no man could learn that song but the hundred and forty and four thousand, which were redeemed from the earth. Rev 14:4 These are they which were not defiled with women; for they are virgins. These are they which follow the Lamb whithersoever he goeth. These were redeemed from among men, being the firstfruits unto THE ELOHIM and to the Lamb. Rev 14:5 And in their mouth was found no guile: for they are without fault before the throne of THE ELOHIM.
Through this heavenly visitation, I have given the revelation of THE FATHER of all mercy and consolation.
DAVID: Yes, Job 15:11 became so real and personal to me.

Job 15:11 Are the consolations (H8575 "tancum" solace") of THE EL (H410 "El") small (H4592 "meat" little, few) with thee? is there any gentle (H328 "at" gently, softly) speech (H1697 "dabar") with thee?
Indeed as I recall, the consolation I received from THE EL of Mercy was not few but many and the voice of THE HOLY SPIRIT was gentle, comforting and therapeutic.

Psalms 94 became a quickening and healing balm. I felt most blessed to be an overcomer from the chastening of my FATHER to be taught of Him. He gave me rest from the days of my adversity. He has not forsaken me and had helped me during my persecution even though at times my soul had almost dwelt in silence and my walk with him was shaken; THE YAHWEH always held me up.
While writing this Chapter, THE HOLY SPIRIT inspired me to compose the following song from Psalms 94:18-19 and Job 15:11

title: WHEN I SAID, MY FOOT SLIPPETH.

segments.text: WHEN I SAID, MY FOOT SLIPPETH.
When I said, My foot slippeth;
Thy mercy, O YAHWEH, held me up.
In the multitude of my thoughts within me Thy comforts delight my soul. (2x)
Chorus
Are the consolations of THE EL small with thee? Is there any gentle speech with thee? (2x)
Psa 94:12 Blessed is the overcomer (H1397 "geber") whom thou chastenest, O JAH, and teachest him out of thy law; Psa 94:13 That thou mayest give him

rest from the days of adversity, until the pit be digged for the wicked. Psa 94:14 For THE YAHWEH will not cast off his people, neither will he forsake his inheritance. Psa 94:15 But judgment shall return unto righteousness: and all the upright in heart shall follow it. Psa 94:16 Who will rise up for me against the evildoers? or who will stand up for me against the workers of iniquity? Psa 94:17 Unless THE YAHWEH had been my help, my soul had almost dwelt in silence. Psa 94:18 When I said, My foot slippeth; thy mercy, O YAHWEH, held me up. Psa 94:19 In the multitude of my thoughts within me thy comforts (H8575 "tanchum" consolation) delight my soul.
I started to understand that whatever things written in the scriptures are for our learning that we through longsuffering and comfort of the scriptures might have hope in our calling.
Rom 15:4 For whatsoever things were written aforetime were written for our learning, that we through longsuffering and comfort of the scriptures might have hope.

I also started to feel empathy for Paul concerning the tribulation and the persecution he had gone through because of the name of a Christ. Like him, I could relate what it was like to be pressed out of measure, above strength, inasmuch as despaired even of life. All this happened to me so that after tasting the goodness and the consolation of THE FATHER, I am able in turn to comfort others who are destined to go through these troubles and persecutions.

2 Co 1:3 Blessed be THE ELOHIM, even THE FATHER of our Lord JESUS Christ, THE FATHER of mercies, and THE ELOHIM of all comfort; 2 Co 1:4 Who comforteth us in all our tribulation, that we may be able to comfort them which are in any trouble, by the comfort wherewith we ourselves are comforted of THE ELOHIM. 2 Co 1:5 For as the sufferings of a Christ abound in us, so our consolation also aboundeth by Christ. 2 Co 1:6 And whether we be afflicted, it is for your consolation and salvation, which is effectual in the enduring of the same sufferings which we also suffer: or whether we be comforted, it is for your consolation and salvation. 2 Co 1:7 And our hope of you is stedfast, knowing, that as ye are partakers of the sufferings, so shall ye be also of the consolation. 2 Co 1:8 For we would not, brethren, have you ignorant of our trouble which came to us in Asia, that we were pressed out of measure, above strength, insomuch that we despaired even of life: 2 Co 1:9 But we had the sentence of death in ourselves, that we should not trust in ourselves, but in THE ELOHIM which raiseth the dead: 2 Co 1:10 Who delivered us from so great a death, and doth deliver: in whom we trust that he will yet deliver us;

At last, I started to understand that all the debasement that happened to me in the past was THE FATHER'S doing and it was for my perfection in meekness unto holiness. I must be like JESUS to lay aside every weight that will cause me to miss the mark and run with patience the race that is set before me, always encouraging and reminding myself not to despise the discipline of THE FATHER. For whom He loves, He chastens and scourges every son He receives and loves so that we can partake of His holiness through bearing the Fruits of the Spirit.

Heb 12:1 Wherefore seeing we also are compassed about with so great a cloud of witnesses, let us lay aside every weight, and the sin which doth so easily beset us, and let us run with patience the race that is set before us, Heb 12:2 Looking unto JESUS the author and finisher of our faith; who for the joy that was set before him endured the cross, despising the shame, and is set down at the right hand of the throne of THE ELOHIM. Heb 12:3 For consider him that endured such contradiction of sinners against himself, lest ye be wearied and faint in your minds. Heb 12:4 Ye have not yet resisted unto blood, striving against sin. Heb 12:5 And ye have forgotten the

exhortation which speaketh unto you as unto children, My son, despise not thou the chastening of the Lord, nor faint when thou art rebuked of him: Heb 12:6 For whom the Lord loveth he chasteneth, and scourgeth every son whom he receiveth. Heb 12:7 If ye endure chastening, THE ELOHIM dealeth with you as with sons; for what son is he whom THE FATHER chasteneth not? Heb 12:8 But if ye be without chastisement, whereof all are partakers, then are ye bastards, and not sons. Heb 12:9 Furthermore we have had fathers of our flesh which corrected us, and we gave them reverence: shall we not much rather be in subjection unto THE FATHER of spirits, and live? Heb 12:10 For they verily for a few days chastened us after their own pleasure; but he for our profit, that we might be partakers of his holiness. Heb 12:11 Now no chastening for the present seemeth to be joyous, but grievous: nevertheless afterward it yieldeth the peaceable fruit of righteousness unto them which are exercised thereby.
JESUS: You have learned well. Always be vigilant and not fall into discouragement and defiled with bitterness and thus turn aside from our Way of Holiness and be disqualified from your birthright.

Heb 12:12 Therefore lift up the hands which hang down, and the feeble knees; Heb 12:13 And make straight paths for your feet, lest that which is lame be turned out of the way; but let it rather be healed. Heb 12:14 Follow peace with all men, and holiness, without which no man shall see THE YAHWEH: Heb 12:15 Looking diligently lest any man fail of the grace of THE ELOHIM; lest any root of bitterness springing up trouble you, and thereby many be defiled; Heb 12:16 Lest there be any fornicator, or profane person, as Esau, who for one morsel of meat sold his birthright. Heb 12:17 For ye know how that afterward, when he would have inherited the blessing, he was rejected: for he found no place of repentance, though he sought it carefully with tears. Heb 12:18 For ye are not come unto the mount that might be touched, and that burned with fire, nor unto blackness, and darkness, and tempest, Heb 12:19 And the sound of a trumpet, and the voice of words; which voice they that heard intreated that the word should not be spoken to them any more: Heb 12:20 (For they could not endure that which was commanded, And if so much as a beast touch the mountain, it shall be stoned, or thrust through with a dart: Heb 12:21 And so terrible was the sight, that Moses said, I exceedingly fear and quake:) Heb 12:22 But ye are come unto mount Sion, and unto the city of the living ELOHIM, the heavenly Jerusalem, and to an innumerable company of angels, Heb 12:23 To the general assembly and church of the firstborn, which are written in heaven, and to THE ELOHIM the Judge of all, and to the spirits of just men made perfect, Heb 12:24 And to JESUS the mediator of the new covenant, and to the blood of sprinkling, that speaketh better things than that of Abel.

You have heard the voice of many waters which is the voice of the great multitude of holy ones in the general assembly and the church of the first born who are with innumerable company of angels in Heavenly Jerusalem.

Rev 19:5 And a voice came out of the throne, saying, Praise our ELOHM, all ye his servants, and ye that fear him, both small and great. Rev 19:6 And I heard as it were the voice of a great multitude, and as the voice of many waters, and as the voice of mighty thunderings, saying, Alleluia: for THE YAHWEH EL SHADDAI reigneth. Rev 19:7 Let us be glad and rejoice, and give honour to him: for the marriage of the Lamb is come, and his wife hath made herself ready. Rev 19:8 And to her was granted that she should be arrayed in fine linen, clean and white: for the fine linen is the righteousness of saints. Rev 19:9 And he saith unto me, Write, Blessed are they which are called unto the marriage supper of the Lamb. And he saith unto me, These are the true sayings of THE ELOHIM
The Spirit of Meekness is synonymous to the Kingdom of THE ELOHIM with power.
1Co 4:20 For the kingdom of is not in word, but in power. 1Co 4:21 What will ye? shall I come unto you with a rod, or in love, and in the spirit of meekness?
The Spirit of Meekness and Gentleness is also synonymous to being a Christ, an Anointed One.
2 Co 10:1 Now I Paul I beseech you by the meekness and gentleness of a Christ, who in presence am base among you, but being absent am bold toward you:

You have a lot of opportunities to produce and maintain this Fruit of the Spirit. THE FATHER will give you a lot of situations where you have to response to people in meekness, to cover their fault even though they are incorrigible or unresponsive or unmoved by your goodness. This is a part of your training to meet all kinds of unreasonable people. Therefore, take this opportunity to produce meekness of love because it is a requirement to go up the Holy Mountain. Take it as a test whether your persecutors are your parents, wife, husband, your children, relatives, friends or whosoever. Take all these opportunities as steppingstones to produce the Meekness of Love so as to receive the Kingdom of THE ELOHIM.
Gal 6:1 Brethren, if a man be overtaken in a fault, ye which are spiritual, restore such a one in the spirit of meekness; considering thyself, lest thou also be tempted.
Meekness is a requirement in your vocation and as elect of THE ELOHIM to be My Bride or the Anointed One.

Eph 4:1 I therefore, the prisoner of THE YAHWEH, beseech you to walk worthy of the vocation wherewith ye are called, Eph 4:2 With all lowliness and meekness, with longsuffering, forbearing one another in love;
Col 3:12 Put on therefore, as the elect of THE ELOHIM, holy and beloved, bowels of mercies, kindness, humbleness of mind, meekness, longsuffering;
Finally, a meek and peaceable spirit is very precious in the sight of My FATHER and you will definitely be His delight in our Heavenly Mount Zion.
1Pe 3:4 But let it be the hidden man of the heart, in that which is not corruptible, even the ornament of a meek and quiet spirit, which is in the sight of THE ELOHIM of great price.

title: LOWLINESS OF MIND VISION OF A HIND

segments.text: LOWLINESS OF MIND VISION OF A HIND
JESUS: Would you like to share with SHEKINAIH the vision I gave you regarding the hind that visited me?

DAVID: In my early years seeking THE YAHWEH, persecutions and debasement is a daily training for me to be lowly. Every night I would mourn, sing and meditate on the Book of Psalms and crying out to be comforted. One day, a seer friend of mine while praying for me, saw a vision of me superimposed on a hind walking toward a tent during a still night. As the female deer reach the opening of the tent, JESUS immediately open the curtain of the tent's entrance and look into her eyes with loving tenderness. At that moment, the hind stood motionless being completely intoxicated by the divine love and compassion that flows from JESUS's eyes.
JESUS: Do you know the interpretation of this vision?

DAVID: Lord, I am not very sure, but I was comforted because of that vision because I felt loved by you. Would you further enlighten us the meaning? JESUS: My beloved must abide in Me, and We in them, that We may be completely one. As I am in THE FATHER, and you in Me, thereby, shall be one
with Us, and thereby are united with Us as one. Therefore, are greatly loved by Us.

Pro 5:18 Let thy fountain be blessed: and rejoice with the wife of thy youth. Pro 5:19 Let her be as the loving hind (H365 "ayeleth") and pleasant roe; let her breasts (H1717 "dad" as the seat of love, same as H1730 dod" to boil with love) satisfy (H7301 "ravah" saturated, intoxicated) thee at all times; and be thou ravished always with her love.
Now let Me decode in details the Revelation of Psalms 22 to you.

Psalms 22 is written to you my last days' David, the chief singer, concerning My Brides symbolized by the hind, Aijeleth and I am the Shahar, the daystar, their husband. You are the overseer and leader of all the other hind that will follow My footsteps in My suffering. They are likened to the scarletworm Cermes vermilio, a scaled insect that feeds upon the oak and is used for producing red dye. The males, which are smaller than the females, pass through a complete metamorphosis and develop wings. Like Me, they will suffer reproach from men and will be despised and killed but resurrected and become fiery red phoenixes. I was the first begotten of the dead to be resurrected and they, like me, were from the womb of THE HOLY SPIRIT. In the last days, they will suffer persecutions from the sons of the Nephilim, the rulers of this age. They are called "Yachiyd", those who are joined with Me in spirit. They are the children whom THE FATHER has given you, our last days' David to be perfected. They are My brethren. They shall be depressed in mind to be lowly in order to ascend further to the Holy Mountain to be among the great congregation in Mount Zion. These are the last days' generation who will rule with Me over the nations in the coming age because as they have suffered with Me, they will also reign with Me; as they have died with Me, they will also resurrect with Me.

Psa 22:1 To the chief Musician (H5329 "natsach" overseer as denominative of H5331 "netsach" victory) concerning (H5921 "al") Aijeleth (H365 "ayeleth" hind) Shahar, (H7837 "shachar" dawn, dayspring) A Psalm of David. My EL, My EL, why hast thou forsaken me? why art thou so far from helping me, and from the words of my roaring? Psa 22:2 O my ELOHIM, I cry in the daytime, but thou hearest not; and in the night season, and am not silent. Psa 22:3 But thou art holy, O thou that inhabitest the praises of Israel. Psa 22:4 Our fathers trusted in thee: they trusted, and thou didst deliver them. Psa 22:5 They cried unto thee, and were delivered: they trusted in thee, and were not confounded. Psa 22:6 But I am a worm (H8438 "tola" crimson grub), and no man; a reproach of men, and despised of the people. Psa 22:7 All they that see me laugh me to scorn: they shoot out the lip, they shake the head, saying, Psa 22:8 He trusted on THE YAHWEH that he would deliver him: let him deliver him, seeing he delighted in him. Psa 22:9 But thou art he that took me out of the womb: thou didst make me hope when I was upon my mother's breasts. Psa 22:10 I was cast upon thee from the womb: thou art my EL from my mother's belly. Psa 22:11 Be not far from me; for trouble is near; for there is none to help. Psa 22:12 Many bulls have compassed me: strong bulls of Bashan have beset me round. Psa 22:13 They gaped upon me with their mouths, as a ravening and a roaring lion. Psa 22:14 I am poured out like water, and all my bones are out of joint: my heart is like wax; it is melted in the midst of my bowels. Psa 22:15 My strength is dried up like a potsherd; and my tongue cleaveth to my jaws; and thou hast brought me into the dust of death. Psa 22:16 For dogs have compassed me: the assembly of the wicked have inclosed me: they pierced my hands and my feet. Psa 22:17 I may tell all my bones: they look and stare upon me. Psa 22:18 They part my garments among them, and cast lots upon my vesture. Psa 22:19 But be not thou far from me, O THE YAHWEH: O my strength, haste thee to help me. Psa 22:20 Deliver my soul from the sword; my united (H3173 "yachiyd" united) from the power of the dog. Psa 22:21 Save me from the lion's mouth: for thou hast heard me from the horns of the unicorns. Psa 22:22 I will declare thy name unto my brethren: in the midst of the congregation will I praise thee. Psa 22:23 Ye that fear THE YAHWEH, praise him; all ye the seed of Jacob, glorify him; and fear him, all ye the seed of

Israel. Psa 22:24 For he hath not despised nor abhorred the oppression (H6039 "enuth") of the lowly (H6041 "aniy" depress in mind); neither hath he hid his face from him; but when he cried unto him, he heard. Psa 22:25 My praise shall be of thee in the great congregation: I will pay my vows before them that fear him. Psa 22:26 The lowly (H6035 "anav") shall eat and be satisfied: they shall praise THE YAHWEH that seek him: your heart shall live forever. Psa 22:27 All the ends of the earth (H776 "erets") shall remember and turn unto THE YAHWEH: and all the kindreds of the nations shall worship before thee. Psa 22:28 For the kingdom is THE YAHWEH'S: and he is the governor among the nations. Psa 22:29 All they that be fat upon earth shall eat and worship: all they that go down to the dust shall bow before him: and none can keep alive his own soul. Psa 22:30 A seed shall serve him; it shall be accounted to THE YAHWEH for a generation. Psa 22:31 They shall come, and shall declare his righteousness unto a people that shall be born, that he hath done this.
These will be accepted by Us to be the heavenly Mount Zion, Our rest because they are lowly in mind, contrite in spirit and show reverence when We speak.

Isa 66:1 Thus saith THE YAHWEH, The heaven is my throne, and the earth is my footstool: where is the house that ye build unto me? and where is the place of my rest? Isa 66:2 For all those things hath mine hand made, and all those things have been, saith THE YAHWEH: but to this man will I look, even to him that is lowly in mind (H6041 "aniy") and of a contrite spirit, and trembleth at my word.

They have followed my example by emptying themselves, deny their right and forsake everything and have obeyed THE FATHER in lowliness of mind even unto the death of the cross. Therefore shall also be exalted like Me as blameless and harmless; son of THE ELOHIM, without rebuke in the midst of a crooked and perverse nation.

Php 2:3 Let nothing be done through strife or vainglory; but in lowliness of mind let each esteem other better than themselves. Php 2:4 Look not every man on his own things, but every man also on the things of others. Php 2:5 Let this mind be in you, which was also in Christ JESUS: Php 2:6 Who, being in the form of THE ELOHIM, thought it not robbery to be equal with THE ELOHIM: Php 2:7 But emptied himself, and took upon him the form of a servant, and was made in the likeness of men: Php 2:8 And being found in fashion as a man, he humbled himself, and became obedient unto death, even the death of the cross. Php 2:9 Wherefore THE ELOHIM also hath highly exalted him, and given him a name which is above every name: Php 2:10 That at the name of JESUS every knee should bow, of things in heaven, and things in earth, and things under the earth; Php 2:11 And that every tongue should confess that JESUS Christ is THE YAHWEH, to the glory of THE ELOHIM THE FATHER. Php 2:12 Wherefore, my beloved, as ye have always obeyed, not as in my presence only, but now much more in my absence, work out your own salvation with fear and trembling.

Through their lowliness of mind, they have received much grace from Us to be able to go through the shames and reproaches with a right attitude and are completely and thoroughly established, strengthened and consolidated in holiness and accounted righteous to be a part of the Holy Jerusalem.

1Pe 5:5 Likewise, ye younger, submit yourselves unto the elder. Yea, all of you be subject one to another, and be clothed with lowliness of mind: for THE ELOHIM resisted the proud, and gives grace to the lowly. 1Pe 5:6 Abase yourselves therefore under the mighty hand of THE ELOHIM, that he may exalt you in due time: 1Pe 5:7 Casting all your distraction (G3308 "merman") upon him; for he careth for you. 1Pe 5:8 Be sober, be vigilant; because your adversary the devil, as a roaring lion, walketh about, seeking whom he may devour: 1Pe 5:9 Whom resist stedfast in the faith, knowing that the same undergoings are to be fulfilled further(G2005 "epiteleo) in your brethren that are in the Cosmos. 1Pe 5:10 But of all grace, who hath called us unto
his eternal glory by Christ JESUS, after that ye have suffered a while, complete thoroughly (G2675 "katartizo"), stablish, strengthen, consolidate you.
YIELDEDNESS
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, teach me how to yield to you?

THE FATHER: Pick up your cross, deny yourself, acknowledge Me in all that you do, be ye lowly just like JESUS; and I will put the spirit of yieldedness in you just like JESUS who yielded unto Me.; even though so unto My representative, SHEKINAIH. Yield your members servants to righteousness unto holiness to enter My heavenly Mount Zioin.

Rom 6:12 Let not sin therefore reign in your mortal body, that ye should obey it in the lusts thereof. Rom 6:13 Neither yield ye your members as instruments of unrighteousness unto sin: but yield yourselves unto THE ELOHIM, as those that are alive from the dead, and your members as instruments of righteousness unto THE ELOHIM. Rom 6:14 For sin shall not have dominion over you: for ye are not under the law, but under grace. Rom 6:15 What then? shall we sin, because we are not under the law, but under grace? forbid. Rom 6:16 Know ye not, that to whom ye yield yourselves servants to obey, his servants ye are to whom ye obey; whether of sin unto death, or of obedience unto righteousness? Rom 6:17 But THE ELOHIM be thanked, that ye were the servants of sin, but ye have obeyed from the heart that form of doctrine which was delivered you. Rom 6:18 Being then made free from sin, ye became the servants of righteousness. Rom 6:19 I speak after the manner of men because of the infirmity of your flesh: for as ye have yielded your members servants to uncleanness and to iniquity unto iniquity; even so now yield your members servants to righteousness unto holiness.
JESUS: Yes, yield your body as a living sacrifice, holy, acceptable unto My FATHER. This is your reasonable service.

Be in tune to My FATHER'S ways and thoughts, be dead to yourself, dead to your pride, ego and self-righteousness, and do not contradict My FATHER'S way even though you do not fully comprehend his thoughts and ways.

Rom 12 1 I beseech you therefore, brethren, by the mercies of THE ELOHIM, that ye yield (G3936 "paristemi") your bodies a living sacrifice, holy, acceptable unto THE ELOHIM, which is your reasonable service, Rom 12:2 And be not conformed to this world: but be ye transformed by the renewing of your mind, that ye may prove what is that good, and acceptable, and perfect, will of THE ELOHIM.

Yield 100% to My FATHER speedily or promptly at all times, so that you will be approved and honoured by Him and be counted faithful to be empowered with authority, power, riches, glory, wisdom as His coworker to make straight and smooth His oracle of truth.

2Ti 2:15 Be prompt (G4704 "spoudazo" is from G4710 "spoude", it means "to use speed, be prompt") to yield (G3936 "paristemi") thyself to be approved of THE ELOHIM, a workman that needeth not to be ashamed (G422 "anepaischuntos", to make straight and smooth (G3718 "orthotomeo") the oracle (G3056 "logos" something spoken including the thought) of truth.
1Ti 1:12 And I thank Christ JESUS our Lord, who hath empower (G1743 "endunamoo" empower, endue) me, for that he counted me faithful, putting me into the ministry;
FAITH IN THE ELOHIM
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, how can one increase in faith toward you in holiness?

JESUS: Blessed are the pure in heart for they shall see THE ELOHIM but the heart is easily polluted and made wicked from all bad communication. So to successfully ascend to Heavenly Mount Zion is not an easy quest.
Jer 17:9 The heart is polluted ( H6121 "aqob") above from all things, and made wicked (H605 "anash") : who can know it?
There will always be defilement in My potential Brides unless they endeavor to purify their hearts through faith by hearing and obeying My spoken word which are spirit and life to their soul.

Act 15:8 And THE ELOHIM, which knoweth the hearts, bare them witness, giving them the Holy Ghost, even as he did unto us; Act 15:9 And put no difference between us and them, purifying their hearts by faith.
Rom 10:17 So then faith cometh by hearing, and hearing by the word of THE ELOHIM.
Joh 6:63 It is the spirit that quickeneth; the flesh profiteth nothing: the words that I speak unto you, they are spirit, and they are life.
David, would you like to share with SHEKINAIH the vision of light coming out of your mouth when you preach?

DAVID: Many years ago, I invited a seer to my meeting. As usual, I did not prepared any notes but was teaching spontaneously as led by THE HOLY SPIRIT. For what I heard in the spirit from JESUS, that I spoke. When I had finished the teaching, he stood up and told the congregation that he saw a vision as I was teaching. He saw light from heaven came down and entered into my heart and from there the light came out of my mouth. The light split into different colours of rays of light. Some of the rays of light penetrated into the hearts of some of my congregation, but for some, the light bounced back to me. He saw in the hearts of these people the words "Prejudice", "Pride", "Preconceived ideas", "Fear" written on their hearts. For those who received the light, he saw the word "Faith" written on their hearts and the word grew larger and larger as they listened attentively and their spirit man became brighter.

JESUS: Yes, this is what happen when My word is spoken prophetically by my spokesman who kept themselves holy. If they yield to us in faith when the prophesy, their heart and mind will be driven by THE HOLY SPIRIT and the word they speak is as good as I spoke through them.

2Pe1:20 Knowing this first that no prophecy of the scripture is of any private interpretation. 2 pet 2:21 For the prophecy came not in old time by the will of man: but holy men of THE ELOHIM spake as they were moved (G5342 "phero" bear or carry) by the Holy Ghost.
This is how I will sanctify and cleanse the hearts of My potential Brides through My spokesman; to present unto myself a glorious church, not having spot or wrinkle; but holy and without blemish.

PATIENCE

DAVID: ABBA FATHER, how can one cultivate the fruit of spirit of Patience? JESUS: THE FATHER have scripted for Our potential ones all kinds of straitened circumstances for them to produce the Fruit of Patience. When they are financially tight, He will still ask them to give. When they have not much time for themselves, He will still want them to serve others etc...
Rom 5:3 And not only so, but we boast in tribulations also: knowing that tribulation accomplisheth patience;
Jas1:2 My brethren, count it all joy when ye fall into divers temptations; Jas 1:3 Knowing this, that the trying of your faith accomplisheth patience.

THE FATHER will set them up by making them think that their breakthrough is near to fulfilment and at the same time permit hindrances and delay to try their patience. My potential Anointed Ones must not be disappointed and give up hope as He will do this many times. They must peaceably and patiently confess: "My FATHER, even if this prophecy does not come to pass now, it does not matter because you are going to vindicate yourself sooner or later to make it come to pass in order to reveal your righteousness. After all, you are THE EHYEH (The I Am), the Mastermind who wrote the script of the whole Cosmos and controls the mind of the Satan/Adversary. If you are going to set me up on this occasion and I have to wait for another few years for this prophecy to fulfil, I am going to wait."
David, would you like to share with SHEKINAIH your revelation regarding the method the accuser used to make My people dare not to believe any more of My FATHER'S promises.

DAVID: Most people gave up hope because they have been disappointed too often. Once they give up their hope, they will no more be patient to hope. I have seen in one Spy Movie; the intelligence agency wants to extract information from the enemy's spy but the captive refuses to disclose information even under horrifying torment. They then change their strategy by setting him free but while the captive is a few feet away from realizing his freedom, they then drag him back and repeat the torture and interrogation. This they did to break his will and hope of deliverance.

The morale of this story is that if you give a person hope and then crush that hope too often, it will be even more terrible and unbearable for him than before to believe and hope. This is what the Diabolos/Accuser will do often to us. That is why We must not give up hope.

Sometimes, when we think that we were almost there and everything was going to be fine, there might be a twist of event, and we were back to where we started and we became more disheartened. It becomes more difficult for us to believe in the promises of THE FATHER. That is why we must know the methods of the Satan/Adversary. We must continue to hope so as to accomplish this fruit called Patience. THE FATHER will give us situations to see if we will hold on to this hope to the end through patience. In the beginning, it would be very difficult to bear as this has happened to me too many times. Sometimes, I felt like giving up. I did not want to believe it anymore. I did not want to listen or believe in any new promises of THE ELOHIM. I dared not believe it even though the fulfilment is nigh at hand because I was afraid to be hurt by disappointment again. However, THE FATHER has not given us a Spirit of Fear/Intimidation from the Diabolos/Accuser. He has given us His love and the power to have a sound mind. Therefore, gird up the loin of Our minds to run with patience in Our persecutions and tribulations to the end in order that we may be found worthy of the Kingdom of THE ELOHIM.
Rom 8:25 But if we hope for that we see not, then do we with patience wait for it.

Heb 12:1 Wherefore seeing we also are compassed about with so great a cloud of witnesses, let us lay aside every weight, and the sin which doth so easily beset us, and let us run with patience the race that is set before us, 2Th 1:4 So that we ourselves glory in you in the churches of THE ELOHIM for your patience and faith in all your persecutions and tribulations that ye endure: 2Th 1:5 Which is a manifest token of the righteous judgment of THE ELOHIM, that ye may be counted worthy of the kingdom of THE ELOHIM, for which ye also suffer:

JESUS: Patience has a delightful fragrance that captivate the soul of all living things and very much delights THE FATHER in his endurance. Only he with an honest and good heart having heard the true gospel and guarding it with his life will bring forth fruit with patience to progress to Heavenly Mount Zion and possess his soul and be restored to glory, honour and immortality.
Luk 8:15 But that on the good ground are they, which in an honest and good heart, having heard the word, keep it, and bring forth fruit with patience (G5278 "hupomeno").
Luk 21:19 In your patience (G5278 "hupomeno") possess ye your souls.
Matt 24:13 But he that shall be patient (G5278 "hupomeno") unto the end, the same shall be saved.
Rom 2:6 Who will render to every man according to his deeds: Rom 2:7 To them who by patient continuance in well doing seek for glory and honour and immortality, eternal life:
MERCY
My FATHER is good and His mercy endureth forever. Therefore those who will to ascend to Heavenly Mount Zion to come to His Presence must be merciful.

Psa 16:10 For thou wilt not leave my soul in hell; neither wilt thou suffer thine Merciful One (H2623 "chasiyd") to see corruption. Psa 16:11 Thou wilt shew me the path of life: in thy is fulness of joy; at thy right hand there are pleasures for evermore.
Our potential Anointed Ones are all vessels of mercy which My FATHER had afore prepared unto glory, therefore, the more they need to show mercy to all as they have obtain mercy from Us.

Rom 9:22 What if THE ELOHIM, willing to shew his wrath, and to make his power known, endured with much longsuffering the vessels of wrath fitted to destruction: Rom 9:23 And that he might make known the riches of his glory on the vessels of mercy, which he had afore prepared unto glory,

Mercy should be shown no matter how horrible, unrepentant, incorrigible the person is. As My FATHER is merciful and compassionate even to those ungrateful, unthankful and unrighteous, even so My potential Anointed Ones should do likewise for this is holiness unto righteousness.
Matt 5:48 Be ye therefore perfect, even as your Father which is in heaven is perfect.
Luke 6:36 Be ye therefore merciful, as your Father also is merciful.
David, would you like to share with SHEKINAIH regarding Our dealing with you in the area of showing mercy to all?

DAVID: The heart is easily polluted above all things, and made wicked by evil spirits. They are like some characters in movies where these people are so oppressed by the evil environment until they become their product. They concluded that to be good and godly does not pay. So they became evil, the evillest of all because they lost faith in men. To them, what is more real is money. There is a saying in Hong Kong, "The people of the world do not despise vice but they despise the poor."

This is what THE FATHER convicted me because I used to pass judgements very quickly. I have learnt and am still trying not to let my self-righteousness deprive me of being merciful to them. I know I have no right to judge anybody. Neither do I have any right to be angry when a brother falls or yield to temptation. We all have our struggles and THE FATHER wants us to show mercy and win them over to good by our mercy. They need to realize, and to repent and cry out to THE FATHER for forgiveness and restoration. Paul was once a blasphemer. He was very unholy. He did a lot of harm to the Children of THE ELOHIM. If we were in the time of Paul and saw how Paul treated the Children of THE ELOHIM, I think it is very difficult for us to forgive and receive Paul. I think we will think of ways to kill him to avenge our brothers and sisters. Nevertheless, JESUS did not think this way. Knowing that Paul had a calling, He forgave him.

There was a very strong unbelief in Paul. Paul did not believe that JESUS is the Messiah. He did not believe in the gospel that JESUS preached. Even when JESUS was resurrected, he still did not believe. When the disciples did signs and wonders, he did not believe as well. He had a snake of selfrighteousness. This is the worst snake you can ever find. It is the spirit of a Pharisee, a religious spirit blinded by the Tree of Knowledge of Good and Evil. They will kill you but still think that they are doing the right thing in The Name of THE ELOHIM. This is going to happen in the last days. It is the worst

snake of all. This self-righteousness spirit is a stronghold in most of our lives especially if you are religious. It is very common because you want to uphold the righteousness of law, but you have forgotten that THE FATHER is merciful to His children and hope that they will repent of their lawlessness. He is more concerned with one lost sheep that had gone astray than the ninety nine righteous that need no repentance. JESUS: THE YAHWEH delights in mercy because He is merciful. He knows the frailty and struggle of men. David, would you like to share with SHEKINAIH My FATHER's mercy towards Daniel, one of your intercessor?

The three of us were trembling and I was crying and begging THE FATHER for His glory. After prayer, the sister asked the other brother why he did not approach the throne of THE FATHER when He invited him in the vision that both of them saw simultaneously. He just laid flat on the floor and trembled because he saw the holiness of THE FATHER like Isaiah. From that incident, I learned more of the Way of THE YAHWEH. THE ELOHIM chose him as His vessel of mercy despite all his flaws. This seer brother was not a decent person. During his younger days, he was involved with secret societies and vices and had been in prison. He was not living a holy life even at that time and yet THE FATHER invited him to come to His throne. This is how THE ELOHIM sees a person. Therefore, I have endeavored not to be religious. How THE ELOHIM sees and how people see is different. I always remind myself not to think that I am better than the others are. THE FATHER sees the heart and does not how good and respectable a person behaves.
