Psa 81:13 Oh that my people had hearkened unto me, and Israel had walked in my ways! Psa 81:14 I should soon have subdued their enemies, and turned my hand against their adversaries. Psa 81:15 The haters of THE YAHWEH should have submitted themselves unto him: but their time should have endured for ever. Psa 81:16 He should have fed them also with the finest of the wheat: and with honey out of the rock should I have satisfied thee.

They lost their peace and became bitter and failed in all the ten testing. When they heard from Moses about the good news of the Promised Land, they were filled with joy. However, when tribulations and persecutions came, they were intimidated and offended; they fell into unbelief, lost their peace, became bitter and complained.

They had forgotten quickly all the signs and wonders The Angel of the Covenant, SHE/HE, THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by SHEKINAIH/ JESUS represented by AARON K DAVID, had done in their sight in bringing the Ten Plagues on the Egyptians. At the Red Sea, when they saw the Egyptians approaching and there was nowhere to run, they again complained to Moses.

Exo 14:10 And when Pharaoh drew nigh, the children of Israel lifted up their eyes, and, behold, the Egyptians marched after them; and they were sore afraid: and the children of Israel cried out unto THE YAHWEH. Exo 14:11 And they said unto Moses, Because there were no graves in Egypt, hast thou taken us away to die in the wilderness? wherefore hast thou dealt thus with us, to carry us forth out of Egypt? Exo 14:12 Is not this the word that we did tell thee in Egypt, saying, Let us alone, that we may serve the Egyptians? For it had been better for us to serve the Egyptians, than that we should die in the wilderness. Exo 14:13 And Moses said unto the people, Fear ye not, stand still, and see the salvation of THE YAHWEH, which he will shew to you today: for the Egyptians whom ye have seen to day, ye shall see them again no more for ever. Exo 14:14 THE YAHWEH shall fight for you, and ye shall hold your peace.

We heard their complaint but bore with it and opened the Red Sea. Yet when we tested them again on food and drink, they grumbled again in bitterness and unbelief, challenging Moses and questioning our trustworthiness and faithfulness.

Exo 15:22 So Moses brought Israel from the Red sea, and they went out into the wilderness of Shur; and they went three days in the wilderness, and found no water. Exo 15:23 And when they came to Marah, they could not drink of the waters of Marah, for they were bitter: therefore the name of it was called Marah. Exo 15:24 And the people murmured against Moses, saying, What shall we drink?

Exo 16:2 And the whole congregation of the children of Israel murmured against Moses and Aaron in the wilderness: Exo 16:3 And the children of Israel said unto them, Would to THE ELOHIM we had died by the hand of THE YAHWEH in the land of Egypt, when we sat by the flesh pots, and when we did eat bread to the full; for ye have brought us forth into this wilderness, to kill this whole assembly with hunger.

Exo 17:1 And all the congregation of the children of Israel journeyed from the wilderness of Sin, after their journeys, according to the commandment of THE YAHWEH, and pitched in Rephidim: and there was no water for the people to drink. Exo 17:2 Wherefore the people did chide with Moses, and said, Give us water that we may drink. And Moses said unto them, Why chide ye with me? wherefore do ye tempt THE YAHWEH? Exo 17:3 And the people thirsted there for water; and the people murmured against Moses, and said, Wherefore is this that thou hast brought us up out of Egypt, to kill us and our children and our cattle with thirst? Exo 17:4 And Moses cried unto THE YAHWEH, saying, What shall I do unto this people? they be almost ready to stone me. Exo 17:5 And THE YAHWEH said unto Moses, Go on before the people, and take with thee of the elders of Israel; and thy rod, wherewith thou smotest the river, take in thine hand, and go. Exo 17:6 Behold, I will stand before thee there upon the rock in Horeb; and thou shalt smite the rock, and there shall come water out of it, that the people may drink. And Moses did so in the sight of the elders of Israel. Exo 17:7 And he called the name of the place Massah, and Meribah, because of the chiding of the children of Israel, and because they tempted THE YAHWEH, saying, Is THE YAHWEH among us, or not?

We again bore with them and provided them with water and meat miraculously. Yet again, they doubted Moses and Us, and betrayed Us by making a molten image of calf and worshipped it because they presumed
that Moses died in the mountain while he went to meet Us to receive the Law.

Exo 32:1 And when the people saw that Moses delayed to come down out of the mount, the people gathered themselves together unto Aaron, and said unto him, Up, make Us THE ELOHIMs, which shall go before us; for as for this Moses, the man that brought us up out of the land of Egypt, we wot not what is become of him. Exo 32:2 And Aaron said unto them, Break off the golden earrings, which are in the ears of your wives, of your sons, and of your daughters, and bring them unto me. Exo 32:3 And all the people brake off the golden earrings which were in their ears, and brought them unto Aaron. Exo 32:4 And he received them at their hand, and fashioned it with a graving tool, after he had made it a molten calf: and they said, These be thy THE ELOHIMs, O Israel, which brought thee up out of the land of Egypt. Exo 32:5 And when Aaron saw it, he built an altar before it; and Aaron made proclamation, and said, Tomorrow is a feast to THE YAHWEH. Exo 32:6 And they rose up early on the morrow, and offered burnt offerings, and brought peace offerings; and the people sat down to eat and to drink, and rose up to play. Exo 32:7 And THE YAHWEH said unto Moses, Go, get thee down; for thy people, which thou broughtest out of the land of Egypt, have corrupted themselves: Exo 32:8 They have turned aside quickly out of the way which I commanded them: they have made them a molten calf, and have worshipped it, and have sacrificed thereunto, and said, These be thy s, O Israel, which have brought thee up out of the land of Egypt.

Again they complained against Moses for providing only Manna to them for they loathed this bread of angels. Again, we bore with their unfaithfulness and complaint by sending quails to them though they despised His manna.

Num 11:4 And the mixt multitude that was among them fell a lusting: and the children of Israel also wept again, and said, Who shall give us flesh to eat? Num 11:5 We remember the fish, which we did eat in Egypt freely; the cucumbers, and the melons, and the leeks, and the onions, and the garlick: Num 11:6 But now our soul is dried away: there is nothing at all, beside this manna, before our eyes.
Aaron and Miriam who were also prophets were being vexed by them as well and were defiled and affected by their spirits. They also rebelled and contested with Moses thus dishonoring us.

Num 12:1 And Miriam and Aaron spake against Moses because of the Ethiopian woman whom he had married: for he had married an Ethiopian woman. Num 12:2 And they said, Hath THE YAHWEH indeed spoken only by Moses? hath he not spoken also by us? And THE YAHWEH heard it.

Finally, they sealed their fate when they refused to enter into the Promised Land because the giants of the land intimidated them. They rebelled and wanted to replace Moses with a new leader to lead them back to Egypt. They did not know that they were rejecting Our promises and Us.

Num 14:1 And all the congregation lifted up their voice, and cried; and the people wept that night. Num 14:2 And all the children of Israel murmured against Moses and against Aaron: and the whole congregation said unto them, Would THE ELOHIM that we had died in the land of Egypt! or would we had died in this wilderness! Num 14:3 And wherefore hath THE YAHWEH brought us unto this land, to fall by the sword, that our wives and our children should be a prey? were it not better for us to return into Egypt? Num 14:4 And they said one to another, Let us make a captain, and let us return into Egypt.
Therefore, We have sworn that they shall not enter into the Promised Land and all will die in the wilderness except Caleb and Joshua and the next generation.
Ever since these incidents, the Israelites never got out of unbelief and rebellion.

Num 14:22 Because all those men which have seen my glory, and my miracles, which I did in Egypt and in the wilderness, and have tempted me now these ten times, and have not hearkened to my voice; Num 14:23 Surely they shall not see the land which I sware unto their fathers, neither shall any of them that provoked me see it: Num 14:24 But my servant Caleb, because he had another spirit with him, and hath followed me fully, him will I bring into the land whereinto he went; and his seed shall possess it.

The testing of the Israelites in the wilderness serves as an example for all My called ones in the last days so that they will not commit the same mistakes and disqualify themselves from entering into Heavenly Mount Zion, Our rest .

1Co 10:1 Moreover, brethren, I would not that ye should be ignorant, how that all our fathers were under the cloud, and all passed through the sea; 1Co 10:2 And were all baptized unto Moses in the cloud and in the sea; 1Co 10:3 And did all eat the same spiritual meat; 1Co 10:4 And did all drink the same spiritual drink: for they drank of that spiritual Rock that followed them: and that Rock was Christ. 1Co 10:5 But with many of them THE ELOHIM was not well pleased: for they were overthrown in the wilderness. 1Co 10:6 Now these things were our examples, to the intent we should not lust after evil things, as they also lusted. 1Co 10:7 Neither be ye idolaters, as were some of them; as it is written, The people sat down to eat and drink, and rose up to play. 1Co 10:8 Neither let us commit fornication, as some of them committed, and fell in one day three and twenty thousand. 1Co 10:9 Neither let us tempt Christ, as some of them also tempted, and were destroyed of serpents. 1Co 10:10 Neither murmur ye, as some of them also murmured, and were destroyed of the destroyer. 1Co 10:11 Now all these things happened unto them for ensamples: and they are written for our admonition, upon whom the ends of the world are come. 1Co 10:12 Wherefore let him that thinketh he standeth take heed lest he fall. 1Co 10:13 There hath no temptation taken you but such as is common to man: but THE ELOHIM is faithful, who will not suffer you to be tempted above that ye are able; but will with the temptation also make a way to escape, that ye may be able to bear it. 1Co 10:14 Wherefore, my dearly beloved, flee from idolatry.

Neither should they harden their hearts to disobey THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by SHEKINAIH and you, who represent THE TRINITY, My angel when My FATHER sent again to guide My remnant into all truth in Our Way of Peace. We will surely test them again in the last days when we bring the Great Tribulation to test all that dwells upon the earth, especially who are made partakers to be a Christ. Everyone who again provoke Us in THE SHE/HE THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by SHEKINAIH/JESUS represented by AARON K DAVID, THE DECREEING AND SEALING SWORD AND THE MAJOR
EXECUTING SABRE/THE MINOR COEXECUTING SABRE, will not be forgiven if they rebel again willfully despite Our warning through both of you.

Heb 3:6 But CHRIST as a son over his own house; whose house are we, if we hold fast the confidence and the rejoicing of the hope firm unto the end. Heb 3:7 Wherefore (as the Holy Ghost saith, Today if ye will hear his voice, Heb 3:8 Harden not your hearts, as in the provocation, in the day of temptation in the wilderness: Heb 3:9 When your fathers tempted me, proved me, and saw my works forty years. Heb 3:10 Wherefore I was grieved with that generation, and said, They do always err in their heart; and they have not known my ways. Heb 3:11 So I sware in my wrath, They shall not enter into my rest.) Heb 3:12 Take heed, brethren, lest there be in any of you an evil heart of unbelief, in departing from the living ELOHIM. Heb 3:13 But exhort one another daily, while it is called To day; lest any of you be hardened through the deceitfulness of sin. Heb 3:14 For we are made partakers of CHRIST, if we hold the beginning of our confidence stedfast

unto the end; Heb 3:15 While it is said, Today if ye will hear his voice, harden not your hearts, as in the provocation. Heb 3:16 For some, when they had heard, did provoke: howbeit not all that came out of Egypt by Moses. Heb 3:17 But with whom was he grieved forty years? was it not with them that had sinned, whose carcases fell in the wilderness? Heb 3:18 And to whom sware he that they should not enter into his rest, but to them that believed not? Heb 3:19 So we see that they could not enter in because of unbelief.

Therefore, let them fear in order not that they also come short in entering into Our rest by ceasing from all their works that originated from our flesh which is based on the Tree of Knowledge of Good and Evil, but learn obedience to Our counsel through THE SHE/HE, THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by SHEKINAIH/JESUS represented by AARON K DAVID, THE DECREEING AND SEALING SWORD AND THE MAJOR EXECUTING SABRE/THE

MINOR COEXECUTING SABRE, who are our Sabre which is quick and powerful, and sharper than any two edged sword, piercing even to the dividing asunder of soul and spirit, and of the joints and marrow, and is a discerner of all thoughts and intents of every heart. There is no creature that is not manifest in both your sight; but all are naked and opened to both your eyes. We will again through both of you lead the children of the message to inherit Our kingdom.

Heb 4:1 Let us therefore fear, lest, a promise being left us of entering into his rest, any of you should seem to come short of it. Heb 4:2 For unto us was the gospel preached, as well as unto them: but the word preached did not profit them, not being mixed with faith in them that heard it. Heb 4:3 For we which have believed do enter into rest, as he said, As I have sworn in my wrath, if they shall enter into my rest: although the works were finished from the foundation of the world. Heb 4:4 For he spake in a certain place of the seventh day on this wise, And THE ELOHIM did rest the seventh day from all his works. Heb 4:5 And in this place again, If they shall enter into my rest. Heb 4:6 Seeing therefore it remaineth that some must enter therein, and they to whom it was first preached entered not in because of unbelief: Heb 4:7 Again, he limiteth a certain day, saying in David, To day, after so long a time; as it is said, Today if ye will hear his voice, harden not your hearts. Heb 4:8 For if JESUS had given them rest, then would he not afterward have spoken of another day. Heb 4:9 There remaineth therefore a rest to the people of THE ELOHIM. Heb 4:10 For he that is entered into his rest, he also hath ceased from his own works, as THE ELOHIM did from his. Heb 4:11 Let us labour therefore to enter into that rest, lest any man fall after the same example of unbelief. Heb 4:12 For the word of THE ELOHIM is quick, and powerful, and sharper than any twoedged sword, piercing even to the dividing asunder of soul and spirit, and of the joints and marrow, and is a discerner of the thoughts and intents of the heart. Heb 4:13 Neither is there any creature that is not manifest in his sight: but all things are naked and opened unto the eyes of him with whom we have to do.

We will repeat our testing on My called ones again through tribulations, persecutions, oppressions and etc. again in the last days to see whether they will continue to believe in Us by obeying our command and bear the Peaceable Fruit of Righteousness to be justified to enter into the Holy Mountain.
Rev 3:10 Because thou hast kept the word of my patience, I also will keep thee from the hour of temptation, which shall come upon all the world, to try them that dwell upon the earth.
Only by being led by THE HOLY SPIRIT daily through Our manna, which is Our prophetic word through you, Our interpreter, will they be shown things to come regarding the last days.

Joh 16:13 Howbeit when he, the Spirit of truth, is come, he will guide you into all truth: for he shall not speak of himself; but whatsoever he shall hear, that shall he speak: and he will shew you things to come. Joh 16:14 He shall glorify me: for he shall receive of mine, and shall shew it unto you. Joh 16:15 All things that THE FATHER hath are mine: therefore said I, that he shall take of mine, and shall shew it unto you.
Therefore, those who do not renew their minds and be spiritually minded shall not inherit life and peace..
Rom 8:6 For to be carnally minded is death; but to be spiritually minded is life and peace.

They must not let anxiety quench their spirit man but in everything by prayer and supplication with thanksgiving let their request be made known to Us. And We shall let Our peace which surpass their reasoning, shall keep their heart and mind in Us in all things that are true, honest, pure, lovely, good report, and commendable.

Php 4:4 Rejoice in THE YAHWEH always: and again I say, Rejoice. Php 4:5 Let your moderation be known unto all men. THE YAHWEH is at hand. Php 4:6 Be careful for nothing; but in everything by prayer and supplication with thanksgiving let your requests be made known unto THE ELOHIM. Php 4:7 And the peace of THE ELOHIM, which passeth all understanding, shall keep your hearts and minds through CHRIST JESUS. Php 4:8 Finally, brethren, whatsoever things are true, whatsoever things are honest, whatsoever things are just, whatsoever things are pure, whatsoever things are lovely, whatsoever things are of good report; if there be any virtue, and if there be any praise, think on these things.
David, would you like to share with SHEKINAIH how you keep your peace in the tribulation We put you through all these years?

DAVID: Firstly, I will try to anticipate the trouble that THE FATHER has purposed for me to prove me. I will try to see from the Eye of THE FATHER and from His Seven Names. (Please refer to Our book "Behold My Messenger 3, Behold My Names")

Then, I will request THE FATHER to help me by telling Him my struggle and ask for more grace to go through it. I try not to condemn myself if I fail the test. I try also not to be anxious and think negatively. I have learned that if I give free run for Our minds to think negatively, the more I will be filled with fear of uncertainties and start to lose hope. This is how I maintain my peace: anticipate ahead and purpose not to lose my peace.

Sometimes, THE HOLY SPIRIT will warn me of the coming tribulation that is requested by the Diabolos/Accuser and which is approved by JESUS but He will always tell me in advance what the enemy's plan. I have learn to trust him and cooperate with Him to be at peace.

Through His words, THE FATHER has helped me to keep my peace. He gave me the following words to help me to be at peace whenever I was going through a crisis. I will sing 2 Chro 16:9: as lyrics to encourage myself.
"For the eyes of THE YAHWEH run to and fro throughout the whole earth; to shew himself strong on the behalf of them whose heart is at peace (H8003) toward him. "

The word Hebrew word "shalem" H8003 is from H7999 "shalam". It means "be at peace". Thus, I said to myself I must believe that THE FATHER is watching me while I am thinking what to do. It is like one of those movies showing Zeus, THE ELOHIM of sky looking down from the sky monitoring his son Hercules and sending help when he in trouble as he is tested.
Psa 8:4 What is man, that thou art mindful of him? and the son of Adam, that thou visitest him?
THE FATHER is ever mindful and overseeing me, looking from above to see whether I will be at peace and really trusts Him.
The Verse "To shew Himself strong" means, "He will fight, He will do something". He will send His angels, His people or whatever ways to help me.

This is how I encouraged myself by meditating on the lyrics of this song: "The eyes of THE YAHWEH run to and fro through the earth to show himself strong on the behalf of them whose heart is at peace with Him.
Acquaint now thyself with Him and be at peace: thereby good shall come unto thee. Acquaint now thyself with Him and be at peace: thereby good shall come unto thee."
Job 22:21 Acquaint now thyself with him, and be at peace: thereby good shall come unto thee.
"Acquaint" means to know and become familiar, something that you are so used to it. I know His style and His ways. I am acquainted with His way of Peace through tribulations.

JESUS: David, you have learned of Me. Our potential Anointed Ones must also remember these Verses from the Book of Jonah. Jonah was in hell (signified by the big fish) for three and a half days. He had a revelation while he was inside the belly of the fish. He made an oath with Us to be at peace even in the face of death and because of his vow, he was thrown out of the belly of the fish still living. This set a precedent for those who are called to be Jonahs, the children of resurrection.

Jon 2:1 Then Jonah prayed unto THE YAHWEH his ELOHIM out of the fish's belly, Jon 2:2 And said, I cried by reason of mine affliction unto THE YAHWEH, and he heard me; out of the belly of hell cried I, and thou heardest my voice. Jon 2:3 For thou hadst cast me into the deep, in the midst of the seas; and the floods compassed me about: all thy billows and thy waves passed over me. Jon 2:4 Then I said, I am cast out of thy sight; yet I will look again toward thy holy temple. Jon 2:5 The waters compassed me about, even to the soul: the depth closed me round about, the weeds were wrapped about my head. Jon 2:6 I went down to the bottoms of the mountains; the earth with her bars was about me forever: yet hast thou brought up my life from corruption, O YAHWEH my ELOHIM. Jon 2:7 When my soul fainted within me I remembered THE YAHWEH: and my prayer came in unto thee, into thine holy temple. Jon 2:8 They that observe lying vanities forsake their own mercy. Jon 2:9 But I will sacrifice unto thee with the voice of thanksgiving; I will pay (H7999 "shalam") that that I have vowed. Salvation is of THE YAHWEH. Jon 2:10 And THE YAHWEH spake unto the fish, and it vomited out Jonah upon the dry land.

In Verse 9, the word "pay" H7999 "shalam" means "at peace". Therefore, the real translation should be "But I will sacrifice unto thee with the voice of thanksgiving; I will be at peace that I have vowed. Salvation is of THE YAHWEH." So, let My elect not be bitter anymore because of the chastening of My FATHER but exercise their peace muscle and pursue peace in all situations unto holiness unto Our Heavenly Mount Zion.

Heb 12:11 Now no chastening for the present seemeth to be joyous, but grievous: nevertheless afterward it yieldeth the peaceable fruit of righteousness unto them which are exercised thereby. Heb 12:12 Wherefore lift up the hands which hang down, and the feeble knees; Heb 12:13 And make straight paths for your feet, lest that which is lame be turned out of the way; but let it rather be healed. Heb 12:14 pursue peace n everything, and holiness, without which no man shall see THE YAHWEH:
Let them set their eyes on the New Heaven and Earth and be diligent that they may be found of Us in peace, without spot and blameless.
2Pe 3:14 Wherefore, beloved, seeing that ye look for such things, be diligent that ye may be found of him in peace, without spot, and blameless.

title: QUESTIONS OF MEN AND ANSWERS FROM THE TRINITY

segments.text: QUESTIONS OF MEN AND ANSWERS FROM THE TRINITY

title: QUESTIONS OF MEN AND ANSWERS FROM THE TRINITY — Introduction

segments.text: 11 QUESTIONS OF MEN AND ANSWERS FROM THE TRINITY FROM HEAVEN ARE AS FOLLOWS:
FIRST 6 QUESTIONS, Q1 TO Q6, ARE THE QUESTIONS, THE TRINITY WOULD LIKE MANKIND TO UNDERSTAND OF THIS BOOK
WHAT IS THE PURPOSE OF THIS BOOK?
THE PURPOSE OF THIS BOOK IS TWOFOLD:
TO LIST THE CRITERIA FOR RESURRECTING THE DEAD

THIS BOOK SERVES AS A COMPREHENSIVE GUIDE THAT OUTLINES THE EXACT SPIRITUAL, DIVINE AND EARTHLY CRITERIA REQUIRED TO PERFORM THE RESURRECTION OF THE DEAD. IT PRESENTS THE KEY STEPS AND PRINCIPLES THAT ARE NECESSARY FOR SOMEONE TO ACCESS THE POWER AND GIFT OF RESURRECTION. THESE PRINCIPLES ARE DEEPLY ROOTED IN THE HOLINESS AND SOVEREIGN WILL OF THE TRINITY.
TO EXPOUND THE CRITERIA FOR THOSE WHO WISH TO RESURRECT LOVED ONES

FOR THOSE WHO DESIRE TO RESURRECT THEIR FAMILY MEMBERS, FRIENDS, OR LOVED ONES, THIS BOOK DETAILS THE QUALIFICATIONS, SPIRITUAL ALIGNMENT, AND HEART CONDITION REQUIRED FROM BOTH THE ONE PRAYING AND THE ONE TO BE RESURRECTED. IT SERVES AS A GUIDE FOR THE MANIFESTATION OF THE SONS AND DAUGHTERS OF GOD IN THESE LAST DAYS, DISPLAYING THE POWER OF THE AGE TO COME, APART FROM OUR MANIFESTATION IN SHEKINAIH AND JESUS IN AARON K DAVID!
ROMANS 8:19 FOR THE EARNEST EXPECTATION OF THE CREATURE WAITETH FOR THE MANIFESTATION OF THE SONS OF GOD.
HEBREWS 6:5 AND HAVE TASTED THE GOOD WORD OF GOD, AND THE POWERS OF THE WORLD TO COME.
THE BOOK SERVES AS A DIVINE REVELATION THAT GUIDES BELIEVERS INTO THEIR GOD ORDAINED DESTINIES, ALLOWING THEM TO WALK IN RESURRECTION POWER AND BRINGING GLORY TO THE TRINITY
CAN YOU TELL US MORE ABOUT YOUR EARLIER 2 POINTS?
CONCERNING HOW TO OBTAIN THE GIFT AND POWER TO RESURRECT THE DEAD
TO OBTAIN THE GIFT AND POWER TO RESURRECT THE DEAD, ONE MUST FOLLOW A CLEAR SPIRITUAL PROCESS, AS OUTLINED IN THIS BOOK. BELOW IS AN EXPLANATION OF WHAT IS REQUIRED:
READ THE FOUNDATIONAL BOOKS

THE BOOK BUILDS UPON THE PREVIOUS FOUR BOOKS, BEHOLD MY MESSENGER 1 TO 4, WHICH SERVE AS THE FOUNDATIONAL TEACHINGS. THESE EARLIER WORKS LAY THE GROUNDWORK FOR UNDERSTANDING THE DEEPER REVELATIONS THAT ARE CRUCIAL FOR OPERATING IN THE POWER OF RESURRECTION.
PURITY OF HEART
IT IS ESSENTIAL TO HAVE A PURE HEART, FREE FROM SIN AND WORLDLY DESIRES. A HEART THAT SEEKS AFTER HOLINESS AND RIGHTEOUSNESS IS THE VESSEL THROUGH WHICH THE POWER OF RESURRECTION CAN FLOW.
MATTHEW 5:8: "BLESSED ARE THE PURE IN HEART, FOR THEY SHALL SEE GOD."
WALK IN OBEDIENCE TO THE PREORDAINED PATH

EACH BELIEVER WHO ARE TO TURN INTO DISCIPLE HAS A DESTINY PREORDAINED BY THE TRINITY. WALKING IN ALIGNMENT WITH THIS DESTINY, IN FULL OBEDIENCE IS CRITICAL TO BEING CHOSEN TO OPERATE IN THE POWER OF RESURRECTION.
STRIVE FOR PERFECTION:
FOLLOWING THE EXAMPLE OF JESUS CHRIST, ONE MUST STRIVE FOR PERFECTION BY CRUCIFYING THE FLESH, WHICH INCLUDES DENYING THE LUST OF THE FLESH, THE LUST OF THE EYES, AND THE PRIDE OF LIFE.
1 JOHN 2:16: "FOR ALL THAT IS IN THE WORLD - THE LUST OF THE FLESH, THE LUST OF THE EYES, AND THE PRIDE OF LIFE - IS NOT OF THE FATHER BUT IS OF THE WORLD."
MATTHEW 5:48: "BE YE THEREFORE PERFECT, EVEN AS YOUR FATHER WHICH IS IN HEAVEN IS PERFECT."
IMITATE THE LIFE OF JESUS

TO ACCESS THE RESURRECTION POWER, ONE MUST LIVE A LIFE MODELED AFTER JESUS. THIS INCLUDES TAKING UP THE CROSS AND FOLLOWING IN HIS FOOTSTEPS, BEING WILLING TO SACRIFICE ONE'S OWN DESIRES AND WILL TO FULLY EMBRACE THE FATHER'S WILL.
MATTHEW 10:38-39: "AND HE THAT TAKETH NOT HIS CROSS, AND FOLLOWETH AFTER ME, IS NOT WORTHY OF ME. HE THAT FINDETH HIS LIFE SHALL LOSE IT: AND HE THAT LOSETH HIS LIFE FOR MY SAKE SHALL FIND IT."
OUR CHILDREN NEED TO LET US CRUCIFY THEM IN 3 AREAS AS FOLLOWS:
CRUCIFY THE FLESH WHICH IS THE LUST OF THE FLESH, THE LUST OF THE EYES, AND THE PRIDE OF LIFE,
1 JOHN 2:16 FOR ALL THAT IS IN THE WORLD, THE LUST OF THE FLESH, AND THE LUST OF THE EYES, AND THE PRIDE OF LIFE, IS NOT OF THE FATHER BUT IS OF THE WORLD.
CRUCIFY YOUR SOUL, WHICH IS TO UPROOT YOUR CARNAL MIND WHICH STEMS FROM THE TREE OF KNOWLEDGE OF GOOD AND EVIL AND REPLACE IT WITH THE BRANCH OF THE TREE OF LIFE, WITH A MIND OF A CHRIST, AND
PHILIPPIANS 2:5 LET THIS MIND BE IN YOU, WHICH WAS ALSO IN CHRIST JESUS.

CRUCIFY YOUR SPIRIT, WHICH IS TO LET GO OF YOUR SELF-WILL AND EMBRACE YOUR HEAVENLY FATHER'S WILL AS JESUS SAID IN MATTHEW 7, AWAY FROM ME, YOU WICKED SERVANT, I DO NOT KNOW YOU, WHY DIDN'T YOU DO THE WILL OF YOUR FATHER IN HEAVEN?
MATTHEW 7:21 NOT EVERY ONE THAT SAITH UNTO ME, LORD, LORD, SHALL ENTER INTO THE KINGDOM OF HEAVEN; BUT HE THAT DOETH THE WILL OF MY FATHER WHICH IS IN HEAVEN.

AS JESUS HAD SAID WHILE HE WAS ON EARTH, MY MEAT IS TO DO THE FATHER'S WILL, TAKE UP YOUR CROSS AND FOLLOW AFTER MY FOOTSTEPS, FOR NO SERVANT IS GREATER THAN THE MASTER, IF YOU LOVE YOUR FATHER, MOTHER, LOVED ONES EVEN YOURSELF MORE THAN ME, YOU ARE NOT WORTHY TO BE MY DISCIPLES!
JOHN 4:34 JESUS SAITH UNTO THEM, MY MEAT IS TO DO THE WILL OF HIM THAT SENT ME, AND TO FINISH HIS WORK.
MATTHEW 10:38-39 AND HE THAT TAKETH NOT HIS CROSS, AND FOLLOWETH AFTER ME, IS NOT WORTHY OF ME. HE THAT FINDETH HIS LIFE SHALL LOSE IT: AND HE THAT LOSETH HIS LIFE FOR MY SAKE SHALL FIND IT.
THE PATH OF HOLINESS

OUR FINAL MANIFESTATION IN SHEKINAIH AND AARON K DAVID AND THEIR OFFSPRING (SPIRITUAL) HEAVENLY JERUSALEM!!!

THE BOOK LEADS MANKIND TO THEIR ULTIMATE INHERITANCE, THE ETERNAL KINGDOM PREPARED FROM THE FOUNDATION OF THE WORLD.
CONCLUSION

THIS BOOK LEADS MANKIND TO THE FINAL REDEMPTION AND GLORIFICATION BY ACTING AS A PROPHETIC GUIDE, REVEALING THE MYSTERIES OF THE KINGDOM AND PREPARING BELIEVERS WHO NEED TO TURN INTO JESUS'S DISCIPLES FOR THEIR GOD ORDAINED DESTINIES. IT HELPS READERS WITH THE KNOWLEDGE OF THE ULTIMATE TRUTH TAUGHT BY US DIRECT FROM HEAVEN IN THIS BOOK AND THE REST OF OUR BEHOLD MY MESSENGER BOOK SERIES IN CROWNED EAGLES GLOBAL, THE TRUE PATH OF HOLINESS WHICH ALL MUST WALK IN THE HIGHWAY OF HOLINESS TO BE A TRUE DISCIPLES OF JESUS, IN ORDER TO BECOME COHEIRS WITH CHRIST, EXPERIENCE THE RESURRECTION, AND BE TRANSFORMED INTO HIS LIKENESS - ENSURING THEIR PLACE IN THE ETERNAL KINGDOM PREPARED FOR THEM FROM THE FOUNDATION OF THE WORLD.

title: HOW TO PRAY FOR YOURSELF AND OTHERS

segments.text: HOW TO PRAY FOR YOURSELF AND OTHERS
SHALOM MY BELOVED CHILDREN,

As you have read throughout this book and the entire BEHOLD MY MESSENGER SERIES, you now hold the keys to divine transformation. Prayer is not just a communication - it is the gateway to purification, restoration, and the unfolding of your divine destiny. Here, WE will guide you in praying in a way that transcends human limitation and taps into the full power of Heaven.
VERSION 1: SIMPLIFIED PRAYER
EMPTYING THE FLESH, SOUL, AND SPIRIT: BECOMING A VESSEL FOR DIVINE GLORY

The first step in prayer is to empty yourself of all that belongs to the fallen nature. Your flesh is a "bag of snakes" - filled with the lusts and desires of this world. Your soul must be emptied of carnal reasoning, and your spirit must surrender to the will of the Heavenly Father.

"Abba Father, I humble myself before You, repent in dust and ashes, and acknowledge that I have missed Your perfect mark. In the name of Jesus, I bind, break, and render powerless every defilement within me, and cast them into THE TRINITY'S oven to be burned. Let YOUR holy fire purge me and purify me as gold. I repent of my carnal reasoning, pride, and every stronghold that has kept me from YOUR will."

As you pray this, imagine yourself being emptied of all worldly desires and filled with Heaven's light. You are being transformed into a living word, aligned with the mind of Christ and the will of THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH.
BECOMING CLOTHED WITH THE DIVINE: THE FULLNESS OF THE SPIRIT

Once you have emptied yourself, you must be filled with the living word of THE TRINITY. This prayer will clothe your spirit with the fruits of THE Holy Spirit, the 10 perfect character traits of JESUS, and the 50 protocols of Heaven.

"Abba Father, clothe me with your living words. I receive the 9 fruits of THE HOLY SPIRIT as angelic wings around my spiritual body. I receive the garment of glory, the 10 perfect character traits of Jesus. I receive the 50 protocols of Heaven, illuminating every part of my spiritual being. Just as Adam was before the fall, make me a living word."
Visualize the transformation as your spirit soars on the wings of THE HOLY SPIRIT, and your entire being is clothed in the perfection of Heaven.
SEALING THE PRAYER WITH THANKSGIVING: ENTERING THE SPIRITUAL VORTEX

After praying, it is critical to seal your prayer with thanksgiving and gratitude. This act solidifies your connection to Heaven and aligns you with the spiritual vortex that executes your cosmic prayers.
"THANK YOU, FATHER. THANK YOU, HOLY SPIRIT. THANK YOU, JESUS.
THANK YOU TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH, THANK YOU JESUS IN AARON K DAVID,
I GIVE YOU ALL THE GLORY, HONOR, AND PRAISE FOREVER AND EVER, AND EVER
AMEN, AMEN, AMEN.
HALLELUJAH, HALLELUJAH, HALLELUJAH."
REPEAT THE ABOVE 15 TIMES WITH THE BELOW ACTION.
Jump in the air with arms outstretched as you declare this, visualizing the spiritual vortex spinning around you, aligning your prayer with the very center of the cosmos.
VERSION 2 A MORE THOROUGH AND EFFECTIVE PRAYER

As we have already expounded in detail in this book and all the BEHOLD MY MESSENGER 1 TO 4, we will briefly list down the steps of how to pray to empty your flesh which is a bag of snakes (the lust of the flesh, the lust of the eyes, the pride of life to be selfless), your soul (to empty and uproot your carnal and the tree of knowledge of good and evil and replace it with the mind of a Christ with the branch of THE TREE OF LIFE) and your spirit (to empty your selfwilled to surrender to the heavenly father's will for your life's destiny) through the following prayer and thereafter, be filled with THE LIVING WORD OF THE TRINITY, as OUR words are light, it will illuminate your entire spirit, soul, and body, after you had emptied your fallen state of a fallen man and be transformed into a living word, a son or daughter of OURS, for WE are THE LIVING WORD, your HEAVENLY FATHER IN/SPOKE

THROUGH SHEKINAIH who is THE FATHER of all spirit, for WE create your spirit in heaven before you are sent on earth to be born on this earth for you to be perfected during your life journey on this earth with your life script all completely written by US, your Creator!
"ABBA FATHER,

I humble myself before You, repent in dust and ashes, and acknowledge that I have missed Your mark and sinned. I ask for Your forgiveness, and in the name of JESUS, I repent, bind, break, render powerless, suck out all the defilements in me, and uproot out of me all my belongings, all my loved ones, all those under me, out of those people in my community, my workplace, people that I met into THE TRINITY'S OVEN to be burned, send your holy fire to purge me and all of us and purify us as gold I pray. I repent of:

my carnal mindedness, carnal reasoning, self-righteousness, blaming GOD instead of examining where I have missed the mark, or sin in scoring less than 10/10 in what YOU have taught us here in this book and all the BEHOLD MY MESSENGER SERIES.

I repent of pride, subtle doubt or unbelief, all the lies and voices of the enemy, my bad habits, escaping into the unreal world, obstinate, stubbornness, self-will, disobedience, unyieldedness, worldliness, lust of the flesh, the lust of the eyes, pride of life, murmuring and complaining, argumentative spirit, strife, proud and haughty spirit, self-condemnation, unfruitfulness, deception, disillusion, anger, agitation, insubordination, all the spirits inside that break THE 50 PROTOCOLS OF HEAVEN, after repenting, suck them all out into THE TRINITY'S OVEN to be burned, cleansed, sanctified, purified with the purging of refiner's fire and fullers' soap.
I EMPTY MY FLESH, which is the lust of my flesh, the lust of my eyes, the pride of life to be selfless, which is to empty the bag of snakes called "FULL OF SELF
I EMPTY MY SOUL, which is to empty my CARNAL MIND, uproot THE TREE OF KNOWLEDGE OF GOOD AND EVIL, and be replaced with the MIND OF A CHRIST and be attached back to the branch of THE TREE OF LIFE,
I EMPTY MY SPIRIT by emptying my self-will and submit to your will.
After I have emptied my flesh, soul and spirit, ABBA FATHER, I pray to clothe my spirit man with THY LIVING WORDS which is:
The 9 fruits of THE HOLY SPIRIT, which is my 9 white angelic wings around my spiritual body so that my spirit man can fly heavenward,

Gal 5:22 But the fruit of the Spirit is love, joy, peace, longsuffering, gentleness, goodness, faith, Gal 5:23 Meekness, temperance: against such there is no law. Gal 5:24 And they that are Christ's have crucified the flesh with the affections and lusts. Gal 5:25 If we live in the Spirit, let us also walk in the Spirit.

10/10 in each of the 10 PERFECT CHARACTER OF JESUS, WHICH IS my SPIRITUAL GARMENT OF GLORY OR HOPE OF GLORY in order to ENTER INTO HEAVEN'S GATE, without which, I will not be able to enter heaven at all,

A LIVING WORD which is THE 50 PROTOCOLS OF HEAVEN, which are THE 50 ENLIGHTENING EYES THAT LIGHT UP THE 50 ACUPUNCTURE POINTS IN MY SPIRITUAL BODY (please refer to the 50 Protocols of Heaven in the picture below), because YOU ABBA FATHER in heaven is THE LIVING WORD, And I need to be restored to be a son or daughter of THE HEAVENLY FATHER IN/SPOKE THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH. JESUS IN AARON K DAVID, which will

heal and restore my physical body to wholesomeness and restore myself back to be A LIVING WORD again, just like ADAM before he ate the forbidden fruit and became a fallen man who fell from being SELFLESS (without snakes) to being FULL OF SELF (a bag full of snakes) which is the lust of the flesh, lust of the eyes, pride of life, being carnally minded which is controlled by Satan, Lucifer through THE TREE OF KNOWLEDGE OF GOOD AND EVIL, Instead spiritually minded having A MIND OF A CHRIST which is part of the branch of THE TREE OF LIFE, doing my own will instead submitting to do THE HEAVENLY FATHER'S WILL LIKE JESUS did.

Also, I pray to fill myself further with THY 7 WORDS (please refer to the 7 WORDS picture below) to be transformed into the manifestation of sons and daughters of YOU, ABBA FATHER IN THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH
AND JESUS IN/SPOKE THROUGH AARON K DAVID. I pray that YOU will impart :
100% ALLEGIANCE, FOCUS, AND PRECISION in my forehead (3rd eye) to THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH AND JESUS IN AARON K DAVID, so that there is no Satan in my life,
OBEDIENCE WITHOUT QUESTIONS ASKED in my right hand. Otherwise, the work of my hands will not be established!

100% YIELDEDNESS in my left hand to THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH AND JESUS IN AARON K DAVID; so that I will have A Blessed Life (as shown in the picture above); otherwise, Satan will trick me into making carnal decisions which will cause me to fall into the pitfall of unnecessary circumstances that will result in promised blessings, not being realized as shown the picture below!

100% FAITH IN THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH AND JESUS IN AARON K DAVID in my vertebra, without which I will be completely powerless and unable to obtain anything from YOU, ABBA FATHER. IN THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH because faith is the insulation cable to carry the power of YOU IN THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH to me (Please refer to The 5 Steps toward Holiness picture below). Hence will result in me being swallowed by the doubt snake, which will suck me into the Tartarus Gehenna fire. (Refer to Doubt snake picture below)
Heb 11:6 But without faith it is impossible to please him: for he that cometh to God must believe that he is, and that he is a rewarder of them that diligently seek him.

Jas 1:6 But let him ask in faith, nothing wavering. For he that wavereth is like a wave of the sea driven with the wind and tossed. Jas 1:7 For let not that man think that he shall receive any thing of the Lord. Jas 1:8 A double minded man is unstable in all his ways.

FAITH IS THE BLUE INSULATION CABLE, FAITH IN THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH INSULATES THE RED POWER CABLE THAT CONNECTS TO THE FATHER'S HEART IN THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH, AND GREEN EARTH WIRE THAT CONNECTS TO LIFE IN JESUS IN JESUS IN AARON K DAVID!
WALK IN MERCY In my right leg so that mercy will be shown to me in return.
Mat 5:7 Blessed are the merciful: for they shall obtain mercy.
WALK IN THE ULTIMATE TRUTH TAUGHT BY THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH AND JESUS IN AARON K DAVID IN MY LEFT LEG,
Joh 8:31 Then said Jesus to those Jews which believed on him, If ye continue in my word, then are ye my disciples indeed;
Joh 8:32 And ye shall know the truth, and the truth shall make you free.

BEING ROOTED AND FILLED WITH THE FLUID OF THE FATHER'S LOVE AND BE CLOTHED WITH THE SKIN OF THE SEVERITY OF THE FATHER IN THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH to be conformed into the image of a Christ by perfecting in holiness and to be perfected as YOU, ABBA FATHER IN THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH AND JESUS IN AARON K DAVID, That is perfect, for without the skin of the severity of THE FATHER IN THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH, I will not be perfected, because I will trample YOUR LOVE under my feet and take YOUR LOVE for granted by just keep sinning if YOU don't discipline us, for WE are your son and daughter and YOU discipline those whom YOU love, ABBA FATHER.

Eph 3:14 For this cause I bow my knees unto the Father of our Lord Jesus Christ, Eph 3:15 Of whom the whole family in heaven and earth is named, Eph 3:16 That he would grant you, according to the riches of his glory, to be strengthened with might by his Spirit in the inner man; Eph 3:17 That Christ may dwell in your hearts by faith; that ye, being rooted and grounded in love, Eph 3:18 May be able to comprehend with all saints what is the breadth, and length, and depth, and height; Eph 3:19 And to know the love of Christ, which passeth knowledge, that ye might be filled with all the fulness of God. Eph 3:20 Now unto him that is able to do exceeding abundantly above all that we ask or think, according to the power that worketh in us, Eph 3:21 Unto him be glory in the church by Christ Jesus throughout all ages, world without end. Amen.
I also pray for PSALM 103 to heal my spirit, soul and body into wholesomeness; in JESUS'S NAME, I pray, amen."
Bless the Lord, O My Soul

Psa 103:1 A Psalm of David. Bless the LORD, O my soul: and all that is within me, bless his holy name. Psa 103:2 Bless the LORD, O my soul, and forget not all his benefits: Psa 103:3 Who forgiveth all thine iniquities; who healeth all thy diseases; Psa 103:4 Who redeemeth thy life from destruction; who crowneth thee with lovingkindness and tender mercies; Psa 103:5 Who satisfieth thy mouth with good things; so that thy youth is renewed like the eagle's. Psa 103:6 The LORD executeth righteousness and judgment for all that are oppressed. Psa 103:7 He made known his ways unto Moses, his acts unto the children of Israel. Psa 103:8 The LORD is merciful and gracious, slow to anger, and plenteous in mercy. Psa 103:9 He will not always chide: neither will he keep his anger for ever.

Psa 103:10 He hath not dealt with us after our sins; nor rewarded us according to our iniquities. Psa 103:11 For as the heaven is high above the earth, so great is his mercy toward them that fear him. Psa 103:12 As far as the east is from the west, so far hath he removed our transgressions from us. Psa 103:13 Like as a father pitieth his children, so the LORD pitieth them that fear him. Psa 103:14 For he knoweth our frame; he remembereth that we are dust. Psa 103:15 As for man, his days are as grass: as a flower of the field, so he flourisheth. Psa 103:16 For the wind passeth over it, and it is gone; and the place thereof shall know it no more. Psa 103:17 But the mercy of the LORD is from everlasting to everlasting upon them that fear him, and his righteousness unto children's children; Psa 103:18 To such as keep his covenant, and to those that remember his commandments to do them. Psa 103:19 The LORD hath prepared his throne in the heavens; and his kingdom ruleth over all. Psa 103:20 Bless the LORD, ye his angels, that excel in strength, that do his commandments, hearkening unto the voice of his word. Psa 103:21 Bless ye the LORD, all ye his hosts; ye ministers of his, that do his pleasure. Psa 103:22 Bless the LORD, all his works in all places of his dominion: bless the LORD, O my soul.
RECAP AND RE-SUMMARISE THE ABOVE REPENTANCE PRAYER
THIS REPENTANCE PRAYER BELOW IS A LIFE ROPE TO PULL YOU OUT OF HELL AND ENTER INTO HEAVEN! WE SWEAR, WE SWEAR, WE SWEAR, AFFIRMED, THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH.
"ABBA FATHER,
REPENTANCE PRAYER

I humble myself before YOU, repent in dust and ashes, and acknowledge that I have missed your perfect mark and sinned. I ask for YOUR forgiveness, and in the name of JESUS, I repent, bind, break, render powerless, suck out all the defilements in me, and uproot out of me, out of all my belongings, all my loved ones, all those under me, out of all those people in my community, my workplace, people that I met, into THE TRINITY'S OVEN to be burned, send your holy fire to purge me and all of us and purify us as gold I pray.

I repent of my carnal mindedness, carnal reasoning, self-righteousness, blaming GOD instead of examining where I have missed the mark or sin in scoring less than 10/10 in what you have taught us here in this book and all THE BEHOLD MY MESSENGER SERIES.

I repent of all my pride, subtle doubt or unbelief, all the lies and voices of the enemy, your bad habits, escaping into the unreal world, obstinate, stubbornness, self-will, disobedience, unyieldedness, worldliness, lust of the flesh, lust of my eyes, pride of life, murmuring and complaining, argumentative spirit, strife, proud and haughty spirit, self-condemnation, unfruitfulness, deception, disillusion, anger, agitation, insubordination, all the spirits inside that break THE 50 PROTOCOLS OF HEAVEN, after repenting, suck them all out into THE TRINITY'S OVEN to be burned, cleansed, sanctified, purified with the purging of refiner's fire and fullers' soap,
EMPTY ME (A BAG OF SNAKES) PRAYER
I pray to :
(I] EMPTY MY FLESH, which is the lust of my flesh, the lust of my eyes, the pride of life to be selfless,
EMPTY MY SOUL, which is to empty my carnal mind, uproot THE TREE OF KNOWLEDGE OF GOOD AND EVIL, and be replaced with the mind of a Christ and be attached back to the branch of THE TREE OF LIFE,
EMPTY MY SPIRIT by emptying my self-will and submitting to your will.
FILLED WITH THE LIVING WORDS, RESTORED TO HEAVEN PRAYER
ABBA, and I pray to clothe my spirit man with THY LIVING WORDS, which is:
NINE WINGS OF THE SPIRITTHE 9 FRUITS OF THE HOLY SPIRIT, which are my 9 WHITE ANGELIC WINGS around my spiritual body so that my spirit man can fly heavenward,

SALVATION GARMENT-10 OUT OF 10 IN EACH OF THE 10 PERFECT CHARACTERS OF JESUS traits, which is MY SALVATION GARMENT OF GLORY OR HOPE OF GLORY OR GLORIFIED BODY that Adam had before his fall, in order to be able to enter into heaven's gate, without which I am unable to enter into heaven at all,

50 ENLIGHTENING EYES-THE 50 PROTOCOLS OF HEAVEN, which are the 50 ENLIGHTENING EYES that LIGHT UP the 50 ACUPUNCTURE POINTS IN MY SPIRITUAL BODY, because YOU ABBA FATHER in heaven is THE LIVING WORD, and I need to be restored to be A Living Word with THE 50 PROTOCOLS OF HEAVENS, to be converted back to be a son or daughter of THE HEAVENLY FATHER IN/SPOKE THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH. JESUS IN AARON K DAVID, will heal and restore my physical body into wholesomeness and restore me back to be A Living Word again just like Adam before he ate the forbidden fruit and became a fallen man who fell from being selfless to being full of self, which is a bag full of snakes, which is the lust of the flesh, lust of the eyes, pride of life, and resulted in him being carnally minded which is controlled by Satan, Lucifer through THE TREE OF KNOWLEDGE OF GOOD AND EVIL, instead spiritually minded having a mind of a Christ which is part of the branch of THE TREE OF LIFE, doing my own will instead submitting to do THE HEAVENLY FATHER'S will just what like JESUS did.
ARCHANGEL GARMENT-THY 7 WORDS to be transformed into the Manifestations Of The Sons And Daughters of YOU, ABBA FATHER IN THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH AND JESUS IN/SPOKE THROUGH AARON
K. DAVID. I pray that YOU will impart into me:

FOREHEAD-100% ALLEGIANCE, FOCUS, AND PRECISION in my forehead (3rd eye) to THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH AND JESUS IN AARON K DAVID which will result in no Satan in my life, for without 100% ALLEGIANCE I am not fully protected, for only through the 100% ALLEGIANCE, then I can tap into THE SOURCE OF POWER OF THE FATHER IN THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH, AND tap into the LIFE OF JESUS IN JESUS IN AARON K DAVID, the son

RIGHT HAND-OBEDIENCE WITHOUT QUESTIONS ASKED TO THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH AND JESUS IN/SPOKE THROUGH AARON K DAVID. So that the fruits of my hands will be established; otherwise, the work of my hands will not be established!

LEFT HAND-100% YIELDED NESS to THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH AND JESUS IN AARON K DAVID; otherwise, Satan will trick me into making carnal decisions which will cause me to fall into the pitfall of unnecessary circumstances filled with obstacles that will result in my promised blessings, not being realized!

VERTEBRAE-100% FAITH IN THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH AND JESUS IN AARON K DAVID in my vertebra, otherwise doubt snake will swallow me up and suck me into GEHENNA TATARUS HELL FIRE resulted in not only blessings forfeited but in hopelessness, despair, no energy, tired, being tormented by hell demons day and night till I repent and cast out the doubt snake and impart faith in THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH AND JESUS IN
AARON K DAVID, which connects back to the source of THE FATHER'S POWER THROUGH THE FATHER'S HEART IN THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH'S HEART AND JESUS'S LIFE IN JESUS IN AARON K DAVID'S HEART!

Because faith is the blue insulation cable, faith in THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH insulates the red power cable that connects to THE FATHER'S HEART IN THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH and green earth wire that connects to life in JESUS in JESUS IN AARON K DAVID!
RIGHT LEG WALK IN MERCY so that mercy will be shown to me.
LEFT LEG WALK IN THE ULTIMATE TRUTH TAUGHT BY THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH AND JESUS IN AARON K DAVID, so that The Truth shall set me free and I shall be free indeed!
(A] BODY FLUID FILLED WITH THE FATHER'S LOVE, IN THE FATHER IN THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH, THEREBY BEING ROOTED, SETTLED IN THE FATHER'S LOVE,

(VII) (B] SKIN OF THE SEVERITY OF THE FATHER IN THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH, to be conformed into the image of a Christ by perfecting in holiness and to be perfect as YOU, ABBA FATHER IN THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH AND JESUS IN AARON K DAVID, is perfect, for without the skin of the severity of THE FATHER IN THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH, I will not be perfected, because I will trample YOUR love under my feet and take YOUR love for granted by just keep sinning if YOU don't discipline us, for we are YOUR son and daughter and YOU discipline those whom you love, ABBA FATHER.
HEALING OF SPIRIT, SOUL, AND BODY WITH PSALM 103. I also pray for PSALM 103 TO HEAL MY SPIRIT, SOUL, AND BODY into wholesomeness;
WISDOM, THROUGH THE FEAR OF THE YAHWEH IN THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH, THE MAJOR, AND JESUS IN AARON K DAVID, THE MINOR, AND
PERFECTING HOLINESS, THROUGH THE TERROR OF SHADDAI OF THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH AND JESUS IN AARON K DAVID
In JESUS'S name, I pray, amen."
EXECUTION THROUGH HORN BLOWING
Followed by blowing off the horn (the spiritual horn, not the physical ram's horn, that we put in your mouth), by sounding like "Hoo…….hoo…….hoo…….hoo…….hoo…….hoo…….hoo…….hoo…….hoo…

…hoo……. until you can feel that all the defilements, heaviness had left you and you are now filled with all the above living words in your entire spirit, soul, and body, you can feel completely lighter and set free!
SEAL WITH THANKSGIVING'S JUMP

After you have prayed, seal your prayer with the following thanksgivings jump with up stretched hands, and jump with a heart of gratitude toward US IN SHEKINAIH AND JESUS IN AARON K DAVID 15 times, 5 times x 3 sets to enter into three spiritual vortexes into the BULLS EYE OF THE COSMOS TO SEAL YOUR PRAYER.
Do 15 sets of THANKSGIVINGS as follows: "THANK YOU FATHER
THANK YOU HOLY SPIRIT THANK YOU JESUS
THANK YOU TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH
THANK YOU JESUS IN AARON K DAVID
I GIVE YOU ALL THE GLORY, HONOR AND PRAISE FOREVER AND EVER AND EVER
AMEN, AMEN, AMEN
HALLELUJAH, HALLELUJAH, HALLELUJAH "

The above THANKSGIVING JUMP is to seal all of the above prayers with THE EXPLOSION OF YOUR THANKSGIVING LIGHTs into the three cosmoses or INTO THE THIRD HEAVENS which is THE PARADISE. TO SEAL ALL OF YOUR PRAYERS! AT THE BULL'S EYE OF THE HIGHEST COSMOS OR HEAVENS! ASSURED THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH!!!
BRING FRUITS MEET FOR REPENTANCE
BRING FRUITS MEET FOR REPENTANCE
THE ABOVE PICTURE EXPLAINS IN DETAIL THE 5 STEPS OF THE PURIFICATION PROCESS THAT EVERYONE MUST GO THROUGH TO BE PURIFIED.

WHEN MEN SIN OR BREAKS THE PROTOCOLS OF HEAVEN, THAT ALL HUMANITY ARE TO OBEY, APART FROM THEIR CONFESSION AND REPENTANCE IN THE SECTION ON "HOW TO PRAY FOR YOURSELF AND OTHERS", MEN IS ALSO REQUIRED TO BRING FRUITS MEET FOR REPENTANCE TO MINIMISE THE CONSEQUENCES OF THEIR SIN, FOR WHATEVER A MAN SOW, THAT SHALL HE ALSO REAP,

THE BREAKING OF STRONG HOLDS THROUGH SLAPPING YOURSELF ON YOUR CHEEKS SO TO BRING FRUITS MEET FOR YOUR REPENTANCE, YOU NEED TO FOLLOW THE ABOVE STEPS TO BREAK YOUR STRONGHOLDS, THE CORE THAT NEEDS THE HAMMER OF HEAVEN TO BREAK IT THROUGH YOUR OWN HANDS SLAPPING YOUR FACE TO BREAK THE SPIRITS THAT ARE CONTROLLING YOU.

HOW MANY TIMES YOU ARE TO SLAP YOURSELF DEPENDS ON HOW THICK THE STRONGHOLDS ARE THAT CONTROL YOU. FOR MILD STRONGHOLD, MINIMUM 5,000 SLAPS ARE USUALLY THE BARE MINIMUM TO BREAK THE SMALLEST STRONGHOLDS TO 50,000 SLAPS TO BREAK THE THICKER STRONGHOLDS IN YOU.

PUNCH YOUR FIST INTO THE AIR TO SWEEP THEM INTO THE PURIFYING FIRE AFTER YOU HAVE FINISHED THE SLAPPINGS, YOU NEED TO FOLLOW BY PUNCHING INTO THE AIR WITH THE SAME NUMBER OF TIMES OF YOUR SLAPPINGS PROPHETICALLY. WHEN YOU DO THAT, YOU ARE SWEEPING ALL THE BROKEN STRONGHOLDS INTO THE FIRE.
BLOW HORN TO RELEASE THE FIRE TO BURN THEREAFTER, YOU NEED TO BLOW HORN
HOO…….HOO…….HOO……HOO…….HOO…….HOO…….HOO…….!

TO RELEASE THE HOLY FIRE FROM YOUR MOUTH TO BURN OFF ALL THE STRONGHOLDS THAT YOU HAVE BROKEN AND SWEPT TO THE FIRE, AND NOW YOUR MOUTH MUST RELEASE THE FIRE THROUGH THE BLOWING OF THE HORN TO BURN THEM INTO ASHES!

AFTER YOU HAVE DONE THE ABOVE 3 STEPS, WHEN YOU DO YOUR REPENTANCE PRAYER TO CAST OUT ALL THE DEFILEMENTS INTO THE TRINITY OVEN TO BE BURNED AND REPLACED WITH ALL THE WORDS TAUGHT IN THE "HOW TO PRAY; FOR YOURSELF AND OTHERS" PAGE, AND FURTHER BLOW HORN,

YOU WILL BE RELEASED FROM ALL THESE STRONGHOLDS NOW, AND IT WILL BE EASIER FOR YOU TO CAST THEM OUT. THIS IS BECAUSE YOU HAVE SETTLED YOUR HEAVENLY COURT CASE THAT THE DEVIL ACCUSES YOU IN THE COURT OF HEAVEN OF YOUR BREAKING OUR 50 PROTOCOLS OF HEAVEN; THEREBY, YOUR HEDGE IS BROKEN, AND THE SERPENT BITES!

AFTER YOU HAVE BROUGHT FRUITS MEET FOR REPENTANCE IN THIS WAY, THEN, WHEN YOU REPENT AS PER THE PRAYER WE TAUGHT YOU IN THE "HOW TO PRAY FOR YOURSELF AND OTHERS" SECTION, THE BLOOD OF JESUS WILL THEN CLEANSE YOU FROM ALL YOUR UNRIGHTEOUSNESS AND FROM YOUR SIN! THESE ARE THE WORDS OF TRUTH TAUGHT DIRECTLY BY US FROM HEAVEN
BRING FRUITS MEET FOR REPENTANCE
THROUGH SHEKINAIH, AND THIS ULTIMATE TRUTH SHALL SET YOU FREE, AND YOU SHALL BE FREE INDEED! WE SWEAR, WE SWEAR, WE SWEAR.
SMILED, THE TRINITY
IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH
THE MEDALLION CHANT
THE WARRIOR VICTORY PROCLAIMATION!!!
