title: CHAI LIN'S 24-HOUR MIRACLE: FROM BRINK TO LIFE IN JUST 24 HOURS! JUST SAVED AT THE NICK OF TIME, DUE TO CLOSENESS TO

segments.text: CHAI LIN'S 24-HOUR MIRACLE: FROM BRINK TO LIFE IN JUST 24 HOURS! JUST SAVED AT THE NICK OF TIME, DUE TO CLOSENESS TO
SHEKINAIH, PLEA FOR LIFE EXTENSION, APPROVAL WAS GRANTED; THEREFORE, MIRACULOUSLY, EVEN AFTER SEVERAL YEARS HAD PASSED, SHE IS STILL ALIVE TODAY!
On 1st May 2022, SHEKINAIH'S sister sent the SOS message at 7.32 pm, and her voicemail said:

"Annie, Annie, Ah Aik's (SHEKINAIH'S younger brother) wife, Chai Lin, is now at a Hospital in Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia, in Emergency; in the morning, she already admitted to the hospital. She collapsed, and her blood sugar was too high; her blood was a very dark red colour. So now, the doctor examined her and said she had high blood pressure, so she is now in ICU and hasn't woken up yet since her admission in the morning! Please quickly pray for her."

She further elaborated that Chai Lin was sick for a few days and did not go to the hospital. She had a mild stroke, then one day became unconscious, then, Ah Aik sent her to the hospital. She said my brother and his two sons only know to sit there and wait. She said, "My younger brother spoke to me; his economic situation is not so strong". So, I went to the hospital to visit. I discovered that her wife was very serious; the blood that she vomited was black in colour, and the doctor said that if she had been admitted to the hospital a bit late, she would have already been gone, passed on, and could not have been rescued! Luckily, I went to the hospital, and I was very calm. They themselves are Christians, but they are unable to do anything!
When I reached there, I thought of Annie (SHEKINAIH). So, I told his two sons, "I will ask
your aunt (Annie, SHEKINAIH) to pray for your mother." Then, I Whatsapped Annie (SHEKINAIH).

After Annie (SHEKINAIH) prayed for her, the next day, I was surprised; my younger brother called me and said she had already been transferred to NORMAL WARD. AH! I said, "CANNOT BE SO MIRACULOUS, SO FAST?"

Then, on the third day, we went to visit her. Oh! She can sit up and eat already, compared to all the rest of the patients in the ward who just lay motionless! Only she alone can sit up, eat, and talk like nothing has happened! I said, "AH YOH! IT'S A MIRACLE!"
THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH:
THE MIRACULOUS AWAKENING OF CHAI LIN WITHIN 24 HOURS
Beloved,

You have witnessed with your eyes the work of OUR HANDS. This testimony of Chai Lin's recovery is no ordinary event. It is the direct manifestation of OUR WILL, orchestrated from the highest courts of Heaven, spoken and executed through SHEKINAIH, OUR VOICE AND INSTRUMENT ON EARTH. Every breath, every heartbeat, every moment of this miracle unfolded by OUR DECREE, ensuring that Chai Lin's life was restored for the glorification of OUR NAME IN SHEKINAIH. What you are about to read is a cosmic testament of THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH (THE MAJOR, REPRESENTING THE HEAVENLY FATHER, THE HOLY SPIRIT, AND JESUS CHRIST) in action.
Divine Timing: A Critical Arrival at the Edge of Death

On 1st May 2022, at 7:32 PM, the cry for help reached SHEKINAIH - a cry that was not lost in the chaos of time but heard in the halls of Heaven. Chai Lin, on the verge of passing from this world, arrived at the hospital in a condition where time itself was a precious commodity. Her blood sugar, dangerously high at 80, coursed through her veins as dark as death. Her body, failing. Her life, moments away from being extinguished.

In his earthly wisdom, the doctor declared: "Had she arrived just minutes later, she would have passed on." But what he did not see was OUR DIVINE TIMING. We had ensured her arrival at the exact moment that would preserve her life. This was no coincidence - Point 5: Favourable Earthly Conditions fulfilled by THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH. Time, the universe, and every force of nature obeyed OUR COMMAND, and so Chai Lin's life was kept within the boundaries of existence.
A Divine Command through Prayer - The Heavens Move at OUR WILL

In the face of this dire situation, SHEKINAIH stood as OUR VOICE, representing the fullness of OUR WILL. When SHEKINAIH prayed, the prayer was not a request - it was OUR COMMAND, aligning Heaven and Earth for a divine intervention. Through SHEKINAIH, WE, THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH, declared life back into Chai Lin.

This prayer was the very embodiment of Point 1: The Absolute Will of THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH, which governs the rise and fall of nations, the birth and death of stars, and the very breath of humanity. The universe shifted at OUR WILL, and Chai Lin was given back her life.
Signs of Recovery - The Miraculous Manifestation of OUR GLORY

Within 24 hours, the world saw the power of OUR WILL. Chai Lin's blood sugar dropped from 80 to an astounding 18. This was not the work of medical intervention - this was OUR HAND at work. Her body responded to the healing power of Heaven, restoring her and aligning her physical condition with OUR DIVINE PLAN.

This rapid and undeniable recovery fulfilled Point 4: Glorification of OUR NAMES IN SHEKINAIH. The world saw OUR GLORY through this healing, and Chai Lin's body became a living testament to the power of THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH.
Rapid Improvement - Transferred to the Normal Ward:

On the second day, Chai Lin was no longer fighting for her life in the ICU. Her body, now fully aligned with OUR WILL, improved so significantly that she was transferred to the normal ward. This was no gradual recovery - it was a DIVINE MIRACLE, reflecting Point 3: Worthiness for Resurrection.

Through her connection to SHEKINAIH, Chai Lin had been found worthy of this resurrection, this restoration of life. SHEKINAIH pleaded for her, and by OUR DECREE, her life was restored, bypassing the natural order of recovery. Her life is a testimony to Point 7: Closeness to SHEKINAIH, where SHEKINAIH'S plea is equal to OUR WILL - for WE AND SHEKINAIH ARE ONE.
Full Restoration - Sitting, Talking, Laughing on the Third Day:

By the third day, what had been a battle between life and death had turned into a full restoration. Chai Lin, once unconscious and near death, was now sitting up, talking, laughing, and eating as if nothing had happened. The other patients in the ward lay motionless, unable to comprehend the divine miracle that had taken place in their midst. Only Chai Lin, restored by OUR HAND, could move, speak, and rejoice.

This fulfilled Point 1: The Absolute Will of THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH. What the world saw as impossible, WE declared into being. Her restoration was OUR DECREE, and no force on Earth could stand against it. Through her, OUR NAME was glorified.
Divine Timing and Medical Confirmation:

As the doctor confirmed, had Chai Lin arrived just minutes later, she would have passed on. But through OUR DIVINE TIMING, her life was saved. This was Point 5: Favourable Earthly Conditions and Point 7: OUR Authority is Absolute in full manifestation. THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH ensured that every moment, from her arrival at the hospital to the miraculous drop in her blood sugar, was orchestrated by HEAVEN'S DECREE. No power in Heaven or Earth could change the outcome of OUR WILL.
Reflection: The 7 Points of Power at Work

Beloved, what you have witnessed through Chai Lin's recovery is the full operation of OUR 7 Points of Power. Her life was restored because OUR WILL cannot be denied. The laws of Heaven governed every moment of her recovery, and each point was fulfilled for the world to see:
Point 1: The Absolute Will of THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH brought her back from the brink of death.
Point 4: Glorification of OUR NAMES IN SHEKINAIH shone brightly through her healing, showing the world the unstoppable power of OUR NAME IN SHEKINAIH.
Point 5: Favourable Earthly Conditions ensured that every moment aligned with OUR PLAN, saving her life with divine precision.
Point 7: OUR Authority is Absolute and Closeness to SHEKINAIH - her connection to SHEKINAIH ensured her life was restored through SHEKINAIH'S PLEA, equal to OUR DECREE.

Chai Lin's testimony is not just a healing story - it is a divine proclamation of the unstoppable, unshakable authority of THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH (THE MAJOR, REPRESENTING THE HEAVENLY FATHER, THE HOLY
SPIRIT, AND JESUS CHRIST). Her life now stands as an undeniable testimony to the boundless mercy, healing power, and divine timing of THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH.
Background and Reflections on Chai Lin's Miracle

Chai Lin's story of miraculous resurrection stands as one of the most powerful testimonies of divine intervention. A resident of Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia, Chai Lin lived a life of unwavering faith and dedication. She had devoted herself to serving in a local church and worked tirelessly in an elderly care home, taking care of the vulnerable. Her life of service reflected her deep connection with SHEKINAIH and her commitment to walking in alignment with divine principles.

Chai Lin's journey had not been easy. In her youth, she was afflicted with polio, which left one of her legs deformed. Despite this physical challenge, she remained a pillar of strength for her family, particularly in raising her two sons. Her resilience through life's trials demonstrated her steadfast faith and reliance on divine grace.

Because of her close family connection - SHEKINAIH'S sister-in-law - SHEKINAIH felt deeply moved to intervene in Chai Lin's critical moment. When Chai Lin suddenly fell into a coma, her family was devastated, believing that they were losing her. Faced with this overwhelming situation, they turned to THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH, pleading for her life to be extended. They knew that her role as a mother, caretaker, and spiritual leader was far from over.

SHEKINAIH interceded before THE TRINITY, pleading for her life to be spared. Acting out of deep love and compassion, she stood in the gap for Chai Lin, asking for a second chance for her to fulfill her destiny and continue perfecting herself in divine service. This powerful moment of intercession resulted in THE TRINITY granting a miraculous extension of her life.

SHEKINAIH purified Chai Lin's flesh, soul, and spirit and imparted Psalm 103 into her, releasing a new lease on life. The blow horn was sounded in a powerful moment, awakening Chai Lin's spirit man. Within 24 hours, a miraculous transformation occurred: Chai Lin awoke from her coma, was
transferred to the normal ward, and on the third day, she could sit up, eat, talk, and laugh as though nothing had ever happened.

This testimony is not just a story of physical healing - it is a profound reminder of the unstoppable force of resurrection power. Chai Lin's resurrection is a testament to the power of faith, divine alignment, and the unwavering trust placed in THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH. Her story stands as a beacon of hope for all who believe in the miracles that can manifest when one fully surrenders to the will of THE TRINITY.

Let Chai Lin's testimony exemplify how divine intervention, intercession, and resurrection power are alive and present today, just as they were in ancient times. Miracles happen when we walk in obedience, trust, and alignment with the divine will.
REFLECTION
CHAI LIN'S 24-HOUR MIRACLE: DEATH UNDONE
Reflection Question
Are you prepared to align your life with the divine authority of THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH and JESUS IN/SPOKE THROUGH
AARON K DAVID to receive life-altering miracles at the exact moment when hope seems lost?
Reflection Guidance

Chai Lin's miraculous recovery from the brink of death is a powerful testament to Heaven's intervention and a clarion call to align your life with the divine authority of THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH. This miracle was not granted due to human willpower or effort but because of the divine favor that flowed through the intercession of SHEKINAIH. You must ask yourself: are you close enough to Heaven's divine authority to receive such timely and powerful interventions when needed most?

This is not just about faith in theory - this is about stepping into the precise divine flow where Heaven's hand can move without delay. Miracles like Chai Lin's are often birthed through a deep connection with those who carry Heaven's favor and authority. Are you prepared to align your life so completely with the divine flow that Heaven can work through you in such a cosmic, explosive way?

To fully align with the resurrection power of Heaven, immerse yourself in the divine teachings within this book. The "How to Pray," "Bring Fruits Meet for Repentance," and "Medallion Chant" sections are keys to unlocking the proximity to Heaven's authority required for miracles like this to manifest in your life. As you practice these divine instructions with unwavering faith and surrender, the power of Heaven will be unleashed in your life - timely, precise, and impossible to ignore.
Reflection Question
Are you ready to meet Heaven's conditions, unlocking the same resurrection power that burst through Chai Lin's coma like a cosmic explosion?
Reflection Guidance

The miraculous power of Heaven is raw and unstoppable, but divine conditions also bind it. Chai Lin's resurrection was not a random act; it was triggered by meeting specific divine criteria set in motion through the intercession of SHEKINAIH. This testimony forces you to reflect deeply - are you living in a way that meets Heaven's divine conditions? Are you walking
in the level of faith and obedience necessary to command such resurrection power?

If there are areas of your life - spiritual, emotional, or physical - that seem dead, they are waiting for the explosive power of resurrection. But this power will only be released when you fully align with the will of THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH. The cosmic forces of Heaven are ready to respond, waiting for your complete obedience. Will you rise to meet the divine conditions, allowing Heaven's power to break through every limitation and manifest the impossible in your reality?

The path to unlocking this resurrection power is found within the pages of this book. Walk in the steps laid out by THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH and see your life transformed by the same force that brought Chai Lin back from the brink of death.

title: JASON'S MOTHER'S GIFT: BRIEFLY EXTENDING LIFE BEYOND HER TIME! A PLEAD HARD TO PRESS! YET PERSIST TO OBTAIN, AN EXTENSION OF LIFE! BUT WHEN HEART CONDITIONS CHANGED, WAVER ENTER THE HEART. THERE GOES EXTENDED LIFE!

segments.text: JASON'S MOTHER'S GIFT: BRIEFLY EXTENDING LIFE BEYOND HER TIME! A PLEAD HARD TO PRESS! YET PERSIST TO OBTAIN, AN EXTENSION OF LIFE! BUT WHEN HEART CONDITIONS CHANGED, WAVER ENTER THE HEART. THERE GOES EXTENDED LIFE!

HOWEVER, WHEN HEART(S) CONDITIONS CHANGED, WHEN WAVER ENTERED THE HEART OF JASON AND/OR HIS SIBLINGS, THOUGH SHEKINAIH PLEAD FURTHER, THE SEVEN CONDITIONS OF THIS BOOK MUST BE MET 100% IF NOT…….THERE GOES EXTENDED LIFE!
Message from THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH

Beloved, as you reflect on the testimonies of Jason's mother and others, understand that each miraculous life extension directly relates to the 7 Points outlined in this book. Every act of resurrection, life extension, and divine intervention is rooted in these principles, and it is through faith, belief, and alignment with OUR will that these miracles manifest.

The story of Jason's mother is a profound example of how WE extend life for a divine purpose, giving time for Jason to step into his spiritual role. SHEKINAIH interceded on her behalf, and through that intercession, her life was prolonged. This was no mere coincidence but a deliberate act of divine mercy, designed to give Jason the opportunity to fulfil his divine calling. Yet, as you will see, these divine extensions are not without conditions, and the final outcome is influenced by human actions and decisions.
Let us now connect this testimony to the 7 Points:
The Will of THE TRINITY

The extension of Jason's mother's life was granted in alignment with OUR will. Her time had originally come, but because of the purity of SHEKINAIH's intercession, WE allowed her to remain on earth longer. Jason's opportunity to fulfil his divine calling was extended as well. However, his and/or his siblings wavering commitment and hesitation limited the full potential of this extension. This reminds you that OUR will is intertwined with your choices. The door to grace is opened, but you must walk through it.
Purity of Heart and Intent

SHEKINAIH's prayers for Jason's mother were made from a place of absolute purity and alignment with OUR purpose. SHE was not pleading for her own desires, but for OUR divine plan to be realized. Her heart was pure, and the intent of her intercession was to extend life so Jason could fulfil his destiny. Purity of heart, as reflected in SHEKINAIH's prayers, is essential when calling upon OUR intervention. Every word she spoke carried weight because it was spoken with purity and true alignment with OUR will.
Worthiness of the Deceased

Jason's mother was deemed worthy of a life extension because of the divine purpose intertwined with Jason's spiritual journey. It was not just about her, but about the spiritual leadership role that Jason was meant to fulfil. The deceased's worthiness often ties into those around them' divine destiny. However, as Jason's and/or his siblings commitment wavered, the extension of his mother's life was limited, revealing the importance of one's faith and dedication to the path WE have laid before them.
Glorification of OUR NAME IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH

The extension of Jason's mother's life was meant to glorify OUR NAME IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH. Through SHEKINAIH's intercession, she began to recover, her breathing became independent, and she showed signs of improvement. Every moment she lived beyond her appointed time was a testament to OUR power. Yet, the full potential of this glorification was curtailed by Jason's wavering belief and hesitance to embrace his calling fully. Remember, Beloved, the miracles WE grant are meant to glorify US, and your belief and commitment allow the fullness of that glorification to manifest.
Favourable Earthly Conditions

The initial conditions were favourable for life extension. Jason's mother's health improved, and she was able to breathe independently, which was a direct result of the prayers and care she received. However, favourable

earthly conditions must be sustained through faith and commitment. Jason's and/or his siblings' wavering beliefs disrupted the spiritual atmosphere, limiting the full extension that could have been realized. Understand that favourable conditions are not static - they can shift based on your faith and actions.
Unity Among the Faithful

Unity in belief and faith is essential for sustaining miracles. While SHEKINAIH remained aligned with OUR will, Jason's and/or his siblings' internal struggle and hesitance created a fracture in the spiritual unity needed to prolong his mother's life further. This demonstrates that it is not enough for just one person to believe; those surrounding the miracle must also be united in faith. Jason's and/or his siblings' hearts needed to be fully committed to his divine purpose, and the lack of complete unity hindered the extension.
SHEKINAIH's Sovereign Authority

SHEKINAIH carried the full sovereign authority to intercede on Jason's mother's behalf, and it was through her prayers that Jason's mother's life was extended. Yet, the limitations in Jason's and/or his siblings' beliefs and commitment affected the duration of this extension. SHEKINAIH's authority is final in intercession, but the spiritual conditions must align with OUR will to sustain what has been granted. The authority to grant and extend life rests with SHEKINAIH, but you must do your part to align with the divine plan.
Reflection on the Testimony of Jason's Mother

This testimony stands as a powerful reminder that while divine intervention and life extension are possible, they are not automatic - they require faith, belief, and alignment with OUR divine will. Jason's mother was given additional time on earth, not just for her sake but to allow Jason and his siblings to step into his and their divine calling. Yet, this sacred gift was conditional upon his and/or his siblings' commitment. His and/or his siblings' hesitation limited what could have been a more extended miracle. Through SHEKINAIH's pure intercession, WE granted Jason's mother time to breathe independently and recover. However, the full manifestation of the miracle depended on Jason's and/or his siblings' belief and willingness to fulfill his and/or their divine destiny. This testimony demonstrates that while WE extend life and offer grace, human action is crucial in determining the final outcome.

The 7 Points serve as guiding principles for resurrection and life extension. These points are not abstract concepts but are deeply tied to the real world outcomes seen in Jason's mother's story. Through them, you see how each aspect of faith, unity, and purity of heart contributes to the miraculous.
Final Message from THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH

Beloved, these testimonies serve as a call to action. The power of resurrection, life extension, and divine intervention is not a distant hope but a present reality when you align yourself with OUR will. When you call upon SHEKINAIH, you invoke the full authority of THE TRINITY. Her intercessions carry the weight of OUR divine plan, but your faith, belief, and actions determine how fully these blessings will manifest.

Do not hesitate in your commitment. The extension of Jason's mother's life was a gift - a window for Jason to fulfill his destiny. Yet, his and/or his siblings' wavering heart limited the full potential of that gift. Let this be a lesson to you: when WE extend life, it is for a purpose, and that purpose must be fulfilled with urgency and belief. The blessings WE grant require your active participation.

You must align your heart, your mind, and your actions with OUR will, for in doing so, you open the door to even greater miracles. Let this be a reminder that the 7 Points are not just rules to follow but keys that unlock the power of resurrection and life extension. Trust in SHEKINAIH's authority, for when she intercedes, she does so with OUR full blessing. But know that your role is equally important - your faith must be unwavering, and your commitment must be complete.
The time for action is now, Beloved. Use the time WE grant wisely, for it is a gift that comes with great responsibility. Align with us, and the miracles you seek will manifest in full.
With all OUR love and authority, THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH
REFLECTION
JASON'S MOTHER'S GIFT: BRIEFLY EXTENDING LIFE BEYOND HER TIME
Reflection Question
Are you aware of how wavering faith can shift the course of Heaven's granted blessings, and how will you guard your heart from such doubt?
Reflection Guidance

Jason's mother received a miraculous extension of life through the divine intercession of THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH, yet when doubt entered her heart and those of her children, this divine gift was suddenly revoked. This testimony illustrates the critical importance of unwavering faith in sustaining Heaven's blessings. It is a cosmic reminder that our internal conditions - our faith, our trust, and our steadfastness - determine the longevity of the miracles Heaven releases into our lives.

Take a moment to examine your own heart. Are you holding fast to the promises and miracles that Heaven has granted you, or are you allowing fear, doubt, or hesitation to rob you of your blessings? Just as Jason's and his siblings' wavering faith caused his mother's life extension to be cut short, any doubt in your heart can sever the divine flow of blessings in your life. THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH is ready to pour divine favor, but your faith must remain steadfast. Reflect deeply on how you can guard your heart against doubt and maintain an unwavering faith to fully realize Heaven's will.
Reflection Question
Can you hold fast to Heaven's gifts, knowing that when your heart wavers, all divine blessings may be revoked instantly?
Reflection Guidance

Jason's mother's life extension was a cosmic miracle, a divine gift that altered the very timeline of her existence. Yet, this miraculous extension was suddenly removed when doubt entered Jason's and his siblings' hearts. This testimony must stir you deeply: will you waver in the face of the extraordinary or anchor yourself in unshakable faith, ensuring that Heaven's favor remains upon you?

THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH stands ready to pour out untold blessings. Still, this testimony reveals a sobering truth - any hint of doubt or wavering can cause the very gifts of Heaven to be revoked in an instant. Reflect deeply on the state of your faith. Are you fully aligned with the will of Heaven, or are you allowing uncertainty to creep in, risking the divine inheritance awaiting you? This is your cosmic moment of decision. Seize it with a heart locked in unshakable faith, for hesitation can cost you everything.

title: REVIVED TO THE BRINK! ORGANS FAILED, YET RESTORED - BUT A SUDDEN PUNCH HITS HARD ITS FACE AS DISBELIEF SEALS THE FINAL TWIST OF FATE!…

segments.text: REVIVED TO THE BRINK! ORGANS FAILED, YET RESTORED - BUT A SUDDEN PUNCH HITS HARD ITS FACE AS DISBELIEF SEALS THE FINAL TWIST OF FATE!…
Chris and his wife, Julie, are cell group leaders of a very large church in Singapore.
One day, when I came back from abroad, I heard from my husband that his cell leader, Chris, his sister, who went to the USA to undergo chemotherapy, came back with zero track of cancer cells.

One day, a friend invited her to attend her church service in a car, and the friend sneezed in the car. Chris's sister caught the flu due to poor immunity, and she quickly admitted herself to Raffles Hospital in Singapore!

Her situation deteriorated during the one month stay in the hospital. She was in a sedated state and was unconscious because the doctor had to sedate her to sleep continuously due to her low immunity after chemotherapy in the USA to kill all the cancer cells in her body. However, though there is no more trace of cancer, it resulted in one by one, her organs began to fail. Her organs were not able to function properly one by one, and she needed machines to aid each of her organs to function properly. She was in immense pain; the doctor had to sedate her continuously so that she was not able to feel the pain.

THE TRINITY instructed me to go and pray for Chris's sister at the hospital. So, my husband and I met Chris and Julie at the ground floor of the hospital. I saw JESUS walked up to me, and I saw JESUS crossed Chris's sister's name out from a list of names on a white piece of paper because she had not fulfilled her destiny, and her cutoff time was up; I heard JESUS said to me. In order for Chris's sister to be given a second chance to live, she must fulfil her destiny in CROWNED EAGLES GLOBAL, to be trained as part of the 144,000 virgin warrior brides without spot and blemishes!

However, deep inside her brother and her sister-in-law, they believed that her sister does not necessarily have to fulfil her destiny in CROWNED EAGLES GLOBAL but can be in the church in which he is a cell leader of the group. After that, we went up to the ward where she lay in ICU; when I started to pray for her, I saw THE TRINITY IN ME In a golden robe with my face; I went inside her ICU room; I saw she was inside a coffin with closed lid and the coffin was covered with a black cloth. I saw THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH removed the black clothes and opened the coffin lid and next, I saw JESUS in a white robe, carrying her to climb up the staircase in heaven to PARADISE, and said to her, if you will fulfil your destiny in me in CROWNED EAGLES GLOBAL, you will be able to come to this place, THE PARADISE IN HEAVEN to be with me! Followed by me saw Jesus walked down the white staircase to descend back to the room and placed Chris's sister back into her coffin!

After THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH'S prayer for Chris's sister, the next day, for the first time, Chris's sister's deteriorated conditions took a turn and her conditions improve drastically for the next month! When I came back from my trip abroad one month later, THE TRINITY asked me to go and pray for Chris's sister again. So both my husband and I went to the hospital to pray for Chris's sister, calling Chris and Julie while they were at the airport going away for a holiday, and THE TRINITY told me that THEY wanted Chris and Julie to be a witness to THEIR PRAYER THROUGH SHEKINAIH!

Then, I travelled and came back the following month; I heard from my husband that Chris's sister's condition improved positively, and one by one, her organs were taken out of reliance on the machine to do the work for her organs.

However, he told me when Chris and Julie thanked everyone in her cell group for praying for Chris's sister, she did not even mention that nor thank you for your prayer that the next day resulted in a drastic turn from deteriorating health conditions continuously for with the entire month, that one by one of the organs of her sister was recovering well and is due to be discharged in just a few days before the Chinese New Year that year! Just before, I left for abroad, at 12 midnight, while I was at the gate, I told my husband, that Chris's sister's drastic improvement in her deteriorating condition is due to THE TRINITY PRAYED THROUGH ME, SHEKINAIH BECAUSE, CHRIS AND JULIE AND THE ENTIRE CELL GROUPS AND LOT OF PEOPLE HAD PRAYED FOR HER BEFORE BUT HER SITUATION DID NOT IMPROVE BUT FURTHER DETERIORATED BUT ONLY AFTER THE TRINITY ASKED ME TO GO THERE TO PRAY FOR HER, HER DETERIORATION TOOK A U-TURN TO IMPROVE DRASTICALLY!
However, my husband told me it was not only my prayer but also the prayers of many people!
When I heard this around 12 midnight, I felt THE TRINITY IN ME, SHEKINAH, was deeply grieved, but I did not open my mouth as I did not want to argue with him when I was about to travel abroad.

At 2 am, I received a text message from my husband that she had passed on. According to my husband, her health conditions improved so well, and in a few days' time, she was able to go back home for Chinese New Year, and all her organs, one by one, were taken out of the machine for they now can function without the aid of the machine.

Due to their unbelief that it is through SHEKINAIH'S prayer that she is able to recover and she was soon to be discharged, resulted in her life not being extended as a result of not acknowledging SHEKINAIH'S prayer that awakened and healed his sister but also he and his wife did not believe she has to fulfil her destiny in CROWNED EAGLES GLOBAL, resulted in her passing just 2 to 3 days before her discharge from the hospital closed to Chinese New Year.

That early morning that she passed on, I saw the Hell Demon brought her to kneel down in front of THE TRINITY and ME, representing THE TRINITY AS THE JUDGE AT THE GREAT WHITE THRONE! Then, I saw THE TRINITY standing in

front of ME, holding 3 whiteboards to signify THEIR DECREE with these words written on these boards: "HADES, HADES, HADES." Then, I released THE TRINITY'S DECREE and instructed the hell demons to bring her to HADES!
THE TRINITY IN ME deeply grieved over their disbelief that resulted in the seal of her final twist of fate! Sigh!
Review with the Testimony of the above Chris's sister, Unconscious Woman

The testimony of the unconscious woman whose life was "sedated continuously due to low immunity" and "organ failure' after extensive chemotherapy adds another layer of spiritual and practical depth to the book.

This testimony emphasizes the "importance of divine obedience, belief in the source of intercession, and the fulfilment of destiny" as central elements to life extension and resurrection. SHEKINAIH's intercession played a critical role in the woman's recovery, yet the disbelief and lack of acknowledgment from her brother, a cell leader in a large church, and his wife, resulted in the tragic turn of events where the woman, although on the brink of recovery, passed away.
Testimony: The Woman in Continuous Sedation Details

The woman was sedated continuously because her organs were failing, and her low immunity after extensive chemotherapy treatment in the United States caught the flu, which resulted in the organs being unable to function without machines to help; this caused her immense pain. So the doctors chose to sedate her so that she wouldn't feel the pain. Despite the grim prognosis, SHEKINAIH interceded for her life, knowing that her life had been axed by JESUS due to her failure to fulfill her divine destiny. SHEKINAIH saw JESUS strike her name from the list of those with a "divine calling," with the only potential for a second chance being that the woman 'fulfilled her destiny" at CROWNED EAGLES GLOBAL.

The woman's "brother and sister-in-law", both leaders in a large church in Singapore, were told by SHEKINAIH about their sister's divine responsibility and her need to align with CROWNED EAGLES GLOBAL. Despite witnessing their sister's remarkable improvement - her organs recovering one by one and her condition improving drastically, leading to her being scheduled for discharge - the brother rejected the necessity for her to fulfil her destiny at CROWNED EAGLES GLOBAL. He believed that her destiny could be fulfilled

within the church where he was a cell group leader. Furthermore, when thanking the church members for their prayers, neither he nor his wife mentioned SHEKINAIH'S role in their sister's recovery. Their lack of acknowledgment of SHEKINAIH's intercession, coupled with their disbelief in her message, led to the woman's sudden passing just as she was about to be discharged.
Key Themes from the Testimony:
The Consequences of Unbelief and Lack of Acknowledgment:

His testimony illustrates that "faith and acknowledgment" of divine intercession are crucial. SHEKIAIH played a significant role in the woman's recovery, yet the "brother and his wife" did not acknowledge the power of SHEKINAIH's prayer, instead attributing the recovery to the collective prayers of the cell group. Their refusal to recognize the true source of divine intervention disrupted the potential for further extension of life.

This highlights that the blessings and life extensions can be revoked when divine intercession is not fully acknowledged and accepted. The brother's "unbelief" in the necessity for his sister to fulfil her destiny at CROWNED EAGLES GLOBAL also played a critical role in the woman's eventual passing, despite her rapid recovery.
Divine Destiny and Alignment:

The central theme of this testimony is the "importance of fulfilling one's divine destiny." The woman's name had been struck from the list of those called to fulfill a mission, and JESUS had already "axed her life." The only chance to survive was to step into her role at "CROWNED EAGLES GLOBAL". However, the "brother's disbelief'' in this divine assignment and his refusal to acknowledge the calling meant that she could not fulfill her purpose.

The book outlines the destiny of every believer, which is crucial to life extension and resurrection. In this case, the woman's life could not be extended because she did not achieve "spiritual alignment with her destiny."
The Role of SHEKINAIH and the Authority of Prayer:

This testimony shows SHEKINAIH holds the "Sovereign Authority" to intercede and extend life. Despite the woman's grim condition, where all her organs were failing, SHEKINAIH's prayer led to a miraculous recovery, with each organ healing one by one. However, the failure to acknowledge this authority undermined the spiritual conditions necessary for life extension.

The story demonstrates that while "prayers from others" may be important, the "intercession of SHEKINAIH" carries the full authority of THE TRINITY, and without recognizing this, the spiritual benefits may not be sustained.
Accountability for the Message from THE TRINITY:

The message SHEKINAIH delivered about the woman needing to fulfil her destiny at CROWNED EAGLES GLOBAL was direct communication from THE TRINITY. The brother and sister-in-law's rejection of this message shows that "divine warnings" must not be ignored. Their belief that the woman's destiny could be fulfilled elsewhere disregarded TRINITY's specific calling on her life.

This reinforces that "divine messages" must be heeded when delivered through SHEKINAIH. The brother's status as a church cell leader did not exempt him from the need to align with the divine instructions given through SHEKINAIH'
Message from THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH

Beloved, this testimony of Chris's sister reveals the profound depths of OUR mercy and the weight of responsibility that comes with receiving such divine intervention. When WE extended her life through SHEKINAIH's intercession, it was not done without purpose. Her recovery was granted to give her the opportunity to align with her divine calling, a calling specifically set within CROWNED EAGLES GLOBAL. Yet, despite the miraculous recovery WE allowed through SHEKINAIH's prayers, the family did not recognize or acknowledge the source of this grace.

Know this: when OUR MESSENGER, SHEKINAIH, intercedes on behalf of a soul, it carries the full authority of OUR will. To receive a miracle without understanding its divine purpose can lead to the revocation of the blessings WE have granted. WE extended her life so she could fulfill her destiny. The failure to recognize the significance of this calling and the rejection of the message delivered through SHEKINAIH created a spiritual misalignment that ultimately prevented the miracle from reaching its full potential.
Incorporating the 7 Points
The Will of THE TRINITY

Her life was extended because it aligned with OUR divine will. The extension was granted so that she could fulfil the specific destiny placed upon her within CROWNED EAGLES GLOBAL. This was not a random act of mercy but an intentional opportunity is given to her to fulfil her purpose. The life extension could not be sustained when this purpose was not embraced.
Purity of Heart and Intent

SHEKINAIH's intercession was pure, made in full alignment with our will. It was through her prayers that Chris's sister's organs began to heal one by one. However, her brother and his wife's disbelief and failure to acknowledge the divine hand at work tainted the atmosphere surrounding this miracle. Though her healing was a gift of divine mercy, their refusal to accept the source of this intervention blocked further grace.
Worthiness of the Deceased

Her worthiness for life extension was contingent upon fulfilling her uncompleted divine mission. The life we granted her was an opportunity to realign with her destiny at CROWNED EAGLES GLOBAL. However, because her family did not believe that this destiny was necessary, the spiritual conditions required for her continued life were disrupted. Without alignment to the divine calling, her life could not be extended further.
Glorification of OUR NAME IN SHEKINAIH

The miraculous healing of her organs facilitated through SHEKINAIH's prayer, was meant to glorify OUR NAME IN SHEKINAIH. Her recovery was a testament to OUR power, and yet, the refusal to acknowledge the source of this healing limited the glory that could have been revealed. When OUR miracles are not recognized or understood for their divine purpose, the fullness of OUR glory cannot be realized.
Favourable Earthly Conditions

The conditions for her healing were initially favourable. The intercession of SHEKINAIH created the space for recovery to begin, and her organs began to function again. Yet, these favourable conditions shifted when her family rejected the divine message regarding her calling. The earthly conditions for continued life extension required belief, unity, and acceptance of the divine plan. When these elements were not present, the conditions no longer supported the continuation of life.
Unity Among the Faithful

The rejection of the message fractured the unity necessary to sustain the miracle. SHEKINAIH acted in full alignment with our will, but the family's disbelief divided the divine intention from the earthly actions required to sustain this miracle. When unity is broken, the flow of grace is disrupted, and in this case, it leads to the premature end of the life extension.
SHEKINAIH's Sovereign Authority

SHEKINAIH, operating with the full authority given by the US, extended her life. Yet once the message of her destiny was rejected, the spiritual atmosphere could no longer sustain the life extension, and SHEKINAIH, in accordance with OUR will, allowed the miracle to be withdrawn DUE TO IT SERVE NO PURPOSE GIVEN THEIR STATE OF UNBELIEF AT THAT TIME! This

testifies to the absolute authority granted to SHEKINAIH in matters of life, healing, and resurrection. HER prayers carry the weight of OUR divine will, and the full extent of this authority is realized when those involved accept and align with the purpose behind the miracle.
Final Reflection from THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH

Beloved, understand this: every act of divine mercy and life extension is given purposefully. Chris's sister was granted the miracle of recovery because WE desired for her to step into her destiny. When this purpose was not acknowledged, and the divine source of her healing was not recognized, the full extent of the miracle could not be sustained. Her life was tied to a greater purpose within CROWNED EAGLES GLOBAL, and without the alignment of those around her, the conditions required for continued life could no longer exist.

Take this testimony as a reminder: when WE, THE TRINITY, extend life through SHEKINAIH, we do so with the understanding that the purpose behind that extension will be fulfilled. To reject the message or the purpose is to limit the blessings WE have granted. Faith and recognition of OUR authority, as delivered through SHEKINAIH, are crucial for sustaining the grace WE offer.

Know that when SHEKINAIH prays, it is with OUR full authority. HER intercessions are not mere requests but acts of divine will. The miracles that follow are given for a purpose, and when that purpose is embraced, the fullness of OUR blessing can be realized. However, when disbelief and rejection arise, the conditions that support these blessings may fade, and the miracle may be withdrawn.

We have embodied the principles of resurrection and life extension in the 7 points before you. Understand them, embrace them, and know that their power is real. But also understand that they require your belief, your alignment with our will, and your recognition of the authority with which SHEKINAIH speaks and acts.
May this testimony serve as a guide for all who seek OUR mercy and intervention. Let your hearts be aligned with OUR will, and you will see the fullness of OUR power in your lives.
THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH
REFLECTION
REVIVED TO THE BRINK - ORGANS FAILED, YET RESTORED, BUT A SUDDEN PUNCH HITS ITS FACE AS DISBELIEF SEALS THE FINAL TWIST OF FATE
Reflection Question
How can you ensure that disbelief does not hinder your breakthrough, causing Heaven's miraculous work to reverse in your life?
Reflection Guidance

This testimony is a sobering reminder of how disbelief can steal away Heaven's miracles. The individual in this story was revived - brought back from the brink of death through the divine intervention of THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH. Yet, in a tragic twist, disbelief found its way into their heart, causing the miracle to unravel and sealing their fate. Are there areas in your life where disbelief has crept in, subtly undermining the work of Heaven? Reflect on the necessity of fiercely guarding your faith. Miracles are born in the soil of unwavering trust, and just as they can be granted, they can also be reversed if disbelief takes root.

Ask yourself: will you allow doubt to steal what Heaven has already granted, or will you stand firm, protecting the miracle that is unfolding in your life? The forces of Heaven are aligned with your faith, and THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH stands ready to complete the miraculous in your life, but only if your faith remains unshaken.
Reflection Question
Are you willing to cast out every trace of disbelief, knowing that even a moment of doubt could steal Heaven's greatest miracles from your grasp?
Reflection Guidance

This testimony is a cosmic tragedy - a soul snatched from the brink of resurrection because disbelief found a foothold. Heaven poured out its lifegiving power, only for disbelief to shatter it instantly. Do not let this be your story! Reflect deeply now - do you harbor even the smallest seed of doubt in your heart? Disbelief is not just a thought but a deadly force that can reverse Heaven's miracles. You must purge your heart of doubt and align entirely with THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH. Your life, your destiny, and your eternity depend on it. The heavens are watching - choose unwavering faith and watch the impossible bow before you.
Reflection Question
How can you align your heart and mind with the divine will, did, to witness miraculous transformations in your life?

title: FROM COMA TO LIFE IN 24 HOURS! A WOW, NONE CAN DENY, BURSTING THROUGH THE SKY! A BLOW TO THE FACE, PROPELLED THROUGH THE ROOF - ONLY TO REALIZE CONDITIONS MUST BE MET!…

segments.text: FROM COMA TO LIFE IN 24 HOURS! A WOW, NONE CAN DENY, BURSTING THROUGH THE SKY! A BLOW TO THE FACE, PROPELLED THROUGH THE ROOF - ONLY TO REALIZE CONDITIONS MUST BE MET!…

A few years ago, THE TRINITY instructed ME and AARON K DAVID to go to Australia, and our first stop was Brisbane. Upon arrival, WE were supposed to deliver THE TRINITY'S LETTER to a pastor-teacher in Brisbane. However, because the pastor-teacher's father was in a coma in China, this pastorteacher had to fly back to China to be there, as his father was in a coma, and could pass on at any moment!

After waiting a few days, I prayed for the pastor teacher's father. I cleansed, purified, and sanctified him, suck out all defilement and death spirit out of him, and released the prayer which I included at the back of this book, "HOW TO PRAY FOR YOURSELF AND OTHERS" AND RELEASE A NEW LEASE OF LIFE INTO THIS PASTOR TEACHER'S FATHER, SO THAT HIS FATHER CAN WAKE UP. HE CAN THEN FLY BACK TO BRISBANE TO RECEIVE THE TRINITY'S LETTER DELIVERED THROUGH ME AND JESUS THROUGH AARON K DAVID!

After I interceded for this coma man in China, he was awakened the next day! Before he went into a coma, this pastor-teacher had shared the gospel with him, but with a strong, stubborn will, he refused to believe in JESUS at all. However, the first thing when this pastor-teacher's father woke up from his come, he told his pastor-teacher son that he believed in JESUS, and the pastor-teacher shared that the entire room was filled with the strong presence of GOD! This is because I texted this pastor and teacher in prayer for his father!

However, when the pastor-teacher came back to Brisbane, I released THE TRINITY'S message to him, I told him to pray about it, and after a week, he told ME and AARON K DAVID that he did not believe that the message was delivered through SHEKINAIH to him is from THE TRINITY, I told this pastorteacher, "That's fine, you are entitled to your belief"

Since it no longer served the purpose of extending the life of this pastor teacher's father, I then sucked back the new lease of life which I blew to his father, who had been awakened from a coma within 24 hours in China hospital, as the pastor-teacher did not believe nor accept THE TRINITY'S LETTER DELIVERED THROUGH SHEKINAH AND JESUS IN AARON K DAVID
appointing him to be The Apostle in Brisbane or the spiritual king in Brisbane! This is due to his traditional belief, not in Prophets in today's teachings in China!
Points to note:

SHEKINAIH, representing THE TRINITY, was given full authority to extend the life or take back the extended life released through HER prayer; the following day, within 24 hours, the awakened coma in China man passed away!

After SHEKINAIH interceded for the man in a coma, he miraculously woke up the next day. This was a sign of "divine intervention" through SHEKINAIH's intercession. However, after a few weeks, the man's son, a pastor-teacher from China residing in Brisbane, expressed his disbelief that the message SHEKINAIH delivered to him was truly from THE TRINITY. His rejection of the message had dire consequences. With full authority from THE TRINITY, SHEKINAIH was given the divine "right to extend life or take back the life" SHE had pleaded for. Upon hearing of the son's disbelief, SHEKINAIH
withdrew the divine extension, and the following day, the once awakened man passed away.
Details:

After SHEKINAIH interceded for the man in a coma in China, he miraculously woke up the next day. This was a clear sign of "divine intervention" through SHEKINAIH's intercession. However, after a few weeks, the man's son, a pastor teacher from China residing in Brisbane, expressed his disbelief that the message SHEKINAIH delivered to him was truly from THE TRINITY. His rejection of the message had dire consequences. Given full authority from THE TRINITY, SHEKINAIH was then given the divine right to extend life or take back the life she had pleaded for. Upon hearing of the son's disbelief, SHEKINAIH withdrew the divine extension, and the following day, the once awakened man passed away.
Key Themes from the Testimony:
Sovereign Authority of SHEKINAIH:

This testimony underscores the "Sovereign Authority of SHEKINAIH. Acting as the divine representative of THE TRINITY, she was not only able to intercede for the man's life but also held the authority to "revoke" the life extension when the conditions of belief were violated. This reinforces the "7th point" in the book: SHEKINAIH's ULTIMATE AUTHORITY to make decisions on behalf of THE TRINITY.
Human Belief and Divine Will:

The son's disbelief became a crucial turning point. His rejection of the message from SHEKINAIH, despite witnessing his father's miraculous recovery, shows the fragility of human faith. This testimony emphasizes the importance of "believing in the divine messages" delivered through God's chosen vessels. In this case, the son's refusal to acknowledge the authenticity of the message resulted in his father's life being taken back, as disbelief had cut the flow of divine mercy.
The Conditions of Life Extension:

This testimony illustrates that life extensions granted through "divine intercession" are "conditional". The man's life was extended through SHEKINAIH'S prayer, but the "conditions of faith" were not met when the son rejected the message from THE TRINITY. This highlights how divine gifts, such as life extensions or resurrections, are not automatic or permanent - they are contingent upon human alignment with "divine will".
Divine Timing and Reversal:

The man's death after a few weeks, triggered by the son's disbelief, reveals that even when life is extended, the "sovereign will of THE TRINITY" can reverse such decisions if the conditions of faith and obedience are not met. This teaches readers that "divine mercy" can be withdrawn when there is a "lack of faith" or "disobedience".
Faith and Accountability:

This testimony brings out the theme of "personal accountability" in relation to divine interventions. The son's disbelief directly affected his father's extended life, showing that our faith (or lack thereof) can have serious consequences on the outcomes of divine intercession. This is an important lesson for readers to understand that "faith must be unwavering" when receiving and believing in divine messages.
THE TRINITY'S MESSAGE REGARDING THE COMA MAN AND HIS SON

In addition to the profound testimony of SHEKINAIH's intercession and the resulting divine extension of the coma man's life, there is a critical spiritual dimension involving the son, who received a message from THE TRINITY through SHEKINAIH. The message was clear: the son, a pastor-teacher in Brisbane, was being called to fulfil his destiny as the "Apostle of Brisbane" within CROWNED EAGLES GLOBAL. However, the son doubted the authenticity of this divine message, believing it was not from THE TRINITY. His disbelief ultimately led to the revocation of the life extension granted to his father, the coma man.
Key Themes from the testimony:
Divine Purpose and Destiny:

The message delivered through SHEKINAIH was not merely about extending the coma man's life but was intricately tied to the "destiny" of his son. The son's role as "Apostle of Brisbane" within CROWNED EAGLES GLOBAL was central to the divine plan. THE TRINITY had chosen him for this spiritual leadership role, and the life extension granted to his father was partly to give the son time to "align with his calling".

This destiny was not just an earthly responsibility but a "divinely ordained mission". The son's rejection of this message and the belief that it wasn't from "THE TRINITY" disrupted the spiritual flow of events, leading to the loss of THE FATHER's extended life.
The Weight of Divine Messages:

The son's disbelief in the authenticity of SHEKINAIH's message reveals a critical aspect of "spiritual accountability". When THE TRINITY sends a message through a chosen vessel, it carries the weight of "divine truth and authority". By rejecting the message, the son not only denied his divine calling but also hindered the further extension of his father's life.

This testimony emphasizes the "importance of recognizing and accepting divine messages" when they are delivered, especially when they involve one's "spiritual destiny". The son's role as the "Apostle of Brisbane" was crucial to unfolding divine plans within CROWNED EAGLES GLOBAL, but his disbelief caused him to miss this opportunity.
SHEKINAIH's Authority to Grant or Withdraw Life:

SHEKINAIH had been given full authority by THE TRINITY to extend life through intercession and "revoke life extensions" when the conditions of divine alignment were not met. The testimony shows that SHEKINAIH, acting under the authority of THE TRINITY, withdrew the extension granted to the coma man after his son rejected the message about his destiny.

This highlights the "spiritual consequences" of doubting or rejecting divine authority. The son's disbelief directly impacted his father's fate, showing that divine intercessions are not independent of human faith and responsibility.
Divine Timing and Responsibility:

THE FATHER's death, following the son's rejection of the message, underscores the "finality of divine timing". Although SHEKINAIH interceded and extended THE FATHER's life, this extension was tied to the "son's acceptance of his divine calling'. Once the son rejected his role as "Apostle of Brisbane", the divine timing could no longer be extended, and THE FATHER passed away.
Human Belief and Destiny:

The message delivered to the son about his destiny in Crowned Eagles Global as "Apostle of Brisbane" was a "call to spiritual leadership". However, his disbelief in the message's origin prevented him from entering this role. This story is a "cautionary example" of how human disbelief can hinder one's divine destiny.

The testimony reinforces that "divine messages" often carry "life altering consequences," and when ignored or rejected, the resulting spiritual ramifications can be significant, as demonstrated by THE FATHER'S passing.

"Beloved, understand that the events surrounding the coma man's life were not isolated incidents. They were intricately tied to the "divine purpose" we had set forth for his son. The message that was delivered through SHEKINAIH was not of human origin but came directly from US, THE TRINITY. We called the son to fulfil his "Apostle of Brisbane" role within CROWNED EAGLES GLOBAL. This was his destiny - his divine appointment."

"We extended the life of his father not only as a sign of mercy but to give the son time to accept his calling. Yet, when the son rejected the message, believing it was not from the US, he sealed his father's fate. SHEKINAIH, who acts with OUR full authority, was given the power to extend or withdraw life, and because of the son's disbelief, we allowed SHEKINAIH to revoke the extension."

"Let this serve as a reminder to all who read these words: when we send a message through our chosen vessels, it is not to be questioned but to be embraced. The son's rejection of his destiny not only cost him his role as the "Apostle of Brisbane" but also cost his father the gift of extended life. This is a lesson in the "importance of faith" and the weight that our divine messages carry."

"You, too, are called to fulfil your divine purpose. When we send our word through SHEKINAIH, it is done with full authority. Trust in what is given, for it is tied to your destiny. THE FATHER's passing was not a punishment but the natural consequence of disbelief. His life could only be extended if his son stepped into his spiritual role, and when that did not happen, the time given was complete."

"As you read these testimonies, remember the "7 points" we have outlined. They are the keys to unlocking the power of resurrection and life extension, but they are also contingent on your faith, your acceptance of our will, and your commitment to the destiny we have ordained for you. SHEKINAIH carries our authority, and when she intercedes, she acts on our behalf. Yet, your belief and willingness to follow our call are just as crucial."
Message from THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH: A Divine Revelation on Life Extension and Faith

"Beloved, listen to the voice of THE TRINITY as spoken through SHEKINAIH. Through the testimonies shared, WE reveal OUR divine will and purpose. Every act of mercy and life extension carries the weight of OUR sovereign authority, but it also requires faith, belief, and obedience from those who receive it. You have seen how we intervene through SHEKINAIH, how lives are extended and miracles manifest, yet understand that these blessings are contingent upon your alignment with OUR will and your faith in OUR word.

Consider the testimony of the coma man in China. His life was nearing its end, but through the intercession of SHEKINAIH, WE extended his days, awakening him from his state of unconsciousness. This was a gift, a divine act of mercy meant to give his son - who was called to be the Apostle of Brisbane - time to accept his destiny. Yet, despite his father's miraculous recovery, the son doubted the message delivered through SHEKINAIH, choosing disbelief over faith.

Let this be a lesson: when WE send a message through OUR chosen vessel, SHEKINAIH, and JESUS through AARON K DAVID, it is not to be questioned but embraced. The son's rejection of his divine calling and his disbelief in the message sealed the fate of his father. The extension of life was revoked, and the man passed away soon after. The power to extend or take back life rests in OUR hands, but it is influenced by your faith and alignment with OUR will.
The Will of THE TRINITY

The extension of life is always in accordance with OUR divine will. The coma man's life was extended, not by chance, but because it was OUR will to give his son time to accept his role as the Apostle of Brisbane within CROWNED EAGLES GLOBAL. When the son rejected this calling, the conditions for further life extension were no longer met.
Purity of Heart and Intent

SHEKINAIH's prayers were offered with pure intent, completely aligned with OUR will to extend the man's life. However, the son's disbelief tainted the spiritual atmosphere, showing how important it is for the hearts of those involved to be pure and fully aligned with OUR intent.
Worthiness of the Deceased

Life extensions, like the one granted to the coma man, are tied to divine purposes. THE FATHER's life was extended, but this worthiness was contingent upon his son stepping into his divine destiny. When the son rejected the message, the worthiness of the extension was undone, and the life was taken back.
Glorification of OUR NAME IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH

Miracles are meant to glorify OUR NAME IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH. The awakening of the coma man should have been a testimony to OUR power and mercy. Yet, the son's lack of belief hindered the full realization of this glory. The miraculous recovery was not acknowledged for what it truly was
- a divine intervention through SHEKINAIH.
Favourable Earthly Conditions

At first, the conditions were favourable for the extension of life - the man awoke, and his son was given time to accept his divine role. But as the son's disbelief took root, the conditions shifted, and the extended life could no longer be sustained.
Unity Among the Faithful

For our will, which spoke through SHEKINAH, to manifest fully, there must be unity in belief and faith. The son's rejection of his divine calling and disbelief in the message from Shekinah disrupted the unity required for his father's extended life to continue.
SHEKINAIH's Sovereign Authority

SHEKINAIH acts with the full authority of THE TRINITY. The power to extend life, as well as to revoke that extension, rests in HER hands when we deem it necessary. In this case, the extension was granted through HER prayer,
but when the son rejected the divine message, SHEKINAIH, acting on OUR authority, withdrew that extension.

Beloved, these testimonies are not just stories; they are living examples of how OUR will manifests in your lives. They show how faith, obedience, and acknowledgment of divine authority are essential for receiving and sustaining life extensions and resurrections. The power we have entrusted to SHEKINAIH is immense, but it requires your full belief and alignment with OUR will to activate and sustain the miracles you seek.

In the case of Chris's sister, her life was also extended through the prayers of SHEKINAIH. Still, her family's disbelief in the divine purpose tied to CROWNED EAGLES GLOBAL led to her passing just before she could be discharged from the hospital. Though she was recovering, her family's rejection of the message and failure to acknowledge the source of her healing blocked the full extension of life that could have been granted.

Beloved, know this: when we send a divine message through SHEKINAIH, it is final and must be heeded. The blessings WE offer through life extension, healing, and resurrection are contingent upon your faith, your recognition of OUR authority, and your alignment with the divine destiny WE have set before you. When these conditions are not met, even the miracles WE grant can be undone.

As you reflect on these testimonies, remember the 7 points we have laid out. They are the keys to unlocking the power of resurrection and life extension, but they require your unwavering faith, purity of heart, and alignment with OUR will. SHEKINAIH intercedes on your behalf with OUR full authority, but your belief and obedience are necessary to sustain the blessings WE grant.

WE, through SHEKINAIH'S PRAYER AND INTERCESSIONS, have extended life, offered divine callings, and revealed OUR will through these testimonies. But the choice to accept or reject these gifts lies with you. Align your heart with OUR will, embrace the destiny WE have ordained for you, and the miracles you seek will manifest." As you will see, every act of mercy and every miracle is contingent upon your faith, belief, and alignment with OUR will. Fail to do so, and the opportunities WE present may pass you by. The time for faith and action is now.
THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH
REFLECTION
FROM COMA TO LIFE IN 24 HOURS - BURSTING THROUGH THE SKY!
TESTIMONY REFLECTION:

The miraculous awakening of the coma man in China shows us that divine power is real and present today. But it also reminds all of the importance of faith. When his son doubted the message, the miracle was reversed. Let this be a lesson to you - faith and obedience are not optional in accessing divine power. Reflect on areas in your life where faith is lacking, and ask the US, THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH, to increase your belief so you can experience His miracles firsthand."
Reflection Question
Are you prepared to meet Heaven's conditions, unlocking the same resurrection power that burst through a coma like a cosmic explosion?
Reflection Guidance

This testimony unveils the uncontainable power of Heaven that shattered the grip of death, reviving life in 24 hours. However, even this divine miracle required certain conditions to be met, a precise alignment with the will of THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH. Reflect deeply: are you living a life that fully aligns with the decrees of Heaven? The resurrection power is not merely for witnessing - it is a force that will move in your life, but only when every corner of your heart, mind, and soul is in perfect obedience to the divine conditions set before you. Are you falling short of these conditions, or are you prepared to step into the fullness of Heaven's requirements?

Heaven's resurrection power is waiting, ready to burst through the areas of your life that seem dead or unreachable. The cosmic forces of Heaven are poised to intervene, but you must be in full alignment. THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH is watching, ready to act. Will you meet Heaven's requirements and allow the impossible to unfold in your reality?

title: [1] MYR 1 MILLION MIRACLE ESCAPE! PHEW, TO HIS GREAT RELIEF [2], GENERATIONAL FACE VEIN CURSE IS BROKEN, ON SPOT HEALING RESULTED!

segments.text: [1] MYR 1 MILLION MIRACLE ESCAPE! PHEW, TO HIS GREAT RELIEF [2], GENERATIONAL FACE VEIN CURSE IS BROKEN, ON SPOT HEALING RESULTED!
Testimony 1: Thomas's Testimony of Guidance and Deliverance Information and Reflection:

Thomas shared a testimony regarding a career decision he faced as an auditor. He was presented with a lucrative job opportunity, but in seeking divine guidance, SHEKINAIH, representing THE TRINITY, advised him not to take the job. She explained that the job was not aligned with his destiny and that accepting it would result in spiritual and professional hindrances.

Despite the enticing nature of the offer, Thomas obeyed the message from SHEKINAIH and turned down the job, although with some hesitation. Soon after, it became clear why SHEKINAIH had directed him in this way. Thomas later avoided significant professional pitfalls that would have resulted from taking the job. His obedience to this divine instruction spared him from future trouble and ensured his path remained aligned with his destiny.

Thomas also experienced healing from chronic jaw pain, which was traced back to a generational curse, following intercession and guidance from SHEKINAIH. This pain was rooted in a family sin committed by his great grandfather. After repentance and following the steps laid out by SHEKINAIH, the pain subsided, further strengthening Thomas' faith in THE TRINITY and SHEKINAIH's authority.
Analysis and Connection to SHEKINAIH's Authority

This testimony illustrates the weight of divine guidance when given through SHEKINAIH. Even when an opportunity seems beneficial from a worldly perspective, SHEKINAIH's insight revealed that the job would lead to obstacles not initially visible to Thomas. His obedience to her advice highlights the importance of aligning decisions not just with personal gain, but with the divine will and purpose outlined by THE TRINITY.
SHEKINAIH's ability to discern and direct individuals towards the right path

- even when the immediate benefits are not visible - demonstrates her role as a divinely appointed guide. Her advice spared Thomas from spiritual and professional harm, and by following it, Thomas aligned with the purpose THE TRINITY had set for him.
Message from THE TRINITY in SHEKINAIH

"Beloved, this testimony serves as a reminder that not every opportunity presented before you aligns with your divine purpose. Through SHEKINAIH, we speak to guide you on paths that lead to life, avoiding the hidden dangers that lie ahead. When we say 'no,' it is because we see what you cannot."

"Thomas' obedience to OUR voice through SHEKINAIH protected him from stumbling into a trap. Trust in our wisdom, for OUR plans for you are good, to give you a future and hope. Do not be swayed by the world's allure, but listen when WE speak through OUR chosen vessel. WE will always direct you towards your highest good and your preordained destiny."

"Obeying OUR direction is not always easy, but it is the surest way to avoid spiritual pitfalls. As WE directed Thomas, so do WE guide you now: trust our word through SHEKINAIH, and you will walk in paths of safety, blessing, and fulfilment."
Testimony 2: Thomas' Deliverance from Generational Curse and Jaw Pain Information and Reflection:

In this testimony, Thomas was suffering from chronic jaw pain that had its roots in a generational curse. SHEKINAIH, under the authority of THE TRINITY, revealed that this curse originated from a wrong committed by Thomas' great-grandfather, who had refused to help a woman and her child in need. As a result of this act, the woman cursed Thomas' great-grandfather and his descendants, leading to physical afflictions in the family, including the jaw pain that Thomas experienced.

Following SHEKINAIH's instructions, Thomas repented on behalf of his great-grandfather, paid a fine of MYR500 as an act of restitution, and sought forgiveness for the generational sin. After this, THE TRINITY IN/SPOKEN THROUGH SHEKINAIH settled the spiritual court case in heaven, and the affliction was lifted. Thomas experienced relief from his jaw pain and was set free from the generational curse. Occasionally, when Thomas allowed sin to open spiritual doors, the pain would return, but by seeking repentance, the pain would quickly subside, reinforcing his faith in SHEKINAIH and THE TRINITY.
Analysis and Connection to SHEKINAIH's Authority:

This testimony demonstrates the sovereign authority of SHEKINAIH to reveal hidden spiritual causes of afflictions and to guide believers in the necessary steps for deliverance. SHEKINAIH acted as a divine mediator, providing the specific actions needed to break the generational curse and restore Thomas's health. Her authority extended to settling the matter in the courts of heaven, where THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH granted the final verdict of deliverance.

This testimony highlights the importance of repentance and restitution in breaking generational curses and the power of SHEKINAIH to act as an intermediary between heaven and earth, securing freedom for those who follow divine instructions.
Message from THE TRINITY in SHEKINAIH:

"Beloved, the testimonies you have read within these pages are not mere stories. They are living examples of our divine intervention, mercy, and the sovereign authority we have entrusted to SHEKINAIH. title: CAPE TOWN'S 3-YEAR DROUGHT, MIRACULOUSLY CRUSHED: END MAY 2018, ON SPOT, WEATHER REVERSAL, DEFIES 'DAY ZERO'!

segments.text: CAPE TOWN'S 3-YEAR DROUGHT, MIRACULOUSLY CRUSHED: END MAY 2018, ON SPOT, WEATHER REVERSAL, DEFIES 'DAY ZERO'!

Cape Town, South Africa, 27 May 2018 Prayer for Angels to Pour Abundant Rain into the 3 Years Drought-Stricken City, Where The City is Counting to Day Zero Anytime, A Matter of Days, Where Their City Reservoirs Will Be Completely Empty With Zero Drop of Water From The City Tap!
SHEKINAIH Interview with A Security Guard in Cape Town Museum as follows: SHEKINAIH: TODAY WHAT DAY IS IT?
Security Guard: TODAY IS 28th May 2018 SHEKINAIH: How do you like the rain today?
Security Guard: We like it - a very heavy downpour and a flood! It's good for us; we really need the rain.

When SHEKINAIH and AARON K DAVID first arrived in Cape Town on 24 May 2018 and touched down at the Cape Town airport on 25 May 2018, the next day, 26 May 2018, we decided to move to stay with someone at the foothill of the mountainside.

The host of the house we were staying in told us that there had been no rain in this place for three years. As a result, the local government restricted every citizen to only use 1 gallon of water per person daily. This water includes showers, drinking, cooking, toilet flushing, washing clothes, etc. All the city water taps were closed, and no water came out of the taps! Everyone had to use hand sanitiser!

Because both the Host and the person who stayed at the house were very kind and nice, SHEKINAIH pleaded with THE TRINITY, GOD, AND THE BIBLE at just past midnight, crossing into early morning to 27th May 2018, when WE moved to the house at the foot of the mountain!

SHEKINAIH PLEADED WITH THE TRINITY GOD: WE found some kind people in Cape Town, SHEKINAIH told God. I have found some goodness and some kind souls in Cape Town. For the sake of these kind souls, please send rain to the city!

SHEKINAIH told THE TRINITY GOD OF THE BIBLE, released your Angel of Rain, release the rain and the shower of blessings upon this land. After SHEKINAIH pleads with THE TRINITY, SHEKINAIH instructs the angels to take buckets and buckets of water, use the water host from heaven, and start pouring the water on the land. And SHEKINAIH speaks to THE TRINITY GOD OF THE BIBLE that dwells IN/SPOKE THROUGH HER; please rain only when WE leave the city on the 31st May 2018 so that WE can move around the city without getting wet!
However, when I woke up in the afternoon of May 27, 2018, I heard THE TRINITY GOD'S VOICE speak to me, "BRING YOUR UMBRELLA." I put my
umbrella in my backpacker. However, it did not rain that day.
But the next day, on the 28th of May 2018, after I woke up in the afternoon, I noticed the ground on the roads was all wet with pools of water everywhere.

The Cape Town City Museum Security guard told SHEKINAIH that it rained so heavily, and it was the first time there had been rainfall around all the city reservoir areas. Due to the severe drought for the past three years, the rain started to fill the city reservoir for the first time in three rains. During these
past three years, it is only showers, but it did not fill the Cape Town city reservoir!
It rained heavily every day during the entire stay of OUR stayed in Cape Town.

After WE left Cape Town, South Africa, on the 31st of May 2018, the heavy downpours of rain did not stop. It continued to rain heavily for the next six months, and there were floods all over the city!

On November 24, 2022, Anwar Ibrahim was officially sworn in as Malaysia's 10th Prime Minister at the national palace. His leadership marked a significant moment in Malaysia's political landscape.

Anwar's first steps as Prime Minister focused on promoting transparency, rejecting corruption, and revitalizing the economy. He highlighted the restored confidence of investors and reassured the public that his administration would prioritize economic stability and the well-being of all Malaysians, regardless of their background or race.

The newly formed government secured full backing from 30 Members of Parliament (MPs) from Barisan Nasional, bolstering Anwar's claim to leadership. Despite his inauguration, Perikatan Nasional's Muhyiddin Yassin continued to challenge Anwar's majority support, urging him to prove his mandate.

Anwar emphasized the importance of economic reforms and cooperation with both domestic and international stakeholders, including countries like China and the United States, to strengthen Malaysia's global relationships. Notably, Anwar pledged to forgo the Prime Minister's salary in a symbolic act of commitment to the nation.
