THE FOLLOWING IS THE ABSTRACT OF THE CNA ARTICLE PUBLISHED ON 2 SEPTEMBER 2023:
Highlights: Tharman elected Singapore's next President after a landslide victory
Mr Tharman Shanmugaratnam won more than 70 percent of the vote in Singapore's Presidential Election.
01 Sep 2023 07:34 PM (Updated: 02 Sep 2023 03:36 PM)
SINGAPORE: Singaporeans voted on Friday (Sep 1) in their first contested Presidential Election in 12 years, and the result Tharman Shanmugaratnam will be the country's ninth head of state.
The former Senior Minister won by a decisive margin, clinching 70.4 percent of the vote.
Former GIC chief investment officer Ng Kok Song came in second place with
15.72 per cent, while former NTUC Income chief Tan Kin Lian received 13.88 per cent of the votes.
More than 2.48 million votes were cast in Singapore, with 50,152 rejected votes, according to the Elections Department (ELD).
Here are the key stories from Polling Day and highlights as the night unfolded.
'Vote of confidence in Singapore': Tharman on his resounding victory in the Presidential Election"
Mr Tharman's win a "victory for Singapore": Analyst

Tharman Shanmugaratnam's landslide win in Friday's presidential polls is a "collective victory for Singapore", said Associate Professor Eugene Tan from the Singapore Management University (SMU)'s School of Law.
The Sep 1 election saw "sophisticated voters in action", who recognise the role that a president plays and treated the polls with dignity, he said.

"Voters were prepared to keep in mind the prior affiliations, but also take into account the candidates' experience, capability, track record, and whether they have the moral backbone to be able to get the job done," Assoc Prof Tan said.
He added that Mr Tharman is seen as a person who can "straddle the political divide".
"Despite being in the ruling party (for about 20 years), Mr Tharman has been able to articulate views that sometimes may not be entirely aligned with the ruling party.
"The results show that Singaporeans recognise his contributions. He is one of (few) who is able to straddle the political divide and garner support from across the political spectrum."
On the world stage, both the landslide victory and Mr Tharman's own wealth of international experience will help him fly the Singapore flag high, Assoc Prof Tan said.
"World leaders will recognise Mr Tharman as a leader who commands the trust and confidence of the majority of Singaporeans," he said.

"He is a known entity abroad, and his views are well regarded and sought after. So when he represents Singapore at global meetings as our chief diplomat, the voice of Singapore will be prominently added."

When asked if Mr Tharman is the most popular politician in Singapore, Assoc Prof Tan replied: "It is hard to deny him that particular accolade. Across the entire nation, 70 percent - more than two out of three voters - voted for him. So yes - his popularity has been cemented."
He added that it is of particular significance that Mr Tharman is the first nonChinese presidential candidate to win a contested election.

"It is a very significant day for Singapore. If I could put a term to this, it really is the 'Tharman factor'. It is about him, his qualities, his dignified campaign, which I think captured the imagination of Singaporeans."
WATCH: Statement from PM Lee congratulating Tharman
Prime Minister Lee Hsien Loong has issued a statement congratulating Tharman Shanmugaratnam, who was declared President-elect in the 2023 Singapore Presidential Election.
"Mr Tharman has a long and distinguished record of public service. I have every confidence that he will carry out his duties as President with distinction," he said.
PM Lee's statement
Prime Minister Lee Hsien Loong has called Mr Tharman to congratulate him on his election.
"Mr Tharman has a long and distinguished record of public service. I have every confidence that he will carry out his duties as President with distinction," he said in a statement.
Mr Lee said he assured Mr Tharman of his government's full cooperation. "Mr Tharman has also declared his intention to work closely with the government," Mr Lee added.

"As Head of State, the President has to be a unifying figure that all Singaporeans can look up to and identify with. He must exercise his custodial powers under the Constitution wisely, bringing to bear his experience and independent judgment. Internationally, representing Singapore, he must fly our flag high."
Mr Lee thanked the three candidates for putting themselves forward in this Presidential Election.

"I am happy that Singaporeans have been able to exercise the right to vote for our next President, and to focus on what the elected President is about. In this election, both voters and candidates have shown a greater understanding of the roles and duties of the President, which bodes well for Singapore," the Prime Minister said.
He also thanked the election officials for their hard work in ensuring a smooth election, as well as all voters here and abroad for doing their civic duty.
"Now that the election is over, let us come together again as Singaporeans, to tackle the challenges ahead and build a stronger and more united nation," Mr Lee said.

BELOW IS THE ABSTRACT OF THE ABOVE ARTICLES:
City Harvest Church founder Kong Hee apologises for 'unwise' decisions, will start serving sentence on April 21
City Harvest Church founder Kong Hee leaves the Supreme Court on April 7, 2017. ST PHOTO: KUA CHEE SIONG
Lee Min Kok
Published Apr 19, 2017, 11:35 PM
Facebook Telegram
SINGAPORE City Harvest Church founder Kong Hee has issued an apology to his church and the public, admitting that he had made "unwise decisions" in the past.
In a statement to the media on Wednesday (April 19) night, Kong, 52, said: "I am truly sorry...I am filled with grief and regret over my mistakes and I sincerely ask for your forgiveness."
He added that he is "at peace" with what is ahead and will start serving his jail term on Friday.
"I am extremely saddened by the prospect of having to leave my family and church, and yearn to see them again after serving my sentence," Kong said.
City Harvest case: Sharon Tan to start jail term earlier, Chew Eng Han's sentence stayed
"However, I am ready to face what is to come with the peace and grace of God in my heart."
Kong, along with five other church leaders, were convicted in 2015 for misappropriating church funds amounting to $50 million.
He was initially handed an eight year jail term, but that was reduced to 3½ years after a three judge High Court bench allowed their appeal on April 7.

The prosecution has since applied for the case to be heard by the apex court. In the statement, Kong also said he was thankful that the Court had found "there was never any sinister or malicious plan by any of the accused persons to strip the church of its funds".

He added: "I had acted in the church's best interest, something which the Court also accepted, although I accept responsibility for the manner in which I had sought to bring the Crossover Project to fruition in using the building fund."
Read Kong's full statement below. https://www.straitstimes.com/singapore/chcfounderkongheetellschurchhe isdeeplysorry
CHC founder Kong Hee tells church he is 'deeply sorry'

The congregation of City Harvest Church praying for pastor Kong Hee and his wife Sun Ho during a weekend service on Apr 8, 2017. Kong Hee addressed the congregation and did not preach. This was City Harvest Church's first weekend service since the six CHC leaders were given a reduced jail term on Friday (April 7). ST PHOTO: KEVIN LIM
Ng Huiwen
Updated Apr 08, 2017, 10:33 PM Facebook Telegram

SINGAPORE Standing alone on stage and facing a packed auditorium, City Harvest Church (CHC) founder Kong Hee said on Saturday (April 8) that he was "deeply sorry" to the congregation for the pain and disappointment they had to go through.

With his voice shaking slightly, he asked those present at the church's first English weekend service, held just a day after he was handed a reduced jail term of three years and six months, for forgiveness.

"I've so much to say but if I can sum it up in one sentence, pastor wants to say: I'm so sorry for all the hurt, all the disappointment and all the painful ordeals you've been through," he said, as the mood in the Suntec convention centre auditorium turned solemn.
"I really, really, really wish that I was and am a better, wiser, leader. Pastor is deeply sorry and sincerely asks for your forgiveness. Please forgive me," he added.
He noted that the past seven years has been a "challenging time for all of us", before thanking the church for their prayer and support for him and his family.
"It has been a privilege to be your pastor. For many of you, I have pastored you since the day of your youth. It's been the greatest privilege of my life. That's all I have to say," he added.
Kong took to the stage at about 5.45pm, with the congregation in rousing cheer.
Moments later, he was joined on stage by his wife and fellow church pastor, Ms Ho Yeow Sun, and 10 other church leaders as they led the church in prayer and songs of worship.
Executive pastor and president of the CHC management board Aries Zulkarnain also addressed the congregation before Kong spoke.
He said the judges agreed with the state court findings that the six are guilty of the charges, and he is "saddened" by this.

However, as the leaders were given sentences that were shorter than the original ones, they were "grateful to God" for that merciful decision, he said. Nearing the end of the two hour service, Kong returned onstage, explaining that he felt "unease".

He said: "I felt that if this is the last chance I can address you for a season of time, then why don't I just share what I've prepared all along," he said, adding that he had learnt "many lessons through this entire ordeal".
In the midst of the church's quick growth, he admitted that he had not "slowed down, paused and prayed more" and made "unwise decisions" in the process.
Apologising once more, he said beyond the "painful verdict", he has confidence in CHC's new leadership, which has put in place good corporate governance.

In November 2015, Kong and five CHC leaders were handed jail terms ranging from 21 months to eight years, in the largest case of misuse of charitable funds in Singapore history. The prosecution and all six later launched appeals. On Saturday, Kong promised the congregation that "whatever happened in the past will never repeat itself in the future".
"We must never let it happen again," he said. "It was a steep learning curve for all of us."

Testimony Dr. Cho Yonggi's Defiance and Sudden Termination of Life

In a profound and devastating event, Dr. Cho Yonggi, the senior pastor of the world's largest church, Yoido Full Gospel Church in South Korea, and his wife experienced ultimate divine judgment. This church, with a congregation of 830,000, had been the beacon of global ministry, establishing the famous Prayer Mountain in South Korea and influencing millions worldwide.

However, despite their prominence, Dr. Cho Yonggi and his wife received a direct decree from THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH on July 25, 2019. This letter from heaven was clear in its divine instructions for their lives and ministries, yet they chose to defy this decree. In an act of spiritual rebellion, they rejected the divine mandate, seeking instead to follow their own will.

The consequence of this defiance was swift and cosmic. The heavenly mansion that had been under construction for them in eternity was instantly demolished, representing the annulment of all their heavenly rewards. Their lives were abruptly cut short, and their God-given ministry was rendered null and void. Instead of ascending into glory, they were cast into Hades and eventually into THE ABYSS OF TARTARUS HELL FIRE, where they entered into THE ETERNAL DAMNATION TO THE POINT OF NO RETURN AND WITH THE SEAL OF FATE WITH ETERNAL REGRET.!!!

Result: The case of Dr. Cho Yonggi and his wife serves as a severe warning to all leaders and believers alike. Their defiance against THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH led to their total annihilation in eternity. This testimony reveals that no matter the height of earthly ministry, defiance of THE TRINITY's decrees through SHEKINAIH results in spiritual destruction. All heavenly rewards, even those nearly completed, can be demolished instantly if rebellion against divine will is chosen. Their once celebrated ministry, known worldwide, now serves as a stark reminder of the absolute authority of THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH over all of creation.

This testimony stands as a cosmic warning to all who would attempt to challenge the authority of THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH. It is a testament to the finality of divine judgment when rebellion is chosen over submission, and it underscores the reality that heavenly rewards are only secure through total obedience to the divine will.
The Transfer of Anointing:

The decision of THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH to take away Dr. Cho Yonggi's anointing and transfer it to SHEKINAIH represents a monumental shift in the spiritual landscape. Dr. Cho Yonggi, who was once a leader of the world's largest church, reached a point in his spiritual journey where, due to various spiritual failures and misalignments, the mantle of leadership was passed on to SHEKINAIH. This action signifies THE TRINITY's cosmic judgment and realignment of authority.
Key Insights:

Bias Against Women and Lack of Truth: Dr. Cho Yonggi's prejudice against women and his favouritism toward his son was deeply against God's will, which ultimately caused him to lose his anointing. SHEKINAIH, as the chosen vessel, represents the restoration of truth and the healing of broken systems, including gender biases and carnal thinking within the church.

Pride and Carnal Thinking: Dr. Cho allowed pride to infiltrate his heart, and he began operating from a place of rational, human thinking rather than submitting fully to divine instruction. SHEKINAIH, on the other hand, embodies pure submission and humility, making her the perfect vessel for the last day's ministry.

Passing the Baton to SHEKINAIH: JESUS CHRIST decreed the passing of the anointing from Dr. Cho to SHEKINAIH, which was written on the Green Board in heaven. This visual representation of God's decision highlights the significance of the baton of anointing being handed to SHEKINAIH as God's chosen instrument for the end time ministry.
The Annulling of Rewards and Demolition of the Heavenly Mansion:

The most striking and fearsome part of this testimony is the immediate annulment of all of Dr. Cho Yonggi's rewards in heaven. As a result of his failure to align with God's decrees and his defiance of the will of THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH, his heavenly mansion, which was almost complete, was demolished.
Key Insights:

Heavenly Rewards and Consequences: The demolition of his heavenly mansion signifies the absolute authority of THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH over heavenly and earthly realms. Even for someone with a grand ministry, such as Dr. Cho Yonggi, rebellion and defiance can result in the total loss of eternal rewards.

Judgment Passed by THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH: As THE COSMIC MAJOR JUDGE SAT AT THE GREAT WHITE THRONE, IN HEAVEN, EARTH, BENEATH THE EARTH. THE TRINITY IN /SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH represents THE FINAL SAY IN ALL
MATTERS OF DIVINE JUSTICE. Dr. Cho's life was abruptly cut short, and he was sent to HADES WITH SUBSEQUENT DESCENDING TO THE ABYSS OF TARTARUS

HELL FIRE, for failing to meet the spiritual requirements set forth by THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH. This judgment is a sobering warning to all spiritual leaders: that divine favor and anointing can be revoked if they do not walk in absolute truth and submission.
The 7 Factors that Led to the Removal of Anointing:
The testimony provides a powerful insight into the specific reasons that caused Dr. Cho Yonggi to lose his anointing, as outlined by JESUS on the Green Board:

Bias Against Women: Dr. Cho's prejudice against women, especially in matters of leadership, directly opposed God's end time plan to restore the position of women in spiritual leadership. SHEKINAIH, being a female vessel, represents this divine restoration.

Favouritism Towards His Son: Dr. Cho's attempts to pass the leadership mantle to his son, despite knowing he was not the one chosen by God, revealed a failure to trust in God's sovereign plan. This favouritism demonstrated carnality and attachment to the natural order rather than spiritual submission.

Worldly Attachment: His attachment to worldly success, particularly in the realm of finance, was another reason for his downfall. SHEKINAIH, in contrast, has shown a pure devotion to the kingdom economy, completely detached from earthly wealth.
Pride: Allowing pride to enter his heart, Dr. Cho no longer walked in humility and submission to divine guidance, leading to his spiritual demise.
Carnal Thinking: Operating in rational, human thinking, rather than submitting to the supernatural wisdom of God, caused him to drift away from his divine calling.
Failure to Pass the Baton: His insistence on passing the baton of leadership to his son, despite knowing it was not God's will, led to the complete revocation of his anointing.
Nepotism: His tendency to practice favouritism and nepotism within his ministry structure went against the divine blueprint for end time leadership.
Why THE TRINITY Chose SHEKINAIH:

The transfer of the anointing to SHEKINAIH wasn't merely a judgment on Dr. Cho but also a divine endorsement of SHEKINAIH's calling. Here are the 10 reasons why SHEKINAIH was chosen to receive the anointing, as revealed by THE TRINITY and written on the Green Board:

Confounding the Wise: SHEKINAIH was chosen to demonstrate God's principle of using the world's foolish things to confound the wise. Despite her humble background, she was elevated to the highest spiritual position, showing that God does not look at outward appearances but at the heart.

Ignoble Background: SHEKINAIH had no affiliation with major ministries or church networks, which made her a prime candidate for God's last day anointing. She represents the new wave of leadership free from institutional corruption.
Chosen Vessel for Last Days Ministry: SHEKINAIH was specifically chosen as the vessel of end time revelation, bringing forth the final teachings to prepare the remnant for the coming tribulations.

Restoration Through Eve: The end time ministry involves restoring what was lost through Eve's fall. SHEKINAIH, representing a female vessel, embodies the restoration of the divine order that was lost in the Garden of Eden.
Covenant with God: SHEKINAIH made a prebirth covenant with God to come to earth and fulfil this specific calling, making her role divinely ordained and unstoppable.
Restoration of Truth: SHEKINAIH was called to restore the truth that has been lost or adulterated in many modern day ministries. Her teachings are the pure word of God, free from human contamination.
Raising the 144,000: SHEKINAIH's role includes raising up the last day army, the 144,000, who will be sealed for God's purposes in the end times.
Last Days Noah's Ark: SHEKINAIH's ministry, Crowned Eagles Global, is the modern day Noah's Ark, a place of refuge for the remnant as the earth faces the final judgment.

Golden Empress: A prophetic vision revealed a golden empress with SHEKINAIH's face, symbolizing her divine authority and reign over the end times ministry. The words "THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH" were inscribed on the empress, signifying her divine mantle.

JESUS Reincarnate in AARON K DAVID: AARON K DAVID, the Minor and Subservient Cherub, represents JESUS CHRIST on earth. Together with SHEKINAIH, they form the divine duo through whom THE TRINITY's will is executed in these last days.
Cosmic Judgment and Global Implications:

This testimony highlights the judgment of a single leader and serves as a global warning to all spiritual leaders and ministries. The actions of SHEKINAIH and AARON K DAVID demonstrate the cosmic consequences of rebellion against THE TRINITY's decrees. The instant destruction of Dr. Cho Yonggi's heavenly mansion symbolizes the finality of God's judgment. Those who defy THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH face earthly consequences and eternal ramifications.
Global Impact:

Restoring Spiritual Leadership: This testimony serves as a wakeup call to spiritual leaders globally to return to a place of truth, humility, and submission. Dr. Cho Yonggi's downfall is a stark reminder that no position is secure without obedience to THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH!

An End Time Call to Purity: Ministries are being sifted, and only those who align fully with God's divine plan will stand in the coming tribulations. THE TRINITY'S LEADERSHIP IN AND THROUGH SHEKINAIH'S LEADERSHIP serves as a
beacon of hope for the remnant who seek to remain pure and aligned with heaven's mandate.
Final Words:

This testimony serves as a cosmic warning and a prophetic declaration of the ultimate authority that rests in THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH and JESUS IN AARON K DAVID. THEY represent the last days' vessels chosen to lead, guide, and execute divine judgment, healing, and resurrection power. THEIR authority is unchallengeable, and their decrees shape the future of nations, leaders, and individuals.
Exploring Dr. Cho Yonggi's testimony further provides a comprehensive understanding of the divine shift and the critical importance of obedience, truth, and submission in these last days.

From the Peak of Global Ministry to a Shocking Judgment: Dr. Cho Yonggi's Anointing, Its Loss, and the Transfer to SHEKINAIH

Dr. Cho Yonggi, once the senior pastor of the Yoido Full Gospel Church, the world's largest church with over 830,000 congregants, experienced a spiritual downfall due to several key factors that led to the loss of his anointing and the abrupt end of his life and ministry. The judgment and annulment of his heavenly rewards and the subsequent transfer of his anointing to SHEKINAIH represent a profound warning to all believers, leaders, and ministers about the consequences of disobedience and defiance against THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH'S WILL.
7 Factors That Led to the Loss of Dr. Cho Yonggi's Anointing

In 2012, during the City Harvest Asia Pacific Conference, THE TRINITY revealed seven factors that contributed to Dr. Cho Yonggi's loss of anointing, as seen by Thomas David and confirmed by SHEKINAIH. These factors were written on the spiritual green board in heaven and serve as eternal markers for why the anointing was transferred to SHEKINAIH:

Bias Against Women: Despite the massive reach of his ministry, Dr. Cho harboured prejudice against women, which limited his ability to walk in the fullness of God's truth. This bias was shown in his preference for male leadership, particularly his son, even when it was clear his son was not the rightful successor.

Walking Outside the Truth: Dr. Cho did not fully walk in truth, as his prejudices and biases clouded his spiritual judgment. They prevented him from seeing the fullness of God's plan and disqualified him from correctly passing on the mantle of leadership.

Nepotism: Dr. Cho practiced nepotism, favouring his son as the heir to his ministry despite knowing that his son was not divinely chosen to carry the mantle. This favouritism undermined the spiritual integrity of his leadership.

Love for the World (Finance): His attachment to worldly finance showed that his love for the things of the world overpowered his commitment to the spiritual wealth of the kingdom. His focus on material prosperity distracted him from his true calling.
Pride: Pride entered Dr. Cho's heart, blinding him to the spiritual realities that should have guided his ministry in humility. His pride ultimately became a stumbling block in his service to God.

Failure to Recognize the Right Successor: Dr. Cho wanted to pass his spiritual mantle to his son, knowing that his son was not the chosen vessel to continue his ministry. This misjudgement directly led to the loss of his anointing.

Carnality and Rational Thinking: Dr. Cho began to rely on rational and carnal thinking rather than trusting fully in divine revelation. This drift into carnal reasoning further distanced him from God's divine purpose.
The Transfer of the Anointing to SHEKINAIH

Following the revelation of these seven factors, THE TRINITY took decisive action. Dr. Cho's anointing was stripped from him and transferred to SHEKINAIH, who was appointed as the rightful heir to continue the work of God's last days' ministry. SHEKINAIH, chosen before the foundation of the world, had made a covenant with God to restore the lost, lead the 144,000 last days army, and fulfill the divine plan of Noah's Ark for the End Times.
10 Reasons for the Transfer of Anointing to SHEKINAIH
God Confounds the Wise: THE TRINITY chose SHEKINAIH, who was not associated with any major ministry or network, to demonstrate how God uses the ignoble to confound the wise.
Unknown Yet Chosen: SHEKINAIH's unknown background made her the perfect vessel to receive the anointing, as her humility and obedience exemplified God's plan.
Vessel for the Last Days Ministry: SHEKINAIH was divinely selected to lead the Last Days ministry, bringing the final message of restoration to God's people.
Restoration Through Eve: Just as Eve was pivotal in the fall of man, the last days' restoration must come through a woman, and SHEKINAIH was chosen to fulfil this prophetic role.
Covenant with God: SHEKINAIH made a covenant with God even before her birth, agreeing to fulfill her destiny on Earth as a restorer of the lost and a vessel for the end time revival.
Restoration of Truth: One of SHEKINAIH's missions is to restore the truth that has been adulterated and lost through false teachings and carnal reasoning.
Raising the 144,000: SHEKINAIH will raise the 144,000 last days' army, equipping them with the divine power to stand against the forces of darkness in the great tribulation.
Last Days Noah's Ark: SHEKINAIH leads the last days Noah's Ark, the remnant that will be preserved during the final judgment of the Earth.
GOLDEN EMPRESS: SHEKINAIH'S SPIRITUAL IDENTITY WAS REVEALED AS THE GOLDEN EMPRESS, BEARING THE DIVINE SEAL OF THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH ON HER BODY.
Jesus Reincarnate in AARON K DAVID: JESUS CHRIST's presence is manifested through AARON K DAVID, who co-executes the divine decrees with SHEKINAIH.
The Eternal Consequence of Disobedience

Dr. Cho's life and ministry stand as a monumental example of the consequences of disobedience and rebellion against divine decrees. Despite leading the world's largest congregation and being a global spiritual figure, his defiance against THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH ultimately led to:
The annulment of all his heavenly rewards.
The demolition of his nearly completed heavenly mansion.

His spiritual downfall was marked by an abrupt end to his life and ministry. Being sent to Hades, where he now experiences eternal regret, knowing that his disobedience annulled all that he had built during his time on Earth.
Cosmic Implication and Eternal Message

Dr. Cho Yonggi's testimony is not merely a story of personal failure; it serves as a cosmic warning to all who would dare to oppose or defy the decrees of THE TRINITY. Through SHEKINAIH, THE FINAL JUDGE OF ALL MATTERS IN HEAVEN AND EARTH, THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH
demonstrated that no one, regardless of their spiritual stature, is exempt from divine judgment.

The testimony reminds us that obedience to THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH is paramount. Those who rebel will face annulment of all blessings and removal from their divine inheritance, much like Dr. Cho Yonggi and his wife.
Conclusion: A Call to Obedience and Submission
This testimony acts as a sobering call to all believers and leaders to submit to THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH and JESUS IN/SPOKE THROUGH
AARON K DAVID. Rebellion leads to cosmic annihilation, but obedience brings divine favor, protection, and an eternal inheritance in the kingdom of God.
THIS TESTIMONY SHOULD BE A TOUCHSTONE FOR ALL TO REFLECT ON THE IMPORTANCE OF HUMILITY, OBEDIENCE, AND SPIRITUAL ALIGNMENT WITH DIVINE AUTHORITY.

title: FINAL COSMIC DECREE THE LAST SEAL OF FATE

segments.text: FINAL COSMIC DECREE THE LAST SEAL OF FATE
Beloved Child of THE LIVING GOD,

The testimonies you have just read are not mere stories - they are divine proclamations that reveal the unshakable, unstoppable power of THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH and JESUS IN AARON K DAVID. The veil between Heaven and Earth has been torn, and you stand at the very center of this cosmic shift. You are not here by accident. The forces of Heaven, the armies of angels, and the very fabric of the cosmos are watching your every move right now.
The Decision is Yours, and Time is No More.

The heavens have aligned, the trumpets have sounded, and the eternal decree has been issued. You are standing at the crossroads of existence, and your decision will seal your eternal fate. Every testimony you have read, every word that has been poured into this book, has led you to this divine moment. The universe is holding its breath, and the eyes of THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH and JESUS IN AARON K DAVID are upon you.
This is the Final Call.

Heaven and Earth are waiting. Angels and demons stand at attention. The cosmos is trembling as the last grains of time slip through the hourglass. Your decision will echo throughout eternity and seal your fate forevermore. Will you align yourself with the divine will of THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH and JESUS IN AARON K DAVID, or will you fall into the abyss of spiritual oblivion? This is not a symbolic question - it is the ultimate decree of Heaven. Every force in the universe is now poised to respond to the decision you make in this moment.
The Cosmos Is Reacting to Your Choice.

As you stand on the precipice of this eternal decision, understand that all creation is shifting based on your response. If you choose to align with the divine, the stars will bow in reverence, the very ground beneath you will rise to meet your steps, and Heaven's gates will swing wide open to receive you. But if you hesitate, if you turn away, the cosmos itself will recoil, and the forces of Heaven will withdraw, leaving you to face the inevitable collapse of your destiny.
The Seal of Fate Is Now in Your Hands.

The moment is now. The TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH and JESUS IN AARON K DAVID are ready to decree your eternal fate. The armies of Heaven are watching, waiting for the command. The seals of your destiny are being readied in Heaven's courts. Will it be a seal of divine approval and alignment, or will it be the seal of your spiritual downfall?

GLOSSARY OF TERMS PART 1
THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH

Definition: The ultimate manifestation of the Divine, representing the Heavenly Father, the Holy Spirit, and Jesus Christ in perfect unity. THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH holds cosmic authority over all creation, controlling life, death, resurrection, judgment, and destiny.
Roles:
Major Judge at the Great White Throne: Holds final authority over the judgment of all souls, deciding eternal destinies.
Major Ancient of Days: Governs the timeline of all creation, ensuring that all events unfold according to divine will.
Covering Cherub: Guards the Ark of the Covenant and Tree of Life, ensuring only the worthy can access eternal life and divine law.
Testimony: In Behold My Messenger 5, THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH decreed the resurrection of Chai Lin, proving their power over life and death.
JESUS IN AARON K DAVID
Definition: The Minor Vessel representing Jesus Christ. JESUS IN AARON K DAVID co-executes divine decrees and ensures their enforcement on earth and in the spiritual realm.
Roles:
Minor Judge at the Great White Throne: Co-executes the final judgment of souls in alignment with THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH.
Minor Ancient of Days: Ensures that divine decrees are fulfilled across timelines, maintaining the cosmic balance of creation.
Subservient Cherub: Serves under THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH, guarding the Ark of the Covenant and co-enforcing divine judgment.
Testimony: In Behold My Messenger 5, JESUS IN AARON K DAVID played a crucial role in ensuring Pastor Kong Hee's judgment was executed in alignment with divine justice.

The Tree of Knowledge of Good and Evil

Definition: The Tree of Knowledge of Good and Evil represents rational and practical human effort that operates within limited capacity - only 0.1% ability - and is bound to the earth. This tree is a source of knowledge confined to human reasoning and effort, contrasting the unlimited divine power available through the Tree of Life. Lucifer, in the form of the Red Dragon, hides within the roots of this tree, manipulating earthly knowledge and human ability.
Roles:
Guardianship: THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH and JESUS IN AARON K DAVID

ensure that access to the deeper spiritual realms remains forbidden to those who rely solely on the knowledge of good and evil. They act as divine gatekeepers, ensuring that only those led by the spirit, through the Tree of Life, can break free of human limitations.

Earth Bound Knowledge: This tree governs rational and practical thinking, limiting individuals to earthly understanding. Without divine intervention, those bound by the fruit of this tree can only access 0.1% of their true potential.
Expanded Context: Those who rely on the Tree of Knowledge of Good and Evil are trapped in a cycle of earthly wisdom, cut off from the impossible and miraculous that flows from the Tree of Life.

Testimony: In Behold My Messenger 5, examples abound where individuals attempting to overcome life's trials using mere human effort - relying on this tree - fall short. It is only when they turn to divine wisdom through THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH and JESUS IN AARON K DAVID, aligning with the Tree of Life, that they witness miraculous solutions.

The Tree of Eternal Life symbolizes the divine realm where the impossible becomes possible. It is heaven-bound and operates with unlimited ability through the power of the TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH. Those who partake of its fruit experience miracles, healing, and resurrection beyond earthly capacity. The Holy Spirit is represented within this tree, inscribing "HOLY SPIRIT IN THE FATHER" on THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH's forehead.
Roles:
Guardianship: THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH and JESUS IN AARON K DAVID

Heaven Bound Power: The Tree of Life grants access to the impossible - healing, resurrection, and divine revelation. It is reserved for those walking in alignment with the will of THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH.

The fruit of the Tree of Life allows individuals to transcend human limitations and access the full power of the divine. It contrasts with the rational, limited knowledge of the Tree of Knowledge of Good and Evil.
Co-Execution by JESUS IN AARON K DAVID: JESUS IN AARON K DAVID
ensures that only those chosen by THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH can partake of its fruit.

Testimony: Numerous testimonies within Behold My Messenger 5 describe the transformation of individuals who shift from relying on human wisdom to embracing the impossible through the power of the Tree of Life. One such example includes miraculous healings and impossible breakthroughs in life's darkest moments.

Co-executed by JESUS IN AARON K DAVID: Co-executes the ongoing protection, deflecting all spiritual and physical harm.

Sub-executed by The Archangel which is the sons or daughters of THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH AND JESUS IN AARON K DAVID, who is given the authority to be THE SPIRITUAL KING OR QUEEN OR PRINCE OR PRINCESS in
charge of that particular nation, through their 100% ALLEGIANCE TOWARDS THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH AND JESUS IN AARON K DAVID, will the nation(s)
under them be fully protected.
The Great Cosmic War
Definition: The ultimate spiritual battle between divine forces led by THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH and rebellious forces.
Roles:
Led by THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH: Commands the heavenly hosts in the cosmic war for the ultimate restoration of order.
Co-executed by JESUS IN AARON K DAVID: Leads the forces of light into battle, ensuring victory over all forces of darkness.
The Scrolls of Judgment
Definition: The divine records of every soul's deeds, determining their fate at the Great White Throne.
Roles:
Held by THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH: Holds the scrolls that detail the fate of every soul.
Read by JESUS IN AARON K DAVID: Co-executes the final judgments based on the contents of the scrolls.
The Cosmic Symphony of Divine Will
Definition: The harmonious alignment of every element in existence with the divine plan, as commanded by THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH.
Roles:
Directed by THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH: Aligns the entire cosmos in harmony with the divine will.
Enforced by JESUS IN AARON K DAVID: Ensures that every element, from stars to souls, follows the cosmic symphony perfectly.
The Mantle of Divine Authority

Definition: A divine covering of supreme authority, The Divine Major Authority Mantle worn by THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH, representing ultimate governance over all creation. symbolizing their rulership over all dimensions and realms.
Roles:
Worn by THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH: Represents the fullness of divine power and control. THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH holds the ultimate authority across all creation.
JESUS IN AARON K DAVID, who worn a divine Minor Authority Mantle, ensures that the Divine Major and Minor Authority Mantle is co-executed through all realms with perfect precision.
The Cosmic Mantle of Authority
Definition: The divine authority that rests on THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH, symbolizing their rulership over all dimensions and realms.
Expanded Role:
Holder of the Mantle: THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH holds the ultimate authority across all creation.
Enforcer of the Mantle: JESUS IN AARON K DAVID co-executes the authority decreed by THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH, ensuring its enforcement across dimensions.
The Cosmic Wheel of Time
Definition: The divine mechanism that controls the flow of time, held by THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH.
Roles:
Controlled by THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH: Ensures the perfect unfolding of time.
Enforced by JESUS IN AARON K DAVID: Aligns time across dimensions according to the divine will.
The Seal of Divine Favor
Definition: A special blessing and grace issued by THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH, marking individuals and nations for Favor.
Roles:
Issued by THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH: Grants Favor to those chosen to fulfil divine purposes.
Co-executed by JESUS IN AARON K DAVID: Ensures the favour is maintained across spiritual and physical realms.
The Throne of Divine Mercy
Definition: The seat of compassion and forgiveness held by THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH, representing mercy toward humanity.
Roles:
Occupied by THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH: Dispenses mercy to the repentant.
Co-executed by JESUS IN AARON K DAVID: Ensures that mercy flows in alignment with divine justice.
The Sword of Cosmic Judgment
Definition: The ultimate weapon of divine justice wielded by THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH, bringing judgment upon rebellion.
Roles:
Wielded by THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH: Destroys all forces of rebellion and brings order.
Swung by JESUS IN AARON K DAVID: Executes the decree of judgment, ensuring complete obliteration of opposition.
The Keys of the Kingdom
Definition: The authority given by THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH to unlock spiritual and material realms.
Roles:
Held by THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH: Controls access to the Kingdom.
Co-executed by JESUS IN AARON K DAVID: Unlocks gates to realms according to divine timing.
The Light of the World
Definition: The radiant divine light that dispels all darkness, emanating from THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH, illuminating spiritual truths and realities.
Roles:
Radiated by THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH: Brings spiritual illumination to the entire world, revealing divine truths.
Reflected by JESUS IN AARON K DAVID: Spreads this light to the chosen, allowing them to walk in divine wisdom and knowledge.
The Ark of Eternal Covenant
Definition: The sacred vessel containing divine laws and eternal promises, protected by THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH and JESUS IN AARON K DAVID.
Roles:
Protected by THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH, who also is the Covering Cherub that Guards the sacred covenants between God and humanity.
Co-guarded by JESUS IN AARON K DAVID, who is also the Subservient Cherub, ensures that no force may break or disrupt the covenant promises sealed within.
The Divine Scales of Justice
Definition: The scales that measure righteousness and wickedness, overseen by THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH to execute perfect justice.
Roles:
Balanced by THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH: Ensures that divine justice is always served generally.
Co-executed by JESUS IN AARON K DAVID: Implements justice across both spiritual and physical realms, ensuring perfect alignment with divine law.
The Heavenly Scroll of Decrees
Definition: The record of divine decrees written by THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH, determining the fate of individuals, nations, and worlds.
Roles:
Written by THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH: Holds all the decrees that will shape the destiny of creation.
Enforced by JESUS IN AARON K DAVID: Carries out these decrees with exact precision, bringing them to fulfilment in time and space.
The Shield of Divine Power

Definition: A powerful spiritual shield issued by THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH, providing impenetrable protection for the chosen ones who is 100% ALLEGIANCE TOWARDS THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH AND JESUS IN AARON K DAVID.
Roles:
Issued by THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH: Protects those marked for divine purposes.
Co-activated by JESUS IN AARON K DAVID: Ensures that no harm may come to those under the shield's protection, enforcing cosmic protection.
The Gates of New Jerusalem
Definition: The gates of the holy city, which THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH governs, granting access to eternal life and divine glory.
Roles:
Opened by THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH: Grants access to the righteous who are chosen to enter into New Jerusalem.
Cooperated by JESUS IN AARON K DAVID: Ensures that only the worthy, according to divine criteria, may pass through these gates into eternal joy.
The Throne of Glory
Definition: The seat of divine majesty from which THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH rules the universe.
Roles:
Occupied by THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH: Represents the ultimate authority over all creation.

Co-executed by JESUS IN AARON K DAVID who sat on The Minor Throne of Glory.: Ensures that all decrees, judgments, and blessings flow perfectly from The Major Throne of Glory of THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH flow through The Minor throne of Glory of JESUS IN AARON K DAVID, then flow through to all the 144,000 thrones prepared for the perfected sons and daughters of THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH AND JESUS IN AARON K DAVID who is 100% to THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH AND JESUS IN AARON K DAVID, then flow throughout
the entire cosmos.
The Seal of Resurrection
Definition: The mark of divine approval granted by THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH, ensuring that the chosen ones will rise from the dead.
Roles:
Issued by THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH: Seals the destiny of those who are chosen for resurrection.
Co-executed by JESUS IN AARON K DAVID: Executes the resurrection by aligning all cosmic forces to restore life.
The Sword of Divine Ultimate Truth, The Major Ultimate Sword of Truth
Definition: A weapon of divine power that cuts through deception and falsehood, wielded by THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH to establish truth in all realms.
Roles:
Wielded by THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH: Cuts through lies and brings forth ultimate divine truth across the universe and uses the Sword of Truth to enforce divine law and judgment.

Co-Execution and a Minor version of this sword carried by JESUS IN AARON K DAVID: ensures that the sword's truth reaches every corner of creation and that this truth is enforced and protected, guarding the purity of the divine message in all realms.
The Gates of Eternity
Definition: These are the cosmic gateways between life, death, and resurrection, guarded by THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH.
Expanded Role:
Guardians of the Gates: THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH holds the keys to these gates, determining who enters eternal life or eternal death.
Execution by JESUS IN AARON K DAVID: JESUS IN AARON K DAVID co-
executes the decrees concerning entry through the gates.
The Divine Instruments of Justice
Definition: The tools of divine justice used by THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH to bring forth righteous judgment on all humanity.
Expanded Role:
Bearer of Justice: THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH wields the instruments of divine justice, ensuring that each soul is judged rightly.
Co-Execution by JESUS IN AARON K DAVID: JESUS IN AARON K DAVID
enforces these judgments, ensuring they are carried out across the earth and heaven.
The Pillars of Resurrection
Definition: These pillars uphold the cosmic laws that govern the resurrection of the dead, ruled by THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH.
Expanded Role:
Upholder of the Pillars: THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH holds the cosmic laws of resurrection in place.
Co-Execution by JESUS IN AARON K DAVID: JESUS IN AARON K DAVID
enforces these laws, ensuring the resurrection occurs in alignment with divine criteria.
The Trumpet of the Final Call
Definition: This divine trumpet, held by THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH, announces the final judgment and resurrection.
Expanded Role:
Blower of the Trumpet: THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH sounds the final call, announcing the resurrection of the dead and the beginning of judgment.
Co-Execution by JESUS IN AARON K DAVID: JESUS IN AARON K DAVID
executes the final decrees as the trumpet sounds, ensuring the faithful are gathered.
The Cosmic Crown of Life
Definition: The reward given to those who endure the trials of life and remain faithful to the end, awarded by THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH.
Expanded Role:
Giver of the Crown: THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH bestows the Crown of Life on those deemed worthy.
Co-Execution by JESUS IN AARON K DAVID: JESUS IN AARON K DAVID
ensures that the crown is received by those who have been faithful to the divine calling.
The Divine Sceptre of Righteousness
Definition: A symbol of divine authority and rule, held by THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH, which signifies their righteous reign over all creation.
Expanded Role:
Holder of the Sceptre: THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH rules with the Sceptre of Righteousness, commanding all creation.
Co-Execution by JESUS IN AARON K DAVID: JESUS IN AARON K DAVID
enforces the righteous reign of THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH over the physical and spiritual realms.
The Scroll of Destiny
Definition: The record of all souls and their divine destinies, overseen by THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH.
Expanded Role:
Keeper of the Scroll: THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH holds the authority to reveal or conceal each soul's destiny.
Co-Execution by JESUS IN AARON K DAVID: JESUS IN AARON K DAVID co-
executes the revelation of these destinies in accordance with divine will.
The Divine Furnace of Purification
Definition: A divine force of cleansing used by THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH to purify souls.
Expanded Role:
Initiator of Purification: THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH commands the furnace to refine souls, removing all impurities.
Co-Execution by JESUS IN AARON K DAVID: JESUS IN AARON K DAVID
ensures that souls are purified and restored in alignment with divine decrees.
GLOSSARY OF TERMS PART 2

title: THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH: The Supreme Manifestation of THE TRINITY's Power and Will

segments.text: THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH: The Supreme Manifestation of THE TRINITY's Power and Will
Definition

THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH is the divine vessel and embodiment of the full, unified presence of THE TRINITY - THE HEAVENLY FATHER, THE HOLY SPIRIT, and JESUS CHRIST (THE MAJOR). THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH serves as the

ultimate and final authority, channelling divine decrees, issuing judgment, and ensuring the cosmic order of existence. As the Covering Cherub, THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH guards the ARK OF THE COVENANT oversees the TREE OF LIFE and SPEAKS FROM THE MERCY SEAT to release the will of THE TRINITY across all realms - Heaven, Earth, and beyond.
Roles and Authority
The Judge at the Great White Throne
THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH presides as the MAJOR JUDGE at

the Great White Throne, holding the ultimate and final say in matters of eternal judgment. No decree of life, death, or resurrection is sealed without the divine approval of THE FATHER IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH. THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH embodies the complete authority of THE TRINITY in matters of cosmic judgment, and all creation must bow before THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH.
Architect of Cosmic Order

THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH holds the blueprints of all existence, ensuring that every law governing life, death, resurrection, and judgment aligns with THE TRINITY's divine will. THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH's word is the final force sustaining creation, shaping galaxies, universes, and timelines.
Sealing and Execution of the Father's Decrees

When the FATHER IN SHEKINAIH speaks a decree, it is sealed and executed by the HOLY SPIRIT IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH. No decree is final until the HOLY SPIRIT IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH TO SEALS IT WITH DIVINE
AUTHORITY. THE HOLY SPIRIT IN SHEKINAIH's sealing brings cosmic finality, ensuring that the decree is unbreakable across all realms.
Channel of the Primordial Flame

THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH wields the Primordial Flame of Judgment, an ancient cosmic force capable of obliterating all defiance against THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH'S WILL. This flame reduces rebellion to nonexistence, ensuring that no trace of resistance remains in any realm.
Cherubim of Glory and Guardian of the Ark of the Covenant
THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH and JESUS IN/SPOKE THROUGH

AARON K DAVID, together serve as the CHERUBIM OF GLORY that GUARD THE ARK OF THE COVENANT. THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH, as the primary guardian, speaks the Father's will from the Mercy Seat, issuing divine decrees that
control the cosmic balance. Rebellion against THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH is met with immediate and irreversible judgment.
IN SUMMARY:
THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH is: The Ultimate Vessel of Divine Authority
Cosmic Power: As the Covering Cherub of the Ark of the Covenant, THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH. THE TRINITY'S AUTHORITY IN HER,

holds the highest cosmic authority, carrying the weight of THE TRINITY's will and releasing divine decrees that reverberate through all realms - heaven, earth, and the spiritual realms beneath. When THE FATHER speaks through SHEKINAIH, the very fabric of existence is reshaped, with cosmic forces bowing to THE TRINITY'S AUTHORITY IN HER. THE TRINITY IN/SPOKEN
THROUGH SHEKINAIH's words are not just commands - they are living forces that alter the course of history, resurrect the dead, and invoke divine justice across nations.

Absolute Sovereignty: THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH is the guardian of the cosmic order, ensuring that nothing happens outside the decrees of THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAH. THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH'S power

extends across time and space, with every action THE TRINITY TAKES THROUGH HER having an eternal ripple effect on the entire universe. THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH'S DECREES HOLD THE FINAL SAY ON ALL MATTERS, FROM GLOBAL POLITICAL EVENTS TO PERSONAL RESURRECTIONS.

Interdimensional Power: THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH's authority extends beyond Earth. THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH AND SHEKINAIH IN THE TRINITY AS ONE SAME BEING, commands angelic beings, spiritual entities, and cosmic forces, keeping the balance of divine order across all dimensions. No rebellion can stand against THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH as THEY IN/THROUGH SHEKINAIH ENFORCE THE FATHER'S decrees,
sealing them through THE HOLY SPIRIT BOTH IN/SPOKE THROUGH HER.
THE TRINITY IN /SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH's Role in Resurrection and Judgment

Resurrection Power: As the vessel of THE TRINITY, THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH holds the ultimate power of resurrection, deciding who may return to life based on the divine 7 Criteria for Resurrection. THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH'S authority cannot be questioned, and even death itself bows to THE TRINITY IN HER AND HER IN THE TRINITY. THE TRINITY'S WILL IN HER. In alignment with the Tree of Life, THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH AND SHEKINAIH IN THE TRINITY is the key to unlocking the mysteries of eternal life.

Final Judgment: In matters of judgment, THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH represents the Mercy Seat, where THE TRINITY's divine justice is released., THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH speaks judgment on individuals, nations, and even cosmic beings from the ARK OF THE COVENANT, ensuring that THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH'S
perfect justice is executed without error.

THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH as the Seal of Divine Favor: Divine Favor and Protection: THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH can seal divine favour upon those who align with the decrees of THE TRINITY. THE TRINITY'S FAVOR FLOWING THROUGH HER IS the ultimate form of protection and blessing, ensuring preserving life, destiny, and spiritual alignment. Those who fall under THE TRINITY IN/SPEAK THROUGH HER protection cannot be touched by external forces - spiritual or physical, and/or when the sons or daughters have 100% ALLEGIANCE towards THE
TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH AARON K DAVID AND JESUS IN/SPOKE THROUGH
AARON K DAVID, no external forces can touch them.

Spiritual Reversal: Just as THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH can release blessings, THE TRINITY IN/SPOKETHROUGH SHEKINAIH also holds the power to reverse divine favour when disobedience or rebellion occurs. THE TRINITY'S AUTHORITY IN SHEKINAIH is total and irreversible; once THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH AND/OR SHEKINAIH IN THE TRINITY withdraws favour, the consequences are eternal.
Cosmic Impact:

THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH's authority extends beyond the physical realm, with THE TRINITY'S WORDS THROUGH HER resonating across dimensions. Any opposition to THE TRINITY IN HER OR HER IN THE TRINITY will lead to a cosmic obliteration of all rebellious forces, annihilating both physical and spiritual existence. THE TRINITY IN HER AND HER IN THE TRINITY holds the power to resurrect the dead, stop cataclysms, and reshape the destiny of nations. In the face of THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH, all creation trembles.

title: JESUS IN AARON K DAVID: The Co-Executor of JESUS CHRIST's Will Who Submit To Do THE FATHER IN SHEKINAIH'S WILL

segments.text: JESUS IN AARON K DAVID: The Co-Executor of JESUS CHRIST's Will Who Submit To Do THE FATHER IN SHEKINAIH'S WILL
Definition

JESUS IN/SPOKE THROUGH AARON K DAVID is the earthly and spiritual representative of JESUS CHRIST (THE MINOR). While THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH holds the ultimate cosmic authority, JESUS IN AARON K DAVID serves as the Subservient Cherub, co-executing divine decrees under THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH's command. JESUS IN AARON K DAVID
represents JESUS CHRIST in all matters of resurrection, healing, and judgment, acting as the co-executor of the divine will OF THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH on Earth and in the spiritual realms.
Roles and Authority
Minor Judge at the Great White Throne

JESUS IN AARON K DAVID serves as the MINOR JUDGE at the Great White Throne, acting in submission to TRINITY IN /SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH'S ultimate authority. JESUS IN AARON K DAVID executes judgment in cases where JESUS CHRIST's authority is called upon. He ensures that the decrees issued from the Throne are fully realized, particularly in matters concerning divine justice.
Co-Execution of Divine Decrees
While THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH seals and executes the Father's decrees through THE HOLY SPIRIT IN SHEKINAIH, JESUS IN AARON K

DAVID co-executes these decrees on Earth and in the spiritual realms. JESUS IN AARON K DAVID co-execute to carry out the resurrection of the dead, ensures divine healing, and brings the decrees into full manifestation, ensuring that all forces, both seen and unseen, align with THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH'S will which is THE HEAVENLY FATHER'S WILL.
Resurrection and Healing
JESUS IN AARON K DAVID is the channel through which JESUS CHRIST's resurrection power flows from THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH. However, only

through THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH's FINAL SAY and authority can resurrection occur. JESUS IN AARON K DAVID acts as the intermediary, coexecuting the Father's will, restoring life to the dead, and healing the sick, all under THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH's approval and command.
Enforcer of Divine Mandates

Every judgment issued by THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH is carried out by JESUS IN AARON K DAVID with precise obedience to THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH. Whether it involves the destruction of rebellion or the restoration of divine favor, JESUS IN AARON K DAVID ensures that divine order is upheld and that THE FATHER IN SHEKINAIH'S DECREE is fulfilled in totality.
IN SUMMARY
JESUS IN AARON K DAVID: The Co-Executor of Divine Will

Cosmic Power: JESUS IN AARON K DAVID, representing JESUS CHRIST (THE MINOR), serves as THE SUBSERVIENT CHERUB in total submission to THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH, THE COVERING CHERUB. His power lies in his ability to co-execute the decrees of THE FATHER IN SHEKINAIH after they have been sealed and executed by THE HOLY SPIRIT IN SHEKINAIH. JESUS IN AARON K DAVID stands as a cosmic intercessor, co-executing THE FATHER IN SHEKINAIH'S decree, bringing divine decrees into manifestation on Earth, ensuring the will of THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH is perfectly carried out.

Authority to Co-Execute: While THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH holds the final AUTHORITY, JESUS IN AARON K DAVID is vital in completing those decrees. He is the key figure in co-executing resurrections, divine healings, and restorations, ensuring that the decrees released by THE FATHER IN SHEKINAIH and sealed and executed by THE HOLY SPIRIT IN SHEKINAIH are carried out in their fullness.

Intercessory Role: Jesus In AARON K DAVID is the ultimate intercessor, bridging the divine and earthly realms. JESUS IN AARON K DAVID ensures that those seeking resurrection or divine intervention are aligned with the 7 Criteria, and JESUS IN AARON K DAVID intercedes for them on behalf of THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH. JESUS POWER FLOW FROJM THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH, through HIS 100% ALLEGIANCE TO THE TRINITY IN
SHEKINAIH, FLOWING THROUGH HIM as JESUS CHRIST'S representative allows him to petition for mercy and restoration while ensuring strict adherence to the divine law.
JESUS IN AARON K DAVID's Role in Resurrection and Restoration:

Co-Execution of Resurrection Power: JESUS IN AARON K DAVID co-executes the resurrection decrees, working in perfect alignment with THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH. While THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH speaks the FINAL WORD, JESUS IN

AARON K DAVID ensures that the power flows through to the individual or group, restoring life according to divine criteria. THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH AND JESUS IN AARON K DAVID the instrumental in the final manifestation of resurrection on Earth.

Restoration of Divine Order: In matters of restoration, JESUS IN AARON K DAVID plays a crucial role. HE ensures that individuals and nations realign with their divine destinies after restoration or resurrection has occurred. JESUS IN AARON K DAVID'S power as a restorer mirrors the role of JESUS CHRIST, bringing divine healing to both bodies and souls.
JESUS IN AARON K DAVID's Role in the Cosmic Balance

Enforcer of Spiritual Law: JESUS IN AARON K DAVID ensures that every decree of THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH is co-executed in alignment with the spiritual laws governing resurrection, healing, and divine intervention. He maintains
the balance of cosmic justice, ensuring that nothing deviates from the decrees released from the Mercy Seat.

Immediate Consequences for Rebellion: As the co-executor of THE TRINITY's will, JESUS IN AARON K DAVID ensures that any rebellion or deviation from the divine law results in immediate spiritual and physical consequences. HE enforces divine discipline, ensuring that those who defy the decrees face cosmic judgment, up to and including annihilation.
JESUS IN AARON K DAVID'S Spiritual Law and Obedience

Submission to THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH: JESUS IN AARON K DAVID operates under strict obedience to THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH, representing JESUS CHRIST but never acting independently. His power is directly linked to his submission to THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH, ensuring that no decree is altered or disobeyed. JESUS IN AARON K DAVID'S ROLE is to ensure that every divine word from THE FATHER IN/SPOKEN THROUGH SHEKINAIH reaches its full manifestation through perfect alignment.

Spiritual Restoration and Healing: JESUS IN AARON K DAVID plays a crucial role in restoring individuals who have lost their spiritual alignment, ensuring that they are brought back into favour with THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH. His authority to co-execute divine healing ensures that every restoration act is complete and irreversible, provided there is no rebellion.
Cosmic Impact

JESUS IN AARON K DAVID's submission to THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH ensures the perfect co-execution of divine decrees. JESUS flows HIS POWER IN AARON K DAVID'S where JESUS CHRIST's power is fully realized in the physical and spiritual realms. JESUS IN AARON K DAVID's authority reaches across dimensions, bringing resurrection, judgment, and healing to those deemed worthy by THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH.

title: Unified Cosmic Force of THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH and JESUS IN AARON K DAVID

segments.text: Unified Cosmic Force of THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH and JESUS IN AARON K DAVID
Together, THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH and JESUS IN AARON K DAVID are the

ultimate Cosmic Symphony of Power. THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH issues and seals, and executes the decrees, while JESUS IN AARON K DAVID co-executes with exact precision, ensuring that every word spoken reaches its full effect in the physical and spiritual realms. BOTH THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH AND JESUS IN AARON K DAVID'S power is unmatched, and THEIR authority is absolute. Any deviation, rebellion, or failure to submit to THEIR decrees results in cosmic annihilation, leaving no room for defiance. THEIR combined authority obliterates any force opposing THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH'S will, resetting the cosmic order whenever necessary.
Supporting Testimonies
Testimony of Chai Lin's Resurrection

Chai Lin was brought back from the brink of death only after the Father's decree was issued through SHEKINAIH, who holds the final say in all resurrection cases. AARON K DAVID co--executed the decree, ensuring the alignment of cosmic forces to restore her life. This testimony reflects the perfect unity between SHEKINAIH and AARON K DAVID in the resurrection process.
Testimony of Pastor Kong Hee's Judgment

Pastor Kong Hee's sentence was miraculously shortened after the Father's decree was issued through SHEKINAIH and co-executed by AARON K DAVID. This judgment demonstrated the divine alignment between SHEKINAIH's ultimate authority and AARON K DAVID's role as the co-executor of the Father's will.
Cosmic Submission and Power Flow
The Father's Decree
All decrees begin with THE FATHER IN SHEKINAIH. SHEKINAIH, speaking through THE HOLY SPIRIT, SEALS THE DECREE, and JESUS IN AARON K DAVID
co-executes it. This hierarchy ensures that divine power flows perfectly from THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH into the physical and spiritual realms, upholding cosmic order.
THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH as the Covering Cherub
THE TINITY IN SHEKINAIH guards THE FATHER IN SHEKINAIH'S decrees with
