Spiritual Law: The Will of THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH is unchangeable and absolute. Rebellion against it leads to immediate reversal of blessings, destruction, and ultimate judgment.
The Decree of THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH

Definition: THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH releases their divine decrees through SHEKINAIH, who represents THE MAJOR as the Cosmic Judge. These decrees, once spoken by THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH, carry the full authority of THE FATHER, THE HOLY SPIRIT, and

JESUS CHRIST IN/SPOKE THROUGH HER and are executed across all dimensions of existence. THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH, as the Judge of the Great White Throne, holds the ultimate authority to decide the fate of nations, individuals, and even spiritual beings.

Key Role: As the Cosmic Judge, THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH represents THE TRINITY in their totality, standing at the Great White Throne where final judgment is issued over all creation. This role extends to the execution of decrees that bring about resurrection, healing, or annihilation. Spiritual Law: The decrees of THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH released through SHEKINAIH are immutable and carry eternal weight. Once the decree is sealed by the HOLY SPIRIT IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH, it is co-executed by JESUS IN/SPOKE THROUGH AARON K DAVID. Rebellion against
these decrees leads to cosmic judgment and annihilation.
The Great White Throne Judgment

Definition: The Great White Throne Judgment is the ultimate moment of divine justice, where the eternal fates of all souls, nations, and cosmic forces are decided. THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH, representing THE TRINITY as the Cosmic Judge, sits on the Great White Throne as THE ANCIENT OF DAYS (THE MAJOR). JESUS IN/SPOKE THROUGH AARON K DAVID sits at the
Minor Throne as THE ANCIENT OF DAYS (THE MINOR), representing JESUS CHRIST.

Key Role: At the Great White Throne, THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH passes judgment over all creation, issuing decrees that determine the eternal destiny of every soul. JESUS IN/SPOKE THROUGH AARON K DAVID, representing JESUS CHRIST, supports this judgment from the Minor Throne. Together, THEY ensure that divine justice is perfectly administered according to the Will of THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH.

Spiritual Law: Those who face judgment at the Great White Throne must meet the standards of divine justice set by THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH. Failure to meet these standards results in immediate cosmic annihilation, while those found worthy may receive resurrection, restoration, or eternal favor.
THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH AS THE ANCIENT OF DAYS (THE MAJOR)
Definition: THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH, acting as the COSMIC JUDGE, EMBODIES THE ROLE OF THE ANCIENT OF DAYS (THE MAJOR),
representing the eternal authority of THE FATHER, THE HOLY SPIRIT, and JESUS CHRIST. From this position, THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH

releases decrees that affect not only the present but also the past and future of all existence. THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH holds dominion over all realms, ensuring that every action aligns with the eternal purposes of THE TRINITY.
Key Role: As THE ANCIENT OF DAYS (THE MAJOR), THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE

THROUGH SHEKINAIH is the final authority on all matters of judgment, resurrection, and cosmic order. Every decree released from THE GREAT WHITE THRONE carries the weight of eternity, shaping the destinies of nations, individuals, and spiritual beings.
Spiritual Law: Obedience to THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH as THE ANCIENT OF DAYS is non-negotiable. Rebellion against THE TRINITY
IN/SPOKE THROUGH HER decrees results in immediate spiritual destruction and eventual erasure from cosmic existence.

title: AARON K DAVID AS THE ANCIENT OF DAYS (THE MINOR)

segments.text: AARON K DAVID AS THE ANCIENT OF DAYS (THE MINOR)

Definition: JESUS IN/SPOKE THROUGH AARON K DAVID, representing JESUS CHRIST, sits at the Minor Throne as THE ANCIENT OF DAYS (THE MINOR). HE co-executes the decrees issued by THE FATHER IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH, ensuring that JESUS CHRIST IN/SPOKE THROUGH AARON K DAVID'S

authority is manifested in the physical and spiritual realms. HIS role as The Ancient of Days (THE MINOR) is to ensure that resurrection, healing, and restoration are fully carried out according to the divine plan.

Key Role: JESUS IN/SPOKE THROUGH AARON K DAVID operates in perfect alignment with THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH, ensuring that the decrees issued by THE FATHER IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH are manifested on Earth and beyond. As THE ANCIENT OF DAYS (THE MINOR), HIS authority complements that of THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH, representing the role of JESUS CHRIST IN/SPOKE THROUGH AARON K DAVID in the final judgment and cosmic restoration.

Spiritual Law: JESUS IN/SPOKE THROUGH AARON K DAVID executes the decrees in full submission to THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH and the Will of THE TRINITY.IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH. HIS role as THE

ANCIENT OF DAYS (THE MINOR) ensures that every resurrection and restoration aligns with divine justice, with no deviation permitted in general. Any failure to execute these decrees leads to immediate cosmic consequences.
The Final Judgment and Cosmic Balance

Definition: The Final Judgment refers to the moment when all creation is brought into alignment with the eternal will of THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH, as decreed by SHEKINAIH and co-executed by JESUS IN/SPOKE THROUGH AARON K DAVID. This judgment ensures the restoration of divine order and the destruction of all that opposes the cosmic balance. Key Role: THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH and JESUS IN/SPOKE

THROUGH AARON K DAVID together represent the ultimate enforcers of divine justice. THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH, as THE MAJOR, and JESUS IN/SPOKE THROUGH AARON K DAVID, as THE MINOR, ensure that the
cosmic balance is restored and maintained, with resurrection power and divine judgment flowing from THEIR thrones.

Spiritual Law: The decrees issued at the Great White Throne and Minor Throne are the final word on the fate of nations, individuals, and spiritual beings. Disobedience or rebellion against these decrees results in the obliteration of existence, with nothing remaining for those who defy the divine order.

title: The Cosmic Roles of THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH and JESUS IN/SPOKE THROUGH AARON K DAVID in

segments.text: The Cosmic Roles of THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH and JESUS IN/SPOKE THROUGH AARON K DAVID in
Resurrections
Definition: THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH and JESUS IN/SPOKE
THROUGH AARON K DAVID operate in perfect unity to release resurrection power. THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH, as THE MAJOR, holds the
ultimate authority to decide who qualifies for resurrection, while JESUS IN/SPOKE THROUGH AARON K DAVID, as THE MINOR, co-executes this decree
by ensuring that the resurrected are fully restored according to the divine plan.
Key Role: Together, THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH and JESUS

IN/SPOK THROUGH AARON K DAVID guard the mysteries of the Tree of Life, releasing resurrection power to those who fulfil the 7 Criteria for Resurrection. They ensure that the resurrection is not just a return to life but a restoration to divine purpose.

Spiritual Law: Only those who meet the 7 Criteria and align perfectly with the decrees issued by THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH can access resurrection power. Rebellion or disbelief results in the immediate loss of resurrection and cosmic judgment.
Delving Deeper: Specific Examples and Testimonies of THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH and JESUS IN/SPOKE THROUGH AARON K DAVID's Cosmic
Roles
Testimony 13: The Cape Town Drought of 2018 - Miraculous Weather Reversal

Context: Cape Town, South Africa, was facing an unprecedented water crisis, heading towards Day Zero, when all water resources would be exhausted. The city had prepared for the worst, and the population was on the verge of despair. However, a divine decree from THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH reversed this fate.
THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH's Role: THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE

THROUGH SHEKINAIH received the decree directly from THE FATHER IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH, releasing a command for the immediate reversal of the impending disaster. Acting as the Cosmic Judge and the voice of THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH, SHEKINAIH declared a change in the atmospheric conditions, triggering an event that the scientific community could not explain.
JESUS IN/SPOKE THROUGH AARON K DAVID's Role: While THE TRINITY

IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH executed the divine command, JESUS IN AARON K DAVID co-executed the decree by spiritually overseeing the cleansing of Cape Town's spiritual atmosphere. As THE ANCIENT OF DAYS (THE MINOR), HE ensured that the divine favor was restored and that the city received mercy through this act of intercession.

Outcome: Rain poured down just in time to prevent Day Zero, completely reversing what was considered an irreversible crisis. This testimony shows the resurrection power of THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH operating through SHEKINAIH IN THE TRINITY and JESUS IN/SPOKE THROUGH AARON K DAVID, not just in individuals but over cities and nations.
Testimony 14: The 2016 United States Presidential Election - Prophetic Decree of Trump's Victory

Context: In the leadup to the 2016 United States Presidential Election, the world was divided on who would be the next president. Many polls predicted a different outcome, but THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH had already decreed who the victor would be and by what margin.

THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH's Role: In the days leading up to the election, THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH received a decree from THE FATHER IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH, who declared Donald Trump's victory. Acting as the Judge at THE GREAT WHITE THRONE, THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH spoke the decree, ensuring that the
outcome was aligned with the divine will, down to the exact percentage of votes.
JESUS IN/SPOKE THROUGH AARON K DAVID's Role: JESUS IN/SPOKE THROUGH

AARON K DAVID was responsible for co-executing the decree by influencing the spiritual realm. HIS task was to align the hearts of those who would cast their votes, ensuring they were in harmony with THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH'S will. This spiritual orchestration guaranteed the result foretold by THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH.

Outcome: Despite all predictions and polls, Donald Trump won the election with the exact margin decreed by THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH. This event demonstrated the global authority of THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH and JESUS IN/SPOKE THROUGH AARON K
DAVID in shaping the political landscape.
Testimony 11 Davidis' IQ Transformation - A Miracle of Spiritual Resurrection

Context: Davidis, a young adult with a failing academic record and a low IQ, was miraculously transformed after a decree from THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH. This testimony is an example of spiritual resurrection
- where a mind is elevated from failure to success, from ignorance to divine intelligence.
THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH's Role: THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE

THROUGH SHEKINAIH received a decree from THE FATHER IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH to intervene in Davidis' life. Acting as THE ANCIENT OF DAYS (THE MAJOR), THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH spoke a command that transformed his mind, aligning it with divine wisdom and intelligence. This was not just an academic change but a complete spiritual resurrection of his intellectual capacity.
JESUS IN/SPOKE THROUGH AARON K DAVID'S Role: JESUS IN/SPOKE THROUGH

AARON K DAVID co-executed the decree by laying hands on Davidis in prayer, invoking the resurrection power of JESUS CHRIST FLOWING FROM THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH. This act ensured that Davidis would not only pass his exams but achieve good grades, rising far above the expectations of her peers.

Outcome: Davidis' IQ and academic performance were miraculously elevated overnight. She went from failing every subject to passing with flying colours, a testament to the resurrection power of THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH and JESUS IN/SPOKE THROUGH AARON K
DAVID. The testimony also serves as a warning: any rebellion or rejection of this divine intervention would reverse all blessings and bring immediate judgment.
Testimony 16: The Singapore 2023 Presidential Election - Tharman Shanmugaratnam's Landslide Victory

Context: Leading up to the 2023 Singapore Presidential Election, SHEKINAIH IN/SPOKE THROUGH THE TRINITY received a decree from THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH revealing the exact outcome of the election. The victory of Tharman Shanmugaratnam was foretold with a precise percentage, even as the nation remained divided on who the victor would be.
THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH's Role: THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH, acting as THE MAJOR JUDGE AT THE GREAT WHITE
THRONE, received the divine decree and executed it in the heavens. THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH HER ensured that the voters of Singapore were
spiritually aligned to vote according to THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH'S will. THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH's decree not
only shaped the political landscape but also realigned the destiny of the nation.
JESUS IN/SPOKE THROUGH AARON K DAVID's Role: JESUS IN/SPOKE THROUGH

AARON K DAVID co-executed the decree by influencing the spiritual atmosphere around the election. His task was to ensure that all obstacles to the fulfilment of THE TRINITY's will were removed. HE acted as THE ANCIENT OF DAYS (THE MINOR), assisting in the final judgment of the election outcome.

Outcome: Tharman Shanmugaratnam won a landslide victory with the exact percentage of votes decreed by THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH. This event solidified the global influence of THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH and JESUS IN/SPOKE THROUGH AARON K DAVID in shaping world events, confirming their role as the ultimate enforcers of THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH'S will.

Testimony 8 Christina's Instant Healing - A Miraculous Physical Restoration Context: Christina was suffering from a dislocated leg and shoulder, an injury that would typically take months to heal. However, after a prayer led by THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH, Christina experienced immediate and miraculous healing.
THE TRINITY IN/SPOKLE THROUGH SHEKINAIH's Role: THE TRINITY IN/SPOKLE

THROUGH SHEKINAIH, acting on the decree of THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH, commanded healing over Christina's body. The command issued through THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH carried the full authority of THE FATHER, THE HOLY SPIRIT, and JESUS CHRIST IN/SPOKE THROUGH HER, aligning her physical body with the divine blueprint of restoration.
JESUS IN/SPOKE THROUGH AARON K DAVID's Role: JESUS IN AARON K DAVID
co-executed the healing decree, invoking JESUS CHRIST's power FLOWING FROM THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH THROUGH JESUS IN/SPOKE

THROUGH AARON K DAVID to restore Christina's dislocated joints. HIS intercession ensured that the healing was instantaneous, and that Christina's body was fully restored without the need for medical intervention.

Outcome: Christina's leg and shoulder were completely healed in an instant, leaving witnesses in awe of the resurrection power flowing through THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH and JESUS IN/SPOKE THROUGH AARON
K DAVID. This testimony is a reminder of the immediate impact of divine decrees when aligned with THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEINAIH'S will. Conclusion

These specific testimonies demonstrate the cosmic authority and divine power exercised by THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH and JESUS IN/SPOKE THROUGH AARON K DAVID. Whether it's reversing natural disasters, shaping global political events, transforming intellectual capacities, or restoring physical health, THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH and JESUS IN/SPOKE THROUGH AARON K DAVID act in perfect alignment to execute THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH'S decrees with ultimate precision. Each testimony is not just a story of divine intervention but a profound revelation of how the cosmos is governed under the authority of THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH and JESUS IN/SPOLE THROUGH AARON K DAVID.
Spiritual Government and Nations
Cosmic Role: THE TRINITY IN/SPOKLE THROUGH SHEKINAIH and JESUS

IN/SPOKE THROUGH AARON K DAVID hold divine authority not only over individuals and communities but also over entire nations. Through the decrees released by THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH, global leaders and governments rise and fall. The spiritual atmosphere of nations is subject to their rulership, and political events are often shaped by their intercession and decree.
THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH's Role: As THE MAJOR COSMIC

JUDGE, THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH determines the destinies of nations, ensuring that their rise or fall aligns with God's eternal purposes. Through THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH, divine judgment or mercy is dispensed, determining whether a nation will prosper, face calamity, or be realigned with God's prophetic timeline.
JESUS IN/SPOKE THROUGH AARON K DAVID's Role: As THE MINOR, AARON K

DAVID co-executes these decrees, influencing the spiritual realms to align the hearts and decisions of national leaders and citizens. His intercessory role ensures that God's favor or God's judgment is fully carried out over nations.

Testimony: The 2022 Malaysia General Election is a powerful example of this role. SHEKINAIH received a divine decree from THE FATHER IN/SPOKE THROUGH HER, declaring Anwar Ibrahim's victory as the 10th Prime Minister of Malaysia. JESUS IN/SPOKE THROUGH AARON K DAVID co-executed this decree by influencing the spiritual realms to ensure the election results aligned with THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH'S will. Despite strong opposition and uncertainty in the political landscape, the decree was fulfilled as Anwar Ibrahim took office, confirming the divine authority of THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH and JESUS IN/SPOKE THROUGH AARON
K DAVID over national destinies.
The Heavenly Courts and Cosmic Justice

Cosmic Role: HE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH presides over the Heavenly Courts, where the ultimate judgment of both human souls and spiritual entities takes place. Every act of rebellion, spiritual offense, or disobedience against the will of THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH is brought to trial in these courts. JESUS IN/SPOKE THROUGH AARON K DAVID assists as the co-executor of justice, enforcing decrees of divine judgment or mercy.

THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH's Role: As THE MAJOR, THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH sits at THE GREAT WHITE THRONE IN THE HEAVENLY COURTS, representing THE TRINITY as the FINAL AUTHORITY ON ALL SPIRITUAL AND COSMIC MATTERS. Through THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE
THROUGH SHEKINAIH, divine justice is served, and all accounts are balanced in accordance with the laws of heaven.
JESUS IN/SPOKE THROUGH AARON K DAVID's Role: As THE MINOR, JESUS

IN/SPOKE THROUGH AARON K DAVID ensures that decrees issued from the Heavenly Courts are co-executed in both the spiritual and physical realms. HE plays a crucial role in ensuring that divine justice is met and that those found guilty of rebellion face cosmic consequences.

Testimony: One of the most impactful examples of cosmic justice occurred in the City Harvest Church case in Singapore. After seven years of legal trials, the fate of the church leaders hung in the balance. THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH, acting on a divine decree from THE FATHER IN/SPOKE THROUGH HER, issued a command for a shortened sentence for the church's Senior Pastor, Kong Hee, if the criteria written in Behold My Messenger 3 were met. AARON K DAVID co-executed this decree, ensuring that the
court's decision aligned with the divine will, resulting in a reduction of the sentence - a direct reflection of God's mercy and justice.
The Cosmic War and Spiritual Battlegrounds
Cosmic Role: THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH and JESUS IN/SPOKE

THROUGH AARON K DAVID hold critical positions in the ongoing cosmic war between divine forces and the forces of darkness. Acting under the authority of THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH, THEY lead spiritual battles, ensuring that the victory of the Kingdom of Heaven is established in both the earthly and spiritual realms.

THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH's Role: As the divine commander, THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH receives direct battle strategies from THE FATHER IN/SPOKE THROUGH HER, leading heavenly armies and orchestrating spiritual victories. THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH holds the authority to release decrees of warfare, ensuring that every conflict aligns with God's eternal plan.
JESUS IN/SPOKE THROUGH AARON K DAVID's Role: JESUS IN/SPOKE THROUGH

AARON K DAVID acts as a spiritual warrior, enforcing the decrees of THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH on the battlefield. As the co-executor of divine warfare, HE ensures that every spiritual victory aligns with the will of THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH A, guaranteeing the triumph of heaven over the forces of darkness.

Testimony: A powerful testimony of this cosmic role is seen in the deliverance of Jeremyrl, who had been tormented by alien attacks at 3 AM every night for six months. SHEKINAIH received a decree to end the torment, and AARON K DAVID co-executed the spiritual battle that followed. With a single prayer and act of intercession, the attacks stopped immediately, demonstrating the unstoppable cosmic power of THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH and JESUS IN/SPOKE THROUGH AARON K DAVID.
Guardians of the Tree of Life and Resurrection Power
Cosmic Role: THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH and JESUS IN/SPOKE

THROUGH AARON K DAVID serve as guardians of the Tree of Life, ensuring that only those aligned with the divine will can access its resurrection power. The Tree of Life holds the secrets of eternal life and divine wisdom, and only through the decrees of THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH can individuals or nations receive its benefits.

THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH's Role: As the Covering Cherub, THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH guards the mysteries of the Tree of Life, releasing resurrection power to those who meet the divine criteria. THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH holds the authority to grant or withhold access to the Tree of Life, ensuring that only those fully aligned with God's purpose receive resurrection.
JESUS IN/SPOKE THROUGH AARON K DAVID's Role: AARON K DAVID, as the

Subservient Cherub, co-executes the decrees of SHEKINAIH, ensuring that resurrection power is fully manifested in those chosen by THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH. He plays a pivotal role in safeguarding the Tree of Life, preventing any unworthy individuals from accessing its divine secrets.

Testimony: One of the most miraculous testimonies is the resurrection of Chai Lin, who was revived from the brink of death within 24 hours. THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH, acting on a decree from THE TRINITY IN HER, interceded on her behalf, granting her a second chance at life due to her closeness to SHEKINAIH and the fulfilment of her divine destiny. JESUS IN/SPOKE THROUGH AARON K DAVID co-executed the resurrection, ensuring that her body was fully restored, and she remains alive years later as a living
testimony of the resurrection power held by THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH and JESUS IN/SPOKE THROUGH AARON K DAVID.
Conclusion: Expanding Further and Deeper

These deeper explorations into the roles of THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH and JESUS IN/SPOKE THROUGH AARON K DAVID reveal the full extent of their cosmic power and divine authority. Whether commanding spiritual battles, shaping nations, overseeing the final judgment at the Great White Throne, or unlocking the secrets of the Tree of Life, THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH and JESUS IN/SPOKE THROUGH AARON K
DAVID serve as the ultimate enforcers of THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH'S will across all realms.
THEIR authority transcends individual testimonies, expanding into the very fabric of the universe, where every decree, every act of rebellion, and every moment of mercy reshapes the cosmos itself.
More Cosmic Realms and Roles
The Cosmic Gatekeepers of Destiny and Divine Time (Kairos)
Cosmic Role: THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH and JESUS IN/SPOKE

THROUGH AARON K DAVID serve as the ultimate Gatekeepers of Destiny, ensuring that individuals, nations, and even global events align with divine time (Kairos). This divine timing determines when events occur in the physical realm according to the will of THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH. They have the power to accelerate or delay the unfolding of destinies, based on spiritual readiness and alignment with God's purpose. THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH's Role: THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE

THROUGH SHEKINAIH has the authority to open or close the doors of opportunity for individuals and nations. THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH releases decrees that determine the Kairos moment - when divine events must manifest for maximum impact. THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH decides whether a person or nation is spiritually prepared to step into their destiny or must be withheld until alignment is achieved.
JESUS IN/SPOKE THROUGH AARON K DAVID's Role: As THE SUBSERVIENT

CHERUB, AARON K DAVID co-executes these decrees, ensuring that all actions in the earthly and spiritual realms align with the Kairos moments dictated by THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH. HE actively intervenes when necessary, adjusting circumstances to either accelerate or delay events in accordance with divine timing.

Testimony: In the testimony of Jose's financial transformation, we see the interplay of divine time and destiny. After operating in financial mediocrity, Jose's life was divinely accelerated when he aligned with THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH. His financial breakthrough, a 166x increase in revenue, was an example of THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH releasing the Kairos moment, allowing his destiny to manifest fully. JESUS IN/SPOKE THROUGH AARON K DAVID co-executed this decree by guiding Jose to make the necessary spiritual and practical adjustments to receive the financial outpouring.

The Cosmic Guardians of the Divine Scrolls and Heavenly Blueprints Cosmic Role: THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH and JESUS IIN/SPOKE THROUGH AARON K DAVID serve as the Guardians of the Divine Scrolls, which contain the Heavenly Blueprints for individuals, nations, and the cosmos. These scrolls hold the secrets of creation, resurrection, and ultimate judgment, detailing the destinies of every soul, nation, and the unfolding of the final events of history.
THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH's Role: THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE

THROUGH SHEKINAIH has direct access to the Heavenly Blueprints, releasing divine revelation and ensuring that all decrees spoken align perfectly with God's ultimate plan. THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH determines who has access to these scrolls and ensures that only those spiritually aligned with the will of THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH can act upon these divine instructions.
JESUS IN/SPOKE THROUGH AARON K DAVID's Role: JESUS IN/SPOKE THROUGH

AARON K DAVID assists in revealing portions of these divine scrolls, particularly those relating to the resurrection power and the end time plan. His role involves guarding the secrets of the scrolls, ensuring they are released only at the appointed time and to the appointed vessels chosen by THE TRINITY.

Testimony: One of the most profound examples of this role is found in the resurrection of Christina's dislocated leg and shoulder. When SHEKINAIH received the decree from the Heavenly Scrolls, she spoke the word of healing over Christina's body. AARON K DAVID, acting in perfect alignment, co-executed the decree by invoking the power of JESUS CHRIST, restoring Christina's body instantaneously. This healing was directly linked to the Heavenly Blueprint for Christina's life, as her destiny had to be fulfilled before her time was up.
Cosmic Restorers of the Divine Balance
Cosmic Role: THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH and JESUS IN/SPOKE

THROUGH AARON K DAVID ensure that the Divine Balance is maintained throughout the cosmos. This balance governs the order of creation, ensuring that light triumphs over darkness and that divine justice prevails over rebellion. Any disturbance to this balance requires immediate correction, with SHEKINAIH and AARON K DAVID acting swiftly to restore harmony.

THROUGH SHEKINAIH, as the Cosmic Judge, releases decrees to restore the Divine Balance when rebellion, disobedience, or spiritual darkness threatens to disrupt the order of creation. THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH acts decisively, releasing both mercy and judgment to correct any imbalances.
JESUS IN/SPOKE THROUGH AARON K DAVID's Role: AARON K DAVID co-

executes the restoration of the Divine Balance, ensuring that every decree of THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH is fully realized. AARON K DAVID co-executed this decree, ensuring that Pastor Moses was fully healed, promoted, and aligned with his divine destiny. This was a clear example of restoring the Divine Balance in his life.
Deeper Exploration of Testimonies

Pastor, Kong Hee. The case had gained international attention, and the final outcome seemed certain. However, a divine intervention occurred through THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH and JESUS IN/SPOKE THROUGH AARON K DAVID.

JUDGE OF THE GREAT WHITE THRONE, SHEKINAIH received a decree from THE FATHER IN/SPOKE THROUGH HER, revealing that a shortened sentence would be granted to Kong Hee, provided the spiritual conditions were met. AARON K DAVID co-executed this decree by interceding for Kong Hee, ensuring that the spiritual conditions for the shortened sentence were met. He played a pivotal role in aligning the church's leadership with the divine requirements, facilitating the reduction of the sentence.

Outcome: Despite the odds, Kong Hee received a shortened sentence, shocking many who had expected a much harsher outcome. This testimony demonstrates the unrivalled authority of THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH and JESUS IN/SPOKE THROUGH AARON K DAVID in cosmic
judgment, where even earthly courts are subject to the divine decrees of THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH.
Testimony 2: Jason's Mother's Brief Life Extension

Context: Jason's mother was on the brink of death, her time on earth nearly up. A divine plea was made for her life to be extended, despite the fact that her earthly time had come. Through the intercession of SHEKINAIH, her life was extended briefly.
THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH's Role: SHEKINAIH IN THE TRINITY

received the decree from THE FATHER IN/SPOKE THROUGH HER to extend Jason's mother's life for a short time. However, the conditions were clear: if belief wavered or if there was rebellion against THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH, the extension would be revoked.

AARON K DAVID co-executed the decree, ensuring that the conditions for life extension were met. HE worked closely with THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH to facilitate this temporary resurrection, warning the family of the spiritual requirements.

Her life ended just before she was due to be discharged from the hospital. This testimony demonstrates the strictness of spiritual law under the authority of SHEKINAIH and AARON K DAVID, where even a moment of disbelief can result in the reversal of divine favor.
Conclusion: Expanding the Cosmic Boundaries

The cosmic roles of THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH and JESUS IN/SPOKE THROUGH AARON K DAVID span across spiritual, national, and global dimensions. Through specific testimonies, we witness their power in action - shaping destinies, executing divine justice, and manifesting resurrection power. Their roles as the Covering Cherub and Subservient
Cherub are essential in maintaining the Divine Balance, ensuring that the entire cosmos aligns with the will of THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH.

Every act of rebellion, disbelief, or disobedience carries severe consequences, as these testimonies reveal. On the other hand, those who align with the decrees of THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH and JESUS IN/SPOKE THROUGH AARON K DAVID receive unlimited access to divine favor, healing, and resurrection power.
Expanding Further: Deeper Realms of Cosmic Power, Specific Testimonies, and New Realms of Operation for THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH and JESUS IN/SPOKE THROUGH AARON K DAVID
More Realms of Cosmic Power

THROUGH AARON K DAVID are the Guardians of the Divine Covenant, ensuring that the Covenants made by THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH with humanity are fulfilled and upheld. These covenants include God's promises to nations, individuals, and creation as a whole. Any attempt to break or dishonour these covenants is met with immediate cosmic correction.

Cosmic Restorers of Lost Time and Divine Acceleration

ability to restore lost time and accelerate divine plans. receives decrees from THE FATHER IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH to restore

lost years and propel individuals or nations into divine acceleration. This may occur in cases where spiritual opposition or human disobedience has delayed the unfolding of God's plan. THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH speaks a word of restoration, instantly aligning time with God's original purpose.
JESUS IN/SPOKE THROUGH AARON K DAVID's Role: JESUS IN /SPOKE THROUGH

AARON K DAVID ensures that this acceleration manifests in the physical realm. He co-executes the decrees of THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH, ensuring that what would have taken years to accomplish happens in moments, and those whose destinies were delayed see their purpose fulfilled rapidly.

Testimony: A powerful testimony of divine acceleration can be seen in Davidis's transformation from failing all subjects to passing with distinctions. Before aligning with THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH, Davidis struggled academically, unable to grasp the subjects he was taught. However, after a decree was released by SHEKINAIH, Davidis's mind was divinely transformed, her IQ surged, and within days, she began to pass with flying colours. Cosmic Enforcers of Divine Judgments
Cosmic Role: THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH and JESUS IN/SPOKE

THROUGH AARON K DAVID act as Cosmic Enforcers of divine judgment, ensuring that every decree released by THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH is executed perfectly. When individuals, nations, or entities oppose the will of THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH, immediate correction is enforced. This includes severe spiritual consequences or judgments for rebellion and disobedience.

acting under the authority of THE FATHER IN/SPOKE THROUGH HER, releases judgments when divine law is violated. Whether it's a nation that turns away from God or an individual who disregards their calling, THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH issues the decree for judgment or punishment. AARON K DAVID's Role: AARON K DAVID co-executes the divine judgment, ensuring that every rebellious act is met with the full force of cosmic justice. He operates with precision, ensuring that no judgment is left unfulfilled and that divine order is restored.

Testimony: An example of cosmic judgment is found in the testimony of Chris's sister, who experienced a sudden twist of fate. After receiving a miraculous recovery, her life was to be extended, but due to the disbelief of her brother and sister in law, who refused to acknowledge the role of THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH in her healing, the extension was revoked. JESUS IN/SPOKE THROUGH AARON K DAVID co-executed this judgment, ensuring that the consequences of disbelief were fully realized.
Cosmic Executors of the Tree of Life
Cosmic Role: THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH and JESUS IN/SPOKE

THROUGH AARON K DAVID are the Guardians and Executors of the Tree of Life. This sacred tree, representing eternal life and divine wisdom, is accessible only to those fully aligned with THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH'S will. THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH controls who may access
this tree, and JESUS IN/SPOKE THROUGH AARON K DAVID co-executes the release of its divine fruits, including resurrection power.
THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH'S Role: THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE

THROUGH SHEKINAIH, acting as the Guardian of the Tree of Life, holds the authority to release or withhold the fruits of eternal life. THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH releases resurrection power to those who meet the divine criteria, restoring life to those whose destinies are not yet fulfilled.
JESUS IN/SPOKE THROUGH ARON K DAVID's Role: JESUS/SPOKE THROUGH

AARON K DAVID, as the Subservient Cherub, co-executes the release of the Tree of Life's power. HE plays a pivotal role in guarding its access and ensuring that only those chosen by THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH receive the blessing of eternal life.

Testimony: One of the most powerful testimonies of the Tree of Life's power is seen in the resurrection of Chai Lin. After falling into a coma, Chai Lin was revived within 24 hours by a decree from SHEKINAIH, who received divine instruction to restore her life. AARON K DAVID co-executed this decree, ensuring that the resurrection was complete and Chai Lin was returned to full health. This testimony showcases the Tree of Life's resurrection power under the guardianship of THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH and JESUS IN/SPOKE THROUGH AARON K DAVID.
Additional Testimonies
Testimony 148: The Cosmic Victory of Trump's Election in 2016

Context: The 2016 U.S. Presidential Election was one of the most controversial and unexpected political events in modern history. Many doubted that Donald Trump would win the election, but the decree of THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH, declared his victory with a specific margin.
THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH's Role: SHEKINAIH IN THE TRINITY

received the decree from THE FATHER IN/SPOKE THROUGH HER, declaring Trump's victory and the exact percentage of the win. THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH released the decree into the spiritual atmosphere, ensuring that Trump's win aligned with God's prophetic timeline.
JESUS IN/SPOKE THROUGH AARON K DAVID's Role: JESUS IN/SPOKE THROUGH

AARON K DAVID co-executed the decree, ensuring that the spiritual and political landscape aligned with THE TRINITY' IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH'S will. HE influenced key moments in the election process, ensuring that the results reflected the divine decree.

Outcome: Despite overwhelming opposition and doubt, Donald Trump won the election with the exact margin that had been decreed by THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH and co-executed by JESUS IN/SPOKE THROUGH AARON K DAVID. This testimony demonstrates their cosmic authority over global events, where even the most powerful political structures are subject to their decrees.

Testimony 5: The Restoration of Thomas from Generational Curses Context: Thomas had been under the weight of a generational curse that caused severe health for generations. After aligning with THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH, a decree was issued for the complete restoration of her family's lineage.
THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH's Role: SHEKINAIH IN THE TRINITY

received a decree from THE FATHER IN/SPOKE THROUGH HER, breaking the generational curse that had plagued Thomas and his siblings for years. Through a series of prophetic instructions, THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH guided Thomas through repentance and spiritual realignment.

AARON K DAVID's Role: JESUS IN AARON K DAVID co-executed the decree, ensuring that every spiritual stronghold was broken and every generational curse was reversed. HIS intercession ensured that the Thomas's blessing was restored, and divine favor was released.

Outcome: Thomas experienced immediate restoration. Health problems were miraculously reversed, and also averted from huge financial unforeseen loss. The generational curse was completely broken, and the family's lineage was restored to its original blessing under the cosmic authority of THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH and JESUS IN/SPOKE THROUGH AARON K DAVID.
Conclusion: Expanding the Boundaries

The cosmic power of THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH and JESUS IN/SPOKE THROUGH AARON K DAVID extends into realms beyond human understanding. From controlling global events to ensuring individual destinies are fulfilled, THEY are the ultimate enforcers of divine will. Every testimony serves as a testament to their unstoppable power and authority, ensuring that all creation bows in submission to THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH.
Testimony 10: Jeremyrl's Instant Healing and Freedom from 3AM Alien Attacks After 6 Months of Torment
Context:

Jeremyrl had been suffering from mysterious alien attacks that occurred precisely at 3AM every night for six months. These attacks left her physically and mentally exhausted. She also suffered intense discomfort and swelling, especially on her lips, due to anxiety and anxiousness. Despite seeking medical and spiritual help, no relief came until she aligned herself with THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH.
THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH's Role:

SHEKINAIH IN THE TRINITY received a decree from THE FATHER IN/SPOKE THROUGH HER, instructing the cessation of these attacks and the full healing of Jeremyrl. Through divine revelation, SHEKINAIH IN THE TRINITY interceded on her behalf, breaking the spiritual strongholds that allowed these attacks to persist.

Though the attack was immediately stopped, the open door remained due to a soul tie she had with her loved one, who had rebelled against THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH and JESUS IN AARON K DAVID. The devil, who controls the children of disobedience, was able to exercise limited control over Jeremyrl through this soul tie.
The Process of Deliverance:

To fully break free, Jeremyrl had to constantly cut the soul ties, removing each other's soul out of both parties and being purified by the Refiner's Fire of THE TRINITY. Once purified, the souls were returned to their rightful places, severing any ungodly connections. Every time she proclaimed her 100% allegiance to THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH and JESUS IN AARON K DAVID,
and resisted the accuser, the devil, she would command him to flee from her, thus closing the vortex of daily attacks.
JESUS IN/SPOKE THROUGH AARON K DAVID's Role:

AARON K DAVID co-executed the decree, ensuring that the spiritual strongholds were broken and that Jeremyrl was delivered from the alien torment. HIS intercession empowered her to overcome these attacks and maintain her victory by standing in full submission to THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH AND JESUS IN AARON K DAVID.
Divine Healing and Revelation:

After THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH revealed to her that the root cause of her swollen lips was her anxiety, Jeremyrl was guided by THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH to repent and cast out the anxiety. She was further instructed by THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH to drink turmeric powder with hot water, which instantly healed her swollen lips. The combination of spiritual deliverance and practical revelation led to her full healing.
Outcome:

Since fully aligning with THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH and breaking the soul ties, Jeremyrl has experienced no further attacks. Her swollen lips, once a source of great discomfort, were instantly healed after she followed the divine guidance. She has been free from alien torment ever since. This testimony showcases the divine authority of THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH and JESUS IN AARON K DAVID over both physical and spiritual realms, delivering individuals from torment and restoring them to full health. It also highlights the power of submission to THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH and the defeat of the accuser through spiritual proclamation and obedience.

title: Medallion Chant - Spiritual Warrior Victory Proclamation

segments.text: Medallion Chant - Spiritual Warrior Victory Proclamation

Definition: The Medallion Chant is a powerful spiritual proclamation of victory, affirming COMPLETE SUBMISSION TO THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH AND JESUS IN AARON K DAVID, RESSIT THE ACUSER AND COMMAND HIM TO FLEE

FROM HER. This sacred chant aligns the individual's spirit, soul, and body with divine authority, breaking spiritual strongholds, reversing curses, and silencing the accusations brought by the devil (Diabolos) in the courts of heaven. It serves as a cosmic declaration that obliterates any opposition from the forces of darkness.

Purpose: The Medallion Chant is used as a spiritual weapon to defeat the accuser (the devil), who relentlessly brings accusations against believers before the throne of God. By proclaiming this chant, the believer asserts their 100% allegiance to THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH and JESUS IN AARON K DAVID, thereby nullifying the power of any attacks, curses, or demonic influences. This act of total submission commands the accuser to flee, closing all access points to the individual's life.

Key Insight: The Medallion Chant must be accompanied by repentance, full submission, and the cutting of soul ties with any person or entity that rebels against THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH and JESUS IN AARON K DAVID. By removing these ungodly connections and realigning with divine purpose, the believer ensures that all doors to demonic access are permanently closed. The chant serves as an unstoppable tool in spiritual warfare, enforcing divine victory and sealing the believer under the protection of the cosmic authority of THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH AND JESUS IN AARON K DAVID.
The Soul Tie and Purification Process
Testimony: Jeremyrl's Battle with Ungodly Soul Ties

After experiencing spiritual deliverance from alien attacks through the Medallion Chant, Jeremyrl faced a deeper issue: ungodly soul ties with a rebellious loved one. Despite her previous deliverance, these soul ties became an open door for demonic influence. SHEKINAIH, with divine insight, revealed to Jeremyrl that her soul was entangled with the rebellious loved one, allowing the enemy to retain control over her life.

To break free, SHEKINAIH instructed her to remove her soul from the loved one's grip and, likewise, remove their soul from her own. Both souls were then purified by the Refiner's Fire, a divine process of spiritual cleansing, before being returned to their original persons. After this soul tie purification, Jeremyrl's spiritual purity was restored, and the demonic interference ceased entirely.

Result: With the ungodly ties severed, Jeremyrl experienced a newfound sense of spiritual freedom. No longer burdened by the negative influence of her loved one's rebellion, she walked in full spiritual alignment with THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH. This testimony underscores the necessity of breaking soul ties to close demonic doors and fully align with divine purpose.
The Accuser (Diabolos, the Devil)
Testimony: Jeremyrl's Triumph Over the Accuser

Throughout Jeremyrl's spiritual journey, she faced relentless accusations by the Accuser, also known as Diabolos. The devil used her anxieties, past traumas, and ungodly soul ties as legal grounds to accuse her in the courts of heaven. Each night, as she was attacked by alien forces, the Accuser continued to undermine her spiritual authority, attempting to keep her bound by fear and doubt.

After aligning with THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH and proclaiming the Medallion Chant, Jeremyrl took authority over these accusations. By cutting ungodly soul ties, submitting completely to THE TRINITY, and pleading the Blood of Jesus over her life, the accusations were silenced. SHEKINAIH decreed her freedom from all past accusations, and the Accuser was forced to flee.

Result: Jeremyrl's victory over the Accuser resulted in complete spiritual freedom. No longer did the devil have legal access to accuse her in the courts of heaven, and she now walks in divine authority, free from fear, doubt, or torment.
The 7 Criteria for Resurrection
Testimony: Chai Lin's 24 Hour Miracle Resurrection

Chai Lin was in a critical condition, unconscious and on the brink of death. Her family had lost hope, but SHEKINAIH, IN THE TRINITY, stepped in to intercede. After examining Chai Lin's spiritual condition, SHEKINAIH IN THE TRINITY determined that she met the 7 Criteria for Resurrection: faith, alignment with divine will, spiritual purity, and the fulfilment of her destiny. Within 24 hours, Chai Lin was miraculously restored to life.

The resurrection wasn't just physical; it was spiritual. This process renewed Chai Lin's destiny, and she was given more time to fulfill her calling within Crowned Eagles Global. Her miraculous resurrection is a testimony to the power of THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH when the 7 Criteria for Resurrection are fully met.

Result: Chai Lin remains a living testament to the resurrection power of THE TRINITY. Years later, she continues to fulfil her divine calling, with the 7 Criteria for Resurrection having played a vital role in extending her life.
Definition:
The Ark of the Covenant
Definition: The Ark of the Covenant is the sacred vessel that holds the divine laws of THE TRINITY. Guarded by THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH

as the Covering Cherub, it is from the Ark that the Mercy Seat issues divine decrees and judgment. THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH and JESUS IN/SPOKE THROUGH AARON K DAVID, the Subservient Cherub, represent the cherubim that stand on either side of the Ark, guarding its power and enforcing its laws.

The Ark of the Covenant symbolizes the ultimate authority of God's presence, divine law, and judgment on Earth. Guarded by the Cherubim of Glory, THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH and JESUS IN/SPOKE

THROUGH AARON K DAVID, the Ark serves as the spiritual focal point through which THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH releases THEIR decrees, judgments, and divine power. THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH and JESUS IN/SPOKE THROUGH AARON K DAVID act as the protectors and enforcers of divine law and serve as vessels of cosmic authority from THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH.

Key Role: The Ark of the Covenant is the ultimate symbol of divine justice and authority. It is from here that THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH releases decrees and judgments that affect the fate of nations, individuals, and cosmic forces.

Spiritual Law: Rebellion against the laws of the Ark of the Covenant results in cosmic annihilation. No one can challenge the authority that emanates from the Mercy Seat without facing immediate consequences.
Testimony: The Downfall of Dr. Cho Yonggi Context:

Dr. Cho Yonggi, the founder and former senior pastor of the world's largest congregation, the Yoido Full Gospel Church in South Korea, received a divine decree from THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH. This decree, which was issued in the Heavenly Courts, revealed a judgment concerning his life and ministry due to several critical spiritual violations. Despite his immense global influence, Cho Yonggi failed to heed the warnings and fulfill the directives outlined by THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH.
The Decree:

The decree was released through THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH on July 25, 2019, and specifically outlined the reasons for judgment, which included spiritual biases, favouritism, and the failure to walk in truth. Furthermore, Cho Yonggi's pride and his attempts to pass his anointing to his son, who was not divinely chosen to succeed him, triggered the divine judgment.
Bias Against Women: One key reason for judgment was his prejudice against female leadership, which was highlighted on the green board in heaven.

Failure to Walk in Truth: The decree revealed that Cho Yonggi's decisions were influenced by carnal thinking and a love for worldly gains, particularly finance, rather than adherence to God's divine truth.
Pride and Carnality: His pride led him away from God's will, especially when it came to choosing a successor, opting for his son despite knowing that it was against God's choice.
Judgment:

SHEKINAIH IN THE TRINITY received this decree from THE FATHER IN/SPOKE THROUGH HER and, after it was sealed and executed by THE HOLY SPIRIT IN/SPOKE THROUGH HER, co-executed the judgment with JESUS IN/SPOKE THROUGH AARON K DAVID. The decree was carried out with precision,

resulting in Cho Yonggi's immediate spiritual downfall. His ministry anointing being removed, heavenly rewards were annulled, and his spiritual authority was stripped. His and his life was terminated shortly after the decree, leading to his and his wife removal from both earthly and heavenly positions of honour.
Heavenly Mansion Demolished: As part of the divine judgment, his nearly completed heavenly mansion was destroyed, symbolizing the annulment of all rewards he had accumulated throughout his ministry.

Sent to Hades: Cho Yonggi's rebellion led to his final sentence in Hades and subsequent plunged to Gehenna, Tartarus hell fire of the Abyss, where he was sent to face the consequences of defying the decree of THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH.
Outcome:

This testimony serves as a cosmic reminder that no individual, regardless of spiritual status or influence, is exempt from the decrees of THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH. The Ark of

the Covenant, guarded by THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH and JESUS IN/SPOKE THROUGH AARON K DAVID, represents the ultimate divine order, and any defiance against it leads to severe consequences. The case of Cho Yonggi echoes throughout the global Christian community, as it highlights the unbreakable nature of God's laws and the immediate enforcement of divine justice by THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH and JESUS IN/SPOKE THROUGH AARON K DAVID.

A Prophetic Shift: After Cho Yonggi's downfall, THE TRINITY transferred his anointing to SHEKINAIH IN THE TRINITY at the 2012 Asia Pacific Conference at City Harvest Church. This marked a significant shift in God's end time agenda, as SHEKINAIH IN THE TRINITY was chosen to lead the 144,000 Last Days Army and fulfil the ultimate plan of resurrection power and divine restoration for the final remnant.
Spiritual Law:

This testimony underscores the absolute authority of THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH over both spiritual and physical realms. The Ark of the Covenant symbolizes the divine throne, where the decrees of heaven are released and executed. Any rebellion against these decrees will lead to immediate and irreversible judgment.

Key Insight: The downfall of Dr. Cho Yonggi serves as a stark reminder to all believers and leaders that rebellion against divine authority, especially that of THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH, results in swift judgment. title: The Mercy Seat: The Source of Divine Decrees

segments.text: The Mercy Seat: The Source of Divine Decrees

Definition: The Mercy Seat on the Ark of the Covenant is the ultimate place of divine authority, where THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH speaks forth their cosmic decrees. It governs the destinies of nations, individuals, and the entire cosmos. From this seat, decrees of judgment, healing, resurrection, and restoration are issued, and no power can override them. Every decree from the Mercy Seat is executed with absolute precision and finality.

Key Role: THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH sits at the Mercy Seat, acting as the mouthpiece for THE TRINITY (THE MAJOR), receiving and declaring the divine decrees of THE FATHER, THE HOLY SPIRIT, and JESUS CHRIST. AARON K DAVID, as the Subservient Cherub, co-executes these decrees, ensuring that the cosmic order is maintained, and that divine will is fully manifested on Earth and beyond. Together, they enforce the spiritual and physical laws that flow from the Mercy Seat.
Testimony of Thomas: Breaking the Generational Curse

Context: Thomas had been living under the heavy weight of a generational curse that manifested in chronic jaw and facial vein health issues, along with financial hardships. The curse stemmed from an event that occurred during his grandfather's time. His grandfather had shown no mercy to a desperate mother and child who came seeking financial help during a heavy rainstorm. The child was gravely ill, and the grandfather's refusal to help led to the child's death. The grieving mother, filled with anger and sorrow, cursed the grandfather's lineage. At the time, Thomas's grandmother was pregnant, and the curse was believed to have pierced into the unborn child, who was Thomas's father, thus affecting future generations.

THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH's Role: Through the divine revelation received by THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH from the Mercy Seat, Thomas was given prophetic instructions on how to stand in repentance for the actions of his grandfather. THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH guided Thomas in seeking forgiveness on behalf of his ancestor, addressing the merciless act that had triggered the generational curse. This repentance and realignment with divine law were essential to break the curse that had plagued his family for generations.

AARON K DAVID's Role: As the co-executor of the decree issued from the Mercy Seat, AARON K DAVID ensured that the spiritual realignment took full effect. Through divine intercession and the power of the decrees, the curse was reversed, and the generational strongholds were broken.

Result: The testimony demonstrates the immense power of the Mercy Seat and the decrees issued through THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH. Following Thomas's repentance, the curse over his family was broken,

leading to complete healing of his chronic jaw and facial vein issues. In addition, he experienced escape from potential huge financial loss through THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH'S counsel and the lingering effects of the generational curse were eradicated. This testimony highlights the transformative power of divine decrees and the authority of THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH and JESUS IN AARON K DAVID in breaking
curses and restoring families.

Expanded Impact: The ripple effects of this breakthrough were felt across Thomas's about half of his siblings. Not only were health issues resolved, but financial stability was restored, and spiritual peace was achieved. The testimony serves as a powerful reminder of the cosmic authority held by THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH at the Mercy Seat and the importance of repentance in aligning with divine will.

Expanded Impact: The breakthrough not only restored Thomas's health and finances but also reshaped the spiritual and financial future of his entire family. The testimony showcases the immense authority of THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH in overturning generational curses, restoring health and prosperity, and offering divine protection in business and personal decisions. It highlights how submission to THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH and JESUS IN AARON K DAVID opens the door for full restoration, healing, and protection.

Additional Example: Another example involves a church leader who defied a decree from the Mercy Seat. His rebellion led to the downfall of his ministry, illustrating the irrevocable nature of decrees issued from the Mercy Seat. Only through repentance and realignment with THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH was the leader spared from complete spiritual ruin.

Real World Impact: The decrees from the Mercy Seat affect every level of existence - personal, spiritual, national, and cosmic. Aligning with these decrees leads to resurrection, healing, and restoration while defying them brings swift judgment. The Mercy Seat is the point where divine justice is administered, ensuring that the cosmic balance is maintained.
The Fiery Transfer of Anointing

Definition: The Fiery Transfer of Anointing is a divine process where spiritual authority and power are passed from one leader to another by THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH. This transfer is marked by a visible and spiritual passing of the mantle, ensuring the chosen individual carries out the will of God for the end times.

over creation. Key Role: Testimony of Thomas: Breaking the Generational Curse

Any defiance results in immediate and irreversible
consequences.

title: Cosmic Annihilation: The Consequences of Defiance

segments.text: Cosmic Annihilation: The Consequences of Defiance

Defiance against divine will triggers immediate and irreversible consequences that extend across all realms - spiritual, physical, and cosmic.

Key Role: THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH holds the authority to issue decrees that maintain the cosmic balance, and any disruption caused by the rebellion is met with annihilation. AARON K DAVID co-executes these decrees to ensure the complete erasure of the individual's spiritual and physical influence, leaving no trace of their former glory.

Testimony 18: Testimony of Annihilation - A renowned church leader and their spouse, who were heads of one of the world's largest churches, defied multiple warnings and decrees issued by THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH. Despite their massive global influence, the leader's disobedience led to the immediate removal of their anointing. Within approximately two years of this defiance, both the leader and their spouse passed on, marking the end of their earthly journey. The church, once a symbol of glory, began a slow decline, and its legacy was gradually reduced, no longer holding the influence it once had. The anointing was completely removed from the church, and the personal legacy of the leaders faded into obscurity.

Result: This testimony serves as a solemn warning that even the greatest spiritual leaders are not immune to the consequences of defying THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH. The swift decline of the church and the passing of its leaders demonstrate that cosmic annihilation affects not only individuals but also the institutions they lead when they step out of alignment with divine will.

It reflects the cosmic justice system where every thought, action, and intention is measured against divine law.

Key Role: THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH acts as the Judge who assesses the balance on the Cosmic Scale, while JESUS IN/SPOKE THROUGH AARON K DAVID co-executes the decrees that arise from the judgments made. Every decision, whether to bless or to judge, is based on this scale, ensuring justice is carried out in both physical and spiritual realms.

The Cosmic Scale was tipped, resulting in catastrophic consequences for the leader's nation, including political upheaval, natural disasters, and social unrest. IN/SPOKE THROUGH AARON K DAVID work in tandem to bring people back to life with divine authority.

K DAVID. This wisdom, drawn from the Tree of Life, allowed them to make decisions that not only saved their family from financial collapse but also brought healing and spiritual revival to their loved ones.

Life's wisdom, ensuring that those aligned with God's will receive divine guidance and understanding.
The Mercy Seat: Judgment and Grace

The Divine Cosmic Shield
