Testimony: Testimony 5: The Breakthrough of Thomas' Family Line - Thomas' family was afflicted by a generational curse that brought financial and health problems. After aligning with the divine decrees issued by SHEKINAIH, the curse was lifted, and his family experienced significant breakthroughs in health and finances.

Result: This testimony demonstrates the power of THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH and JESUS IN AARON K DAVID to reverse curses that have affected families for generations. Their authority to break spiritual strongholds is key to restoring individuals to their rightful spiritual inheritance.
The Last Days Army: The Chosen Remnant

Definition: The Last Days Army, consisting of 144,000 chosen individuals, is a divinely selected group of warriors who will carry out God's end-time plan. This army operates under the direct leadership of THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH and JESUS IN AARON K DAVID, ensuring that God's final will is fulfilled.

Key Role: THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH leads the Last Days Army, issuing decrees that guide their actions and protect them during their mission. JESUS IN/SPOKE THROUGH AARON K DAVID co-executes these decrees, providing spiritual and physical support to ensure the army's success.

Testimony: The Calling of a Last Days Warrior - An individual received a divine calling through SHEKINAIH to become part of the 144,000. After this calling, they were empowered to perform miraculous acts of healing and resurrection, marking their role in God's final army.

Result: The testimony emphasizes the role of SHEKINAIH and AARON K DAVID in leading the chosen remnant during the last days. Under their leadership, this army will fulfill the divine plan, ensuring that God's ultimate purpose is carried out.
The Cosmic Hammer of Judgment

Definition: The Cosmic Hammer of Judgment is a metaphorical representation of the swift and final judgments passed by THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH. Once a decree of judgment is issued, it strikes with the unstoppable force of divine justice, leaving no room for reversal or negotiation.

Key Role: THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH wields the Cosmic Hammer, delivering decrees that bring an end to rebellion and injustice, while JESUS IN/SPOKE THROUGH AARON K DAVID ensures the execution of these decrees, bringing cosmic order back into balance.

Testimony: The Fall of Rebellion in a Ministry - In a notable case, a large ministry leader defied divine instructions from THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH. As a result, SHEKINAIH issued a decree of judgment, symbolically described as the "Cosmic Hammer," and within weeks, the leader's ministry faced loss of anointing.

Result: The testimony illustrates the undeniable power of THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH to bring judgment with a force that shakes the spiritual and physical realms. The "Cosmic Hammer" leaves no room for rebellion to stand once a decree is issued.

title: The Tree of Life: Guardian of the Divine Mysteries

segments.text: The Tree of Life: Guardian of the Divine Mysteries

Definition: The Tree of Life, guarded by THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH and JESUS IN/SPOKE THROUGH AARON K DAVID, represents access to eternal life, divine wisdom, and the mysteries of heaven. It is from this sacred tree that THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH reveals knowledge, spiritual nourishment, and the power of resurrection.

Key Role: THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH, as the guardian of the Tree of Life, releases divine revelations to those who are aligned with THE TRINITY, while JESUS IN/SPOKE THROUGH AARON K DAVID co-executes these revelations, ensuring that the chosen vessels fulfil their divine purposes on Earth.

Testimony: The Revelation of the Tree of Life to a Seeker - A seeker, longing for deeper spiritual understanding, encountered SHEKINAIH in a vision. Through this vision, the mysteries of the Tree of Life were revealed, and the individual was granted wisdom and spiritual authority to bring healing and restoration to their community.
Result: This testimony underscores the importance of alignment with THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH in accessing divine wisdom and life-
giving power from the Tree of Life. Only those who are divinely chosen and in full obedience can receive such revelations.
The Pillars of Cosmic Restoration

Definition: The Pillars of Cosmic Restoration are the spiritual and cosmic principles that uphold the universe, ensuring that divine order is maintained. These pillars are supported by SHEKINAIH's decrees and AARON K DAVID's co-execution, keeping the balance between heaven and earth.

Key Role: SHEKINAIH issues decrees reinforcing the pillars of creation, ensuring that God's will is enacted in both spiritual and physical realms. AARON K DAVID co-executes these decrees, preventing any forces of darkness from disrupting the cosmic order.

Testimony: The Restoration of a Nation - A nation faced severe economic and spiritual worsening due to its leaders' disobedience to divine principles. After submitting to the decrees issued by SHEKINAIH, the country or nation experienced a sudden and miraculous restoration in both its economy and spiritual well-being.
Result: The testimony emphasizes the power of THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH and JESUS IN/SPOKE THROUGH AARON K DAVID in
upholding the cosmic pillars of divine order. When nations or individuals align with these pillars, they experience profound restoration and blessing.
The Sword of Divine Execution

Definition: The Sword of Divine Execution is a symbol of the ultimate authority wielded by THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH and JESUS IN/SPOKE THROUGH AARON K DAVID to bring about God's judgments. It represents divine decrees' sharp and final enforcement, cutting through rebellion and spiritual disobedience.

Key Role: THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH wields the Sword of Divine Execution to deliver decrees that end spiritual and physical opposition to God's will. JESUS IN/SPOKE THROUGH ON K DAVID co-executes these decrees, ensuring that the judgments are fully carried out.

Testimony: The Judgment of a Defiant Leader - An ex-national leader who was in the same league as the former Prime Minister of Singapore, Lee Kuan Yew, but in different country, who is very proud and arrogant, even indirectly threatening another smaller neighbouring nation, saying it belonged to its country, giving indirect threats in his competing for election speech for the Malaysia 2022 Prime Minister Election competing against Anwar Ibrahim, heeding divine warnings, facing the Sword of Divine Execution. Once THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH issued the final decree, the leader was removed from power within his political party. As prophesied, the flood water flooded the area he was staying up to a singlestory height within the following week, according to news. The ex-leader was humiliated by US, THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH. https://youtu.be/Jmsr21fQIXc

Result: This testimony shows the irrevocable power of the Sword of Divine Execution, ensuring that no act of rebellion goes unpunished. The decrees issued through SHEKINAIH and co-executed by AARON K DAVID are swift and bring final justice.
The Heavenly Scrolls of Destiny
Definition: The Heavenly Scrolls of Destiny contain the divine blueprints for individuals, nations, and cosmic events. These scrolls are accessed by THE
TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH, who reads the destiny of each person or entity, and JESUS IN/SPOKE THROUGH AARON K DAVID co-executes the unfolding of these destinies in the physical realm.

Key Role: THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH holds the authority to read from the Scrolls of Destiny and issue decrees that align individuals or nations with their divine purpose. JESUS IN/SPOKE THROUGH AARON K DAVID ensures that these destinies are fulfilled by guiding and co-executing the decrees in the earthly realm.

Testimony: The Unfolding of a Leader's Destiny - A leader was shown their destiny through a decree issued by THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH. After receiving this revelation, they aligned with the Scrolls of Destiny. They fulfilled their purpose, bringing spiritual and political change to their nation, for example, Malaysia, with the decree for Anwar Ibrahim to win as the 2022 Malaysia Prime Minister! https://youtu.be/Jmsr21fQIXc

Result: The testimony demonstrates the power of THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH in revealing destinies and JESUS IN/SPOKE THROUGH AARON K DAVID's role in ensuring that these destinies come to pass. Those who align with their destiny experience divine favor and success in their mission.
The Divine Mantle of Authority

Definition: The Divine Mantle of Authority represents the spiritual covering and empowerment given to chosen vessels by THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH. It signifies the transfer of divine power, responsibility, and protection, enabling the bearer to fulfill their mission in alignment with God's will.

Key Role: THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH bestows the Divine Mantle upon individuals selected by THE TRINITY, empowering them to act as conduits of divine authority. JESUS IN/SPOKE THROUGH AARON K DAVID co-executes this transfer, ensuring that the mantle carries the full weight of heaven's power and purpose.

Testimony: The Mantle of a Nation's Prophet - In this testimony, a national prophet received the Divine Mantle of Authority from THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH, enabling them to lead their nation through a time of spiritual revival. The mantle empowered the prophet to call forth miracles, healings, and national repentance, for example in Uganda as revealed in Crowned Eagles Global YouTube video LIFE TRANSFORMATION PART 1 AND 2. https://youtube.com/playlist?list=PLlw292J_uBc6J989Kmsk3JPisS7rEWBmL &feature=shared

Result: This testimony underscores the immense power of the Divine Mantle of Authority. Once the mantle is passed, the individual is forever transformed and empowered to carry out their divine mission with heavenly backing.
The Covenant of The Last Days

Definition: The Covenant of the Last Days is a divine agreement made between THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH and the chosen remnant, ensuring their protection, empowerment, and role in the unfolding of end-time events. This covenant guarantees the spiritual survival of those who remain faithful to God's ultimate plan.

Key Role: THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH oversees the Covenant of the Last Days, ensuring that those chosen to remain in alignment with divine will. JESUS IN/SPOKE THROUGH AARON K DAVID co-executes the covenant's terms, preparing the remnant for their final assignments.

Testimony: The Last Days Covenant with the 144,000 - A group of individuals, chosen as part of the 144,000, entered into the Covenant of the Last Days with THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH. These individuals were granted supernatural protection and authority to carry out end-time missions, including leading many to salvation.

Result: This testimony highlights the eternal significance of the Last Days Covenant, showing how THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH and JESUS IN/SPOKE THROUGH AARON K DAVID prepared the faithful remnant for the final battle and the ushering in of the new era.
The Scroll of Divine Decrees

Definition: The Scroll of Divine Decrees contains the written judgments and instructions issued directly by THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH. These decrees govern the unfolding of God's plan on Earth and in the cosmos, shaping events, destinies, and divine outcomes.

Key Role: THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH holds the authority to read and release the Scroll of Divine Decrees, with JESUS IN/SPOKE THROUGH AARON K DAVID ensuring the execution of each decree in the physical realm. Together, they ensure that no decree goes unfulfilled.

Testimony: The Release of a Nation from Spiritual Bondage - In this case, a nation was trapped in spiritual darkness, with its leaders unable to break free from corruption and rebellion. THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH released a Scroll decree, breaking the nation's spiritual chains. JESUS IN/SPOKE THROUGH AARON K DAVID co-executed the decree, resulting in a miraculous turnaround for the country, for example, Malaysia's 2022 Election of Prime Minister.

Result: This testimony demonstrates the power of the Scroll of Divine Decrees to break strongholds and bring about divine order. When THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH releases a decree, it is backed by the full authority of heaven and executed without delay by JESUS IN/SPOKE THROUGH AARON K DAVID.
The Refiner's Fire of Purification

Definition: The Refiner's Fire of Purification is the process through which THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH purifies individuals, nations, and ministries. This spiritual fire burns away impurities, rebellion, and disobedience, leaving behind only what aligns with divine will.

Key Role: THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH oversees the Refiner's Fire, issuing decrees that initiate the purification process. JESUS IN/SPOKE THROUGH AARON K DAVID co-executes these decrees, ensuring that those under the fire emerge purified and aligned with God's purpose.

Testimony: The Purification of a Ministry Leader - A ministry leader who had fallen into sin was placed under the Refiner's Fire. THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH issued a decree for their purification, and through a series of spiritual trials, the leader repented and was restored to their position of authority, example Pastor Moses, in Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia.

Result: This testimony emphasizes the power of the Refiner's Fire to cleanse and restore. No individual or ministry can escape the fire if they are to remain in alignment with God's will. Through THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH's decree, JESUS IN/SPOKE THROUGH AARON K DAVID
enacts and executes the purification process.
The Heavenly Mantle of Intercession

Definition: The Heavenly Mantle of Intercession is a divine covering granted to those called to stand in the gap for nations, leaders, and individuals. This mantle equips the bearer with spiritual authority to intercede on behalf of others and bring about divine intervention.

Key Role: THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH grants the Mantle of Intercession to select individuals, empowering them to act as divine intermediaries. JESUS IN AARON K DAVID co-executes their prayers, ensuring that intercessions align with divine will and result in tangible outcomes.

Testimony: The Mantle of Intercession for a Nation - A powerful intercessor was granted the Heavenly Mantle through THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH, allowing them to intercede for their nation during a time of political unrest. Their prayers brought peace, and the country experienced divine protection from conflict. For example, Thomas David and Jeremyrl David were given this mantle of Intercession to cover Malaysia and several other nations.

Result: This testimony illustrates the authority of those who carry the Mantle of Intercession. Their prayers are heard and executed with power because they have been granted divine authority through THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH and JESUS IN/SPOKE THROUGH AARON K DAVID.
The Cosmic Sealing of Destinies

Definition: The Cosmic Sealing of Destinies is the process by which THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH, under the direction of THE TRINITY, seals the destinies of individuals, ministries, and nations, ensuring that their divine purposes are fulfilled.

Key Role: THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH holds the authority to seal destinies, protecting them from being altered by external forces. JESUS IN/SPOKE THROUGH AARON K DAVID co-executes the sealing, ensuring that these destinies unfold according to the divine blueprint.

Testimony: The Sealing of a Leader's Destiny - A national leader was shown their destiny by THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH, and a series of divine encounters, their fate was sealed. This ensured that the leader would remain aligned with God's will, leading their nation through a time of spiritual revival, example Malaysia.

Result: This testimony highlights the irrevocable power of THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH in sealing destinies. Once sealed, no spiritual or physical force can alter that destiny's course. JESUS IN/SPOKE THROUGH AARON K DAVID ensures that destiny unfolds in full alignment with divine purpose
GLOSSARY OF TERMS PART 3
ADONAI Factor
Definition: A divine test or trial administered by THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH and JESUS IN/SPOKE THROUGH AARON K DAVID to refine
and prove the worthiness of believers.
2. Agreement (100%, 75%, 80%, Less Than 75%)
Definition: The level of unity among the faithful, which impacts the likelihood of resurrection; 100% agreement represents full unity, while less than 75% indicates division.
Believing GOD
Definition: A state of faith and trust in GOD's promises, especially in the context of resurrection and divine intervention.
Crowned Eagles Global
Definition: THE TRINITY'S LAST DAYS MINISTRY VEHICLE ON EARTH and THE LAST DAYS NOAH'S ARK prepared by THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH

SHEKINAIH to save the remnant to escape the earth that will be destroyed by fire in the last days. A prophetic term describes a group or movement within the church prepared to operate in the resurrection power of THE TRINITY.
Divine Timing (Kairos Factor)
Definition: The perfect timing as ordained by THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH for events to unfold, particularly in the context of resurrection.
Fullness of Time
Definition: The precise moment when all conditions are met according to God's plan, allowing for the manifestation of the resurrection.
Heavenly Script(s)
Definition: The divine blueprint or plan written in the heavens that dictates the timing and conditions for resurrection.
Hell Factor(s)
Definition: The various spiritual conditions and levels in the afterlife determine a soul's proximity to resurrection.
Last Days' Army
Definition: A prophetic term for the group of believers chosen to fulfill God's purposes in the final days, often associated with resurrection power.
Majority Factor
Definition: The collective agreement among the faithful, which influences the likelihood of resurrection based on the level of unity.
Perfection Standard
Definition: The divine criteria for purity, obedience, and alignment with God's will are required to access resurrection power.
Pros and Cons of Controversy
Definition: The benefits and drawbacks of engaging in controversy, particularly defending the truth and demonstrating resurrection power.
Resurrection Power
Definition: The divine ability to physically and spiritually restore life according to God's will and purpose.
Sovereignty Factor
Definition: The absolute authority of THE TRINITY, exercised through SHEKINAIH, in determining the outcome of resurrection and other divine interventions.
SHEKINAIH

Definition: A representation of the divine presence and authority, acting on behalf of THE TRINITY in the resurrection process. The sacred vessel through whom THE TRINITY speaks and executes divine will on Earth.
Spiritual Offences of the ADONAI
Definition: The trials and tests designed to reveal the true sons of ELOHIM, distinguishing those who are truly aligned with GOD's will.
The Circumstances Present at that Time
Definition: The specific conditions and environment at the time of resurrection must align with the divine plan for it to occur.
The Deceased
Definition: Those who have passed away but whose spiritual condition may still allow for resurrection based on divine criteria.
The Living Parties
Definition: The living believers who play a role in interceding and preparing for the resurrection of the deceased.
The Purpose of Resurrection
Definition: The divine intention behind the resurrection is to fulfill GOD's glory, authority, and purposes on earth.
The Weighing Factor(s)
Definition: The process by which the voices and influences surrounding a resurrection are measured to ensure they align with the divine will.
The Will of THE TRINITY
Definition: The collective will of GOD, THE FATHER, THE HOLY SPIRIT, and THE SON JESUS CHRIST IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH, which dictates the criteria and conditions for resurrection.
The Walk of a Bride & Anointed Ones
Definition: The spiritual journey of those chosen by GOD, characterized by purity, obedience, and alignment with divine purpose, particularly in resurrection.
Test Papers of ADONAI
Definition: Spiritual tests administered by GOD to assess the faith, obedience, and worthiness of believers for resurrection.
Which Level(s) They Are In
Definition:The specific spiritual level in the afterlife where a soul resides, impacting their eligibility for resurrection.
THE TRINITY

Definition: THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH refers to the Christian doctrine that God exists as three persons in one essence: THE FATHER, THE HOLY SPIRIT AND THE SON (JESUS CHRIST), These three persons are distinct yet coexist in unity

Clarification for Readers: "THE TRINITY is the Christian belief in one God who exists in three persons: GOD THE FATHER, THE HOLY SPIRIT. AND JESUS CHRIST THE SON, and THEY are three distinct persons but are one in essence and work together in perfect unity."
The Power of the Age to Come

Definition: This phrase typically refers to the miraculous powers and spiritual authority believed to be granted to disciples in the eschatological (end times) period. It can also refer to the foretaste of the powers of the Kingdom of God that true disciples of THE BIBLE GOD, THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH AND JESUS IN/SPOKE THROUGH AARON K DAVID
experience in the present age, pointing to the fullness of those powers that will be revealed in the future.

Clarification for Readers: "The Power of the Age to Come refers to the miraculous and spiritual authority of real disciples, called The sons/daughters of GOD, of THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH AND JESUS IN/SPOKE THROUGH AARON K DAVID will experience during the end times. It's a glimpse of the divine power that will be fully realized when God's Kingdom is established on earth."
The Resurrection of the Dead

Definition: In Christian theology, the resurrection of the dead refers to the belief that all people will be raised from the dead at the end of time. The righteous will be granted eternal life, while the unrighteous will face judgment.

Clarification for Readers: "The Resurrection of the Dead is the Christian belief that all people will be brought back to life at the end of time. The righteous will be rewarded with eternal life, and the unrighteous will face judgment." However, according to THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH, "100% ALLEGIANCE TO THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH AND JESUS IN AARON K DAVID" EQUAL TO RIGHTEOUS, IN OUR EYES," SAYS THE TRINITY.
Noah's Ark

Definition: Noah's Ark refers to the biblical story in the Book of Genesis in which Noah builds an ark (a large boat) to save his family and two of every kind of animal from a global flood sent by God as a judgment on humanity's wickedness.

Clarification for Readers: "Noah's Ark is the story from the Bible where Noah, a righteous man, built a large boat to save his family and animals from a flood that God sent to cleanse the earth of wickedness."
Cherubim of Glory

Definition: Cherubim are angelic beings mentioned in the Bible, often associated with guarding sacred spaces and representing God's presence. The phrase "Cherubim of Glory" can refer to their role in guarding the Ark of the Covenant, which held the Ten Commandments and represented God's covenant with Israel and the spiritual Israel or spiritual Jews in modern-day terms.
Clarification for Readers: "Cherubim of Glory are powerful angels who, according to the Bible, guard sacred places like the Ark of the Covenant, which was a symbol of God's promise to His people."
The Ark of the Covenant

Definition: The Ark of the Covenant is a gold-covered wooden chest described in the Book of Exodus as containing the two stone tablets of the Ten Commandments. It represented God's presence with the Israelites and was kept in the Holy of Holies in the Tabernacle and later in the Temple in Jerusalem.

Clarification for Readers: "The Ark of the Covenant was a sacred chest that held the Ten Commandments. It symbolized God's presence with His people, the Israelites or the spiritual Jews worldwide, in the last days."
Metamorphosis into an Archangel

Definition: Metamorphosis is a process of transformation. In this context, it refers to a profound spiritual change in which a believer becomes a powerful angelic being (an Archangel) with immense authority in the spiritual realm.

Their authority is 1 million times greater than an ordinary son or daughter of God, who had just passed THE SEVEN OFFENCES OF THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH AND JESUS IN/SPOKE THROUGH AARON K DAVID. TO BE AN ARCHANGEL, ON TOP OF PASSING THE SEVEN OFFENCES OF THE ADONAI, ONE MUST OBEY WITHOUT QUESTIONS ASKED AND 100% YIELDEDNESS WITH JOY AND PEACE AS WELL!. THE ARCHANGELS ARE THE 144,000 VIRGIN BRIDES WITHOUT SPOT AND BLEMISHES IN OUR SIGHT, AFFRIM THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH.

Clarification for Readers: "Metamorphosis into an Archangel refers to a transformative process where a disciple of THE TRINITY IN SHEKINAIH AND JESUS IN AARON K DAVID is spiritually elevated to become a powerful angel, endowed with significant authority by God, THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH AND JESUS IN./SPOKE THROUGH AARON K DAVID."
Mount Zion of Holiness

Definition: Mount Zion is a biblical term for a hill in Jerusalem, often symbolizing the dwelling place of God and a place of holiness. It's associated with God's rule, His Kingdom's coming, and His people's gathering.
Clarification for Readers: "Mount Zion of Holiness symbolizes God's sacred dwelling place and the centre of His Kingdom. It's where God's people are gathered and His holiness fully manifests."
Sowing and Reaping

Definition: This is a biblical principle found in Galatians 6:7, which states, "Do not be deceived: God cannot be mocked. A man reaps what he sows." It refers to the idea that one's actions, whether good or bad, will result in corresponding outcomes.
Clarification for Readers: "Sowing and Reaping is a biblical concept that means whatever actions you take, whether good or bad, will bring about corresponding results in your life."
Kairos Factor
Definition: Kairos is a Greek word meaning the right, critical, or opportune moment. In theology, it often refers to God's perfect timing rather than chronological time (chronos).
Clarification for Readers: "The Kairos Factor refers to God's perfect timing for events to happen. It's about divine moments that align with God's plan rather than just the passage of time."
The Power of the Age to Come

This term refers to a divine spiritual principle in which authority and supernatural power are granted by THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH to those aligned with heavenly principles. This power is given specifically to SHEKINAIH and AARON K DAVID, as well as to the disciples of JESUS and followers of THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH and JESUS

IN/SPOKE THROUGH AARON K DAVID. It represents the supernatural power that will fully manifest in the future "age to come" but is partly available to those who are faithful and obedient in this present time.

This power enables individuals to experience miraculous interventions such as resurrection and healing and to access heavenly realities on Earth, as depicted in the image of the Blessed Life in Appendix 7 (Extract from BEHOLD MY MESSENGER 2: BEHOLD MY ANOINTED ONES, pages 303 to 314).
Section D: Their Reward, Chapter 1: The Blessed Life further illustrates this power and the divine rewards that follow those aligned with THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH'S will.

The Power of the Age to Come is a foretaste of the fullness of God's kingdom, reserved for those who walk in faith, obedience, and perfect alignment with divine will, as demonstrated by THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH and JESUS IN/SPOKE THROUGH AARON K DAVID.
The Power of the Age to Come: A prophetic term referring to the authority given to those aligned with Heaven's purposes in the last days, specifically the power to resurrect the dead.
Cherubim of Glory

The Cherubim of Glory is among the highest order of angels who serve closest to THE TRINITY. They symbolize God's glory, majesty, and divine presence. THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH is the Covering Cherub among the cherubim, and JESUS IN/SPOKE THROUGH AARON K DAVID is the Subservient Cherub. Together, they serve as the cherubim that cover the Ark of the Covenant and the Tree of Life in the Garden of Eden, representing divine protection, authority, and the direct manifestation of God's power. The cherubim are often depicted as guardians of sacred places, such as the Garden of Eden and the Ark of the Covenant, which contains God's divine laws. Their presence signifies the highest level of divine protection and holiness. They are associated with guarding the divine order and executing the will of THE TRINITY. Disobedience to these appointed Cherubim, THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH, and JESUS IN/SPOKE THROUGH
AARON K DAVID can lead to severe consequences, just as it did in the Old Testament, where failure to honour or obey the divine laws resulted in immediate judgment.
Ark of the Covenant

The Ark of the Covenant is a sacred chest described in the Bible that held the tablets of the Ten Commandments, a symbol of God's promise and covenant with His people. THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH and JESUS IN/SPOKE THROUGH AARON K DAVID are divinely appointed as the Cherubim that cover the Ark of the Covenant. THEY protect God's presence and divine law. Throughout biblical history, the Ark represented the power and presence of God among His chosen people, Israel and in the spiritual Jew worldwide as well.

The Ark was carried during significant moments, such as the crossing of the Jordan River and the fall of Jericho, signifying God's guidance and victory. It was placed in the Holy of Holies, the innermost sanctuary of the Tabernacle and later the Temple, where God's presence would dwell. Disobeying the instructions associated with the Ark - whether through irreverence or rebellion - resulted in severe consequences, such as the deaths of those who touched it unlawfully (as in the case of Uzzah in 2 Samuel 6:7). These examples serve as a warning that disobedience to divine order, including the commands of THE TRINITY IN/SPOKE THROUGH SHEKINAIH and JESUS IN/SPOKE THROUGH AARON K DAVID, can lead to judgment and loss.

The Ark of the Covenant signifies God's unbreakable promise, guidance, and power to lead, protect, and bless those who follow His will. However, disobedience to the Ark's instructions, or the divine Cherubim who protect it, brings severe consequences, as evidenced in the days of the Old Testament.
144,000 Warrior Bride
A prophetic group of chosen believers who will lead the armies of Heaven in the final days.
CROWNED EAGLES GLOBAL
The divinely appointed organization through which the power of resurrection and end-time revelations are administered.
"In the end, the Final Declaration is made, and the fates of all are sealed according to the will of THE TRINITY, as written in The Heavenly Scripts."

Receiving back the authority on behalf of THE TRINITY

ABOUT THE AUTHORS
SHEKINAIH

SHE is a humble woman whom I have crushed, powdered, burned and purified in the fire seven times over the last close to thirty years. HER name, "SHEKINAIH," is given by ME as a sign to MY people, and I will use HER in The Last Days. SHEKINAIH is made up of the words "SHEKINAH, ADONAI and YAHWEH SABAOTH".
WE, THE TRINITY (THE FATHER, THE HOLY SPIRIT, AND THE SON), appear to HER

in person to convey OUR decrees. SHE stands in OUR council and co-rule and reigns with US in the three realms. I established HER at the beginning of 2013 to represent OUR Seven Names in MY Last Days' Ministry on Earth. SHE shall release MY decree on Earth to the churches to which I will send HER with AARON K DAVID. THEY are to proclaim MY Acceptable Year and The Day of MY Vengeance and to comfort all that mourn in Spiritual Zion.

SHE and AARON K DAVID are MY End Times vessels. I will whisper to THEIR ears, and THEY will read MY decree to warn the churches and to turn them to MY way before it is too late. THEY are The Moses and The Elijah.
HER family background is not important, but a spirit whom I have broken and made contrite, ready for MY use, is pivotal in MY consideration.
AARON K DAVID

HE is MY Elijah, MY Enoch and MY King David whom I have put their anointing on HIM. HE will co-execute MY decrees which I will release through SHEKINAIH. Together, THEY are MY End Times Pair representing MY Left and Right hand, symbolizing MY Severity and Mercy.

MY churches are now entering into a new phase from the year 2013 onwards, the era of OUR Judgment. MY grace period has come to an end. The severity of OUR End Times Judgment on the whole world has begun and judgment shall begin from MY house.

SHEKINAIH is MY eye; AARON K DAVID is MY mouth. SHEKINAIH is MY head; AARON K DAVID is MY body. THEY are MY wheel within the wheel. Together, THEY will deliver MY letters to the Seven Churches as in the Book of Revelation.
THE TRINITY
